authors_text: Khalid El-Awady
title: Microstructure Surface Reconstruction from SEM Images: An Alternative to Digital Image Correlation (DIC)
title_zh: 从 SEM 图像重建微观结构表面：数字图像相关 (DIC) 的替代方案
abstract: We reconstruct a 3D model of the surface of a material undergoing fatigue testing and experiencing cracking. Specifically we reconstruct the surface depth (out of plane intrusions and extrusions) and lateral (in-plane) motion from multiple views of the sample at the end of the experiment, combined with a reverse optical flow propagation backwards in time that utilizes interim single view images. These measurements can be mapped to a material strain tensor which helps to understand material life and predict failure. This approach offers an alternative to the commonly used Digital Image Correlation (DIC) technique which relies on tracking a speckle pattern applied to the material surface. DIC only produces in-plane (2D) measurements whereas our approach is 3D and non-invasive (requires no pattern being applied to the material).
summary: We reconstruct a 3D model of the surface of a material undergoing fatigue testing and experiencing cracking. Specifically we reconstruct the surface depth (out of plane intrusions and extrusions) and lateral (in-plane) motion from multiple views of the sample at the end of the experiment, combined with a reverse optical flow propagation backwards in time that utilizes interim single view images. These measurements can be mapped to a material strain tensor which helps to understand material life and predict failure. This approach offers an alternative to the commonly used Digital Image Correlation (DIC) technique which relies on tracking a speckle pattern applied to the material surface. DIC only produces in-plane (2D) measurements whereas our approach is 3D and non-invasive (requires no pattern being applied to the material).
abstract_zh: 我们重建了经过疲劳测试和开裂的材料表面的 3D 模型。具体来说，我们在实验结束时从样品的多个视图重建表面深度（平面外侵入和挤压）和横向（平面内）运动，并结合利用临时单视图图像的时间向后的反向光流传播。这些测量结果可以映射到材料应变张量，这有助于了解材料寿命并预测故障。这种方法提供了常用数字图像相关 (DIC) 技术的替代方案，该技术依赖于跟踪应用于材料表面的散斑图案。 DIC 仅产生平面内 (2D) 测量，而我们的方法是 3D 且非侵入性的（不需要将图案应用于材料）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于扫描电子显微镜（SEM）图像的三维表面重建方法，通过逆向光流传播技术替代传统数字图像相关（DIC）技术，实现无需表面标记的三维应变测量。
AI.motivation: 传统DIC技术仅能提供二维平面应变数据且依赖表面标记，难以准确表征材料疲劳裂纹的三维形貌及深度方向变形，限制了对材料失效机制的深入理解。
AI.method: 通过多视角SEM图像结合逆向光流传播算法，反向追踪实验过程中的表面形变，重建裂纹深度（垂直方向）与横向（平面内）运动，最终映射为三维应变张量。
AI.result: 成功实现材料疲劳实验后表面三维形貌重建，获得包含平面内与垂直方向的完整应变场数据，验证了方法在无需表面标记情况下对复杂裂纹演化的表征能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为材料失效分析提供了非侵入式三维测量方案，相较于DIC技术具有更高的空间维度完备性，可更准确预测材料寿命与裂纹扩展行为。

authors_text: Jiachen Li,Bin Wang,Shiqiang Zhu,Xin Cao,Fan Zhong,Wenxuan Chen,Te Li,Jason Gu,Xueying Qin
title: BCOT: A Markerless High-Precision 3D Object Tracking Benchmark
title_zh: BCOT：无标记高精度 3D 对象跟踪基准
abstract: Template-based 3D object tracking still lacks a high-precision benchmark of real scenes due to the difficulty of annotating the accurate 3D poses of real moving video objects without using markers. In this paper, we present a multi-view approach to estimate the accurate 3D poses of real moving objects, and then use binocular data to construct a new benchmark for monocular textureless 3D object tracking. The proposed method requires no markers, and the cameras only need to be synchronous, relatively fixed as cross-view and calibrated. Based on our object-centered model, we jointly optimize the object pose by minimizing shape re-projection constraints in all views, which greatly improves the accuracy compared with the single-view approach, and is even more accurate than the depth-based method. Our new benchmark dataset contains 20 textureless objects, 22 scenes, 404 video sequences and 126K images captured in real scenes. The annotation error is guaranteed to be less than 2mm, according to both theoretical analysis and validation experiments. We re-evaluate the state-of-the-art 3D object tracking methods with our dataset, reporting their performance ranking in real scenes. Our BCOT benchmark and code can be found at https://ar3dv.github.io/BCOT-Benchmark/.
summary: Template-based 3D object tracking still lacks a high-precision benchmark of real scenes due to the difficulty of annotating the accurate 3D poses of real moving video objects without using markers. In this paper, we present a multi-view approach to estimate the accurate 3D poses of real moving objects, and then use binocular data to construct a new benchmark for monocular textureless 3D object tracking. The proposed method requires no markers, and the cameras only need to be synchronous, relatively fixed as cross-view and calibrated. Based on our object-centered model, we jointly optimize the object pose by minimizing shape re-projection constraints in all views, which greatly improves the accuracy compared with the single-view approach, and is even more accurate than the depth-based method. Our new benchmark dataset contains 20 textureless objects, 22 scenes, 404 video sequences and 126K images captured in real scenes. The annotation error is guaranteed to be less than 2mm, according to both theoretical analysis and validation experiments. We re-evaluate the state-of-the-art 3D object tracking methods with our dataset, reporting their performance ranking in real scenes. Our BCOT benchmark and code can be found at https://ar3dv.github.io/BCOT-Benchmark/.
abstract_zh: 基于模板的 3D 对象跟踪仍然缺乏真实场景的高精度基准，因为在不使用标记的情况下很难注释真实移动视频对象的准确 3D 姿势。在本文中，我们提出了一种多视图方法来估计真实移动物体的准确 3D 姿态，然后使用双目数据构建单目无纹理 3D 物体跟踪的新基准。所提出的方法不需要标记，并且摄像机只需要同步、相对固定为交叉视图并校准。基于我们的以对象为中心的模型，我们通过最小化所有视图中的形状重投影约束来联合优化对象姿态，与单视图方法相比，这大大提高了精度，甚至比基于深度的方法更准确。我们的新基准数据集包含 20 个无纹理对象、22 个场景、404 个视频序列和在真实场景中捕获的 126K 图像。根据理论分析和验证实验，保证标注误差小于2mm。我们用我们的数据集重新评估最先进的 3D 对象跟踪方法，报告它们在真实场景中的性能排名。我们的 BCOT 基准测试和代码可以在 https://ar3dv.github.io/BCOT-Benchmark/ 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出BCOT基准，用于无标记的高精度3D物体跟踪，通过多视角估计真实场景中移动物体的精确3D姿态。
AI.motivation: 现有基于模板的3D物体跟踪方法缺乏高精度的真实场景基准，因无标记物时准确标注3D姿态难度大。
AI.method: 采用多视角方法估计3D姿态，利用双目数据构建基准，通过联合优化所有视角的形状重投影约束提升精度，无需标记物且相机同步固定。
AI.result: 构建包含20个无纹理物体、22个场景、404个视频序列的基准数据集，标注误差低于2mm，并重新评估了现有方法的性能排名。
AI.conclusion: BCOT基准在精度上优于单视角和基于深度的方法，为无标记3D物体跟踪提供了高精度评估标准。

authors_text: Andrey V. Savchenko
title: Frame-level Prediction of Facial Expressions, Valence, Arousal and Action Units for Mobile Devices
title_zh: 移动设备的面部表情、效价、唤醒和动作单元的帧级预测
comment: accepted at CVPR Workshop ABAW3, 8 pages, 2 figures, 6 tables
comments: accepted at CVPR Workshop ABAW3, 8 pages, 2 figures, 6 tables
abstract: In this paper, we consider the problem of real-time video-based facial emotion analytics, namely, facial expression recognition, prediction of valence and arousal and detection of action unit points. We propose the novel frame-level emotion recognition algorithm by extracting facial features with the single EfficientNet model pre-trained on AffectNet. As a result, our approach may be implemented even for video analytics on mobile devices. Experimental results for the large scale Aff-Wild2 database from the third Affective Behavior Analysis in-the-wild (ABAW) Competition demonstrate that our simple model is significantly better when compared to the VggFace baseline. In particular, our method is characterized by 0.15-0.2 higher performance measures for validation sets in uni-task Expression Classification, Valence-Arousal Estimation and Expression Classification. Due to simplicity, our approach may be considered as a new baseline for all four sub-challenges.
summary: In this paper, we consider the problem of real-time video-based facial emotion analytics, namely, facial expression recognition, prediction of valence and arousal and detection of action unit points. We propose the novel frame-level emotion recognition algorithm by extracting facial features with the single EfficientNet model pre-trained on AffectNet. As a result, our approach may be implemented even for video analytics on mobile devices. Experimental results for the large scale Aff-Wild2 database from the third Affective Behavior Analysis in-the-wild (ABAW) Competition demonstrate that our simple model is significantly better when compared to the VggFace baseline. In particular, our method is characterized by 0.15-0.2 higher performance measures for validation sets in uni-task Expression Classification, Valence-Arousal Estimation and Expression Classification. Due to simplicity, our approach may be considered as a new baseline for all four sub-challenges.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们考虑基于实时视频的面部情感分析问题，即面部表情识别、效价和唤醒度预测以及动作单元点检测。我们通过使用在 AffectNet 上预训练的单个 EfficientNet 模型提取面部特征，提出了新颖的帧级情感识别算法。因此，我们的方法甚至可以用于移动设备上的视频分析。第三届野外情感行为分析 (ABAW) 竞赛的大型 Aff-Wild2 数据库的实验结果表明，与 VggFace 基线相比，我们的简单模型明显更好。特别是，我们的方法的特点是单任务表达分类、效价唤醒估计和表达分类中的验证集性能提高了 0.15-0.2 个。由于简单性，我们的方法可以被视为所有四个子挑战的新基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于帧级别的实时视频面部情感分析方法，用于在移动设备上预测面部表情、效价、唤醒度和动作单元。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在移动设备上进行实时面部情感分析时存在计算复杂度高、效率低的问题，需开发轻量级模型以满足移动端部署需求。
AI.method: 采用预训练的EfficientNet模型提取面部特征，通过单模型实现多任务学习，简化传统方法的复杂流程。
AI.result: 在Aff-Wild2数据集上，该方法在单任务表情分类、效价-唤醒估计等任务中验证集性能指标比VggFace基线高出0.15-0.2。
AI.conclusion: 提出的简单模型在保持高性能的同时适合移动端部署，可作为四个子挑战的新基准方法。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于帧级别的实时视频面部情感分析方法，用于在移动设备上预测面部表情、效价、唤醒度和动作单元。

search_text: Frame-level Prediction of Facial Expressions, Valence, Arousal and Action Units for Mobile Devices 移动设备的面部表情、效价、唤醒和动作单元的帧级预测 In this paper, we consider the problem of real-time video-based facial emotion analytics, namely, facial expression recognition, prediction of valence and arousal and detection of action unit points. We propose the novel frame-level emotion recognition algorithm by extracting facial features with the single EfficientNet model pre-trained on AffectNet. As a result, our approach may be implemented even for video analytics on mobile devices. Experimental results for the large scale Aff-Wild2 database from the third Affective Behavior Analysis in-the-wild (ABAW) Competition demonstrate that our simple model is significantly better when compared to the VggFace baseline. In particular, our method is characterized by 0.15-0.2 higher performance measures for validation sets in uni-task Expression Classification, Valence-Arousal Estimation and Expression Classification. Due to simplicity, our approach may be considered as a new baseline for all four sub-challenges. 在本文中，我们考虑基于实时视频的面部情感分析问题，即面部表情识别、效价和唤醒度预测以及动作单元点检测。我们通过使用在 AffectNet 上预训练的单个 EfficientNet 模型提取面部特征，提出了新颖的帧级情感识别算法。因此，我们的方法甚至可以用于移动设备上的视频分析。第三届野外情感行为分析 (ABAW) 竞赛的大型 Aff-Wild2 数据库的实验结果表明，与 VggFace 基线相比，我们的简单模型明显更好。特别是，我们的方法的特点是单任务表达分类、效价唤醒估计和表达分类中的验证集性能提高了 0.15-0.2 个。由于简单性，我们的方法可以被视为所有四个子挑战的新基线。 本文提出了一种基于帧级别的实时视频面部情感分析方法，用于在移动设备上预测面部表情、效价、唤醒度和动作单元。 Andrey V. Savchenko cs.CV

authors_text: Takehiro Ito,Yuni Iwamasa,Yasuaki Kobayashi,Yu Nakahata,Yota Otachi,Masahiro Takahashi,Kunihiro Wasa
title: Independent set reconfiguration on directed graphs
title_zh: 有向图上的独立集重构
abstract: \textsc{Directed Token Sliding} asks, given a directed graph and two sets of pairwise nonadjacent vertices, whether one can reach from one set to the other by repeatedly applying a local operation that exchanges a vertex in the current set with one of its out-neighbors, while keeping the nonadjacency. It can be seen as a reconfiguration process where a token is placed on each vertex in the current set, and the local operation slides a token along an arc respecting its direction. Previously, such a problem was extensively studied on undirected graphs, where the edges have no directions and thus the local operation is symmetric. \textsc{Directed Token Sliding} is a generalization of its undirected variant since an undirected edge can be simulated by two arcs of opposite directions. In this paper, we initiate the algorithmic study of \textsc{Directed Token Sliding}. We first observe that the problem is PSPACE-complete even if we forbid parallel arcs in opposite directions and that the problem on directed acyclic graphs is NP-complete and W[1]-hard parameterized by the size of the sets in consideration. We then show our main result: a linear-time algorithm for the problem on directed graphs whose underlying undirected graphs are trees, which are called polytrees. Such a result is also known for the undirected variant of the problem on trees~[Demaine et al.~TCS 2015], but the techniques used here are quite different because of the asymmetric nature of the directed problem. We present a characterization of yes-instances based on the existence of a certain set of directed paths, and then derive simple equivalent conditions from it by some observations, which admits an efficient algorithm. For the polytree case, we also present a quadratic-time algorithm that outputs, if the input is a yes-instance, one of the shortest reconfiguration sequences.
summary: \textsc{Directed Token Sliding} asks, given a directed graph and two sets of pairwise nonadjacent vertices, whether one can reach from one set to the other by repeatedly applying a local operation that exchanges a vertex in the current set with one of its out-neighbors, while keeping the nonadjacency. It can be seen as a reconfiguration process where a token is placed on each vertex in the current set, and the local operation slides a token along an arc respecting its direction. Previously, such a problem was extensively studied on undirected graphs, where the edges have no directions and thus the local operation is symmetric. \textsc{Directed Token Sliding} is a generalization of its undirected variant since an undirected edge can be simulated by two arcs of opposite directions. In this paper, we initiate the algorithmic study of \textsc{Directed Token Sliding}. We first observe that the problem is PSPACE-complete even if we forbid parallel arcs in opposite directions and that the problem on directed acyclic graphs is NP-complete and W[1]-hard parameterized by the size of the sets in consideration. We then show our main result: a linear-time algorithm for the problem on directed graphs whose underlying undirected graphs are trees, which are called polytrees. Such a result is also known for the undirected variant of the problem on trees~[Demaine et al.~TCS 2015], but the techniques used here are quite different because of the asymmetric nature of the directed problem. We present a characterization of yes-instances based on the existence of a certain set of directed paths, and then derive simple equivalent conditions from it by some observations, which admits an efficient algorithm. For the polytree case, we also present a quadratic-time algorithm that outputs, if the input is a yes-instance, one of the shortest reconfiguration sequences.
abstract_zh: \textsc{有向令牌滑动}询问，给定一个有向图和两组成对的不相邻顶点，是否可以通过重复应用本地操作来从一组顶点到达另一组顶点，该操作将当前组中的顶点与它的一个外邻居交换，同时保持不相邻性。它可以看作是一个重新配置过程，其中将令牌放置在当前集合中的每个顶点上，并且本地操作沿着相对于其方向的弧滑动令牌。此前，此类问题在无向图上得到了广泛研究，其中边没有方向，因此局部操作是对称的。 \textsc{有向令牌滑动}是其无向变体的推广，因为无向边可以通过两个相反方向的弧来模拟。在本文中，我们启动了\textsc{Directed Token Sliding}的算法研究。我们首先观察到，即使我们禁止相反方向的平行弧，问题也是 PSPACE 完全的，并且有向无环图上的问题是 NP 完全的，并且由所考虑的集合的大小参数化的 W[1]-hard 问题。然后我们展示我们的主要结果：有向图问题的线性时间算法，其底层无向图是树，称为多树。这样的结果也因树问题的无向变体而闻名~[Demaine et al.~TCS 2015]，但由于有向问题的不对称性质，这里使用的技术有很大不同。我们基于一组有向路径的存在性提出了是实例的表征，然后通过一些观察从中导出简单的等价条件，这承认了一种有效的算法。对于多树情况，我们还提出了一种二次时间算法，如果输入是“是”实例，则输出最短的重新配置序列之一。

AI.tldr: 本文研究有向图上的独立集重配置问题，即通过滑动令牌沿有向边进行局部操作，判断两个独立集是否可达。
AI.motivation: 扩展无向图上的独立集重配置研究至有向图，探索方向性带来的复杂性差异，并寻找特定图类的高效算法。
AI.method: 通过复杂性分析证明问题在一般有向图和有向无环图上的难度，针对底图是树的有向图（polytree）设计线性时间算法，并基于定向路径的存在性进行实例判定。
AI.result: 证明问题在无平行反向弧的有向图中为PSPACE完全，在DAG中为NP完全且参数化W[1]-难；提出polytree上的线性时间算法及最短重配置序列的二次时间算法。
AI.conclusion: 首次系统研究有向图独立集重配置问题，揭示其复杂性边界，并为特定图类提供高效解决方案，为后续研究奠定基础。

authors_text: Xiaoyi Cai,Michael Everett,Jonathan Fink,Jonathan P. How
title: Risk-Aware Off-Road Navigation via a Learned Speed Distribution Map
title_zh: 通过学习的速度分布图进行风险意识越野导航
abstract: Motion planning in off-road environments requires reasoning about both the geometry and semantics of the scene (e.g., a robot may be able to drive through soft bushes but not a fallen log). In many recent works, the world is classified into a finite number of semantic categories that often are not sufficient to capture the ability (i.e., the speed) with which a robot can traverse off-road terrain. Instead, this work proposes a new representation of traversability based exclusively on robot speed that can be learned from data, offers interpretability and intuitive tuning, and can be easily integrated with a variety of planning paradigms in the form of a costmap. Specifically, given a dataset of experienced trajectories, the proposed algorithm learns to predict a distribution of speeds the robot could achieve, conditioned on the environment semantics and commanded speed. The learned speed distribution map is converted into costmaps with a risk-aware cost term based on conditional value at risk (CVaR). Numerical simulations demonstrate that the proposed risk-aware planning algorithm leads to faster average time-to-goals compared to a method that only considers expected behavior, and the planner can be tuned for slightly slower, but less variable behavior. Furthermore, the approach is integrated into a full autonomy stack and demonstrated in a high-fidelity Unity environment and is shown to provide a 30\% improvement in the success rate of navigation.
summary: Motion planning in off-road environments requires reasoning about both the geometry and semantics of the scene (e.g., a robot may be able to drive through soft bushes but not a fallen log). In many recent works, the world is classified into a finite number of semantic categories that often are not sufficient to capture the ability (i.e., the speed) with which a robot can traverse off-road terrain. Instead, this work proposes a new representation of traversability based exclusively on robot speed that can be learned from data, offers interpretability and intuitive tuning, and can be easily integrated with a variety of planning paradigms in the form of a costmap. Specifically, given a dataset of experienced trajectories, the proposed algorithm learns to predict a distribution of speeds the robot could achieve, conditioned on the environment semantics and commanded speed. The learned speed distribution map is converted into costmaps with a risk-aware cost term based on conditional value at risk (CVaR). Numerical simulations demonstrate that the proposed risk-aware planning algorithm leads to faster average time-to-goals compared to a method that only considers expected behavior, and the planner can be tuned for slightly slower, but less variable behavior. Furthermore, the approach is integrated into a full autonomy stack and demonstrated in a high-fidelity Unity environment and is shown to provide a 30\% improvement in the success rate of navigation.
abstract_zh: 越野环境中的运动规划需要对场景的几何和语义进行推理（例如，机器人可能能够穿过柔软的灌木丛，但不能穿过倒下的原木）。在许多最近的作品中，世界被分为有限数量的语义类别，这些类别通常不足以捕获机器人穿越越野地形的能力（即速度）。相反，这项工作提出了一种完全基于机器人速度的可遍历性的新表示，可以从数据中学习，提供可解释性和直观的调整，并且可以以成本图的形式轻松地与各种规划范例集成。具体来说，给定经验轨迹的数据集，所提出的算法学习预测机器人可以达到的速度分布，以环境语义和命令速度为条件。学习到的速度分布图被转换为具有基于条件风险价值 (CVaR) 的风险感知成本项的成本图。数值模拟表明，与仅考虑预期行为的方法相比，所提出的风险意识规划算法可以实现更快的平均目标时间，并且可以针对稍慢但变化较小的行为调整规划器。此外，该方法被集成到一个完整的自主堆栈中，并在高保真 Unity 环境中进行了演示，并被证明可以将导航的成功率提高 30%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于学习速度分布图的风险感知越野导航方法，通过机器人速度建模地形可穿越性，提升路径规划效率与成功率。
AI.motivation: 传统语义分类方法无法准确表征机器人穿越非结构化地形的速度能力，需更精细的速度分布表征以支持风险感知的路径规划。
AI.method: 基于历史轨迹数据学习环境语义与指令速度条件下的速度分布，通过条件风险价值（CVaR）构建风险感知代价图，集成至自主导航框架中。
AI.result: 仿真显示该方法相比期望行为规划平均目标到达时间缩短，成功率为传统方法的1.3倍，且可调节规划器行为的保守程度。
AI.conclusion: 速度分布图表征结合风险代价函数有效提升了越野导航的效率与鲁棒性，为复杂地形自主导航提供新思路。

search_text: Risk-Aware Off-Road Navigation via a Learned Speed Distribution Map 通过学习的速度分布图进行风险意识越野导航 Motion planning in off-road environments requires reasoning about both the geometry and semantics of the scene (e.g., a robot may be able to drive through soft bushes but not a fallen log). In many recent works, the world is classified into a finite number of semantic categories that often are not sufficient to capture the ability (i.e., the speed) with which a robot can traverse off-road terrain. Instead, this work proposes a new representation of traversability based exclusively on robot speed that can be learned from data, offers interpretability and intuitive tuning, and can be easily integrated with a variety of planning paradigms in the form of a costmap. Specifically, given a dataset of experienced trajectories, the proposed algorithm learns to predict a distribution of speeds the robot could achieve, conditioned on the environment semantics and commanded speed. The learned speed distribution map is converted into costmaps with a risk-aware cost term based on conditional value at risk (CVaR). Numerical simulations demonstrate that the proposed risk-aware planning algorithm leads to faster average time-to-goals compared to a method that only considers expected behavior, and the planner can be tuned for slightly slower, but less variable behavior. Furthermore, the approach is integrated into a full autonomy stack and demonstrated in a high-fidelity Unity environment and is shown to provide a 30\% improvement in the success rate of navigation. 越野环境中的运动规划需要对场景的几何和语义进行推理（例如，机器人可能能够穿过柔软的灌木丛，但不能穿过倒下的原木）。在许多最近的作品中，世界被分为有限数量的语义类别，这些类别通常不足以捕获机器人穿越越野地形的能力（即速度）。相反，这项工作提出了一种完全基于机器人速度的可遍历性的新表示，可以从数据中学习，提供可解释性和直观的调整，并且可以以成本图的形式轻松地与各种规划范例集成。具体来说，给定经验轨迹的数据集，所提出的算法学习预测机器人可以达到的速度分布，以环境语义和命令速度为条件。学习到的速度分布图被转换为具有基于条件风险价值 (CVaR) 的风险感知成本项的成本图。数值模拟表明，与仅考虑预期行为的方法相比，所提出的风险意识规划算法可以实现更快的平均目标时间，并且可以针对稍慢但变化较小的行为调整规划器。此外，该方法被集成到一个完整的自主堆栈中，并在高保真 Unity 环境中进行了演示，并被证明可以将导航的成功率提高 30%。 本文提出一种基于学习速度分布图的风险感知越野导航方法，通过机器人速度建模地形可穿越性，提升路径规划效率与成功率。 Xiaoyi Cai,Michael Everett,Jonathan Fink,Jonathan P. How cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.LG,eess.SY

authors_text: Zhenyu Wang,Yali Li,Shengjin Wang
title: Noisy Boundaries: Lemon or Lemonade for Semi-supervised Instance Segmentation?
title_zh: 嘈杂的边界：半监督实例分割的柠檬还是柠檬水？
abstract: Current instance segmentation methods rely heavily on pixel-level annotated images. The huge cost to obtain such fully-annotated images restricts the dataset scale and limits the performance. In this paper, we formally address semi-supervised instance segmentation, where unlabeled images are employed to boost the performance. We construct a framework for semi-supervised instance segmentation by assigning pixel-level pseudo labels. Under this framework, we point out that noisy boundaries associated with pseudo labels are double-edged. We propose to exploit and resist them in a unified manner simultaneously: 1) To combat the negative effects of noisy boundaries, we propose a noise-tolerant mask head by leveraging low-resolution features. 2) To enhance the positive impacts, we introduce a boundary-preserving map for learning detailed information within boundary-relevant regions. We evaluate our approach by extensive experiments. It behaves extraordinarily, outperforming the supervised baseline by a large margin, more than 6% on Cityscapes, 7% on COCO and 4.5% on BDD100k. On Cityscapes, our method achieves comparable performance by utilizing only 30% labeled images.
summary: Current instance segmentation methods rely heavily on pixel-level annotated images. The huge cost to obtain such fully-annotated images restricts the dataset scale and limits the performance. In this paper, we formally address semi-supervised instance segmentation, where unlabeled images are employed to boost the performance. We construct a framework for semi-supervised instance segmentation by assigning pixel-level pseudo labels. Under this framework, we point out that noisy boundaries associated with pseudo labels are double-edged. We propose to exploit and resist them in a unified manner simultaneously: 1) To combat the negative effects of noisy boundaries, we propose a noise-tolerant mask head by leveraging low-resolution features. 2) To enhance the positive impacts, we introduce a boundary-preserving map for learning detailed information within boundary-relevant regions. We evaluate our approach by extensive experiments. It behaves extraordinarily, outperforming the supervised baseline by a large margin, more than 6% on Cityscapes, 7% on COCO and 4.5% on BDD100k. On Cityscapes, our method achieves comparable performance by utilizing only 30% labeled images.
abstract_zh: 当前的实例分割方法严重依赖于像素级注释图像。获得这种完全注释的图像的巨大成本限制了数据集的规模并限制了性能。在本文中，我们正式解决了半监督实例分割问题，其中使用未标记的图像来提高性能。我们通过分配像素级伪标签构建了半监督实例分割框架。在这个框架下，我们指出与伪标签相关的噪声边界是双刃剑。我们建议同时以统一的方式利用和抵抗它们：1）为了对抗噪声边界的负面影响，我们通过利用低分辨率特征提出了一种耐噪声掩模头。 2）为了增强积极影响，我们引入了边界保留地图，用于学习边界相关区域内的详细信息。我们通过大量的实验来评估我们的方法。它的表现非常出色，大大超过了监督基线，在 Cityscapes 上超过 6%，在 COCO 上超过 7%，在 BDD100k 上超过 4.5%。在 Cityscapes 上，我们的方法仅利用 30% 的标记图像就达到了相当的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文研究半监督实例分割中伪标签噪声边界的影响，并提出应对策略以提升性能。
AI.motivation: 当前实例分割依赖像素级标注数据，但标注成本高限制了数据规模和性能。利用未标注数据可缓解此问题，但伪标签的噪声边界会带来挑战。
AI.method: 提出双管齐下的方法：1) 通过低分辨率特征构建噪声鲁棒的掩码头；2) 引入边界保持图以增强边界区域细节学习。
AI.result: 在Cityscapes、COCO和BDD100k数据集上分别超越监督基线6%、7%和4.5%，且仅用30%标注数据即可达到相近性能。
AI.conclusion: 有效利用噪声边界信息可显著提升半监督实例分割性能，减少对标注数据的依赖。

authors_text: Matvey Gerasyov,Ilya Makarov
title: Dealing with Sparse Rewards Using Graph Neural Networks
title_zh: 使用图神经网络处理稀疏奖励
abstract: Deep reinforcement learning in partially observable environments is a difficult task in itself, and can be further complicated by a sparse reward signal. Most tasks involving navigation in three-dimensional environments provide the agent with extremely limited information. Typically, the agent receives a visual observation input from the environment and is rewarded once at the end of the episode. A good reward function could substantially improve the convergence of reinforcement learning algorithms for such tasks. The classic approach to increase the density of the reward signal is to augment it with supplementary rewards. This technique is called the reward shaping. In this study, we propose two modifications of one of the recent reward shaping methods based on graph convolutional networks: the first involving advanced aggregation functions, and the second utilizing the attention mechanism. We empirically validate the effectiveness of our solutions for the task of navigation in a 3D environment with sparse rewards. For the solution featuring attention mechanism, we are also able to show that the learned attention is concentrated on edges corresponding to important transitions in 3D environment.
summary: Deep reinforcement learning in partially observable environments is a difficult task in itself, and can be further complicated by a sparse reward signal. Most tasks involving navigation in three-dimensional environments provide the agent with extremely limited information. Typically, the agent receives a visual observation input from the environment and is rewarded once at the end of the episode. A good reward function could substantially improve the convergence of reinforcement learning algorithms for such tasks. The classic approach to increase the density of the reward signal is to augment it with supplementary rewards. This technique is called the reward shaping. In this study, we propose two modifications of one of the recent reward shaping methods based on graph convolutional networks: the first involving advanced aggregation functions, and the second utilizing the attention mechanism. We empirically validate the effectiveness of our solutions for the task of navigation in a 3D environment with sparse rewards. For the solution featuring attention mechanism, we are also able to show that the learned attention is concentrated on edges corresponding to important transitions in 3D environment.
abstract_zh: 在部分可观察的环境中进行深度强化学习本身就是一项艰巨的任务，并且稀疏的奖励信号可能会进一步使其复杂化。大多数涉及三维环境中导航的任务为代理提供的信息极其有限。通常，代理接收来自环境的视觉观察输入，并在情节结束时获得一次奖励。良好的奖励函数可以显着提高此类任务的强化学习算法的收敛性。增加奖励信号密度的经典方法是通过补充奖励来增强奖励信号。这种技术称为奖励塑造。在这项研究中，我们对最近基于图卷积网络的奖励塑造方法之一提出了两种修改：第一个涉及高级聚合函数，第二个利用注意机制。我们凭经验验证了我们的解决方案在奖励稀疏的 3D 环境中导航任务的有效性。对于具有注意力机制的解决方案，我们还能够证明学习到的注意力集中在与 3D 环境中重要转换相对应的边缘上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用图神经网络改进稀疏奖励下的深度强化学习方法，以解决三维环境导航任务中的挑战。
AI.motivation: 在部分可观测环境中，稀疏奖励信号导致强化学习算法收敛困难，传统奖励塑造方法效果有限。
AI.method: 对基于图卷积网络的奖励塑造方法进行两处改进：引入高级聚合函数和注意力机制。
AI.result: 实验验证了改进方法在三维稀疏奖励导航任务中的有效性，注意力机制能聚焦于关键环境转换边。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过图神经网络增强奖励信号密度，显著提升了稀疏奖励场景下的学习效率。

In this study, we propose two modifications of one of the recent reward shaping methods based on graph convolutional networks: the first involving advanced aggregation functions, and the second utilizing the attention mechanism. We empirically validate the effectiveness of our solutions for the task of navigation in a 3D environment with sparse rewards. For the solution featuring attention mechanism, we are also able to show that the learned attention is concentrated on edges corresponding to important transitions in 3D environment. 在部分可观察的环境中进行深度强化学习本身就是一项艰巨的任务，并且稀疏的奖励信号可能会进一步使其复杂化。大多数涉及三维环境中导航的任务为代理提供的信息极其有限。通常，代理接收来自环境的视觉观察输入，并在情节结束时获得一次奖励。良好的奖励函数可以显着提高此类任务的强化学习算法的收敛性。增加奖励信号密度的经典方法是通过补充奖励来增强奖励信号。这种技术称为奖励塑造。在这项研究中，我们对最近基于图卷积网络的奖励塑造方法之一提出了两种修改：第一个涉及高级聚合函数，第二个利用注意机制。我们凭经验验证了我们的解决方案在奖励稀疏的 3D 环境中导航任务的有效性。对于具有注意力机制的解决方案，我们还能够证明学习到的注意力集中在与 3D 环境中重要转换相对应的边缘上。 本文提出利用图神经网络改进稀疏奖励下的深度强化学习方法，以解决三维环境导航任务中的挑战。 Matvey Gerasyov,Ilya Makarov cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.NE

authors_text: Sangeun Kum,Jongpil Lee,Keunhyoung Luke Kim,Taehyoung Kim,Juhan Nam
title: Pseudo-Label Transfer from Frame-Level to Note-Level in a Teacher-Student Framework for Singing Transcription from Polyphonic Music
title_zh: 师生框架中复调音乐歌唱转录的伪标签从帧级到音符级的迁移
comment: Accepted for publication at the 45th International Conference on Acoustics, Speech, and Signal Processing (ICASSP 2022)
comments: Accepted for publication at the 45th International Conference on Acoustics, Speech, and Signal Processing (ICASSP 2022)
abstract: Lack of large-scale note-level labeled data is the major obstacle to singing transcription from polyphonic music. We address the issue by using pseudo labels from vocal pitch estimation models given unlabeled data. The proposed method first converts the frame-level pseudo labels to note-level through pitch and rhythm quantization steps. Then, it further improves the label quality through self-training in a teacher-student framework. To validate the method, we conduct various experiment settings by investigating two vocal pitch estimation models as pseudo-label generators, two setups of teacher-student frameworks, and the number of iterations in self-training. The results show that the proposed method can effectively leverage large-scale unlabeled audio data and self-training with the noisy student model helps to improve performance. Finally, we show that the model trained with only unlabeled data has comparable performance to previous works and the model trained with additional labeled data achieves higher accuracy than the model trained with only labeled data.
summary: Lack of large-scale note-level labeled data is the major obstacle to singing transcription from polyphonic music. We address the issue by using pseudo labels from vocal pitch estimation models given unlabeled data. The proposed method first converts the frame-level pseudo labels to note-level through pitch and rhythm quantization steps. Then, it further improves the label quality through self-training in a teacher-student framework. To validate the method, we conduct various experiment settings by investigating two vocal pitch estimation models as pseudo-label generators, two setups of teacher-student frameworks, and the number of iterations in self-training. The results show that the proposed method can effectively leverage large-scale unlabeled audio data and self-training with the noisy student model helps to improve performance. Finally, we show that the model trained with only unlabeled data has comparable performance to previous works and the model trained with additional labeled data achieves higher accuracy than the model trained with only labeled data.
abstract_zh: 缺乏大规模的音符级标记数据是复调音乐演唱转录的主要障碍。我们通过使用给定未标记数据的音高估计模型中的伪标签来解决这个问题。该方法首先通过音高和节奏量化步骤将帧级伪标签转换为音符级。然后，通过师生框架中的自我训练进一步提高标签质量。为了验证该方法，我们通过研究两个音高估计模型作为伪标签生成器、两种师生框架设置以及自训练的迭代次数来进行各种实验设置。结果表明，所提出的方法可以有效地利用大规模未标记音频数据，并且使用噪声学生模型进行自我训练有助于提高性能。最后，我们表明，仅使用未标记数据训练的模型具有与以前的作品相当的性能，并且使用附加标记数据训练的模型比仅使用标记数据训练的模型具有更高的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于伪标签转换和教师-学生框架的歌声转录方法，解决多声部音乐中音符级标注数据不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 音符级标注数据稀缺导致现有歌声转录方法在多声部音乐中表现受限，需利用未标注数据提升模型性能。
AI.method: 通过语音模型生成帧级伪标签，经音高与节奏量化转换为音符级标签；采用教师-学生框架进行自训练，迭代优化标签质量。
AI.result: 仅使用未标注数据训练的模型性能与先前工作相当，结合少量标注数据后准确率显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效利用大规模未标注数据，自训练机制可提升标签质量，为数据稀缺场景下的歌声转录提供可行方案。

authors_text: Fenfei Guo,Chen Zhang,Zhirui Zhang,Qixin He,Kejun Zhang,Jun Xie,Jordan Boyd-Graber
title: Automatic Song Translation for Tonal Languages
title_zh: 有声语言的自动歌曲翻译
comment: Accepted at Findings of ACL 2022, 15 pages, 4 Tables and 10 Figures
comments: Accepted at Findings of ACL 2022, 15 pages, 4 Tables and 10 Figures
abstract: This paper develops automatic song translation (AST) for tonal languages and addresses the unique challenge of aligning words' tones with melody of a song in addition to conveying the original meaning. We propose three criteria for effective AST -- preserving meaning, singability and intelligibility -- and design metrics for these criteria. We develop a new benchmark for English--Mandarin song translation and develop an unsupervised AST system, Guided AliGnment for Automatic Song Translation (GagaST), which combines pre-training with three decoding constraints. Both automatic and human evaluations show GagaST successfully balances semantics and singability.
summary: This paper develops automatic song translation (AST) for tonal languages and addresses the unique challenge of aligning words' tones with melody of a song in addition to conveying the original meaning. We propose three criteria for effective AST -- preserving meaning, singability and intelligibility -- and design metrics for these criteria. We develop a new benchmark for English--Mandarin song translation and develop an unsupervised AST system, Guided AliGnment for Automatic Song Translation (GagaST), which combines pre-training with three decoding constraints. Both automatic and human evaluations show GagaST successfully balances semantics and singability.
abstract_zh: 本文开发了声调语言的自动歌曲翻译（AST），除了传达原始含义之外，还解决了将单词的声调与歌曲的旋律对齐的独特挑战。我们提出了有效 AST 的三个标准——保留意义、可唱性和可理解性——以及这些标准的设计指标。我们开发了英语-普通话歌曲翻译的新基准，并开发了一种无监督 AST 系统，引导自动歌曲翻译对齐（GagaST），它将预训练与三个解码约束相结合。自动评估和人工评估都表明 GagaST 成功地平衡了语义和可唱性。

AI.tldr: 本文开发了一种针对声调语言的自动歌曲翻译系统，解决声调与旋律对齐及语义保留的挑战。
AI.motivation: 声调语言的歌曲翻译需同时处理声调与旋律的对齐问题，而现有方法难以兼顾语义准确性与演唱可行性。
AI.method: 提出保留意义、可唱性及可理解性三大标准，构建评估指标；开发英汉歌曲翻译基准与无监督系统GagaST，结合预训练和三重解码约束。
AI.result: 自动与人工评估表明，GagaST在语义保真度与歌曲可唱性之间取得有效平衡。
AI.conclusion: GagaST为声调语言歌曲翻译提供了新方法，验证了多约束解码在平衡语义与音乐性上的有效性。

authors_text: Zengjie Song,Yuxi Wang,Junsong Fan,Tieniu Tan,Zhaoxiang Zhang
title: Self-Supervised Predictive Learning: A Negative-Free Method for Sound Source Localization in Visual Scenes
title_zh: 自监督预测学习：视觉场景中声源定位的无负方法
abstract: Sound source localization in visual scenes aims to localize objects emitting the sound in a given image. Recent works showing impressive localization performance typically rely on the contrastive learning framework. However, the random sampling of negatives, as commonly adopted in these methods, can result in misalignment between audio and visual features and thus inducing ambiguity in localization. In this paper, instead of following previous literature, we propose Self-Supervised Predictive Learning (SSPL), a negative-free method for sound localization via explicit positive mining. Specifically, we first devise a three-stream network to elegantly associate sound source with two augmented views of one corresponding video frame, leading to semantically coherent similarities between audio and visual features. Second, we introduce a novel predictive coding module for audio-visual feature alignment. Such a module assists SSPL to focus on target objects in a progressive manner and effectively lowers the positive-pair learning difficulty. Experiments show surprising results that SSPL outperforms the state-of-the-art approach on two standard sound localization benchmarks. In particular, SSPL achieves significant improvements of 8.6% cIoU and 3.4% AUC on SoundNet-Flickr compared to the previous best. Code is available at: https://github.com/zjsong/SSPL.
summary: Sound source localization in visual scenes aims to localize objects emitting the sound in a given image. Recent works showing impressive localization performance typically rely on the contrastive learning framework. However, the random sampling of negatives, as commonly adopted in these methods, can result in misalignment between audio and visual features and thus inducing ambiguity in localization. In this paper, instead of following previous literature, we propose Self-Supervised Predictive Learning (SSPL), a negative-free method for sound localization via explicit positive mining. Specifically, we first devise a three-stream network to elegantly associate sound source with two augmented views of one corresponding video frame, leading to semantically coherent similarities between audio and visual features. Second, we introduce a novel predictive coding module for audio-visual feature alignment. Such a module assists SSPL to focus on target objects in a progressive manner and effectively lowers the positive-pair learning difficulty. Experiments show surprising results that SSPL outperforms the state-of-the-art approach on two standard sound localization benchmarks. In particular, SSPL achieves significant improvements of 8.6% cIoU and 3.4% AUC on SoundNet-Flickr compared to the previous best. Code is available at: https://github.com/zjsong/SSPL.
abstract_zh: 视觉场景中的声源定位旨在定位给定图像中发出声音的物体。最近表现出令人印象深刻的本地化性能的作品通常依赖于对比学习框架。然而，这些方法中通常采用的负片随机采样可能会导致音频和视觉特征之间的不一致，从而导致定位的模糊性。在本文中，我们没有遵循以前的文献，而是提出了自监督预测学习（SSPL），这是一种通过显式正挖掘进行声音定位的无负方法。具体来说，我们首先设计了一种三流网络，将声源与一个相应视频帧的两个增强视图优雅地关联起来，从而在音频和视觉特征之间产生语义上连贯的相似性。其次，我们引入了一种用于视听特征对齐的新型预测编码模块。这样的模块帮助SSPL渐进式地聚焦于目标对象，有效降低正对学习难度。实验显示出令人惊讶的结果，即 SSPL 在两个标准声音定位基准上优于最先进的方法。特别是，与之前的最佳成绩相比，SSPL 在 SoundNet-Flickr 上实现了 8.6% cIoU 和 3.4% AUC 的显着改进。代码位于：https://github.com/zjsong/SSPL。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需负样本的自监督预测学习方法（SSPL），用于在视觉场景中定位声源。
AI.motivation: 现有对比学习方法依赖随机负样本，可能导致音频与视觉特征对齐错误，从而影响定位精度。
AI.method: 设计三流网络关联声源与双增强视频帧，引入预测编码模块实现渐进式特征对齐，通过显式正样本挖掘降低学习难度。
AI.result: 在SoundNet-Flickr等基准测试中，SSPL较之前最佳方法提升8.6% cIoU和3.4% AUC。
AI.conclusion: SSPL通过消除负样本依赖并优化正样本挖掘，在声源定位任务中取得显著性能提升。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种无需负样本的自监督预测学习方法（SSPL），用于在视觉场景中定位声源。
ai_content.motivation: 现有对比学习方法依赖随机负样本，可能导致音频与视觉特征对齐错误，从而影响定位精度。
ai_content.method: 设计三流网络关联声源与双增强视频帧，引入预测编码模块实现渐进式特征对齐，通过显式正样本挖掘降低学习难度。
ai_content.result: 在SoundNet-Flickr等基准测试中，SSPL较之前最佳方法提升8.6% cIoU和3.4% AUC。
ai_content.conclusion: SSPL通过消除负样本依赖并优化正样本挖掘，在声源定位任务中取得显著性能提升。

search_text: Self-Supervised Predictive Learning: A Negative-Free Method for Sound Source Localization in Visual Scenes 自监督预测学习：视觉场景中声源定位的无负方法 Sound source localization in visual scenes aims to localize objects emitting the sound in a given image. Recent works showing impressive localization performance typically rely on the contrastive learning framework. However, the random sampling of negatives, as commonly adopted in these methods, can result in misalignment between audio and visual features and thus inducing ambiguity in localization. In this paper, instead of following previous literature, we propose Self-Supervised Predictive Learning (SSPL), a negative-free method for sound localization via explicit positive mining. Specifically, we first devise a three-stream network to elegantly associate sound source with two augmented views of one corresponding video frame, leading to semantically coherent similarities between audio and visual features. Second, we introduce a novel predictive coding module for audio-visual feature alignment. Such a module assists SSPL to focus on target objects in a progressive manner and effectively lowers the positive-pair learning difficulty. Experiments show surprising results that SSPL outperforms the state-of-the-art approach on two standard sound localization benchmarks. In particular, SSPL achieves significant improvements of 8.6% cIoU and 3.4% AUC on SoundNet-Flickr compared to the previous best. Code is available at: https://github.com/zjsong/SSPL. 视觉场景中的声源定位旨在定位给定图像中发出声音的物体。最近表现出令人印象深刻的本地化性能的作品通常依赖于对比学习框架。然而，这些方法中通常采用的负片随机采样可能会导致音频和视觉特征之间的不一致，从而导致定位的模糊性。在本文中，我们没有遵循以前的文献，而是提出了自监督预测学习（SSPL），这是一种通过显式正挖掘进行声音定位的无负方法。具体来说，我们首先设计了一种三流网络，将声源与一个相应视频帧的两个增强视图优雅地关联起来，从而在音频和视觉特征之间产生语义上连贯的相似性。其次，我们引入了一种用于视听特征对齐的新型预测编码模块。这样的模块帮助SSPL渐进式地聚焦于目标对象，有效降低正对学习难度。实验显示出令人惊讶的结果，即 SSPL 在两个标准声音定位基准上优于最先进的方法。特别是，与之前的最佳成绩相比，SSPL 在 SoundNet-Flickr 上实现了 8.6% cIoU 和 3.4% AUC 的显着改进。代码位于：https://github.com/zjsong/SSPL。 本文提出一种无需负样本的自监督预测学习方法（SSPL），用于在视觉场景中定位声源。 Zengjie Song,Yuxi Wang,Junsong Fan,Tieniu Tan,Zhaoxiang Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Arthur Bucker,Luis Figueredo,Sami Haddadin,Ashish Kapoor,Shuang Ma,Rogerio Bonatti
title: Reshaping Robot Trajectories Using Natural Language Commands: A Study of Multi-Modal Data Alignment Using Transformers
title_zh: 使用自然语言命令重塑机器人轨迹：使用 Transformer 的多模态数据对齐研究
abstract: Natural language is the most intuitive medium for us to interact with other people when expressing commands and instructions. However, using language is seldom an easy task when humans need to express their intent towards robots, since most of the current language interfaces require rigid templates with a static set of action targets and commands. In this work, we provide a flexible language-based interface for human-robot collaboration, which allows a user to reshape existing trajectories for an autonomous agent. We take advantage of recent advancements in the field of large language models (BERT and CLIP) to encode the user command, and then combine these features with trajectory information using multi-modal attention transformers. We train the model using imitation learning over a dataset containing robot trajectories modified by language commands, and treat the trajectory generation process as a sequence prediction problem, analogously to how language generation architectures operate. We evaluate the system in multiple simulated trajectory scenarios, and show a significant performance increase of our model over baseline approaches. In addition, our real-world experiments with a robot arm show that users significantly prefer our natural language interface over traditional methods such as kinesthetic teaching or cost-function programming. Our study shows how the field of robotics can take advantage of large pre-trained language models towards creating more intuitive interfaces between robots and machines. Project webpage: https://arthurfenderbucker.github.io/NL_trajectory_reshaper/

However, using language is seldom an easy task when humans need to express their intent towards robots, since most of the current language interfaces require rigid templates with a static set of action targets and commands. We train the model using imitation learning over a dataset containing robot trajectories modified by language commands, and treat the trajectory generation process as a sequence prediction problem, analogously to how language generation architectures operate. We evaluate the system in multiple simulated trajectory scenarios, and show a significant performance increase of our model over baseline approaches. In addition, our real-world experiments with a robot arm show that users significantly prefer our natural language interface over traditional methods such as kinesthetic teaching or cost-function programming. Our study shows how the field of robotics can take advantage of large pre-trained language models towards creating more intuitive interfaces between robots and machines. Project webpage: https://arthurfenderbucker.github.io/NL_trajectory_reshaper/
abstract_zh: 自然语言是我们在表达命令和指示时与他人交互的最直观的媒介。然而，当人类需要向机器人表达意图时，使用语言很少是一件容易的任务，因为当前大多数语言界面都需要带有一组静态动作目标和命令的严格模板。在这项工作中，我们为人机协作提供了一个灵活的基于语言的界面，它允许用户重塑自主代理的现有轨迹。我们利用大型语言模型（BERT 和 CLIP）领域的最新进展对用户命令进行编码，然后使用多模态注意力变换器将这些特征与轨迹信息结合起来。我们在包含由语言命令修改的机器人轨迹的数据集上使用模仿学习来训练模型，并将轨迹生成过程视为序列预测问题，类似于语言生成架构的运行方式。我们在多个模拟轨迹场景中评估系统，并显示我们的模型比基线方法有显着的性能提升。此外，我们使用机器人手臂进行的现实实验表明，与动觉教学或成本函数编程等传统方法相比，用户明显更喜欢我们的自然语言界面。我们的研究展示了机器人领域如何利用大型预训练语言模型在机器人和机器之间创建更直观的界面。项目网页：https://arthurfenderbucker.github.io/NL_trajectory_reshaper/

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自然语言命令的机器人轨迹重规划方法，通过多模态数据对齐实现人类与机器人的灵活协作。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人交互接口依赖固定模板，难以满足用户自然表达需求，需开发更直观的自然语言交互方式。
AI.method: 结合BERT和CLIP编码语言指令，利用多模态注意力Transformer融合轨迹数据，通过模仿学习将轨迹生成建模为序列预测问题。
AI.result: 仿真和实物实验显示模型性能显著优于基线方法，用户调研表明自然语言接口优于传统教学或编程方式。
AI.conclusion: 大语言模型可为机器人领域提供更直观的人机交互方案，推动多模态数据融合技术在机器人控制中的应用。

authors_text: Theodoros Pissas,Claudio S. Ravasio,Lyndon Da Cruz,Christos Bergeles
title: Multi-scale and Cross-scale Contrastive Learning for Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 语义分割的多尺度和跨尺度对比学习
abstract: This work considers supervised contrastive learning for semantic segmentation. We apply contrastive learning to enhance the discriminative power of the multi-scale features extracted by semantic segmentation networks. Our key methodological insight is to leverage samples from the feature spaces emanating from multiple stages of a model's encoder itself requiring neither data augmentation nor online memory banks to obtain a diverse set of samples. To allow for such an extension we introduce an efficient and effective sampling process, that enables applying contrastive losses over the encoder's features at multiple scales. Furthermore, by first mapping the encoder's multi-scale representations to a common feature space, we instantiate a novel form of supervised local-global constraint by introducing cross-scale contrastive learning linking high-resolution local features to low-resolution global features. Combined, our multi-scale and cross-scale contrastive losses boost performance of various models (DeepLabV3, HRNet, OCRNet, UPerNet) with both CNN and Transformer backbones, when evaluated on 4 diverse datasets from natural (Cityscapes, PascalContext, ADE20K) but also surgical (CaDIS) domains. Our code is available at https://github.com/RViMLab/MS_CS_ContrSeg. datasets from natural (Cityscapes, PascalContext, ADE20K) but also surgical (CaDIS) domains.
summary: This work considers supervised contrastive learning for semantic segmentation. We apply contrastive learning to enhance the discriminative power of the multi-scale features extracted by semantic segmentation networks. Our key methodological insight is to leverage samples from the feature spaces emanating from multiple stages of a model's encoder itself requiring neither data augmentation nor online memory banks to obtain a diverse set of samples. To allow for such an extension we introduce an efficient and effective sampling process, that enables applying contrastive losses over the encoder's features at multiple scales. Furthermore, by first mapping the encoder's multi-scale representations to a common feature space, we instantiate a novel form of supervised local-global constraint by introducing cross-scale contrastive learning linking high-resolution local features to low-resolution global features. Combined, our multi-scale and cross-scale contrastive losses boost performance of various models (DeepLabV3, HRNet, OCRNet, UPerNet) with both CNN and Transformer backbones, when evaluated on 4 diverse datasets from natural (Cityscapes, PascalContext, ADE20K) but also surgical (CaDIS) domains. Our code is available at https://github.com/RViMLab/MS_CS_ContrSeg. datasets from natural (Cityscapes, PascalContext, ADE20K) but also surgical (CaDIS) domains.
abstract_zh: 这项工作考虑了语义分割的监督对比学习。我们应用对比学习来增强语义分割网络提取的多尺度特征的判别能力。我们的关键方法论见解是利用模型编码器本身多个阶段发出的特征空间中的样本，既不需要数据增强也不需要在线存储库来获取不同的样本集。为了实现这样的扩展，我们引入了一种高效且有效的采样过程，该过程能够在多个尺度上对编码器的特征应用对比损失。此外，通过首先将编码器的多尺度表示映射到公共特征空间，我们通过引入将高分辨率局部特征与低分辨率全局特征联系起来的跨尺度对比学习，实例化了一种新形式的监督局部全局约束。结合起来，当在来自自然（Cityscapes、PascalContext、ADE20K）和外科（CaDIS）领域的 4 个不同数据集上进行评估时，我们的多尺度和跨尺度对比损失提高了具有 CNN 和 Transformer 主干的各种模型（DeepLabV3、HRNet、OCRNet、UPerNet）的性能。我们的代码位于 https://github.com/RViMLab/MS_CS_ContrSeg。来自自然（Cityscapes、PascalContext、ADE20K）和外科（CaDIS）领域的数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多尺度和跨尺度对比学习方法，用于提升语义分割模型的特征判别能力。
AI.motivation: 现有语义分割模型在多尺度特征学习中依赖数据增强或记忆库，但这些方法存在计算开销大或样本多样性不足的问题。
AI.method: 通过利用编码器不同阶段的多尺度特征空间，设计无需数据增强的对比学习策略，结合多尺度对比损失与跨尺度特征映射约束。
AI.result: 在Cityscapes、ADE20K等4个自然及手术领域数据集上，显著提升DeepLabV3、HRNet等模型的分割性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过编码器内部多尺度特征交互，有效增强了模型对局部与全局语义关系的学习能力。

search_text: Multi-scale and Cross-scale Contrastive Learning for Semantic Segmentation 语义分割的多尺度和跨尺度对比学习 This work considers supervised contrastive learning for semantic segmentation. We apply contrastive learning to enhance the discriminative power of the multi-scale features extracted by semantic segmentation networks. Our key methodological insight is to leverage samples from the feature spaces emanating from multiple stages of a model's encoder itself requiring neither data augmentation nor online memory banks to obtain a diverse set of samples. To allow for such an extension we introduce an efficient and effective sampling process, that enables applying contrastive losses over the encoder's features at multiple scales. Furthermore, by first mapping the encoder's multi-scale representations to a common feature space, we instantiate a novel form of supervised local-global constraint by introducing cross-scale contrastive learning linking high-resolution local features to low-resolution global features. Combined, our multi-scale and cross-scale contrastive losses boost performance of various models (DeepLabV3, HRNet, OCRNet, UPerNet) with both CNN and Transformer backbones, when evaluated on 4 diverse datasets from natural (Cityscapes, PascalContext, ADE20K) but also surgical (CaDIS) domains. Our code is available at https://github.com/RViMLab/MS_CS_ContrSeg. datasets from natural (Cityscapes, PascalContext, ADE20K) but also surgical (CaDIS) domains. 这项工作考虑了语义分割的监督对比学习。我们应用对比学习来增强语义分割网络提取的多尺度特征的判别能力。我们的关键方法论见解是利用模型编码器本身多个阶段发出的特征空间中的样本，既不需要数据增强也不需要在线存储库来获取不同的样本集。为了实现这样的扩展，我们引入了一种高效且有效的采样过程，该过程能够在多个尺度上对编码器的特征应用对比损失。此外，通过首先将编码器的多尺度表示映射到公共特征空间，我们通过引入将高分辨率局部特征与低分辨率全局特征联系起来的跨尺度对比学习，实例化了一种新形式的监督局部全局约束。结合起来，当在来自自然（Cityscapes、PascalContext、ADE20K）和外科（CaDIS）领域的 4 个不同数据集上进行评估时，我们的多尺度和跨尺度对比损失提高了具有 CNN 和 Transformer 主干的各种模型（DeepLabV3、HRNet、OCRNet、UPerNet）的性能。我们的代码位于 https://github.com/RViMLab/MS_CS_ContrSeg。来自自然（Cityscapes、PascalContext、ADE20K）和外科（CaDIS）领域的数据集。 本文提出一种多尺度和跨尺度对比学习方法，用于提升语义分割模型的特征判别能力。 Theodoros Pissas,Claudio S. Ravasio,Lyndon Da Cruz,Christos Bergeles cs.CV

authors_text: Yujing Xue,Jiageng Mao,Minzhe Niu,Hang Xu,Michael Bi Mi,Wei Zhang,Xiaogang Wang,Xinchao Wang
title: Point2Seq: Detecting 3D Objects as Sequences
title_zh: Point2Seq：将 3D 对象检测为序列
abstract: We present a simple and effective framework, named Point2Seq, for 3D object detection from point clouds. In contrast to previous methods that normally {predict attributes of 3D objects all at once}, we expressively model the interdependencies between attributes of 3D objects, which in turn enables a better detection accuracy. Specifically, we view each 3D object as a sequence of words and reformulate the 3D object detection task as decoding words from 3D scenes in an auto-regressive manner. We further propose a lightweight scene-to-sequence decoder that can auto-regressively generate words conditioned on features from a 3D scene as well as cues from the preceding words. The predicted words eventually constitute a set of sequences that completely describe the 3D objects in the scene, and all the predicted sequences are then automatically assigned to the respective ground truths through similarity-based sequence matching. Our approach is conceptually intuitive and can be readily plugged upon most existing 3D-detection backbones without adding too much computational overhead; the sequential decoding paradigm we proposed, on the other hand, can better exploit information from complex 3D scenes with the aid of preceding predicted words. Without bells and whistles, our method significantly outperforms previous anchor- and center-based 3D object detection frameworks, yielding the new state of the art on the challenging ONCE dataset as well as the Waymo Open Dataset. Code is available at \url{https://github.com/ocNflag/point2seq}.
summary: We present a simple and effective framework, named Point2Seq, for 3D object detection from point clouds. In contrast to previous methods that normally {predict attributes of 3D objects all at once}, we expressively model the interdependencies between attributes of 3D objects, which in turn enables a better detection accuracy. Specifically, we view each 3D object as a sequence of words and reformulate the 3D object detection task as decoding words from 3D scenes in an auto-regressive manner. We further propose a lightweight scene-to-sequence decoder that can auto-regressively generate words conditioned on features from a 3D scene as well as cues from the preceding words. The predicted words eventually constitute a set of sequences that completely describe the 3D objects in the scene, and all the predicted sequences are then automatically assigned to the respective ground truths through similarity-based sequence matching. Our approach is conceptually intuitive and can be readily plugged upon most existing 3D-detection backbones without adding too much computational overhead; the sequential decoding paradigm we proposed, on the other hand, can better exploit information from complex 3D scenes with the aid of preceding predicted words. Without bells and whistles, our method significantly outperforms previous anchor- and center-based 3D object detection frameworks, yielding the new state of the art on the challenging ONCE dataset as well as the Waymo Open Dataset. Code is available at \url{https://github.com/ocNflag/point2seq}.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个简单而有效的框架，名为 Point2Seq，用于从点云进行 3D 对象检测。与之前通常{同时预测 3D 对象的属性}的方法相比，我们对 3D 对象属性之间的相互依赖性进行了表达建模，从而实现了更好的检测精度。具体来说，我们将每个 3D 对象视为单词序列，并将 3D 对象检测任务重新表述为以自回归方式解码 3D 场景中的单词。我们进一步提出了一种轻量级的场景到序列解码器，它可以根据 3D 场景的特征以及前面单词的提示自动生成单词。预测的单词最终构成一组完整描述场景中的 3D 对象的序列，然后所有预测的序列通过基于相似性的序列匹配自动分配给各自的基本事实。我们的方法在概念上很直观，可以轻松插入大多数现有的 3D 检测主干，而不会增加太多的计算开销；另一方面，我们提出的顺序解码范例可以借助前面的预测词更好地利用复杂 3D 场景中的信息。没有花里胡哨的东西，我们的方法显着优于以前基于锚点和中心的 3D 对象检测框架，在具有挑战性的 ONCE 数据集以及 Waymo 开放数据集上产生了新的最先进技术。代码可在 \url{https://github.com/ocNflag/point2seq} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Point2Seq的框架，通过将3D物体检测任务转化为序列解码问题，以提高点云数据中的3D物体检测精度。
AI.motivation: 传统方法一次性预测3D物体属性，忽略了属性间的依赖关系。本文通过序列化建模，利用前序预测信息增强复杂场景下的检测能力。
AI.method: 将每个3D物体视为词序列，采用自回归解码器生成序列，并通过相似度匹配将预测序列与真实标签对应。方法兼容现有检测主干网络，计算开销低。
AI.result: 在ONCE和Waymo数据集上显著优于基于锚点和中心点的检测框架，达到新的SOTA水平，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 序列化解码范式能有效捕捉属性间依赖关系，提升复杂场景下的检测性能，且易于集成到现有系统中。

authors_text: Mohamad Alissa,Kevin Sim,Emma Hart
title: Automated Algorithm Selection: from Feature-Based to Feature-Free Approaches
title_zh: 自动算法选择：从基于特征的方法到无特征的方法
abstract: We propose a novel technique for algorithm-selection, applicable to optimisation domains in which there is implicit sequential information encapsulated in the data, e.g., in online bin-packing. Specifically we train two types of recurrent neural networks to predict a packing heuristic in online bin-packing, selecting from four well-known heuristics. As input, the RNN methods only use the sequence of item-sizes. This contrasts to typical approaches to algorithm-selection which require a model to be trained using domain-specific instance features that need to be first derived from the input data. The RNN approaches are shown to be capable of achieving within 5% of the oracle performance on between 80.88% to 97.63% of the instances, depending on the dataset. They are also shown to outperform classical machine learning models trained using derived features. Finally, we hypothesise that the proposed methods perform well when the instances exhibit some implicit structure that results in discriminatory performance with respect to a set of heuristics. We test this hypothesis by generating fourteen new datasets with increasing levels of structure, and show that there is a critical threshold of structure required before algorithm-selection delivers benefit.
summary: We propose a novel technique for algorithm-selection, applicable to optimisation domains in which there is implicit sequential information encapsulated in the data, e.g., in online bin-packing. Specifically we train two types of recurrent neural networks to predict a packing heuristic in online bin-packing, selecting from four well-known heuristics. As input, the RNN methods only use the sequence of item-sizes. This contrasts to typical approaches to algorithm-selection which require a model to be trained using domain-specific instance features that need to be first derived from the input data. The RNN approaches are shown to be capable of achieving within 5% of the oracle performance on between 80.88% to 97.63% of the instances, depending on the dataset. They are also shown to outperform classical machine learning models trained using derived features. Finally, we hypothesise that the proposed methods perform well when the instances exhibit some implicit structure that results in discriminatory performance with respect to a set of heuristics. We test this hypothesis by generating fourteen new datasets with increasing levels of structure, and show that there is a critical threshold of structure required before algorithm-selection delivers benefit.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种算法选择的新技术，适用于数据中封装有隐式顺序信息的优化领域，例如在线装箱。具体来说，我们训练两种类型的循环神经网络来预测在线装箱中的装箱启发式，从四种众所周知的启发式中进行选择。作为输入，RNN 方法仅使用项目大小序列。这与典型的算法选择方法形成鲜明对比，典型的算法选择方法需要使用首先从输入数据中导出的特定于领域的实例特征来训练模型。研究表明，RNN 方法能够在 80.88% 到 97.63% 的实例上实现预言机性能 5% 以内的性能，具体取决于数据集。它们还被证明优于使用派生特征训练的经典机器学习模型。最后，我们假设当实例表现出某种隐式结构，导致相对于一组启发式的歧视性表现时，所提出的方法表现良好。我们通过生成结构级别不断增加的 14 个新数据集来测试这一假设，并表明在算法选择带来好处之前需要一个关键的结构阈值。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需特征提取的自动算法选择方法，应用于包含隐含序列信息的优化问题（如在线装箱），通过循环神经网络直接利用物品尺寸序列预测启发式算法。
AI.motivation: 传统算法选择依赖人工提取的领域特征，而隐含在数据序列中的信息未被充分利用，导致方法复杂且效果受限。
AI.method: 训练两种RNN模型，仅以物品尺寸序列为输入预测装箱启发式算法，对比使用人工特征的传统机器学习模型。
AI.result: RNN方法在80.88%-97.63%的实例中达到最优性能5%以内，显著优于传统模型；验证了隐含结构阈值对算法选择效果的影响。
AI.conclusion: 当数据存在足够隐含结构时，无特征的RNN方法能有效实现自动算法选择，为优化领域提供新思路。

We test this hypothesis by generating fourteen new datasets with increasing levels of structure, and show that there is a critical threshold of structure required before algorithm-selection delivers benefit. 我们提出了一种算法选择的新技术，适用于数据中封装有隐式顺序信息的优化领域，例如在线装箱。具体来说，我们训练两种类型的循环神经网络来预测在线装箱中的装箱启发式，从四种众所周知的启发式中进行选择。作为输入，RNN 方法仅使用项目大小序列。这与典型的算法选择方法形成鲜明对比，典型的算法选择方法需要使用首先从输入数据中导出的特定于领域的实例特征来训练模型。研究表明，RNN 方法能够在 80.88% 到 97.63% 的实例上实现预言机性能 5% 以内的性能，具体取决于数据集。它们还被证明优于使用派生特征训练的经典机器学习模型。最后，我们假设当实例表现出某种隐式结构，导致相对于一组启发式的歧视性表现时，所提出的方法表现良好。我们通过生成结构级别不断增加的 14 个新数据集来测试这一假设，并表明在算法选择带来好处之前需要一个关键的结构阈值。 本文提出一种无需特征提取的自动算法选择方法，应用于包含隐含序列信息的优化问题（如在线装箱），通过循环神经网络直接利用物品尺寸序列预测启发式算法。 Mohamad Alissa,Kevin Sim,Emma Hart cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.NE

authors_text: Mohammed Hassanin,Abdelwahed Khamiss,Mohammed Bennamoun,Farid Boussaid,Ibrahim Radwan
title: CrossFormer: Cross Spatio-Temporal Transformer for 3D Human Pose Estimation
title_zh: CrossFormer：用于 3D 人体姿势估计的跨时空转换器
abstract: 3D human pose estimation can be handled by encoding the geometric dependencies between the body parts and enforcing the kinematic constraints. Recently, Transformer has been adopted to encode the long-range dependencies between the joints in the spatial and temporal domains. While they had shown excellence in long-range dependencies, studies have noted the need for improving the locality of vision Transformers. In this direction, we propose a novel pose estimation Transformer featuring rich representations of body joints critical for capturing subtle changes across frames (i.e., inter-feature representation). Specifically, through two novel interaction modules; Cross-Joint Interaction and Cross-Frame Interaction, the model explicitly encodes the local and global dependencies between the body joints. The proposed architecture achieved state-of-the-art performance on two popular 3D human pose estimation datasets, Human3.6 and MPI-INF-3DHP. In particular, our proposed CrossFormer method boosts performance by 0.9% and 0.3%, compared to the closest counterpart, PoseFormer, using the detected 2D poses and ground-truth settings respectively.
summary: 3D human pose estimation can be handled by encoding the geometric dependencies between the body parts and enforcing the kinematic constraints. Recently, Transformer has been adopted to encode the long-range dependencies between the joints in the spatial and temporal domains. While they had shown excellence in long-range dependencies, studies have noted the need for improving the locality of vision Transformers. In this direction, we propose a novel pose estimation Transformer featuring rich representations of body joints critical for capturing subtle changes across frames (i.e., inter-feature representation). Specifically, through two novel interaction modules; Cross-Joint Interaction and Cross-Frame Interaction, the model explicitly encodes the local and global dependencies between the body joints. The proposed architecture achieved state-of-the-art performance on two popular 3D human pose estimation datasets, Human3.6 and MPI-INF-3DHP. In particular, our proposed CrossFormer method boosts performance by 0.9% and 0.3%, compared to the closest counterpart, PoseFormer, using the detected 2D poses and ground-truth settings respectively.
abstract_zh: 3D 人体姿势估计可以通过编码身体部位之间的几何依赖性并强制执行运动学约束来处理。最近，Transformer 被用来编码空间和时间域中关节之间的远程依赖关系。虽然它们在远程依赖性方面表现出了卓越的性能，但研究指出需要改进视觉变形金刚的局部性。在这个方向上，我们提出了一种新颖的姿势估计 Transformer，具有丰富的身体关节表示，这对于捕获跨帧的细微变化（即特征间表示）至关重要。具体来说，通过两个新颖的交互模块；跨关节交互和跨框架交互，模型显式编码身体关节之间的局部和全局依赖关系。所提出的架构在两个流行的 3D 人体姿势估计数据集 Human3.6 和 MPI-INF-3DHP 上实现了最先进的性能。特别是，与最接近的对应方法 PoseFormer 相比，我们提出的 CrossFormer 方法分别使用检测到的 2D 姿势和地面实况设置将性能提高了 0.9% 和 0.3%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CrossFormer模型，通过跨关节和跨帧交互模块改进3D人体姿态估计中的局部性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有Transformer在长距离依赖建模表现优异，但局部性不足，需增强对身体关节局部依赖和跨帧细微变化的捕捉能力。
AI.method: 设计Cross-Joint Interaction模块建模关节间局部依赖，Cross-Frame Interaction模块捕捉跨帧动态变化，结合时空特征提升表示能力。
AI.result: 在Human3.6和MPI-INF-3DHP数据集上分别超越PoseFormer 0.9%和0.3%，达到当时最优性能。
AI.conclusion: CrossFormer通过显式建模局部与全局依赖，有效提升了3D人体姿态估计的精度，验证了跨时空交互设计的有效性。

authors_text: MohammadReza Davari,Nader Asadi,Sudhir Mudur,Rahaf Aljundi,Eugene Belilovsky
title: Probing Representation Forgetting in Supervised and Unsupervised Continual Learning
title_zh: 探索监督和无监督持续学习中的表征遗忘
abstract: Continual Learning research typically focuses on tackling the phenomenon of catastrophic forgetting in neural networks. Catastrophic forgetting is associated with an abrupt loss of knowledge previously learned by a model when the task, or more broadly the data distribution, being trained on changes. In supervised learning problems this forgetting, resulting from a change in the model's representation, is typically measured or observed by evaluating the decrease in old task performance. However, a model's representation can change without losing knowledge about prior tasks. In this work we consider the concept of representation forgetting, observed by using the difference in performance of an optimal linear classifier before and after a new task is introduced. Using this tool we revisit a number of standard continual learning benchmarks and observe that, through this lens, model representations trained without any explicit control for forgetting often experience small representation forgetting and can sometimes be comparable to methods which explicitly control for forgetting, especially in longer task sequences. We also show that representation forgetting can lead to new insights on the effect of model capacity and loss function used in continual learning. Based on our results, we show that a simple yet competitive approach is to learn representations continually with standard supervised contrastive learning while constructing prototypes of class samples when queried on old samples.
summary: Continual Learning research typically focuses on tackling the phenomenon of catastrophic forgetting in neural networks. Catastrophic forgetting is associated with an abrupt loss of knowledge previously learned by a model when the task, or more broadly the data distribution, being trained on changes. In supervised learning problems this forgetting, resulting from a change in the model's representation, is typically measured or observed by evaluating the decrease in old task performance. However, a model's representation can change without losing knowledge about prior tasks. In this work we consider the concept of representation forgetting, observed by using the difference in performance of an optimal linear classifier before and after a new task is introduced. Using this tool we revisit a number of standard continual learning benchmarks and observe that, through this lens, model representations trained without any explicit control for forgetting often experience small representation forgetting and can sometimes be comparable to methods which explicitly control for forgetting, especially in longer task sequences. We also show that representation forgetting can lead to new insights on the effect of model capacity and loss function used in continual learning. Based on our results, we show that a simple yet competitive approach is to learn representations continually with standard supervised contrastive learning while constructing prototypes of class samples when queried on old samples.
abstract_zh: 持续学习研究通常侧重于解决神经网络中的灾难性遗忘现象。灾难性遗忘与当任务（或更广泛地说是数据分布）接受变化训练时模型先前学到的知识突然丢失有关。在监督学习问题中，这种由于模型表示变化而导致的遗忘通常是通过评估旧任务性能的下降来测量或观察的。然而，模型的表示可以改变，而不会丢失有关先前任务的知识。在这项工作中，我们考虑了表示遗忘的概念，通过使用引入新任务之前和之后最佳线性分类器的性能差异来观察。使用这个工具，我们重新审视一些标准的持续学习基准，并观察到，通过这个镜头，在没有任何明确的遗忘控制的情况下训练的模型表示经常会经历小表示遗忘，有时可以与明确控制遗忘的方法相媲美，特别是在较长的任务序列中。我们还表明，表征遗忘可以对持续学习中使用的模型容量和损失函数的影响产生新的见解。根据我们的结果，我们表明一种简单但有竞争力的方法是通过标准监督对比学习不断学习表示，同时在对旧样本进行查询时构建类样本的原型。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了监督和无监督持续学习中表示遗忘的现象，提出通过最优线性分类器性能差异来衡量表示遗忘，并分析了模型容量和损失函数对持续学习的影响。
AI.motivation: 传统持续学习研究主要关注灾难性遗忘，但表示遗忘（即模型表示变化但未丢失旧任务知识）未被充分研究，需新方法评估和理解这一现象。
AI.method: 通过比较新任务引入前后最优线性分类器的性能差异，量化表示遗忘；重新评估标准持续学习基准，并分析模型容量和损失函数的影响。
AI.result: 发现无显式遗忘控制的模型在长任务序列中表示遗忘较小，效果可与显式方法媲美；模型容量和损失函数选择对表示遗忘有显著影响。
AI.conclusion: 提出一种简单有效的方法：使用标准监督对比学习持续训练表示，并在查询旧样本时构建类原型，以缓解表示遗忘问题。

authors_text: Yusuf Nasir,Louis J. Durlofsky
title: Deep reinforcement learning for optimal well control in subsurface systems with uncertain geology
title_zh: 深度强化学习在地质不确定的地下系统中实现最佳井控
abstract: A general control policy framework based on deep reinforcement learning (DRL) is introduced for closed-loop decision making in subsurface flow settings. Traditional closed-loop modeling workflows in this context involve the repeated application of data assimilation/history matching and robust optimization steps. Data assimilation can be particularly challenging in cases where both the geological style (scenario) and individual model realizations are uncertain. The closed-loop reservoir management (CLRM) problem is formulated here as a partially observable Markov decision process, with the associated optimization problem solved using a proximal policy optimization algorithm. This provides a control policy that instantaneously maps flow data observed at wells (as are available in practice) to optimal well pressure settings. The policy is represented by a temporal convolution and gated transformer blocks. Training is performed in a preprocessing step with an ensemble of prior geological models, which can be drawn from multiple geological scenarios. Example cases involving the production of oil via water injection, with both 2D and 3D geological models, are presented. The DRL-based methodology is shown to result in an NPV increase of 15% (for the 2D cases) and 33% (3D cases) relative to robust optimization over prior models, and to an average improvement of 4% in NPV relative to traditional CLRM. The solutions from the control policy are found to be comparable to those from deterministic optimization, in which the geological model is assumed to be known, even when multiple geological scenarios are considered. The control policy approach results in a 76% decrease in computational cost relative to traditional CLRM with the algorithms and parameter settings considered in this work.
summary: A general control policy framework based on deep reinforcement learning (DRL) is introduced for closed-loop decision making in subsurface flow settings. Traditional closed-loop modeling workflows in this context involve the repeated application of data assimilation/history matching and robust optimization steps. Data assimilation can be particularly challenging in cases where both the geological style (scenario) and individual model realizations are uncertain. The closed-loop reservoir management (CLRM) problem is formulated here as a partially observable Markov decision process, with the associated optimization problem solved using a proximal policy optimization algorithm. This provides a control policy that instantaneously maps flow data observed at wells (as are available in practice) to optimal well pressure settings. The policy is represented by a temporal convolution and gated transformer blocks. Training is performed in a preprocessing step with an ensemble of prior geological models, which can be drawn from multiple geological scenarios. Example cases involving the production of oil via water injection, with both 2D and 3D geological models, are presented. The DRL-based methodology is shown to result in an NPV increase of 15% (for the 2D cases) and 33% (3D cases) relative to robust optimization over prior models, and to an average improvement of 4% in NPV relative to traditional CLRM. The solutions from the control policy are found to be comparable to those from deterministic optimization, in which the geological model is assumed to be known, even when multiple geological scenarios are considered. The control policy approach results in a 76% decrease in computational cost relative to traditional CLRM with the algorithms and parameter settings considered in this work.
abstract_zh: 引入了基于深度强化学习（DRL）的通用控制策略框架，用于地下流设置中的闭环决策。在这种情况下，传统的闭环建模工作流程涉及数据同化/历史匹配和稳健优化步骤的重复应用。在地质类型（情景）和单个模型实现都不确定的情况下，数据同化尤其具有挑战性。闭环油藏管理（CLRM）问题在这里被表述为部分可观察的马尔可夫决策过程，并使用近端策略优化算法解决相关的优化问题。这提供了一种控制策略，可以将在井中观察到的流量数据（如实践中可用的）即时映射到最佳井压设置。该策略由时间卷积和门控变压器块表示。训练是在预处理步骤中使用一组先前的地质模型进行的，这些模型可以从多个地质场景中提取。介绍了涉及通过注水生产石油的示例案例，以及 2D 和 3D 地质模型。结果表明，与先前模型相比，基于 DRL 的方法与稳健优化相比，NPV 提高了 15%（对于 2D 情况）和 33%（3D 情况），并且与传统 CLRM 相比，NPV 平均提高了 4%。研究发现，控制策略的解决方案与确定性优化的解决方案相当，其中即使考虑多个地质场景，也假定地质模型已知。与本工作中考虑的算法和参数设置的传统 CLRM 相比，控制策略方法的计算成本降低了 76%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于深度强化学习（DRL）的控制策略框架，用于在地质条件不确定的地下流体系统中实现闭环决策优化。
AI.motivation: 传统闭环油藏管理方法在地质不确定性高的场景下，面临数据同化和鲁棒优化计算成本高、适应性差的问题。
AI.method: 将问题建模为部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP），采用近端策略优化算法训练包含时序卷积和门控变压器块的控制策略网络，利用多地质场景先验模型进行预训练。
AI.result: 在2D/3D油藏模型测试中，DRL方法相比鲁棒优化提升NPV 15%-33%，相比传统CLRM提升4%，计算成本降低76%。
AI.conclusion: DRL控制策略在多地质场景下能生成接近确定性优化效果的解决方案，显著优于传统方法，在不确定性管理中具有应用潜力。

search_text: Deep reinforcement learning for optimal well control in subsurface systems with uncertain geology 深度强化学习在地质不确定的地下系统中实现最佳井控 A general control policy framework based on deep reinforcement learning (DRL) is introduced for closed-loop decision making in subsurface flow settings. The DRL-based methodology is shown to result in an NPV increase of 15% (for the 2D cases) and 33% (3D cases) relative to robust optimization over prior models, and to an average improvement of 4% in NPV relative to traditional CLRM. authors_text: Santiago Castro,Fabian Caba Heilbron
title: FitCLIP: Refining Large-Scale Pretrained Image-Text Models for Zero-Shot Video Understanding Tasks
title_zh: FitCLIP：针对零镜头视频理解任务完善大规模预训练图像文本模型
comment: Accepted at BMVC 2022. It includes the supplementary material. The margins and page size were modified to fit the arXiv ID stamp on the left side
comments: Accepted at BMVC 2022. It includes the supplementary material. The margins and page size were modified to fit the arXiv ID stamp on the left side
abstract: Large-scale pretrained image-text models have shown incredible zero-shot performance in a handful of tasks, including video ones such as action recognition and text-to-video retrieval. However, these models have not been adapted to video, mainly because they do not account for the time dimension but also because video frames are different from the typical images (e.g., containing motion blur, and less sharpness). In this paper, we present a fine-tuning strategy to refine these large-scale pretrained image-text models for zero-shot video understanding tasks. We show that by carefully adapting these models we obtain considerable improvements on two zero-shot Action Recognition tasks and three zero-shot Text-to-video Retrieval tasks. The code is available at https://github.com/bryant1410/fitclip
summary: Large-scale pretrained image-text models have shown incredible zero-shot performance in a handful of tasks, including video ones such as action recognition and text-to-video retrieval. However, these models have not been adapted to video, mainly because they do not account for the time dimension but also because video frames are different from the typical images (e.g., containing motion blur, and less sharpness). In this paper, we present a fine-tuning strategy to refine these large-scale pretrained image-text models for zero-shot video understanding tasks. We show that by carefully adapting these models we obtain considerable improvements on two zero-shot Action Recognition tasks and three zero-shot Text-to-video Retrieval tasks. The code is available at https://github.com/bryant1410/fitclip
abstract_zh: 大规模预训练的图像文本模型在一些任务中表现出了令人难以置信的零样本性能，包括动作识别和文本到视频检索等视频任务。然而，这些模型尚未适应视频，主要是因为它们没有考虑时间维度，而且还因为视频帧与典型图像不同（例如，包含运动模糊和清晰度较低）。在本文中，我们提出了一种微调策略来细化这些大规模预训练的图像文本模型，以实现零样本视频理解任务。我们表明，通过仔细调整这些模型，我们在两个零样本动作识别任务和三个零样本文本到视频检索任务上获得了相当大的改进。代码可在 https://github.com/bryant1410/fitclip 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出FitCLIP方法，通过微调大规模预训练图像-文本模型以提升其在零样本视频理解任务中的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有图像-文本预训练模型未考虑视频的时间维度及视频帧的特性（如运动模糊、清晰度低），导致其在视频任务中表现不足。
AI.method: 设计针对视频特性的微调策略，优化模型以适应视频帧的时序信息和视觉差异。
AI.result: 在两个零样本动作识别任务和三个零样本文本到视频检索任务中取得显著性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过针对性微调，可有效增强预训练模型在视频理解任务中的零样本适应能力。

authors_text: Sean Matthews,John Hudzina,Dawn Sepehr
title: Gender and Racial Stereotype Detection in Legal Opinion Word Embeddings
title_zh: 法律意见词嵌入中的性别和种族刻板印象检测
comment: Accepted at AAAI-22, AI for Social Impact Track
comments: Accepted at AAAI-22, AI for Social Impact Track
abstract: Studies have shown that some Natural Language Processing (NLP) systems encode and replicate harmful biases with potential adverse ethical effects in our society. In this article, we propose an approach for identifying gender and racial stereotypes in word embeddings trained on judicial opinions from U.S. case law. Embeddings containing stereotype information may cause harm when used by downstream systems for classification, information extraction, question answering, or other machine learning systems used to build legal research tools. We first explain how previously proposed methods for identifying these biases are not well suited for use with word embeddings trained on legal opinion text. We then propose a domain adapted method for identifying gender and racial biases in the legal domain. Our analyses using these methods suggest that racial and gender biases are encoded into word embeddings trained on legal opinions. These biases are not mitigated by exclusion of historical data, and appear across multiple large topical areas of the law. Implications for downstream systems that use legal opinion word embeddings and suggestions for potential mitigation strategies based on our observations are also discussed.
summary: Studies have shown that some Natural Language Processing (NLP) systems encode and replicate harmful biases with potential adverse ethical effects in our society. In this article, we propose an approach for identifying gender and racial stereotypes in word embeddings trained on judicial opinions from U.S. case law. Embeddings containing stereotype information may cause harm when used by downstream systems for classification, information extraction, question answering, or other machine learning systems used to build legal research tools. We first explain how previously proposed methods for identifying these biases are not well suited for use with word embeddings trained on legal opinion text. We then propose a domain adapted method for identifying gender and racial biases in the legal domain. Our analyses using these methods suggest that racial and gender biases are encoded into word embeddings trained on legal opinions. These biases are not mitigated by exclusion of historical data, and appear across multiple large topical areas of the law. Implications for downstream systems that use legal opinion word embeddings and suggestions for potential mitigation strategies based on our observations are also discussed.
abstract_zh: 研究表明，一些自然语言处理（NLP）系统会编码和复制有害的偏见，对我们的社会产生潜在的不利道德影响。在本文中，我们提出了一种根据美国判例法的司法意见训练的词嵌入中识别性别和种族刻板印象的方法。当下游系统用于分类、信息提取、问答或用于构建法律研究工具的其他机器学习系统时，包含刻板印象信息的嵌入可能会造成损害。我们首先解释为什么之前提出的用于识别这些偏见的方法不太适合与在法律意见文本上训练的词嵌入一起使用。然后，我们提出了一种适应领域的方法，用于识别法律领域中的性别和种族偏见。我们使用这些方法的分析表明，种族和性别偏见被编码到根据法律意见训练的词嵌入中。这些偏见并不能通过排除历史数据而得到缓解，并且出现在法律的多个大主题领域。还讨论了使用法律意见词嵌入的下游系统的影响以及根据我们的观察提出的潜在缓解策略的建议。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种方法，用于检测基于美国判例法司法意见训练的词嵌入中的性别和种族刻板印象。
AI.motivation: 现有自然语言处理系统可能编码并复制有害偏见，而针对法律文本的词嵌入方法尚未有效解决这一问题，需探索法律领域的特定解决方案。
AI.method: 分析现有偏见检测方法在法律文本中的局限性，并提出领域自适应方法，通过调整指标和数据处理方式检测法律意见词嵌入中的刻板印象。
AI.result: 发现法律意见词嵌入中存在显著的性别和种族偏见，且排除历史数据无法缓解该问题，偏见广泛存在于多个法律主题领域。
AI.conclusion: 法律领域词嵌入的偏见可能影响下游系统，需开发针对性缓解策略以减少伦理风险。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种方法，用于检测基于美国判例法司法意见训练的词嵌入中的性别和种族刻板印象。

ai_content.method: 分析现有偏见检测方法在法律文本中的局限性，并提出领域自适应方法，通过调整指标和数据处理方式检测法律意见词嵌入中的刻板印象。
ai_content.result: 发现法律意见词嵌入中存在显著的性别和种族偏见，且排除历史数据无法缓解该问题，偏见广泛存在于多个法律主题领域。
ai_content.conclusion: 法律领域词嵌入的偏见可能影响下游系统，需开发针对性缓解策略以减少伦理风险。
