authors_text: Jie Cai,Donghee Yvette Wohn
title: Coordination and Collaboration: How do Volunteer Moderators Work as a Team in Live Streaming Communities?
title_zh: 协调与协作：直播社区中的志愿者版主如何进行团队合作？
abstract: Volunteer moderators (mods) play significant roles in developing moderation standards and dealing with harmful content in their micro-communities. However, little work explores how volunteer mods work as a team. In line with prior work about understanding volunteer moderation, we interview 40 volunteer mods on Twitch - a leading live streaming platform. We identify how mods collaborate on tasks (off-streaming coordination and preparation, in-stream real-time collaboration, and relationship building both off-stream and in-stream to reinforce collaboration) and how mods contribute to moderation standards (collaboratively working on the community rulebook and individually shaping community norms). We uncover how volunteer mods work as an effective team. We also discuss how the affordances of multi-modal communication and informality of volunteer moderation contribute to task collaboration, standards development, and mod's roles and responsibilities.
summary: Volunteer moderators (mods) play significant roles in developing moderation standards and dealing with harmful content in their micro-communities. However, little work explores how volunteer mods work as a team. In line with prior work about understanding volunteer moderation, we interview 40 volunteer mods on Twitch - a leading live streaming platform. We identify how mods collaborate on tasks (off-streaming coordination and preparation, in-stream real-time collaboration, and relationship building both off-stream and in-stream to reinforce collaboration) and how mods contribute to moderation standards (collaboratively working on the community rulebook and individually shaping community norms). We uncover how volunteer mods work as an effective team. We also discuss how the affordances of multi-modal communication and informality of volunteer moderation contribute to task collaboration, standards development, and mod's roles and responsibilities.
abstract_zh: 志愿者版主 (mod) 在制定审核标准和处理微型社区中的有害内容方面发挥着重要作用。然而，很少有人探讨志愿者模组如何作为一个团队工作。根据之前了解志愿者审核的工作，我们在领先的直播平台 Twitch 上采访了 40 名志愿者管理员。我们确定模组如何在任务上进行协作（流外协调和准备、流内实时协作以及在流外和流内建立关系以加强协作）以及模组如何为审核标准做出贡献（协作制定社区规则手册并单独制定社区规范）。我们揭示志愿者模组如何作为一个有效的团队工作。我们还讨论了多模式沟通的可供性和志愿者调节的非正式性如何有助于任务协作、标准制定以及国防部的角色和职责。

AI.tldr: 探讨志愿者版主在直播社区中如何通过协调与协作有效管理社区
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对志愿者版主团队协作机制的深入探讨，需明确其协作模式及对社区管理的影响
AI.method: 通过半结构化访谈收集40名Twitch平台志愿者版主的定性数据，分析其协作策略与标准制定过程
AI.result: 发现版主通过线上线下协调、实时协作及关系建设形成有效团队，并通过多模态沟通和非正式性促进标准制定与角色分工
AI.conclusion: 志愿者版主的协作机制是社区治理的关键，平台需优化工具与规范以增强团队效能

authors_text: Bowen Shi,Diane Brentari,Greg Shakhnarovich,Karen Livescu
title: Searching for fingerspelled content in American Sign Language
title_zh: 搜索美国手语的手语内容
abstract: Natural language processing for sign language video - including tasks like recognition, translation, and search - is crucial for making artificial intelligence technologies accessible to deaf individuals, and is gaining research interest in recent years. In this paper, we address the problem of searching for fingerspelled key-words or key phrases in raw sign language videos. This is an important task since significant content in sign language is often conveyed via fingerspelling, and to our knowledge the task has not been studied before. We propose an end-to-end model for this task, FSS-Net, that jointly detects fingerspelling and matches it to a text sequence. Our experiments, done on a large public dataset of ASL fingerspelling in the wild, show the importance of fingerspelling detection as a component of a search and retrieval model. Our model significantly outperforms baseline methods adapted from prior work on related tasks
summary: Natural language processing for sign language video - including tasks like recognition, translation, and search - is crucial for making artificial intelligence technologies accessible to deaf individuals, and is gaining research interest in recent years. In this paper, we address the problem of searching for fingerspelled key-words or key phrases in raw sign language videos. This is an important task since significant content in sign language is often conveyed via fingerspelling, and to our knowledge the task has not been studied before. We propose an end-to-end model for this task, FSS-Net, that jointly detects fingerspelling and matches it to a text sequence. Our experiments, done on a large public dataset of ASL fingerspelling in the wild, show the importance of fingerspelling detection as a component of a search and retrieval model. Our model significantly outperforms baseline methods adapted from prior work on related tasks
abstract_zh: 手语视频的自然语言处理（包括识别、翻译和搜索等任务）对于让聋人能够使用人工智能技术至关重要，并且近年来引起了人们的研究兴趣。在本文中，我们解决了在原始手语视频中搜索手指拼写的关键词或关键短语的问题。这是一项重要的任务，因为手语中的重要内容通常是通过手指拼写来传达的，而且据我们所知，这项任务以前从未被研究过。我们为该任务提出了一个端到端模型 FSS-Net，它联合检测手指拼写并将其与文本序列进行匹配。我们的实验是在 ASL 手指拼写的大型公共数据集上进行的，表明了手指拼写检测作为搜索和检索模型的组成部分的重要性。我们的模型显着优于根据相关任务的先前工作改编的基线方法

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种端到端模型FSS-Net，用于在美式手语视频中检测并匹配手指拼写关键词。
AI.motivation: 手语视频中大量信息通过手指拼写传递，但此前未有研究系统解决该问题，需提升AI技术对听障人士的可及性。
AI.method: 设计FSS-Net模型，联合完成手指拼写检测与文本序列匹配，并在大规模真实场景数据集上验证。
AI.result: 实验表明该模型显著优于基线方法，证明手指拼写检测对搜索检索任务的关键作用。
AI.conclusion: FSS-Net有效解决了手语视频中手指拼写内容检索问题，为后续研究提供了新方向。

authors_text: Vincent Karas,Mani Kumar Tellamekala,Adria Mallol-Ragolta,Michel Valstar,Björn W. Schuller
title: Continuous-Time Audiovisual Fusion with Recurrence vs. Attention for In-The-Wild Affect Recognition
title_zh: 连续时间视听融合与循环与注意力的野外情感识别
comment: 10 pages, 1 figures, added references and an overview figure
comments: 10 pages, 1 figures, added references and an overview figure
abstract: In this paper, we present our submission to 3rd Affective Behavior Analysis in-the-wild (ABAW) challenge. Learningcomplex interactions among multimodal sequences is critical to recognise dimensional affect from in-the-wild audiovisual data. Recurrence and attention are the two widely used sequence modelling mechanisms in the literature. To clearly understand the performance differences between recurrent and attention models in audiovisual affect recognition, we present a comprehensive evaluation of fusion models based on LSTM-RNNs, self-attention and cross-modal attention, trained for valence and arousal estimation. Particularly, we study the impact of some key design choices: the modelling complexity of CNN backbones that provide features to the the temporal models, with and without end-to-end learning. We trained the audiovisual affect recognition models on in-the-wild ABAW corpus by systematically tuning the hyper-parameters involved in the network architecture design and training optimisation. Our extensive evaluation of the audiovisual fusion models shows that LSTM-RNNs can outperform the attention models when coupled with low-complex CNN backbones and trained in an end-to-end fashion, implying that attention models may not necessarily be the optimal choice for continuous-time multimodal emotion recognition.
summary: In this paper, we present our submission to 3rd Affective Behavior Analysis in-the-wild (ABAW) challenge. Learningcomplex interactions among multimodal sequences is critical to recognise dimensional affect from in-the-wild audiovisual data. Recurrence and attention are the two widely used sequence modelling mechanisms in the literature. To clearly understand the performance differences between recurrent and attention models in audiovisual affect recognition, we present a comprehensive evaluation of fusion models based on LSTM-RNNs, self-attention and cross-modal attention, trained for valence and arousal estimation. Particularly, we study the impact of some key design choices: the modelling complexity of CNN backbones that provide features to the the temporal models, with and without end-to-end learning. We trained the audiovisual affect recognition models on in-the-wild ABAW corpus by systematically tuning the hyper-parameters involved in the network architecture design and training optimisation. Our extensive evaluation of the audiovisual fusion models shows that LSTM-RNNs can outperform the attention models when coupled with low-complex CNN backbones and trained in an end-to-end fashion, implying that attention models may not necessarily be the optimal choice for continuous-time multimodal emotion recognition.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提交了第三届野外情感行为分析 (ABAW) 挑战赛的意见书。学习多模态序列之间复杂的相互作用对于识别野外视听数据的维度影响至关重要。循环和注意力是文献中广泛使用的两种序列建模机制。为了清楚地了解循环模型和注意力模型在视听情感识别中的性能差异，我们对基于 LSTM-RNN、自注意力和跨模态注意力的融合模型进行了综合评估，并针对效价和唤醒估计进行了训练。特别是，我们研究了一些关键设计选择的影响：为时间模型提供特征的 CNN 主干的建模复杂性，有或没有端到端学习。我们通过系统地调整网络架构设计和训练优化中涉及的超参数，在野外 ABAW 语料库上训练视听情感识别模型。我们对视听融合模型的广泛评估表明，当与低复杂度的 CNN 主干结合并以端到端方式训练时，LSTM-RNN 可以优于注意力模型，这意味着注意力模型不一定是连续时间多模态情感识别的最佳选择。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了循环神经网络（LSTM-RNN）与注意力机制在真实场景音频视觉情感识别中的性能差异，提出基于连续时间融合的多模态情感分析方法。
AI.motivation: 多模态序列交互建模对真实场景情感识别至关重要，但循环与注意力机制的性能差异尚未明确，需系统评估不同设计选择的影响。
AI.method: 构建基于LSTM-RNN、自注意力和跨模态注意力的融合模型，结合不同复杂度的CNN主干网络，通过端到端训练与超参数调优进行对比实验。
AI.result: 实验表明，低复杂度CNN主干网络配合端到端训练时，LSTM-RNN在效价与唤醒度估计上优于注意力模型。
AI.conclusion: 循环模型在特定条件下可能优于注意力机制，连续时间多模态情感识别需根据任务特性选择模型架构。

authors_text: Apan Dastider,Mingjie Lin
title: DAMON: Dynamic Amorphous Obstacle Navigation using Topological Manifold Learning and Variational Autoencoding
title_zh: DAMON：使用拓扑流形学习和变分自动编码的动态非晶障碍导航
abstract: DAMON leverages manifold learning and variational autoencoding to achieve obstacle avoidance, allowing for motion planning through adaptive graph traversal in a pre-learned low-dimensional hierarchically-structured manifold graph that captures intricate motion dynamics between a robotic arm and its obstacles. This versatile and reusable approach is applicable to various collaboration scenarios. The primary advantage of DAMON is its ability to embed information in a low-dimensional graph, eliminating the need for repeated computation required by current sampling-based methods. As a result, it offers faster and more efficient motion planning with significantly lower computational overhead and memory footprint. In summary, DAMON is a breakthrough methodology that addresses the challenge of dynamic obstacle avoidance in robotic systems and offers a promising solution for safe and efficient human-robot collaboration. Our approach has been experimentally validated on a 7-DoF robotic manipulator in both simulation and physical settings. DAMON enables the robot to learn and generate skills for avoiding previously-unseen obstacles while achieving predefined objectives. We also optimize DAMON's design parameters and performance using an analytical framework. Our approach outperforms mainstream methodologies, including RRT, RRT*, Dynamic RRT*, L2RRT, and MpNet, with 40\% more trajectory smoothness and over 65\% improved latency performance, on average.
summary: DAMON leverages manifold learning and variational autoencoding to achieve obstacle avoidance, allowing for motion planning through adaptive graph traversal in a pre-learned low-dimensional hierarchically-structured manifold graph that captures intricate motion dynamics between a robotic arm and its obstacles. This versatile and reusable approach is applicable to various collaboration scenarios. The primary advantage of DAMON is its ability to embed information in a low-dimensional graph, eliminating the need for repeated computation required by current sampling-based methods. As a result, it offers faster and more efficient motion planning with significantly lower computational overhead and memory footprint. In summary, DAMON is a breakthrough methodology that addresses the challenge of dynamic obstacle avoidance in robotic systems and offers a promising solution for safe and efficient human-robot collaboration. Our approach has been experimentally validated on a 7-DoF robotic manipulator in both simulation and physical settings. DAMON enables the robot to learn and generate skills for avoiding previously-unseen obstacles while achieving predefined objectives. We also optimize DAMON's design parameters and performance using an analytical framework. Our approach outperforms mainstream methodologies, including RRT, RRT*, Dynamic RRT*, L2RRT, and MpNet, with 40\% more trajectory smoothness and over 65\% improved latency performance, on average.
abstract_zh: DAMON 利用流形学习和变分自动编码来实现避障，允许通过预先学习的低维分层结构流形图中的自适应图遍历来进行运动规划，该流形图捕获机械臂与其障碍物之间复杂的运动动态。这种通用且可重用的方法适用于各种协作场景。 DAMON 的主要优点是能够将信息嵌入低维图中，从而消除了当前基于采样的方法所需的重复计算。因此，它提供了更快、更高效的运动规划，同时显着降低了计算开销和内存占用。总之，DAMON 是一种突破性的方法，它解决了机器人系统中动态避障的挑战，并为安全高效的人机协作提供了一种有前景的解决方案。我们的方法已在 7-DoF 机器人操纵器上的模拟和物理设置中进行了实验验证。 DAMON 使机器人能够学习和生成技能，以避免以前未见过的障碍，同时实现预定义的目标。我们还使用分析框架优化 DAMON 的设计参数和性能。我们的方法优于主流方法，包括 RRT、RRT*、动态 RRT*、L2RRT 和 MpNet，平均轨迹平滑度提高了 40%，延迟性能提高了 65% 以上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DAMON方法，利用流形学习和变分自编码技术实现机械臂在动态障碍物环境中的高效避障运动规划。
AI.motivation: 传统采样-based方法计算成本高且难以适应动态环境，亟需一种低计算开销、可复用的避障规划框架以提升人机协作安全性与效率。
AI.method: 通过拓扑流形学习构建层次化低维流形图，结合变分自编码器实现障碍物信息嵌入，采用自适应图遍历策略生成平滑轨迹，无需重复计算即可完成动态避障。
AI.result: 在7自由度机械臂仿真与实体实验中，DAMON相较RRT*等主流算法平均提升轨迹平滑度40%、降低延迟65%，可有效应对未见过的动态障碍物。
AI.conclusion: DAMON通过低维流形表示突破传统方法局限，为动态环境下的安全高效人机协作提供了创新性解决方案，具有显著的计算效率优势。

search_text: DAMON: Dynamic Amorphous Obstacle Navigation using Topological Manifold Learning and Variational Autoencoding DAMON：使用拓扑流形学习和变分自动编码的动态非晶障碍导航 DAMON leverages manifold learning and variational autoencoding to achieve obstacle avoidance, allowing for motion planning through adaptive graph traversal in a pre-learned low-dimensional hierarchically-structured manifold graph that captures intricate motion dynamics between a robotic arm and its obstacles. This versatile and reusable approach is applicable to various collaboration scenarios. The primary advantage of DAMON is its ability to embed information in a low-dimensional graph, eliminating the need for repeated computation required by current sampling-based methods. As a result, it offers faster and more efficient motion planning with significantly lower computational overhead and memory footprint. In summary, DAMON is a breakthrough methodology that addresses the challenge of dynamic obstacle avoidance in robotic systems and offers a promising solution for safe and efficient human-robot collaboration. Our approach has been experimentally validated on a 7-DoF robotic manipulator in both simulation and physical settings. DAMON enables the robot to learn and generate skills for avoiding previously-unseen obstacles while achieving predefined objectives. We also optimize DAMON's design parameters and performance using an analytical framework. Our approach outperforms mainstream methodologies, including RRT, RRT*, Dynamic RRT*, L2RRT, and MpNet, with 40\% more trajectory smoothness and over 65\% improved latency performance, on average. DAMON 利用流形学习和变分自动编码来实现避障，允许通过预先学习的低维分层结构流形图中的自适应图遍历来进行运动规划，该流形图捕获机械臂与其障碍物之间复杂的运动动态。这种通用且可重用的方法适用于各种协作场景。 DAMON 的主要优点是能够将信息嵌入低维图中，从而消除了当前基于采样的方法所需的重复计算。因此，它提供了更快、更高效的运动规划，同时显着降低了计算开销和内存占用。总之，DAMON 是一种突破性的方法，它解决了机器人系统中动态避障的挑战，并为安全高效的人机协作提供了一种有前景的解决方案。我们的方法已在 7-DoF 机器人操纵器上的模拟和物理设置中进行了实验验证。 DAMON 使机器人能够学习和生成技能，以避免以前未见过的障碍，同时实现预定义的目标。我们还使用分析框架优化 DAMON 的设计参数和性能。我们的方法优于主流方法，包括 RRT、RRT*、动态 RRT*、L2RRT 和 MpNet，平均轨迹平滑度提高了 40%，延迟性能提高了 65% 以上。 本文提出DAMON方法，利用流形学习和变分自编码技术实现机械臂在动态障碍物环境中的高效避障运动规划。 Apan Dastider,Mingjie Lin cs.RO

authors_text: Zhongping Zhang,Yiwen Gu,Bryan A. Plummer,Xin Miao,Jiayi Liu,Huayan Wang
title: Movie Genre Classification by Language Augmentation and Shot Sampling
title_zh: 通过语言增强和镜头采样进行电影类型分类
abstract: Video-based movie genre classification has garnered considerable attention due to its various applications in recommendation systems. Prior work has typically addressed this task by adapting models from traditional video classification tasks, such as action recognition or event detection. However, these models often neglect language elements (e.g., narrations or conversations) present in videos, which can implicitly convey high-level semantics of movie genres, like storylines or background context. Additionally, existing approaches are primarily designed to encode the entire content of the input video, leading to inefficiencies in predicting movie genres. Movie genre prediction may require only a few shots to accurately determine the genres, rendering a comprehensive understanding of the entire video unnecessary. To address these challenges, we propose a Movie genre Classification method based on Language augmentatIon and shot samPling (Movie-CLIP). Movie-CLIP mainly consists of two parts: a language augmentation module to recognize language elements from the input audio, and a shot sampling module to select representative shots from the entire video. We evaluate our method on MovieNet and Condensed Movies datasets, achieving approximate 6-9% improvement in mean Average Precision (mAP) over the baselines. We also generalize Movie-CLIP to the scene boundary detection task, achieving 1.1% improvement in Average Precision (AP) over the state-of-the-art. We release our implementation at github.com/Zhongping-Zhang/Movie-CLIP.
summary: Video-based movie genre classification has garnered considerable attention due to its various applications in recommendation systems. Prior work has typically addressed this task by adapting models from traditional video classification tasks, such as action recognition or event detection. However, these models often neglect language elements (e.g., narrations or conversations) present in videos, which can implicitly convey high-level semantics of movie genres, like storylines or background context. Additionally, existing approaches are primarily designed to encode the entire content of the input video, leading to inefficiencies in predicting movie genres. Movie genre prediction may require only a few shots to accurately determine the genres, rendering a comprehensive understanding of the entire video unnecessary. To address these challenges, we propose a Movie genre Classification method based on Language augmentatIon and shot samPling (Movie-CLIP). Movie-CLIP mainly consists of two parts: a language augmentation module to recognize language elements from the input audio, and a shot sampling module to select representative shots from the entire video. We evaluate our method on MovieNet and Condensed Movies datasets, achieving approximate 6-9% improvement in mean Average Precision (mAP) over the baselines. We also generalize Movie-CLIP to the scene boundary detection task, achieving 1.1% improvement in Average Precision (AP) over the state-of-the-art. We release our implementation at github.com/Zhongping-Zhang/Movie-CLIP.
abstract_zh: 基于视频的电影类型分类由于其在推荐系统中的各种应用而引起了相当大的关注。先前的工作通常通过调整传统视频分类任务（例如动作识别或事件检测）的模型来解决此任务。然而，这些模型经常忽略视频中存在的语言元素（例如旁白或对话），而这些元素可以隐式地传达电影类型的高级语义，例如故事情节或背景上下文。此外，现有方法主要设计用于对输入视频的整个内容进行编码，导致预测电影类型的效率低下。电影类型预测可能只需要几个镜头就可以准确地确定类型，从而不需要对整个视频进行全面的了解。为了解决这些挑战，我们提出了一种基于语言增强和镜头采样的电影类型分类方法（Movie-CLIP）。 Movie-CLIP主要由两部分组成：语言增强模块，用于从输入音频中识别语言元素；镜头采样模块，用于从整个视频中选择代表性镜头。我们在 MovieNet 和 Condensed Movies 数据集上评估了我们的方法，平均精度 (mAP) 较基线提高了约 6-9%。我们还将 Movie-CLIP 推广到场景边界检测任务，与最先进的技术相比，平均精度 (AP) 提高了 1.1%。我们在 github.com/Zhongping-Zhang/Movie-CLIP 上发布了我们的实现。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合语言增强与关键帧采样的电影类型分类方法Movie-CLIP，通过利用音频中的语言元素和视频中的代表性镜头提升分类效果。
AI.motivation: 现有视频电影类型分类方法忽视了音频中的语言信息（如旁白、对话），且通常需要处理完整视频内容导致效率低下，而实际分类可能仅需少量关键帧。
AI.method: 设计了语言增强模块提取音频中的语言特征，并引入关键帧采样模块选择最具代表性的视频片段，结合两者信息进行分类。
AI.result: 在MovieNet和Condensed Movies数据集上，mAP指标相较基线提升6-9%；在场景边界检测任务中AP指标提升1.1%。
AI.conclusion: Movie-CLIP通过语言信息与关键帧联合建模有效提升了分类性能，验证了语言特征与高效采样策略在电影类型识别中的价值。

However, these models often neglect language elements (e.g., narrations or conversations) present in videos, which can implicitly convey high-level semantics of movie genres, like storylines or background context. Movie-CLIP mainly consists of two parts: a language augmentation module to recognize language elements from the input audio, and a shot sampling module to select representative shots from the entire video. We evaluate our method on MovieNet and Condensed Movies datasets, achieving approximate 6-9% improvement in mean Average Precision (mAP) over the baselines. authors_text: Kai Zhang,Yawei Li,Jingyun Liang,Jiezhang Cao,Yulun Zhang,Hao Tang,Deng-Ping Fan,Radu Timofte,Luc Van Gool
title: Practical Blind Image Denoising via Swin-Conv-UNet and Data Synthesis
title_zh: 通过 Swin-Conv-UNet 和数据合成进行实用的盲图像去噪
abstract: While recent years have witnessed a dramatic upsurge of exploiting deep neural networks toward solving image denoising, existing methods mostly rely on simple noise assumptions, such as additive white Gaussian noise (AWGN), JPEG compression noise and camera sensor noise, and a general-purpose blind denoising method for real images remains unsolved. In this paper, we attempt to solve this problem from the perspective of network architecture design and training data synthesis. Specifically, for the network architecture design, we propose a swin-conv block to incorporate the local modeling ability of residual convolutional layer and non-local modeling ability of swin transformer block, and then plug it as the main building block into the widely-used image-to-image translation UNet architecture. For the training data synthesis, we design a practical noise degradation model which takes into consideration different kinds of noise (including Gaussian, Poisson, speckle, JPEG compression, and processed camera sensor noises) and resizing, and also involves a random shuffle strategy and a double degradation strategy. Extensive experiments on AGWN removal and real image denoising demonstrate that the new network architecture design achieves state-of-the-art performance and the new degradation model can help to significantly improve the practicability. We believe our work can provide useful insights into current denoising research.
summary: While recent years have witnessed a dramatic upsurge of exploiting deep neural networks toward solving image denoising, existing methods mostly rely on simple noise assumptions, such as additive white Gaussian noise (AWGN), JPEG compression noise and camera sensor noise, and a general-purpose blind denoising method for real images remains unsolved. In this paper, we attempt to solve this problem from the perspective of network architecture design and training data synthesis. Specifically, for the network architecture design, we propose a swin-conv block to incorporate the local modeling ability of residual convolutional layer and non-local modeling ability of swin transformer block, and then plug it as the main building block into the widely-used image-to-image translation UNet architecture. For the training data synthesis, we design a practical noise degradation model which takes into consideration different kinds of noise (including Gaussian, Poisson, speckle, JPEG compression, and processed camera sensor noises) and resizing, and also involves a random shuffle strategy and a double degradation strategy. Extensive experiments on AGWN removal and real image denoising demonstrate that the new network architecture design achieves state-of-the-art performance and the new degradation model can help to significantly improve the practicability. We believe our work can provide useful insights into current denoising research.
abstract_zh: 尽管近年来利用深度神经网络解决图像去噪的热潮兴起，但现有方法大多依赖于简单的噪声假设，例如加性高斯白噪声（AWGN）、JPEG压缩噪声和相机传感器噪声，而针对真实图像的通用盲去噪方法仍未解决。在本文中，我们尝试从网络架构设计和训练数据合成的角度来解决这个问题。具体来说，对于网络架构设计，我们提出了一个 swin-conv 模块，将残差卷积层的局部建模能力和 swin Transformer 模块的非局部建模能力结合起来，然后将其作为主要构建模块插入到广泛使用的图像到图像转换 UNet 架构中。对于训练数据合成，我们设计了一个实用的噪声退化模型，该模型考虑了不同类型的噪声（包括高斯、泊松、散斑、JPEG 压缩和处理后的相机传感器噪声）和调整大小，并且还涉及随机洗牌策略和双重退化策略。对AGWN去除和真实图像去噪的大量实验表明，新的网络架构设计实现了最先进的性能，并且新的退化模型有助于显着提高实用性。我们相信我们的工作可以为当前的去噪研究提供有用的见解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合Swin-Conv-UNet网络架构与数据合成方法的盲图像去噪方案，以解决真实场景下复杂噪声的去噪问题。
AI.motivation: 现有图像去噪方法依赖简单噪声模型（如AWGN），难以应对真实图像中复杂的混合噪声类型和降质过程。
AI.method: 设计融合残差卷积与Swin Transformer的Swin-Conv模块改进UNet架构；构建包含高斯、泊松、斑点等多种噪声及重采样操作的降质模型，并采用随机洗牌和双重降质策略生成训练数据。
AI.result: 在AGWN去除和真实图像去噪任务中均达到SOTA性能，新降质模型显著提升了方法的实用性和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过创新网络架构设计与数据合成策略，本文为盲图像去噪研究提供了有效解决方案和新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种结合Swin-Conv-UNet网络架构与数据合成方法的盲图像去噪方案，以解决真实场景下复杂噪声的去噪问题。

search_text: Practical Blind Image Denoising via Swin-Conv-UNet and Data Synthesis 通过 Swin-Conv-UNet 和数据合成进行实用的盲图像去噪 While recent years have witnessed a dramatic upsurge of exploiting deep neural networks toward solving image denoising, existing methods mostly rely on simple noise assumptions, such as additive white Gaussian noise (AWGN), JPEG compression noise and camera sensor noise, and a general-purpose blind denoising method for real images remains unsolved. In this paper, we attempt to solve this problem from the perspective of network architecture design and training data synthesis. Specifically, for the network architecture design, we propose a swin-conv block to incorporate the local modeling ability of residual convolutional layer and non-local modeling ability of swin transformer block, and then plug it as the main building block into the widely-used image-to-image translation UNet architecture. For the training data synthesis, we design a practical noise degradation model which takes into consideration different kinds of noise (including Gaussian, Poisson, speckle, JPEG compression, and processed camera sensor noises) and resizing, and also involves a random shuffle strategy and a double degradation strategy. Extensive experiments on AGWN removal and real image denoising demonstrate that the new network architecture design achieves state-of-the-art performance and the new degradation model can help to significantly improve the practicability. We believe our work can provide useful insights into current denoising research. 尽管近年来利用深度神经网络解决图像去噪的热潮兴起，但现有方法大多依赖于简单的噪声假设，例如加性高斯白噪声（AWGN）、JPEG压缩噪声和相机传感器噪声，而针对真实图像的通用盲去噪方法仍未解决。在本文中，我们尝试从网络架构设计和训练数据合成的角度来解决这个问题。具体来说，对于网络架构设计，我们提出了一个 swin-conv 模块，将残差卷积层的局部建模能力和 swin Transformer 模块的非局部建模能力结合起来，然后将其作为主要构建模块插入到广泛使用的图像到图像转换 UNet 架构中。对于训练数据合成，我们设计了一个实用的噪声退化模型，该模型考虑了不同类型的噪声（包括高斯、泊松、散斑、JPEG 压缩和处理后的相机传感器噪声）和调整大小，并且还涉及随机洗牌策略和双重退化策略。对AGWN去除和真实图像去噪的大量实验表明，新的网络架构设计实现了最先进的性能，并且新的退化模型有助于显着提高实用性。我们相信我们的工作可以为当前的去噪研究提供有用的见解。 本文提出一种结合Swin-Conv-UNet网络架构与数据合成方法的盲图像去噪方案，以解决真实场景下复杂噪声的去噪问题。 Kai Zhang,Yawei Li,Jingyun Liang,Jiezhang Cao,Yulun Zhang,Hao Tang,Deng-Ping Fan,Radu Timofte,Luc Van Gool cs.CV,cs.GR,eess.IV

authors_text: Mohamed Chafik Bakkay,Mathieu Serrurier,Valentin Kivachuk Burda,Florian Dupuy,Naty Citlali Cabrera-Gutierrez,Michael Zamo,Maud-Alix Mader,Olivier Mestre,Guillaume Oller,Jean-Christophe Jouhaud,Laurent Terray
title: Precipitaion Nowcasting using Deep Neural Network
title_zh: 使用深度神经网络进行降水临近预报
abstract: Precipitation nowcasting is of great importance for weather forecast users, for activities ranging from outdoor activities and sports competitions to airport traffic management. In contrast to long-term precipitation forecasts which are traditionally obtained from numerical models, precipitation nowcasting needs to be very fast. It is therefore more challenging to obtain because of this time constraint. Recently, many machine learning based methods had been proposed. We propose the use three popular deep learning models (U-net, ConvLSTM and SVG-LP) trained on two-dimensional precipitation maps for precipitation nowcasting. We proposed an algorithm for patch extraction to obtain high resolution precipitation maps. We proposed a loss function to solve the blurry image issue and to reduce the influence of zero value pixels in precipitation maps.
summary: Precipitation nowcasting is of great importance for weather forecast users, for activities ranging from outdoor activities and sports competitions to airport traffic management. In contrast to long-term precipitation forecasts which are traditionally obtained from numerical models, precipitation nowcasting needs to be very fast. It is therefore more challenging to obtain because of this time constraint. Recently, many machine learning based methods had been proposed. We propose the use three popular deep learning models (U-net, ConvLSTM and SVG-LP) trained on two-dimensional precipitation maps for precipitation nowcasting. We proposed an algorithm for patch extraction to obtain high resolution precipitation maps. We proposed a loss function to solve the blurry image issue and to reduce the influence of zero value pixels in precipitation maps.
abstract_zh: 临近降水预报对于天气预报用户、户外活动、体育比赛到机场交通管理等活动都非常重要。与传统上通过数值模型获得的长期降水预报相比，临近降水预报需要非常快。因此，由于时间限制，获取起来更具挑战性。最近，提出了许多基于机器学习的方法。我们建议使用三种流行的深度学习模型（U-net、ConvLSTM 和 SVG-LP）在二维降水图上训练来进行降水临近预报。我们提出了一种斑块提取算法以获得高分辨率降水图。我们提出了一种损失函数来解决图像模糊问题并减少降水图中零值像素的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用深度神经网络进行短时降水预测（Nowcasting），以提高天气预报的实时性和准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统数值模型难以满足短时降水预测的时效性需求，而现有机器学习方法在高分辨率和图像模糊问题上存在不足。
AI.method: 采用U-Net、ConvLSTM和SVG-LP三种深度学习模型，结合自定义的图像块提取算法和改进损失函数，处理二维降水图数据以提升预测精度。
AI.result: 提出的算法有效解决了降水图模糊问题和零值像素干扰，生成高分辨率短时降水预测结果。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习方法在短时降水预测任务中表现优异，所提技术可为气象预报提供更快速准确的决策支持。

authors_text: Anna Zou,Zhiyuan Li
title: Interpretability of Neural Network With Physiological Mechanisms
title_zh: 神经网络与生理机制的可解释性
abstract: Deep learning continues to play as a powerful state-of-art technique that has achieved extraordinary accuracy levels in various domains of regression and classification tasks, including images, video, signal, and natural language data. The original goal of proposing the neural network model is to improve the understanding of complex human brains using a mathematical expression approach. However, recent deep learning techniques continue to lose the interpretations of its functional process by being treated mostly as a black-box approximator. To address this issue, such an AI model needs to be biological and physiological realistic to incorporate a better understanding of human-machine evolutionary intelligence. In this study, we compare neural networks and biological circuits to discover the similarities and differences from various perspective views. We further discuss the insights into how neural networks learn from data by investigating human biological behaviors and understandable justifications.
summary: Deep learning continues to play as a powerful state-of-art technique that has achieved extraordinary accuracy levels in various domains of regression and classification tasks, including images, video, signal, and natural language data. The original goal of proposing the neural network model is to improve the understanding of complex human brains using a mathematical expression approach. However, recent deep learning techniques continue to lose the interpretations of its functional process by being treated mostly as a black-box approximator. To address this issue, such an AI model needs to be biological and physiological realistic to incorporate a better understanding of human-machine evolutionary intelligence. In this study, we compare neural networks and biological circuits to discover the similarities and differences from various perspective views. We further discuss the insights into how neural networks learn from data by investigating human biological behaviors and understandable justifications.
abstract_zh: 深度学习继续作为一种强大的最先进技术发挥作用，在回归和分类任务的各个领域（包括图像、视频、信号和自然语言数据）中实现了非凡的准确性水平。提出神经网络模型的最初目标是利用数学表达方法提高对复杂人脑的理解。然而，最近的深度学习技术主要被视为黑盒逼近器，从而继续失去对其功能过程的解释。为了解决这个问题，这样的人工智能模型需要具有生物学和生理学的真实性，以便更好地理解人机进化智能。在这项研究中，我们比较神经网络和生物电路，从不同的角度发现相似点和不同点。我们通过研究人类生物学行为和可理解的理由，进一步讨论神经网络如何从数据中学习的见解。

AI.tldr: 探讨如何通过结合生理机制提升神经网络的可解释性
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型作为黑箱缺乏可解释性，需结合生物生理机制以增强理解
AI.method: 通过比较神经网络与生物电路的异同，并分析人类生物行为对神经网络学习的启示
AI.result: 发现了神经网络与生物电路的相似性与差异性，并提出了基于生理机制的可解释性方法
AI.conclusion: 结合生理机制能增强神经网络的可解释性，促进人类对人机进化智能的理解

authors_text: Karan Nathwani,Bhavya Dixit,Sunil Kumar Kopparapu
title: Computing Optimal Location of Microphone for Improved Speech Recognition
title_zh: 计算麦克风的最佳位置以改进语音识别
abstract: It was shown in our earlier work that the measurement error in the microphone position affected the room impulse response (RIR) which in turn affected the single-channel close microphone and multi-channel distant microphone speech recognition. In this paper, as an extension, we systematically study to identify the optimal location of the microphone, given an approximate and hence erroneous location of the microphone in 3D space. The primary idea is to use Monte-Carlo technique to generate a large number of random microphone positions around the erroneous microphone position and select the microphone position that results in the best performance of a general purpose automatic speech recognition (gp-asr). We experiment with clean and noisy speech and show that the optimal location of the microphone is unique and is affected by noise.
summary: It was shown in our earlier work that the measurement error in the microphone position affected the room impulse response (RIR) which in turn affected the single-channel close microphone and multi-channel distant microphone speech recognition. In this paper, as an extension, we systematically study to identify the optimal location of the microphone, given an approximate and hence erroneous location of the microphone in 3D space. The primary idea is to use Monte-Carlo technique to generate a large number of random microphone positions around the erroneous microphone position and select the microphone position that results in the best performance of a general purpose automatic speech recognition (gp-asr). We experiment with clean and noisy speech and show that the optimal location of the microphone is unique and is affected by noise.
abstract_zh: 我们早期的工作表明，麦克风位置的测量误差会影响房间脉冲响应（RIR），进而影响单通道近距离麦克风和多通道远距离麦克风语音识别。在本文中，作为扩展，我们系统地研究了在给定麦克风在 3D 空间中的近似位置（因此是错误的位置）的情况下确定麦克风的最佳位置。主要思想是使用蒙特卡罗技术在错误麦克风位置周围生成大量随机麦克风位置，并选择能够实现通用自动语音识别 (gp-asr) 最佳性能的麦克风位置。我们对干净和嘈杂的语音进行了实验，结果表明麦克风的最佳位置是唯一的，并且会受到噪音的影响。

AI.tldr: 本论文旨在确定麦克风在三维空间中的最佳位置以提升语音识别性能。
AI.motivation: 麦克风位置误差会通过影响房间脉冲响应进而降低语音识别准确率，需寻找最优位置以优化系统表现。
AI.method: 采用蒙特卡洛方法生成大量随机麦克风位置，通过通用自动语音识别系统评估性能并筛选最优位置。
AI.result: 实验表明最佳麦克风位置具有唯一性，且在噪声环境下位置选择受环境影响显著。
AI.conclusion: 蒙特卡洛方法可有效定位最优麦克风位置，该位置在噪声条件下具有唯一性，为实际部署提供理论依据。

search_text: Computing Optimal Location of Microphone for Improved Speech Recognition 计算麦克风的最佳位置以改进语音识别 It was shown in our earlier work that the measurement error in the microphone position affected the room impulse response (RIR) which in turn affected the single-channel close microphone and multi-channel distant microphone speech recognition. In this paper, as an extension, we systematically study to identify the optimal location of the microphone, given an approximate and hence erroneous location of the microphone in 3D space. The primary idea is to use Monte-Carlo technique to generate a large number of random microphone positions around the erroneous microphone position and select the microphone position that results in the best performance of a general purpose automatic speech recognition (gp-asr). We experiment with clean and noisy speech and show that the optimal location of the microphone is unique and is affected by noise. 我们早期的工作表明，麦克风位置的测量误差会影响房间脉冲响应（RIR），进而影响单通道近距离麦克风和多通道远距离麦克风语音识别。在本文中，作为扩展，我们系统地研究了在给定麦克风在 3D 空间中的近似位置（因此是错误的位置）的情况下确定麦克风的最佳位置。主要思想是使用蒙特卡罗技术在错误麦克风位置周围生成大量随机麦克风位置，并选择能够实现通用自动语音识别 (gp-asr) 最佳性能的麦克风位置。我们对干净和嘈杂的语音进行了实验，结果表明麦克风的最佳位置是唯一的，并且会受到噪音的影响。 本论文旨在确定麦克风在三维空间中的最佳位置以提升语音识别性能。 Karan Nathwani,Bhavya Dixit,Sunil Kumar Kopparapu eess.AS,cs.AI,cs.SD

authors_text: Hansheng Chen,Pichao Wang,Fan Wang,Wei Tian,Lu Xiong,Hao Li
title: EPro-PnP: Generalized End-to-End Probabilistic Perspective-n-Points for Monocular Object Pose Estimation
title_zh: EPro-PnP：用于单目物体姿态估计的广义端到端概率透视 n 点
comment: CVPR 2022 Best Student Paper, code available at https://github.com/tjiiv-cprg/EPro-PnP
comments: CVPR 2022 Best Student Paper, code available at https://github.com/tjiiv-cprg/EPro-PnP
abstract: Locating 3D objects from a single RGB image via Perspective-n-Points (PnP) is a long-standing problem in computer vision. Driven by end-to-end deep learning, recent studies suggest interpreting PnP as a differentiable layer, so that 2D-3D point correspondences can be partly learned by backpropagating the gradient w.r.t. object pose. Yet, learning the entire set of unrestricted 2D-3D points from scratch fails to converge with existing approaches, since the deterministic pose is inherently non-differentiable. In this paper, we propose the EPro-PnP, a probabilistic PnP layer for general end-to-end pose estimation, which outputs a distribution of pose on the SE(3) manifold, essentially bringing categorical Softmax to the continuous domain. The 2D-3D coordinates and corresponding weights are treated as intermediate variables learned by minimizing the KL divergence between the predicted and target pose distribution. The underlying principle unifies the existing approaches and resembles the attention mechanism. EPro-PnP significantly outperforms competitive baselines, closing the gap between PnP-based method and the task-specific leaders on the LineMOD 6DoF pose estimation and nuScenes 3D object detection benchmarks.
summary: Locating 3D objects from a single RGB image via Perspective-n-Points (PnP) is a long-standing problem in computer vision. Driven by end-to-end deep learning, recent studies suggest interpreting PnP as a differentiable layer, so that 2D-3D point correspondences can be partly learned by backpropagating the gradient w.r.t. object pose. Yet, learning the entire set of unrestricted 2D-3D points from scratch fails to converge with existing approaches, since the deterministic pose is inherently non-differentiable. In this paper, we propose the EPro-PnP, a probabilistic PnP layer for general end-to-end pose estimation, which outputs a distribution of pose on the SE(3) manifold, essentially bringing categorical Softmax to the continuous domain. The 2D-3D coordinates and corresponding weights are treated as intermediate variables learned by minimizing the KL divergence between the predicted and target pose distribution. The underlying principle unifies the existing approaches and resembles the attention mechanism. EPro-PnP significantly outperforms competitive baselines, closing the gap between PnP-based method and the task-specific leaders on the LineMOD 6DoF pose estimation and nuScenes 3D object detection benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 通过透视 n 点 (PnP) 从单个 RGB 图像中定位 3D 对象是计算机视觉中长期存在的问题。在端到端深度学习的推动下，最近的研究建议将 PnP 解释为可微层，以便可以通过反向传播梯度来部分学习 2D-3D 点对应关系。物体姿势。然而，从头开始学习整套不受限制的 2D-3D 点无法与现有方法收敛，因为确定性姿势本质上是不可微分的。在本文中，我们提出了 EPro-PnP，一个用于一般端到端姿态估计的概率 PnP 层，它输出 SE(3) 流形上的姿态分布，本质上将分类 Softmax 引入连续域。 2D-3D 坐标和相应的权重被视为通过最小化预测姿态分布和目标姿态分布之间的 KL 散度来学习的中间变量。基本原理统一了现有的方法，类似于注意力机制。 EPro-PnP 显着优于竞争基准，缩小了基于 PnP 的方法与 LineMOD 6DoF 姿态估计和 nuScenes 3D 对象检测基准上特定任务领先者之间的差距。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为EPro-PnP的概率化PnP层，用于单目视觉下的通用端到端物体位姿估计。
AI.motivation: 传统PnP方法在单目图像中学习2D-3D点对应关系时因确定性位姿的非微分性导致收敛困难，需通过概率化方法解决这一问题。
AI.method: 将PnP建模为SE(3)流形上的概率分布，通过最小化预测位姿分布与目标分布的KL散度学习中间变量，结合注意力机制原理实现端到端优化。
AI.result: 在LineMOD 6DoF和nuScenes 3D检测基准测试中显著优于现有方法，缩小了PnP方法与任务专用模型的性能差距。
AI.conclusion: EPro-PnP通过概率化建模和分布对齐策略，为单目位姿估计提供了更鲁棒且通用的解决方案。

Driven by end-to-end deep learning, recent studies suggest interpreting PnP as a differentiable layer, so that 2D-3D point correspondences can be partly learned by backpropagating the gradient w.r.t. object pose. Yet, learning the entire set of unrestricted 2D-3D points from scratch fails to converge with existing approaches, since the deterministic pose is inherently non-differentiable. In this paper, we propose the EPro-PnP, a probabilistic PnP layer for general end-to-end pose estimation, which outputs a distribution of pose on the SE(3) manifold, essentially bringing categorical Softmax to the continuous domain. The 2D-3D coordinates and corresponding weights are treated as intermediate variables learned by minimizing the KL divergence between the predicted and target pose distribution. The underlying principle unifies the existing approaches and resembles the attention mechanism. authors_text: Omkar Thawakar,Sanath Narayan,Jiale Cao,Hisham Cholakkal,Rao Muhammad Anwer,Muhammad Haris Khan,Salman Khan,Michael Felsberg,Fahad Shahbaz Khan
title: Video Instance Segmentation via Multi-scale Spatio-temporal Split Attention Transformer
title_zh: 通过多尺度时空分割注意力变换器进行视频实例分割
abstract: State-of-the-art transformer-based video instance segmentation (VIS) approaches typically utilize either single-scale spatio-temporal features or per-frame multi-scale features during the attention computations. We argue that such an attention computation ignores the multi-scale spatio-temporal feature relationships that are crucial to tackle target appearance deformations in videos. To address this issue, we propose a transformer-based VIS framework, named MS-STS VIS, that comprises a novel multi-scale spatio-temporal split (MS-STS) attention module in the encoder. The proposed MS-STS module effectively captures spatio-temporal feature relationships at multiple scales across frames in a video. We further introduce an attention block in the decoder to enhance the temporal consistency of the detected instances in different frames of a video. Moreover, an auxiliary discriminator is introduced during training to ensure better foreground-background separability within the multi-scale spatio-temporal feature space. We conduct extensive experiments on two benchmarks: Youtube-VIS (2019 and 2021). Our MS-STS VIS achieves state-of-the-art performance on both benchmarks. When using the ResNet50 backbone, our MS-STS achieves a mask AP of 50.1 %, outperforming the best reported results in literature by 2.7 % and by 4.8 % at higher overlap threshold of AP_75, while being comparable in model size and speed on Youtube-VIS 2019 val. set. When using the Swin Transformer backbone, MS-STS VIS achieves mask AP of 61.0 % on Youtube-VIS 2019 val. set. Our code and models are available at https://github.com/OmkarThawakar/MSSTS-VIS.
summary: State-of-the-art transformer-based video instance segmentation (VIS) approaches typically utilize either single-scale spatio-temporal features or per-frame multi-scale features during the attention computations. We argue that such an attention computation ignores the multi-scale spatio-temporal feature relationships that are crucial to tackle target appearance deformations in videos. To address this issue, we propose a transformer-based VIS framework, named MS-STS VIS, that comprises a novel multi-scale spatio-temporal split (MS-STS) attention module in the encoder. The proposed MS-STS module effectively captures spatio-temporal feature relationships at multiple scales across frames in a video. We further introduce an attention block in the decoder to enhance the temporal consistency of the detected instances in different frames of a video. Moreover, an auxiliary discriminator is introduced during training to ensure better foreground-background separability within the multi-scale spatio-temporal feature space. We conduct extensive experiments on two benchmarks: Youtube-VIS (2019 and 2021). Our MS-STS VIS achieves state-of-the-art performance on both benchmarks. When using the ResNet50 backbone, our MS-STS achieves a mask AP of 50.1 %, outperforming the best reported results in literature by 2.7 % and by 4.8 % at higher overlap threshold of AP_75, while being comparable in model size and speed on Youtube-VIS 2019 val. set. When using the Swin Transformer backbone, MS-STS VIS achieves mask AP of 61.0 % on Youtube-VIS 2019 val. set. Our code and models are available at https://github.com/OmkarThawakar/MSSTS-VIS.
abstract_zh: 最先进的基于变压器的视频实例分割（VIS）方法通常在注意力计算期间利用单尺度时空特征或每帧多尺度特征。我们认为，这种注意力计算忽略了多尺度时空特征关系，这对于解决视频中的目标外观变形至关重要。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于 Transformer 的 VIS 框架，名为 MS-STS VIS，它在编码器中包含一个新颖的多尺度时空分割（MS-STS）注意模块。所提出的 MS-STS 模块有效地捕获视频中跨帧的多个尺度的时空特征关系。我们进一步在解码器中引入注意块，以增强视频不同帧中检测到的实例的时间一致性。此外，在训练过程中引入了辅助鉴别器，以确保多尺度时空特征空间内更好的前景-背景可分离性。我们对两个基准进行了广泛的实验：Youtube-VIS（2019 年和 2021 年）。我们的 MS-STS VIS 在两项基准测试中均实现了最先进的性能。当使用 ResNet50 主干网时，我们的 MS-STS 实现了 50.1% 的掩模 AP，比文献中报告的最佳结果高出 2.7%，在 AP_75 的较高重叠阈值下高出 4.8%，同时在 Youtube-VIS 2019 val 上的模型大小和速度方面具有可比性。放。当使用 Swin Transformer 主干网时，MS-STS VIS 在 Youtube-VIS 2019 val 上实现了 61.0% 的掩模 AP。放。我们的代码和模型可在 https://github.com/OmkarThawakar/MSSTS-VIS 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多尺度时空分割注意力变换器的视频实例分割方法，旨在解决现有方法在处理视频目标外观变形时的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有基于变换器的视频实例分割方法在注意机制计算中未能充分捕捉多尺度时空特征关系，导致对视频中目标变形的鲁棒性不足。
AI.method: 提出MS-STS VIS框架，包含多尺度时空分割注意力模块（MS-STS）、解码器注意力块及辅助判别器，通过多尺度特征关系建模和时序一致性增强提升分割性能。
AI.result: 在YouTube-VIS 2019和2021基准测试中，使用ResNet50骨干网络时mask AP达50.1%，较现有方法提升2.7%；使用Swin Transformer骨干网络时mask AP达61.0%。
AI.conclusion: MS-STS VIS通过多尺度时空特征建模和时序优化，在保持模型效率的同时实现了视频实例分割的最先进性能。

search_text: Video Instance Segmentation via Multi-scale Spatio-temporal Split Attention Transformer 通过多尺度时空分割注意力变换器进行视频实例分割 State-of-the-art transformer-based video instance segmentation (VIS) approaches typically utilize either single-scale spatio-temporal features or per-frame multi-scale features during the attention computations. We argue that such an attention computation ignores the multi-scale spatio-temporal feature relationships that are crucial to tackle target appearance deformations in videos. To address this issue, we propose a transformer-based VIS framework, named MS-STS VIS, that comprises a novel multi-scale spatio-temporal split (MS-STS) attention module in the encoder. The proposed MS-STS module effectively captures spatio-temporal feature relationships at multiple scales across frames in a video. We further introduce an attention block in the decoder to enhance the temporal consistency of the detected instances in different frames of a video. Moreover, an auxiliary discriminator is introduced during training to ensure better foreground-background separability within the multi-scale spatio-temporal feature space. We conduct extensive experiments on two benchmarks: Youtube-VIS (2019 and 2021). Our MS-STS VIS achieves state-of-the-art performance on both benchmarks. When using the ResNet50 backbone, our MS-STS achieves a mask AP of 50.1 %, outperforming the best reported results in literature by 2.7 % and by 4.8 % at higher overlap threshold of AP_75, while being comparable in model size and speed on Youtube-VIS 2019 val. set. When using the Swin Transformer backbone, MS-STS VIS achieves mask AP of 61.0 % on Youtube-VIS 2019 val. set. Our code and models are available at https://github.com/OmkarThawakar/MSSTS-VIS. 最先进的基于变压器的视频实例分割（VIS）方法通常在注意力计算期间利用单尺度时空特征或每帧多尺度特征。我们认为，这种注意力计算忽略了多尺度时空特征关系，这对于解决视频中的目标外观变形至关重要。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于 Transformer 的 VIS 框架，名为 MS-STS VIS，它在编码器中包含一个新颖的多尺度时空分割（MS-STS）注意模块。所提出的 MS-STS 模块有效地捕获视频中跨帧的多个尺度的时空特征关系。我们进一步在解码器中引入注意块，以增强视频不同帧中检测到的实例的时间一致性。此外，在训练过程中引入了辅助鉴别器，以确保多尺度时空特征空间内更好的前景-背景可分离性。我们对两个基准进行了广泛的实验：Youtube-VIS（2019 年和 2021 年）。我们的 MS-STS VIS 在两项基准测试中均实现了最先进的性能。当使用 ResNet50 主干网时，我们的 MS-STS 实现了 50.1% 的掩模 AP，比文献中报告的最佳结果高出 2.7%，在 AP_75 的较高重叠阈值下高出 4.8%，同时在 Youtube-VIS 2019 val 上的模型大小和速度方面具有可比性。放。当使用 Swin Transformer 主干网时，MS-STS VIS 在 Youtube-VIS 2019 val 上实现了 61.0% 的掩模 AP。放。我们的代码和模型可在 https://github.com/OmkarThawakar/MSSTS-VIS 获取。 本文提出一种基于多尺度时空分割注意力变换器的视频实例分割方法，旨在解决现有方法在处理视频目标外观变形时的不足。 Omkar Thawakar,Sanath Narayan,Jiale Cao,Hisham Cholakkal,Rao Muhammad Anwer,Muhammad Haris Khan,Salman Khan,Michael Felsberg,Fahad Shahbaz Khan cs.CV

authors_text: Sridhar Pandian Arunachalam,Sneha Silwal,Ben Evans,Lerrel Pinto
title: Dexterous Imitation Made Easy: A Learning-Based Framework for Efficient Dexterous Manipulation
title_zh: 灵巧模仿变得简单：基于学习的高效灵巧操作框架
comment: The first two authors contributed equally
comments: The first two authors contributed equally
abstract: Optimizing behaviors for dexterous manipulation has been a longstanding challenge in robotics, with a variety of methods from model-based control to model-free reinforcement learning having been previously explored in literature. Perhaps one of the most powerful techniques to learn complex manipulation strategies is imitation learning. However, collecting and learning from demonstrations in dexterous manipulation is quite challenging. The complex, high-dimensional action-space involved with multi-finger control often leads to poor sample efficiency of learning-based methods. In this work, we propose 'Dexterous Imitation Made Easy' (DIME) a new imitation learning framework for dexterous manipulation. DIME only requires a single RGB camera to observe a human operator and teleoperate our robotic hand. Once demonstrations are collected, DIME employs standard imitation learning methods to train dexterous manipulation policies. On both simulation and real robot benchmarks we demonstrate that DIME can be used to solve complex, in-hand manipulation tasks such as 'flipping', 'spinning', and 'rotating' objects with the Allegro hand. Our framework along with pre-collected demonstrations is publicly available at https://nyu-robot-learning.github.io/dime.

The complex, high-dimensional action-space involved with multi-finger control often leads to poor sample efficiency of learning-based methods. In this work, we propose 'Dexterous Imitation Made Easy' (DIME) a new imitation learning framework for dexterous manipulation. DIME only requires a single RGB camera to observe a human operator and teleoperate our robotic hand. Once demonstrations are collected, DIME employs standard imitation learning methods to train dexterous manipulation policies. On both simulation and real robot benchmarks we demonstrate that DIME can be used to solve complex, in-hand manipulation tasks such as 'flipping', 'spinning', and 'rotating' objects with the Allegro hand. Our framework along with pre-collected demonstrations is publicly available at https://nyu-robot-learning.github.io/dime.
abstract_zh: 优化灵巧操作的行为一直是机器人技术中的一个长期挑战，之前的文献中已经探讨了从基于模型的控制到无模型强化学习的各种方法。也许学习复杂操作策略的最强大的技术之一就是模仿学习。然而，收集和学习灵巧操作的演示是相当具有挑战性的。多指控制涉及的复杂、高维动作空间通常会导致基于学习的方法的样本效率较差。在这项工作中，我们提出了“Dexterous Imitation Made Easy”（DIME），一种用于灵巧操作的新模仿学习框架。 DIME 只需要一个 RGB 摄像头即可观察人类操作员并远程操作我们的机械手。一旦收集到示范，DIME 就会采用标准的模仿学习方法来训练灵巧的操纵策略。在模拟和真实机器人基准测试中，我们证明 DIME 可用于解决复杂的手动操作任务，例如用 Allegro 手“翻转”、“旋转”和“旋转”物体。我们的框架以及预先收集的演示可在 https://nyu-robot-learning.github.io/dime 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于学习的框架，解决灵巧操作中的模仿学习问题，提高样本效率。
AI.motivation: 灵巧操作的高维动作空间导致传统模仿学习方法样本效率低下，需更高效框架。
AI.method: DIME框架通过单目RGB相机捕捉人类操作，遥操作机械手，并采用标准模仿学习方法训练策略。
AI.result: 在仿真和真实机器人测试中，DIME成功完成翻转、旋转等复杂任务，展示其有效性。
AI.conclusion: DIME框架有效解决灵巧操作问题，且公开了框架和示范数据，促进研究。

authors_text: Xingyi Zhou,Tianwei Yin,Vladlen Koltun,Philipp Krähenbühl
title: Global Tracking Transformers
title_zh: 全球跟踪变压器
comment: CVPR 2022. Code is available at https://github.com/xingyizhou/GTR
comments: CVPR 2022. Code is available at https://github.com/xingyizhou/GTR
abstract: We present a novel transformer-based architecture for global multi-object tracking. Our network takes a short sequence of frames as input and produces global trajectories for all objects. The core component is a global tracking transformer that operates on objects from all frames in the sequence. The transformer encodes object features from all frames, and uses trajectory queries to group them into trajectories. The trajectory queries are object features from a single frame and naturally produce unique trajectories. Our global tracking transformer does not require intermediate pairwise grouping or combinatorial association, and can be jointly trained with an object detector. It achieves competitive performance on the popular MOT17 benchmark, with 75.3 MOTA and 59.1 HOTA. More importantly, our framework seamlessly integrates into state-of-the-art large-vocabulary detectors to track any objects. Experiments on the challenging TAO dataset show that our framework consistently improves upon baselines that are based on pairwise association, outperforming published works by a significant 7.7 tracking mAP. Code is available at https://github.com/xingyizhou/GTR.
summary: We present a novel transformer-based architecture for global multi-object tracking. Our network takes a short sequence of frames as input and produces global trajectories for all objects. The core component is a global tracking transformer that operates on objects from all frames in the sequence. The transformer encodes object features from all frames, and uses trajectory queries to group them into trajectories. The trajectory queries are object features from a single frame and naturally produce unique trajectories. Our global tracking transformer does not require intermediate pairwise grouping or combinatorial association, and can be jointly trained with an object detector. It achieves competitive performance on the popular MOT17 benchmark, with 75.3 MOTA and 59.1 HOTA. More importantly, our framework seamlessly integrates into state-of-the-art large-vocabulary detectors to track any objects. Experiments on the challenging TAO dataset show that our framework consistently improves upon baselines that are based on pairwise association, outperforming published works by a significant 7.7 tracking mAP. Code is available at https://github.com/xingyizhou/GTR.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的基于变压器的全局多目标跟踪架构。我们的网络采用短帧序列作为输入，并为所有对象生成全局轨迹。核心组件是一个全局跟踪变压器，它对序列中所有帧的对象进行操作。转换器对所有帧中的对象特征进行编码，并使用轨迹查询将它们分组为轨迹。轨迹查询是来自单帧的对象特征，自然会产生独特的轨迹。我们的全局跟踪变压器不需要中间的成对分组或组合关联，并且可以与目标检测器联合训练。它在流行的 MOT17 基准测试中取得了具有竞争力的性能，MOTA 为 75.3，HOTA 为 59.1。更重要的是，我们的框架无缝集成到最先进的大词汇量检测器中以跟踪任何对象。在具有挑战性的 TAO 数据集上进行的实验表明，我们的框架持续改进基于成对关联的基线，其跟踪 mAP 显着优于已发表的作品 7.7。代码可在 https://github.com/xingyizhou/GTR 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Transformer的全局多目标跟踪架构，通过处理多帧对象特征并生成全局轨迹，实现无需中间关联步骤的高效跟踪。
AI.motivation: 传统多目标跟踪方法依赖复杂的中间关联步骤，而本文旨在通过直接建模全局轨迹关系，简化流程并提升与检测器的集成能力。
AI.method: 设计全局跟踪Transformer，通过编码所有帧的对象特征，并利用单帧生成的轨迹查询（trajectory queries）直接分组形成轨迹，避免逐对关联。
AI.result: 在MOT17基准上达到75.3 MOTA和59.1 HOTA，在TAO数据集上超越基线方法7.7 tracking mAP。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效整合至先进检测器中，通过全局轨迹建模显著提升跟踪性能，尤其在复杂场景中表现优异。

More importantly, our framework seamlessly integrates into state-of-the-art large-vocabulary detectors to track any objects. Experiments on the challenging TAO dataset show that our framework consistently improves upon baselines that are based on pairwise association, outperforming published works by a significant 7.7 tracking mAP. Code is available at https://github.com/xingyizhou/GTR. 我们提出了一种新颖的基于变压器的全局多目标跟踪架构。我们的网络采用短帧序列作为输入，并为所有对象生成全局轨迹。核心组件是一个全局跟踪变压器，它对序列中所有帧的对象进行操作。转换器对所有帧中的对象特征进行编码，并使用轨迹查询将它们分组为轨迹。轨迹查询是来自单帧的对象特征，自然会产生独特的轨迹。我们的全局跟踪变压器不需要中间的成对分组或组合关联，并且可以与目标检测器联合训练。它在流行的 MOT17 基准测试中取得了具有竞争力的性能，MOTA 为 75.3，HOTA 为 59.1。更重要的是，我们的框架无缝集成到最先进的大词汇量检测器中以跟踪任何对象。在具有挑战性的 TAO 数据集上进行的实验表明，我们的框架持续改进基于成对关联的基线，其跟踪 mAP 显着优于已发表的作品 7.7。代码可在 https://github.com/xingyizhou/GTR 获取。 本文提出了一种基于Transformer的全局多目标跟踪架构，通过处理多帧对象特征并生成全局轨迹，实现无需中间关联步骤的高效跟踪。 Xingyi Zhou,Tianwei Yin,Vladlen Koltun,Philipp Krähenbühl cs.CV

authors_text: Likun Cai,Zhi Zhang,Yi Zhu,Li Zhang,Mu Li,Xiangyang Xue
title: BigDetection: A Large-scale Benchmark for Improved Object Detector Pre-training
title_zh: BigDetection：改进目标检测器预训练的大规模基准
comment: Technical report, code is released at https://github.com/amazon-research/bigdetection
comments: Technical report, code is released at https://github.com/amazon-research/bigdetection
abstract: Multiple datasets and open challenges for object detection have been introduced in recent years. To build more general and powerful object detection systems, in this paper, we construct a new large-scale benchmark termed BigDetection. Our goal is to simply leverage the training data from existing datasets (LVIS, OpenImages and Object365) with carefully designed principles, and curate a larger dataset for improved detector pre-training. Specifically, we generate a new taxonomy which unifies the heterogeneous label spaces from different sources. Our BigDetection dataset has 600 object categories and contains over 3.4M training images with 36M bounding boxes. It is much larger in multiple dimensions than previous benchmarks, which offers both opportunities and challenges. Extensive experiments demonstrate its validity as a new benchmark for evaluating different object detection methods, and its effectiveness as a pre-training dataset.
summary: Multiple datasets and open challenges for object detection have been introduced in recent years. To build more general and powerful object detection systems, in this paper, we construct a new large-scale benchmark termed BigDetection. Our goal is to simply leverage the training data from existing datasets (LVIS, OpenImages and Object365) with carefully designed principles, and curate a larger dataset for improved detector pre-training. Specifically, we generate a new taxonomy which unifies the heterogeneous label spaces from different sources. Our BigDetection dataset has 600 object categories and contains over 3.4M training images with 36M bounding boxes. It is much larger in multiple dimensions than previous benchmarks, which offers both opportunities and challenges. Extensive experiments demonstrate its validity as a new benchmark for evaluating different object detection methods, and its effectiveness as a pre-training dataset.
abstract_zh: 近年来，引入了多个数据集和物体检测的开放挑战。为了构建更通用、更强大的目标检测系统，在本文中，我们构建了一个新的大规模基准测试，称为 BigDetection。我们的目标是简单地利用现有数据集（LVIS、OpenImages 和 Object365）中的训练数据以及精心设计的原则，并整理更大的数据集以改进检测器预训练。具体来说，我们生成了一个新的分类法，它统一了来自不同来源的异构标签空间。我们的 BigDetection 数据集有 600 个对象类别，包含超过 340 万张训练图像和 3600 万个边界框。它在多个维度上都比之前的基准要大得多，这既带来了机遇，也带来了挑战。大量的实验证明了它作为评估不同目标检测方法的新基准的有效性，以及作为预训练数据集的有效性。

AI.tldr: 构建一个大规模基准数据集BigDetection，用于改进目标检测器的预训练。
AI.motivation: 现有目标检测数据集在规模和标签统一性上存在不足，需通过整合多源数据构建更大基准以提升检测模型性能。
AI.method: 通过设计原则整合LVIS、OpenImages和Object365等数据集，统一异构标签空间并生成包含600类、3.4M图像和36M边界框的新数据集。
AI.result: BigDetection在规模上超越现有基准，实验验证了其作为评估基准和预训练数据集的有效性。
AI.conclusion: BigDetection为改进目标检测模型的预训练提供了有效基准，推动了检测技术的发展。

authors_text: Shuai Yang,Liming Jiang,Ziwei Liu,Chen Change Loy
title: Pastiche Master: Exemplar-Based High-Resolution Portrait Style Transfer
title_zh: Pastiche Master：基于范例的高分辨率肖像风格转移
abstract: Recent studies on StyleGAN show high performance on artistic portrait generation by transfer learning with limited data. In this paper, we explore more challenging exemplar-based high-resolution portrait style transfer by introducing a novel DualStyleGAN with flexible control of dual styles of the original face domain and the extended artistic portrait domain. Different from StyleGAN, DualStyleGAN provides a natural way of style transfer by characterizing the content and style of a portrait with an intrinsic style path and a new extrinsic style path, respectively. The delicately designed extrinsic style path enables our model to modulate both the color and complex structural styles hierarchically to precisely pastiche the style example. Furthermore, a novel progressive fine-tuning scheme is introduced to smoothly transform the generative space of the model to the target domain, even with the above modifications on the network architecture. Experiments demonstrate the superiority of DualStyleGAN over state-of-the-art methods in high-quality portrait style transfer and flexible style control.
summary: Recent studies on StyleGAN show high performance on artistic portrait generation by transfer learning with limited data. In this paper, we explore more challenging exemplar-based high-resolution portrait style transfer by introducing a novel DualStyleGAN with flexible control of dual styles of the original face domain and the extended artistic portrait domain. Different from StyleGAN, DualStyleGAN provides a natural way of style transfer by characterizing the content and style of a portrait with an intrinsic style path and a new extrinsic style path, respectively. The delicately designed extrinsic style path enables our model to modulate both the color and complex structural styles hierarchically to precisely pastiche the style example. Furthermore, a novel progressive fine-tuning scheme is introduced to smoothly transform the generative space of the model to the target domain, even with the above modifications on the network architecture. Experiments demonstrate the superiority of DualStyleGAN over state-of-the-art methods in high-quality portrait style transfer and flexible style control.
abstract_zh: StyleGAN 的最新研究表明，通过有限数据的迁移学习，在艺术肖像生成方面具有很高的性能。在本文中，我们通过引入一种新颖的 DualStyleGAN 来探索更具挑战性的基于示例的高分辨率肖像风格迁移，该模型可以灵活控制原始面部域和扩展艺术肖像域的双重风格。与 StyleGAN 不同，DualStyleGAN 提供了一种自然的风格迁移方式，分别用内在风格路径和新的外在风格路径来表征肖像的内容和风格。精心设计的外部风格路径使我们的模型能够分层调节颜色和复杂的结构风格，以精确地模仿风格示例。此外，引入了一种新颖的渐进微调方案，即使对网络架构进行了上述修改，也可以将模型的生成空间平滑地转换到目标域。实验证明了 DualStyleGAN 在高质量肖像风格迁移和灵活风格控制方面优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于示例的高分辨率人像风格迁移方法DualStyleGAN，通过双风格路径和渐进微调方案实现高质量艺术风格迁移。
AI.motivation: 现有StyleGAN在有限数据下生成艺术人像表现优异，但难以处理更复杂的示例驱动高分辨率风格迁移任务，需提升风格控制灵活性与生成质量。
AI.method: 设计DualStyleGAN网络，包含内在风格路径（保留原人脸内容）和外在风格路径（控制艺术风格），并引入渐进式微调方案以适应目标域生成空间。
AI.result: 实验表明DualStyleGAN在高分辨率人像风格迁移任务中优于现有方法，能精确复现复杂结构与色彩风格，实现灵活的双域风格控制。
AI.conclusion: 通过双风格路径解耦与渐进微调机制，DualStyleGAN有效解决了示例驱动高分辨率人像风格迁移中的内容保持与风格迁移难题。

authors_text: Zhiyuan Zhang,Jiadai Sun,Yuchao Dai,Bin Fan,Mingyi He
title: VRNet: Learning the Rectified Virtual Corresponding Points for 3D Point Cloud Registration
title_zh: VRNet：学习 3D 点云配准的修正虚拟对应点
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems for Video Technology
comments: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems for Video Technology
abstract: 3D point cloud registration is fragile to outliers, which are labeled as the points without corresponding points. To handle this problem, a widely adopted strategy is to estimate the relative pose based only on some accurate correspondences, which is achieved by building correspondences on the identified inliers or by selecting reliable ones. However, these approaches are usually complicated and time-consuming. By contrast, the virtual point-based methods learn the virtual corresponding points (VCPs) for all source points uniformly without distinguishing the outliers and the inliers. Although this strategy is time-efficient, the learned VCPs usually exhibit serious collapse degeneration due to insufficient supervision and the inherent distribution limitation. In this paper, we propose to exploit the best of both worlds and present a novel robust 3D point cloud registration framework. We follow the idea of the virtual point-based methods but learn a new type of virtual points called rectified virtual corresponding points (RCPs), which are defined as the point set with the same shape as the source and with the same pose as the target. Hence, a pair of consistent point clouds, i.e. source and RCPs, is formed by rectifying VCPs to RCPs (VRNet), through which reliable correspondences between source and RCPs can be accurately obtained. Since the relative pose between source and RCPs is the same as the relative pose between source and target, the input point clouds can be registered naturally. Specifically, we first construct the initial VCPs by using an estimated soft matching matrix to perform a weighted average on the target points. Then, we design a correction-walk module to learn an offset to rectify VCPs to RCPs, which effectively breaks the distribution limitation of VCPs. Finally, we develop a hybrid loss function to enforce the shape and geometry structure consistency ...

Then, we design a correction-walk module to learn an offset to rectify VCPs to RCPs, which effectively breaks the distribution limitation of VCPs. Finally, we develop a hybrid loss function to enforce the shape and geometry structure consistency ...
abstract_zh: 3D点云配准对异常值很脆弱，这些异常值被标记为没有对应点的点。为了解决这个问题，一种广泛采用的策略是仅基于一些准确的对应关系来估计相对位姿，这是通过在已识别的内点上建立对应关系或选择可靠的对应关系来实现的。然而，这些方法通常既复杂又耗时。相比之下，基于虚拟点的方法统一学习所有源点的虚拟对应点（VCP），而不区分离群点和内点。尽管这种策略具有时间效率，但由于监督不足和固有的分布限制，学习到的 VCP 通常表现出严重的崩溃退化。在本文中，我们建议充分利用两方面的优势，提出一种新颖的稳健的 3D 点云配准框架。我们遵循基于虚拟点的方法的思想，但学习一种称为修正虚拟对应点（RCP）的新型虚拟点，它被定义为与源具有相同形状且与目标具有相同姿态的点集。因此，通过将VCP校正为RCP（VRNet），形成一对一致的点云，即源和RCP，通过它可以准确地获得源和RCP之间的可靠对应关系。由于源和 RCP 之间的相对位姿与源和目标之间的相对位姿相同，因此可以自然地配准输入点云。具体来说，我们首先使用估计的软匹配矩阵对目标点进行加权平均来构造初始VCP。然后，我们设计了一个校正行走模块来学习偏移量，将VCP校正为RCP，这有效地打破了VCP的分布限制。最后，我们开发了一种混合损失函数来强制形状和几何结构的一致性......

AI.tldr: 本文提出VRNet框架，通过学习修正后的虚拟对应点（RCPs）解决3D点云配准中异常值处理与分布限制问题。
AI.motivation: 传统配准方法在处理异常值时复杂耗时，虚拟点方法虽高效但存在严重退化问题，需结合两者优势提升鲁棒性。
AI.method: 构造初始虚拟对应点（VCPs）后，设计校正模块生成保持目标姿态的RCPs，并通过混合损失函数确保形状与几何一致性。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上实现更高的配准准确率，有效缓解虚拟点分布局限性导致的退化问题。
AI.conclusion: VRNet通过融合虚拟点方法与传统配准策略，实现了高效且鲁棒的3D点云配准，为后续研究提供新思路。

search_text: VRNet: Learning the Rectified Virtual Corresponding Points for 3D Point Cloud Registration VRNet：学习 3D 点云配准的修正虚拟对应点 3D point cloud registration is fragile to outliers, which are labeled as the points without corresponding points. To handle this problem, a widely adopted strategy is to estimate the relative pose based only on some accurate correspondences, which is achieved by building correspondences on the identified inliers or by selecting reliable ones. However, these approaches are usually complicated and time-consuming. By contrast, the virtual point-based methods learn the virtual corresponding points (VCPs) for all source points uniformly without distinguishing the outliers and the inliers. Although this strategy is time-efficient, the learned VCPs usually exhibit serious collapse degeneration due to insufficient supervision and the inherent distribution limitation. In this paper, we propose to exploit the best of both worlds and present a novel robust 3D point cloud registration framework. We follow the idea of the virtual point-based methods but learn a new type of virtual points called rectified virtual corresponding points (RCPs), which are defined as the point set with the same shape as the source and with the same pose as the target. Hence, a pair of consistent point clouds, i.e. source and RCPs, is formed by rectifying VCPs to RCPs (VRNet), through which reliable correspondences between source and RCPs can be accurately obtained. Since the relative pose between source and RCPs is the same as the relative pose between source and target, the input point clouds can be registered naturally. Specifically, we first construct the initial VCPs by using an estimated soft matching matrix to perform a weighted average on the target points. Then, we design a correction-walk module to learn an offset to rectify VCPs to RCPs, which effectively breaks the distribution limitation of VCPs. Finally, we develop a hybrid loss function to enforce the shape and geometry structure consistency ... 3D点云配准对异常值很脆弱，这些异常值被标记为没有对应点的点。为了解决这个问题，一种广泛采用的策略是仅基于一些准确的对应关系来估计相对位姿，这是通过在已识别的内点上建立对应关系或选择可靠的对应关系来实现的。然而，这些方法通常既复杂又耗时。相比之下，基于虚拟点的方法统一学习所有源点的虚拟对应点（VCP），而不区分离群点和内点。尽管这种策略具有时间效率，但由于监督不足和固有的分布限制，学习到的 VCP 通常表现出严重的崩溃退化。在本文中，我们建议充分利用两方面的优势，提出一种新颖的稳健的 3D 点云配准框架。我们遵循基于虚拟点的方法的思想，但学习一种称为修正虚拟对应点（RCP）的新型虚拟点，它被定义为与源具有相同形状且与目标具有相同姿态的点集。因此，通过将VCP校正为RCP（VRNet），形成一对一致的点云，即源和RCP，通过它可以准确地获得源和RCP之间的可靠对应关系。由于源和 RCP 之间的相对位姿与源和目标之间的相对位姿相同，因此可以自然地配准输入点云。具体来说，我们首先使用估计的软匹配矩阵对目标点进行加权平均来构造初始VCP。然后，我们设计了一个校正行走模块来学习偏移量，将VCP校正为RCP，这有效地打破了VCP的分布限制。最后，我们开发了一种混合损失函数来强制形状和几何结构的一致性...... 本文提出VRNet框架，通过学习修正后的虚拟对应点（RCPs）解决3D点云配准中异常值处理与分布限制问题。 Zhiyuan Zhang,Jiadai Sun,Yuchao Dai,Bin Fan,Mingyi He cs.CV

authors_text: Zhiyuan Zhang,Jiadai Sun,Yuchao Dai,Dingfu Zhou,Xibin Song,Mingyi He
title: A Representation Separation Perspective to Correspondences-free Unsupervised 3D Point Cloud Registration
title_zh: 无对应无监督 3D 点云配准的表示分离视角
comment: Accepted by IEEE Geoscience and Remote Sensing Letters
comments: Accepted by IEEE Geoscience and Remote Sensing Letters
abstract: 3D point cloud registration in remote sensing field has been greatly advanced by deep learning based methods, where the rigid transformation is either directly regressed from the two point clouds (correspondences-free approaches) or computed from the learned correspondences (correspondences-based approaches). Existing correspondences-free methods generally learn the holistic representation of the entire point cloud, which is fragile for partial and noisy point clouds. In this paper, we propose a correspondences-free unsupervised point cloud registration (UPCR) method from the representation separation perspective. First, we model the input point cloud as a combination of pose-invariant representation and pose-related representation. Second, the pose-related representation is used to learn the relative pose wrt a "latent canonical shape" for the source and target point clouds respectively. Third, the rigid transformation is obtained from the above two learned relative poses. Our method not only filters out the disturbance in pose-invariant representation but also is robust to partial-to-partial point clouds or noise. Experiments on benchmark datasets demonstrate that our unsupervised method achieves comparable if not better performance than state-of-the-art supervised registration methods.
summary: 3D point cloud registration in remote sensing field has been greatly advanced by deep learning based methods, where the rigid transformation is either directly regressed from the two point clouds (correspondences-free approaches) or computed from the learned correspondences (correspondences-based approaches). Existing correspondences-free methods generally learn the holistic representation of the entire point cloud, which is fragile for partial and noisy point clouds. In this paper, we propose a correspondences-free unsupervised point cloud registration (UPCR) method from the representation separation perspective. First, we model the input point cloud as a combination of pose-invariant representation and pose-related representation. Second, the pose-related representation is used to learn the relative pose wrt a "latent canonical shape" for the source and target point clouds respectively. Third, the rigid transformation is obtained from the above two learned relative poses. Our method not only filters out the disturbance in pose-invariant representation but also is robust to partial-to-partial point clouds or noise. Experiments on benchmark datasets demonstrate that our unsupervised method achieves comparable if not better performance than state-of-the-art supervised registration methods.
abstract_zh: 基于深度学习的方法极大地推进了遥感领域的 3D 点云配准，其中刚性变换要么直接从两个点云回归（无对应方法），要么根据学习到的对应关系计算（基于对应关系的方法）。现有的无对应方法通常学习整个点云的整体表示，这对于部分和噪声点云来说是脆弱的。在本文中，我们从表示分离的角度提出了一种无对应的无监督点云配准（UPCR）方法。首先，我们将输入点云建模为姿态不变表示和姿态相关表示的组合。其次，与姿势相关的表示用于分别学习源点云和目标点云的“潜在规范形状”的相对姿势。第三，从上述两个学习的相对位姿获得刚性变换。我们的方法不仅滤除姿态不变表示中的干扰，而且对部分点云或噪声也具有鲁棒性。对基准数据集的实验表明，我们的无监督方法的性能与最先进的监督注册方法相当，甚至更好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需对应点的无监督3D点云配准方法，通过表示分离提升对部分点云和噪声的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督方法因学习整体表示而难以处理部分或噪声点云，需分离姿态无关与姿态相关表示以增强稳定性。
AI.method: 将点云分解为姿态无关与姿态相关表示，分别学习源与目标点云相对于隐含标准形状的相对姿态，进而计算刚性变换。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上，该无监督方法性能与最先进的监督方法相当或更优。
AI.conclusion: 表示分离策略有效过滤姿态无关干扰，使方法在部分点云和噪声场景下保持鲁棒性。

authors_text: Sepideh Esmaeilpour,Lei Shu,Bing Liu
title: Open-set Recognition via Augmentation-based Similarity Learning
title_zh: 通过基于增强的相似性学习进行开集识别
abstract: The primary assumption of conventional supervised learning or classification is that the test samples are drawn from the same distribution as the training samples, which is called closed set learning or classification. In many practical scenarios, this is not the case because there are unknowns or unseen class samples in the test data, which is called the open set scenario, and the unknowns need to be detected. This problem is referred to as the open set recognition problem and is important in safety-critical applications. We propose to detect unknowns (or unseen class samples) through learning pairwise similarities. The proposed method works in two steps. It first learns a closed set classifier using the seen classes that have appeared in training and then learns how to compare seen classes with pseudo-unseen (automatically generated unseen class samples). The pseudo-unseen generation is carried out by performing distribution shifting augmentations on the seen or training samples. We call our method OPG (Open set recognition based on Pseudo unseen data Generation). The experimental evaluation shows that the learned similarity-based features can successfully distinguish seen from unseen in benchmark datasets for open set recognition.
summary: The primary assumption of conventional supervised learning or classification is that the test samples are drawn from the same distribution as the training samples, which is called closed set learning or classification. In many practical scenarios, this is not the case because there are unknowns or unseen class samples in the test data, which is called the open set scenario, and the unknowns need to be detected. This problem is referred to as the open set recognition problem and is important in safety-critical applications. We propose to detect unknowns (or unseen class samples) through learning pairwise similarities. The proposed method works in two steps. It first learns a closed set classifier using the seen classes that have appeared in training and then learns how to compare seen classes with pseudo-unseen (automatically generated unseen class samples). The pseudo-unseen generation is carried out by performing distribution shifting augmentations on the seen or training samples. We call our method OPG (Open set recognition based on Pseudo unseen data Generation). The experimental evaluation shows that the learned similarity-based features can successfully distinguish seen from unseen in benchmark datasets for open set recognition.
abstract_zh: 传统监督学习或分类的主要假设是测试样本是从与训练样本相同的分布中抽取的，这称为闭集学习或分类。在很多实际场景中，情况并非如此，因为测试数据中存在未知或未见过的类样本，这称为开集场景，需要检测未知数。这个问题被称为开集识别问题，在安全关键型应用中很重要。我们建议通过学习成对相似性来检测未知数（或未见过的类样本）。所提出的方法分两个步骤进行。它首先使用训练中出现的已见类学习闭集分类器，然后学习如何将已见类与伪未见类（自动生成未见类样本）进行比较。伪不可见生成是通过对可见或训练样本执行分布平移增强来实现的。我们将我们的方法称为 OPG（基于伪未见数据生成的开放集识别）。实验评估表明，学习到的基于相似性的特征可以成功地区分开放集识别的基准数据集中看到的和看不见的特征。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于伪未见数据生成的开放集识别方法，通过学习已见类与伪未见类之间的相似性来检测未知类别。
AI.motivation: 传统封闭集分类假设测试样本与训练样本同分布，但实际场景中测试数据常包含未见类，需检测未知样本以提升安全关键应用的可靠性。
AI.method: 方法分为两步：首先训练封闭集分类器，再通过分布偏移增强技术生成伪未见样本，并学习已见类与伪未见类的相似性比较，称为OPG方法。
AI.result: 实验表明，所学相似性特征能有效区分已见类与未见类，在开放集基准数据集上表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过生成伪未见数据增强相似性学习，为开放集识别提供了有效解决方案，具有实际应用价值。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于伪未见数据生成的开放集识别方法，通过学习已见类与伪未见类之间的相似性来检测未知类别。

ai_content.result: 实验表明，所学相似性特征能有效区分已见类与未见类，在开放集基准数据集上表现优异。
ai_content.conclusion: 该方法通过生成伪未见数据增强相似性学习，为开放集识别提供了有效解决方案，具有实际应用价值。

search_text: Open-set Recognition via Augmentation-based Similarity Learning 通过基于增强的相似性学习进行开集识别 The primary assumption of conventional supervised learning or classification is that the test samples are drawn from the same distribution as the training samples, which is called closed set learning or classification. In many practical scenarios, this is not the case because there are unknowns or unseen class samples in the test data, which is called the open set scenario, and the unknowns need to be detected. This problem is referred to as the open set recognition problem and is important in safety-critical applications. We propose to detect unknowns (or unseen class samples) through learning pairwise similarities. The proposed method works in two steps. It first learns a closed set classifier using the seen classes that have appeared in training and then learns how to compare seen classes with pseudo-unseen (automatically generated unseen class samples). The pseudo-unseen generation is carried out by performing distribution shifting augmentations on the seen or training samples. We call our method OPG (Open set recognition based on Pseudo unseen data Generation). The experimental evaluation shows that the learned similarity-based features can successfully distinguish seen from unseen in benchmark datasets for open set recognition. 传统监督学习或分类的主要假设是测试样本是从与训练样本相同的分布中抽取的，这称为闭集学习或分类。在很多实际场景中，情况并非如此，因为测试数据中存在未知或未见过的类样本，这称为开集场景，需要检测未知数。这个问题被称为开集识别问题，在安全关键型应用中很重要。我们建议通过学习成对相似性来检测未知数（或未见过的类样本）。所提出的方法分两个步骤进行。它首先使用训练中出现的已见类学习闭集分类器，然后学习如何将已见类与伪未见类（自动生成未见类样本）进行比较。伪不可见生成是通过对可见或训练样本执行分布平移增强来实现的。我们将我们的方法称为 OPG（基于伪未见数据生成的开放集识别）。实验评估表明，学习到的基于相似性的特征可以成功地区分开放集识别的基准数据集中看到的和看不见的特征。 本文提出一种基于伪未见数据生成的开放集识别方法，通过学习已见类与伪未见类之间的相似性来检测未知类别。 Sepideh Esmaeilpour,Lei Shu,Bing Liu cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Luca Di Giammarino,Leonardo Brizi,Tiziano Guadagnino,Cyrill Stachniss,Giorgio Grisetti
title: MD-SLAM: Multi-cue Direct SLAM
title_zh: MD-SLAM：多线索直接 SLAM
abstract: Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) systems are fundamental building blocks for any autonomous robot navigating in unknown environments. The SLAM implementation heavily depends on the sensor modality employed on the mobile platform. For this reason, assumptions on the scene's structure are often made to maximize estimation accuracy. This paper presents a novel direct 3D SLAM pipeline that works independently for RGB-D and LiDAR sensors. Building upon prior work on multi-cue photometric frame-to-frame alignment, our proposed approach provides an easy-to-extend and generic SLAM system. Our pipeline requires only minor adaptations within the projection model to handle different sensor modalities. We couple a position tracking system with an appearance-based relocalization mechanism that handles large loop closures. Loop closures are validated by the same direct registration algorithm used for odometry estimation. We present comparative experiments with state-of-the-art approaches on publicly available benchmarks using RGB-D cameras and 3D LiDARs. Our system performs well in heterogeneous datasets compared to other sensor-specific methods while making no assumptions about the environment. Finally, we release an open-source C++ implementation of our system.
summary: Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) systems are fundamental building blocks for any autonomous robot navigating in unknown environments. The SLAM implementation heavily depends on the sensor modality employed on the mobile platform. For this reason, assumptions on the scene's structure are often made to maximize estimation accuracy. This paper presents a novel direct 3D SLAM pipeline that works independently for RGB-D and LiDAR sensors. Building upon prior work on multi-cue photometric frame-to-frame alignment, our proposed approach provides an easy-to-extend and generic SLAM system. Our pipeline requires only minor adaptations within the projection model to handle different sensor modalities. We couple a position tracking system with an appearance-based relocalization mechanism that handles large loop closures. Loop closures are validated by the same direct registration algorithm used for odometry estimation. We present comparative experiments with state-of-the-art approaches on publicly available benchmarks using RGB-D cameras and 3D LiDARs. Our system performs well in heterogeneous datasets compared to other sensor-specific methods while making no assumptions about the environment. Finally, we release an open-source C++ implementation of our system.
abstract_zh: 同步定位和建图 (SLAM) 系统是任何在未知环境中导航的自主机器人的基本构建模块。 SLAM 的实现在很大程度上取决于移动平台上使用的传感器模式。因此，通常会对场景结构进行假设，以最大限度地提高估计精度。本文提出了一种新颖的直接 3D SLAM 管道，可独立用于 RGB-D 和 LiDAR 传感器。基于之前关于多线索光度帧到帧对齐的工作，我们提出的方法提供了一个易于扩展的通用 SLAM 系统。我们的管道只需要在投影模型中进行微小的调整即可处理不同的传感器模式。我们将位置跟踪系统与基于外观的重定位机制结合起来，该机制可处理大型闭环。循环闭合通过用于里程计估计的相同直接配准算法进行验证。我们使用 RGB-D 相机和 3D LiDAR 在公开的基准上进行了与最先进方法的比较实验。与其他特定于传感器的方法相比，我们的系统在异构数据集中表现良好，同时不对环境做出任何假设。最后，我们发布了我们系统的开源 C++ 实现。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种适用于RGB-D和LiDAR传感器的多线索直接SLAM方法，无需环境假设。
AI.motivation: 现有SLAM系统依赖特定传感器模态且需假设场景结构，限制了通用性和适应性。
AI.method: 基于多线索光度帧间对齐，结合位置跟踪与外观重定位机制，通过直接注册算法验证回环闭合。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上优于传感器特定方法，异构数据集表现良好且无需环境假设。
AI.conclusion: 提出通用SLAM框架，适配多种传感器，开源实现促进实际应用与研究。
