authors_text: Rashmeet Kaur Nayyar,Pulkit Verma,Siddharth Srivastava
title: Differential Assessment of Black-Box AI Agents
title_zh: 黑盒人工智能代理的差异化评估
abstract: Much of the research on learning symbolic models of AI agents focuses on agents with stationary models. This assumption fails to hold in settings where the agent's capabilities may change as a result of learning, adaptation, or other post-deployment modifications. Efficient assessment of agents in such settings is critical for learning the true capabilities of an AI system and for ensuring its safe usage. In this work, we propose a novel approach to "differentially" assess black-box AI agents that have drifted from their previously known models. As a starting point, we consider the fully observable and deterministic setting. We leverage sparse observations of the drifted agent's current behavior and knowledge of its initial model to generate an active querying policy that selectively queries the agent and computes an updated model of its functionality. Empirical evaluation shows that our approach is much more efficient than re-learning the agent model from scratch. We also show that the cost of differential assessment using our method is proportional to the amount of drift in the agent's functionality.
summary: Much of the research on learning symbolic models of AI agents focuses on agents with stationary models. This assumption fails to hold in settings where the agent's capabilities may change as a result of learning, adaptation, or other post-deployment modifications. Efficient assessment of agents in such settings is critical for learning the true capabilities of an AI system and for ensuring its safe usage. In this work, we propose a novel approach to "differentially" assess black-box AI agents that have drifted from their previously known models. As a starting point, we consider the fully observable and deterministic setting. We leverage sparse observations of the drifted agent's current behavior and knowledge of its initial model to generate an active querying policy that selectively queries the agent and computes an updated model of its functionality. Empirical evaluation shows that our approach is much more efficient than re-learning the agent model from scratch. We also show that the cost of differential assessment using our method is proportional to the amount of drift in the agent's functionality.
abstract_zh: 许多关于学习人工智能代理符号模型的研究都集中在具有固定模型的代理上。在代理的能力可能由于学习、适应或其他部署后修改而改变的情况下，这种假设无法成立。在此类环境中对代理进行有效评估对于了解人工智能系统的真实功能并确保其安全使用至关重要。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的方法来“差异化”评估偏离先前已知模型的黑盒人工智能代理。作为起点，我们考虑完全可观察和确定性的设置。我们利用对漂移代理当前行为的稀疏观察和对其初始模型的了解来生成主动查询策略，该策略有选择地查询代理并计算其功能的更新模型。实证评估表明，我们的方法比从头开始重新学习代理模型要有效得多。我们还表明，使用我们的方法进行差异评估的成本与代理功能的漂移量成正比。

AI.tldr: 提出一种差异评估黑盒AI代理的方法，以应对模型漂移问题，提高评估效率。
AI.motivation: 现有研究假设AI代理模型为静态，但实际中代理能力可能因学习或部署后修改而变化，需高效评估其真实能力以确保安全使用。
AI.method: 利用稀疏观察和初始模型知识生成主动查询策略，选择性查询代理并计算其功能模型更新。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法比从头学习更高效，评估成本与代理功能漂移量成正比。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法能有效应对AI代理功能漂移，提升动态环境下的评估效率，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Jae-Yeop Jeong,Yeong-Gi Hong,Daun Kim,Yuchul Jung,Jin-Woo Jeong
title: Facial Expression Recognition based on Multi-head Cross Attention Network
title_zh: 基于多头交叉注意力网络的面部表情识别
abstract: Facial expression in-the-wild is essential for various interactive computing domains. In this paper, we proposed an extended version of DAN model to address the VA estimation and facial expression challenges introduced in ABAW 2022. Our method produced preliminary results of 0.44 of mean CCC value for the VA estimation task, and 0.33 of the average F1 score for the expression classification task.
summary: Facial expression in-the-wild is essential for various interactive computing domains. In this paper, we proposed an extended version of DAN model to address the VA estimation and facial expression challenges introduced in ABAW 2022. Our method produced preliminary results of 0.44 of mean CCC value for the VA estimation task, and 0.33 of the average F1 score for the expression classification task.
abstract_zh: 野外面部表情对于各种交互式计算领域至关重要。在本文中，我们提出了 DAN 模型的扩展版本，以解决 ABAW 2022 中引入的 VA 估计和面部表情挑战。我们的方法为 VA 估计任务提供了 0.44 的平均 CCC 值，为表情分类任务提供了 0.33 的平均 F1 分数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多头交叉注意网络的改进DAN模型，用于解决ABAW 2022挑战赛中的面部表情识别与情绪价值估计任务。
AI.motivation: 真实场景下面部表情识别面临光照变化、遮挡等挑战，现有方法在复杂环境中的准确率和鲁棒性不足。
AI.method: 扩展DAN模型架构，引入多头交叉注意力机制增强特征交互，联合优化情绪价值估计（VA）与表情分类任务。
AI.result: 在ABAW 2022数据集上，VA估计任务平均CCC值达0.44，表情分类任务平均F1分数为0.33。

search_text: Facial Expression Recognition based on Multi-head Cross Attention Network 基于多头交叉注意力网络的面部表情识别 Facial expression in-the-wild is essential for various interactive computing domains. In this paper, we proposed an extended version of DAN model to address the VA estimation and facial expression challenges introduced in ABAW 2022. Our method produced preliminary results of 0.44 of mean CCC value for the VA estimation task, and 0.33 of the average F1 score for the expression classification task. 野外面部表情对于各种交互式计算领域至关重要。在本文中，我们提出了 DAN 模型的扩展版本，以解决 ABAW 2022 中引入的 VA 估计和面部表情挑战。我们的方法为 VA 估计任务提供了 0.44 的平均 CCC 值，为表情分类任务提供了 0.33 的平均 F1 分数。 本文提出一种基于多头交叉注意网络的改进DAN模型，用于解决ABAW 2022挑战赛中的面部表情识别与情绪价值估计任务。 Jae-Yeop Jeong,Yeong-Gi Hong,Daun Kim,Yuchul Jung,Jin-Woo Jeong cs.CV

authors_text: Tuukka Korhonen
title: Grid Induced Minor Theorem for Graphs of Small Degree
title_zh: 小次数图的网格归纳小定理
abstract: A graph $H$ is an induced minor of a graph $G$ if $H$ can be obtained from $G$ by vertex deletions and edge contractions. We show that there is a function $f(k, d) = O(k^{10} + 2^{d^5})$ so that if a graph has treewidth at least $f(k, d)$ and maximum degree at most $d$, then it contains a $k \times k$-grid as an induced minor. This proves the conjecture of Aboulker, Adler, Kim, Sintiari, and Trotignon [Eur. J. Comb., 98, 2021] that any graph with large treewidth and bounded maximum degree contains a large wall or the line graph of a large wall as an induced subgraph. It also implies that for any fixed planar graph $H$, there is a subexponential time algorithm for maximum weight independent set on $H$-induced-minor-free graphs.
summary: A graph $H$ is an induced minor of a graph $G$ if $H$ can be obtained from $G$ by vertex deletions and edge contractions. We show that there is a function $f(k, d) = O(k^{10} + 2^{d^5})$ so that if a graph has treewidth at least $f(k, d)$ and maximum degree at most $d$, then it contains a $k \times k$-grid as an induced minor. This proves the conjecture of Aboulker, Adler, Kim, Sintiari, and Trotignon [Eur. J. Comb., 98, 2021] that any graph with large treewidth and bounded maximum degree contains a large wall or the line graph of a large wall as an induced subgraph. It also implies that for any fixed planar graph $H$, there is a subexponential time algorithm for maximum weight independent set on $H$-induced-minor-free graphs.
abstract_zh: 如果 $H$ 可以通过顶点删除和边收缩从 $G$ 获得，则图 $H$ 是图 $G$ 的导出小数。我们证明存在一个函数 $f(k, d) = O(k^{10} + 2^{d^5})$，因此如果图的树宽至少为 $f(k, d)$ 且最大度至多为 $d$，则它包含一个 $k \times k$ 网格作为诱导子网格。这证明了 Aboulker、Adler、Kim、Sintiari 和 Trotignon 的猜想 [Eur. J. Comb., 98, 2021]任何具有大树宽和有界最大度的图都包含大墙或大墙的线图作为导出子图。它还意味着对于任何固定平面图 $H$，对于 $H$ 诱导的无次要图上的最大权重独立集存在一个次指数时间算法。

AI.tldr: 该论文证明了对于具有有限最大度数的图，若其树宽足够大，则必然包含一个k×k网格作为诱导次图，并验证了相关猜想。
AI.motivation: 解决关于高树宽和有限度数图是否必然包含大墙结构或其线图的猜想，并为特定图类的独立集问题提供算法基础。
AI.method: 通过构造函数f(k,d)并结合树宽与诱导次图的性质，利用组合数学和图论方法证明核心定理。
AI.result: 确定函数f(k,d)=O(k¹⁰+2^{d⁵})，证明猜想成立，并推导出H-诱导次图免费图的独立集问题亚指数时间算法。
AI.conclusion: 该成果深化了图结构理论，为算法设计提供了理论支持，验证了诱导次图与树宽之间的关键联系。

authors_text: Yair Carmon,Danielle Hausler
title: Distributionally Robust Optimization via Ball Oracle Acceleration
title_zh: 通过 Ball Oracle 加速进行分布式鲁棒优化
abstract: We develop and analyze algorithms for distributionally robust optimization (DRO) of convex losses. In particular, we consider group-structured and bounded $f$-divergence uncertainty sets. Our approach relies on an accelerated method that queries a ball optimization oracle, i.e., a subroutine that minimizes the objective within a small ball around the query point. Our main contribution is efficient implementations of this oracle for DRO objectives. For DRO with $N$ non-smooth loss functions, the resulting algorithms find an $ε$-accurate solution with $\widetilde{O}\left(Nε^{-2/3} + ε^{-2}\right)$ first-order oracle queries to individual loss functions. Compared to existing algorithms for this problem, we improve complexity by a factor of up to $ε^{-4/3}$.
summary: We develop and analyze algorithms for distributionally robust optimization (DRO) of convex losses. In particular, we consider group-structured and bounded $f$-divergence uncertainty sets. Our approach relies on an accelerated method that queries a ball optimization oracle, i.e., a subroutine that minimizes the objective within a small ball around the query point. Our main contribution is efficient implementations of this oracle for DRO objectives. For DRO with $N$ non-smooth loss functions, the resulting algorithms find an $ε$-accurate solution with $\widetilde{O}\left(Nε^{-2/3} + ε^{-2}\right)$ first-order oracle queries to individual loss functions. Compared to existing algorithms for this problem, we improve complexity by a factor of up to $ε^{-4/3}$.
abstract_zh: 我们开发和分析凸损失的分布鲁棒优化（DRO）算法。特别是，我们考虑群体结构和有界 $f$ 散度不确定性集。我们的方法依赖于查询球优化预言的加速方法，即最小化查询点周围小球内目标的子例程。我们的主要贡献是为了 DRO 目标而有效实现这个预言机。对于具有 $N$ 非平滑损失函数的 DRO，生成的算法通过对各个损失函数进行 $\widetilde{O}\left(Nε^{-2/3} + ε^{-2}\right)$ 一阶预言查询来找到 $ε$ 精确的解决方案。与该问题的现有算法相比，我们将复杂性提高了高达 $ε^{-4/3}$。

AI.tldr: 本文开发和分析了用于凸损失函数的分布鲁棒优化（DRO）算法，特别关注组结构和有界f-散度不确定性集。
AI.motivation: 现有DRO算法在非光滑损失函数上的复杂度较高，需要更高效的算法来求解此类问题，尤其是在处理大规模数据时降低计算开销。
AI.method: 提出基于球优化预言机加速的方法，该预言机作为子程序在查询点附近的小球内最小化目标函数，并针对DRO目标函数设计了该预言机的高效实现。
AI.result: 对于N个非光滑损失函数的DRO，算法达到ε精度所需的每个损失函数的一阶预言机查询次数为Õ(Nε^{-2/3} + ε^{-2})，比现有算法复杂度最多提升了ε^{-4/3}倍。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的球预言机加速方法显著降低了分布鲁棒优化问题的计算复杂度，为大规模DRO问题提供了更高效的求解方案。

authors_text: Kurt Shuster,Mojtaba Komeili,Leonard Adolphs,Stephen Roller,Arthur Szlam,Jason Weston
title: Language Models that Seek for Knowledge: Modular Search & Generation for Dialogue and Prompt Completion
title_zh: 寻求知识的语言模型：对话的模块化搜索和生成以及即时完成
abstract: Language models (LMs) have recently been shown to generate more factual responses by employing modularity (Zhou et al., 2021) in combination with retrieval (Adolphs et al., 2021). We extend the recent approach of Adolphs et al. (2021) to include internet search as a module. Our SeeKeR (Search engine->Knowledge->Response) method thus applies a single LM to three modular tasks in succession: search, generating knowledge, and generating a final response. We show that, when using SeeKeR as a dialogue model, it outperforms the state-of-the-art model BlenderBot 2 (Chen et al., 2021) on open-domain knowledge-grounded conversations for the same number of parameters, in terms of consistency, knowledge and per-turn engagingness. SeeKeR applied to topical prompt completions as a standard language model outperforms GPT2 (Radford et al., 2019) and GPT3 (Brown et al., 2020) in terms of factuality and topicality, despite GPT3 being a vastly larger model. Our code and models are made publicly available.
summary: Language models (LMs) have recently been shown to generate more factual responses by employing modularity (Zhou et al., 2021) in combination with retrieval (Adolphs et al., 2021). We extend the recent approach of Adolphs et al. (2021) to include internet search as a module. Our SeeKeR (Search engine->Knowledge->Response) method thus applies a single LM to three modular tasks in succession: search, generating knowledge, and generating a final response. We show that, when using SeeKeR as a dialogue model, it outperforms the state-of-the-art model BlenderBot 2 (Chen et al., 2021) on open-domain knowledge-grounded conversations for the same number of parameters, in terms of consistency, knowledge and per-turn engagingness. SeeKeR applied to topical prompt completions as a standard language model outperforms GPT2 (Radford et al., 2019) and GPT3 (Brown et al., 2020) in terms of factuality and topicality, despite GPT3 being a vastly larger model. Our code and models are made publicly available.
abstract_zh: 最近，语言模型（LM）已被证明可以通过采用模块化（Zhou 等人，2021）与检索（Adolphs 等人，2021）相结合来生成更多事实响应。我们扩展了 Adolphs 等人最近的方法。 （2021）将互联网搜索作为一个模块。因此，我们的 SeeKeR（搜索引擎->知识->响应）方法将单个 LM 连续应用于三个模块化任务：搜索、生成知识和生成最终响应。我们表明，当使用 SeeKeR 作为对话模型时，在相同数量的参数的开放域知识基础对话中，它在一致性、知识和每轮参与度方面优于最先进的模型 BlenderBot 2（Chen 等人，2021）。 SeeKeR 作为标准语言模型应用于主题提示完成，在事实性和主题性方面优于 GPT2（Radford 等人，2019）和 GPT3（Brown 等人，2020），尽管 GPT3 是一个更大的模型。我们的代码和模型是公开的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SeeKeR方法，通过模块化搜索与生成结合，提升对话和提示补全任务中的事实性与相关性。
AI.motivation: 现有语言模型在对话和提示补全任务中存在事实性不足、依赖预训练知识局限的问题，需引入实时检索机制增强信息准确性。
AI.method: 设计三阶段模块化流程：搜索引擎获取信息、知识生成模块整合内容、最终生成响应，基于单一语言模型实现端到端处理。
AI.result: 在对话任务中超越BlenderBot 2，在提示补全任务中超越GPT-2和GPT-3，且参数量更少；代码与模型已开源。
AI.conclusion: 模块化搜索-生成框架能有效提升语言模型的事实性与任务表现，为知识密集型应用提供新范式。

search_text: Language Models that Seek for Knowledge: Modular Search & Generation for Dialogue and Prompt Completion 寻求知识的语言模型：对话的模块化搜索和生成以及即时完成 Language models (LMs) have recently been shown to generate more factual responses by employing modularity (Zhou et al., 2021) in combination with retrieval (Adolphs et al., 2021). We extend the recent approach of Adolphs et al. (2021) to include internet search as a module. Our SeeKeR (Search engine->Knowledge->Response) method thus applies a single LM to three modular tasks in succession: search, generating knowledge, and generating a final response. We show that, when using SeeKeR as a dialogue model, it outperforms the state-of-the-art model BlenderBot 2 (Chen et al., 2021) on open-domain knowledge-grounded conversations for the same number of parameters, in terms of consistency, knowledge and per-turn engagingness. SeeKeR applied to topical prompt completions as a standard language model outperforms GPT2 (Radford et al., 2019) and GPT3 (Brown et al., 2020) in terms of factuality and topicality, despite GPT3 being a vastly larger model. Our code and models are made publicly available. 最近，语言模型（LM）已被证明可以通过采用模块化（Zhou 等人，2021）与检索（Adolphs 等人，2021）相结合来生成更多事实响应。我们扩展了 Adolphs 等人最近的方法。 （2021）将互联网搜索作为一个模块。因此，我们的 SeeKeR（搜索引擎->知识->响应）方法将单个 LM 连续应用于三个模块化任务：搜索、生成知识和生成最终响应。我们表明，当使用 SeeKeR 作为对话模型时，在相同数量的参数的开放域知识基础对话中，它在一致性、知识和每轮参与度方面优于最先进的模型 BlenderBot 2（Chen 等人，2021）。 SeeKeR 作为标准语言模型应用于主题提示完成，在事实性和主题性方面优于 GPT2（Radford 等人，2019）和 GPT3（Brown 等人，2020），尽管 GPT3 是一个更大的模型。我们的代码和模型是公开的。 本文提出SeeKeR方法，通过模块化搜索与生成结合，提升对话和提示补全任务中的事实性与相关性。 Kurt Shuster,Mojtaba Komeili,Leonard Adolphs,Stephen Roller,Arthur Szlam,Jason Weston cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Samik Sadhu,Hynek Hermansky
title: Complex Frequency Domain Linear Prediction: A Tool to Compute Modulation Spectrum of Speech
title_zh: 复频域线性预测：计算语音调制频谱的工具
abstract: Conventional Frequency Domain Linear Prediction (FDLP) technique models the squared Hilbert envelope of speech with varied degrees of approximation which can be sampled at the required frame rate and used as features for Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR). Although previously the complex cepstrum of the conventional FDLP model has been used as compact frame-wise speech features, it has lacked interpretability in the context of the Hilbert envelope. In this paper, we propose a modification of the conventional FDLP model that allows easy interpretability of the complex cepstrum as temporal modulations in an all-pole model approximation of the power of the speech signal. Additionally, our "complex" FDLP yields significant speed-ups in comparison to conventional FDLP for the same degree of approximation.
summary: Conventional Frequency Domain Linear Prediction (FDLP) technique models the squared Hilbert envelope of speech with varied degrees of approximation which can be sampled at the required frame rate and used as features for Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR). Although previously the complex cepstrum of the conventional FDLP model has been used as compact frame-wise speech features, it has lacked interpretability in the context of the Hilbert envelope. In this paper, we propose a modification of the conventional FDLP model that allows easy interpretability of the complex cepstrum as temporal modulations in an all-pole model approximation of the power of the speech signal. Additionally, our "complex" FDLP yields significant speed-ups in comparison to conventional FDLP for the same degree of approximation.
abstract_zh: 传统频域线性预测 (FDLP) 技术以不同程度的近似对语音的平方希尔伯特包络进行建模，可以按所需的帧速率进行采样，并用作自动语音识别 (ASR) 的特征。尽管以前传统 FDLP 模型的复倒谱已被用作紧凑的逐帧语音特征，但它在希尔伯特包络的上下文中缺乏可解释性。在本文中，我们提出了对传统 FDLP 模型的修改，可以轻松地将复杂倒谱解释为语音信号功率的全极点模型近似中的时间调制。此外，对于相同程度的近似，与传统 FDLP 相比，我们的“复杂”FDLP 产生了显着的加速。

AI.tldr: 本文提出改进的复频域线性预测方法，用于更高效地计算语音调制谱并提升特征可解释性。
AI.motivation: 传统频域线性预测的复倒谱缺乏对希尔伯特包络的可解释性，且计算效率有待提升。
AI.method: 通过修改传统FDLP模型，将复倒谱解释为全极点模型中语音信号功率的时域调制，并优化计算流程。
AI.result: 改进后的复FDLP在保持相同近似度时显著加速计算，同时增强特征的可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 新方法在调制谱计算中兼顾效率与可解释性，适用于自动语音识别等任务。

authors_text: Nicholas Kolkin,Michal Kucera,Sylvain Paris,Daniel Sykora,Eli Shechtman,Greg Shakhnarovich
title: Neural Neighbor Style Transfer
title_zh: 神经邻域风格迁移
abstract: We propose Neural Neighbor Style Transfer (NNST), a pipeline that offers state-of-the-art quality, generalization, and competitive efficiency for artistic style transfer. Our approach is based on explicitly replacing neural features extracted from the content input (to be stylized) with those from a style exemplar, then synthesizing the final output based on these rearranged features. While the spirit of our approach is similar to prior work, we show that our design decisions dramatically improve the final visual quality.
summary: We propose Neural Neighbor Style Transfer (NNST), a pipeline that offers state-of-the-art quality, generalization, and competitive efficiency for artistic style transfer. Our approach is based on explicitly replacing neural features extracted from the content input (to be stylized) with those from a style exemplar, then synthesizing the final output based on these rearranged features. While the spirit of our approach is similar to prior work, we show that our design decisions dramatically improve the final visual quality.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了神经邻域风格迁移（NNST），这是一种为艺术风格迁移提供最先进的质量、泛化和竞争效率的管道。我们的方法基于用来自风格范例的神经特征显式替换从内容输入（待风格化）中提取的神经特征，然后根据这些重新排列的特征合成最终输出。虽然我们的方法的精神与之前的工作相似，但我们表明我们的设计决策极大地提高了最终的视觉质量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为神经邻域风格迁移（NNST）的管道，通过替换内容输入的神经特征为风格样本的特征，实现高质量的艺术风格迁移。
AI.motivation: 现有风格迁移方法在视觉质量、泛化能力或效率上存在不足，需探索更优的特征替换与合成策略以提升效果。
AI.method: 显式替换内容输入的神经特征为风格样本的特征，再基于重排后的特征合成最终输出，通过优化设计提升视觉质量。
AI.result: 在视觉质量、泛化能力及效率方面达到当前最优水平，设计决策显著优于先前方法。
AI.conclusion: NNST通过改进特征替换与合成机制，有效提升了艺术风格迁移的质量与效率，验证了设计决策的关键作用。

authors_text: Jenny Schmalfuss,Philipp Scholze,Andrés Bruhn
title: A Perturbation-Constrained Adversarial Attack for Evaluating the Robustness of Optical Flow
title_zh: 用于评估光流鲁棒性的扰动约束对抗攻击
comment: Accepted at the European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV) 2022
comments: Accepted at the European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV) 2022
abstract: Recent optical flow methods are almost exclusively judged in terms of accuracy, while their robustness is often neglected. Although adversarial attacks offer a useful tool to perform such an analysis, current attacks on optical flow methods focus on real-world attacking scenarios rather than a worst case robustness assessment. Hence, in this work, we propose a novel adversarial attack - the Perturbation-Constrained Flow Attack (PCFA) - that emphasizes destructivity over applicability as a real-world attack. PCFA is a global attack that optimizes adversarial perturbations to shift the predicted flow towards a specified target flow, while keeping the L2 norm of the perturbation below a chosen bound. Our experiments demonstrate PCFA's applicability in white- and black-box settings, and show it finds stronger adversarial samples than previous attacks. Based on these strong samples, we provide the first joint ranking of optical flow methods considering both prediction quality and adversarial robustness, which reveals state-of-the-art methods to be particularly vulnerable. Code is available at https://github.com/cv-stuttgart/PCFA.
summary: Recent optical flow methods are almost exclusively judged in terms of accuracy, while their robustness is often neglected. Although adversarial attacks offer a useful tool to perform such an analysis, current attacks on optical flow methods focus on real-world attacking scenarios rather than a worst case robustness assessment. Hence, in this work, we propose a novel adversarial attack - the Perturbation-Constrained Flow Attack (PCFA) - that emphasizes destructivity over applicability as a real-world attack. PCFA is a global attack that optimizes adversarial perturbations to shift the predicted flow towards a specified target flow, while keeping the L2 norm of the perturbation below a chosen bound. Our experiments demonstrate PCFA's applicability in white- and black-box settings, and show it finds stronger adversarial samples than previous attacks. Based on these strong samples, we provide the first joint ranking of optical flow methods considering both prediction quality and adversarial robustness, which reveals state-of-the-art methods to be particularly vulnerable. Code is available at https://github.com/cv-stuttgart/PCFA.
abstract_zh: 最近的光流方法几乎完全根据准确性来评判，而其鲁棒性往往被忽视。尽管对抗性攻击提供了执行此类分析的有用工具，但当前对光流方法的攻击侧重于现实世界的攻击场景，而不是最坏情况的鲁棒性评估。因此，在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的对抗性攻击——扰动约束流攻击（PCFA）——它强调破坏性而不是现实世界攻击的适用性。 PCFA 是一种全局攻击，它优化对抗性扰动，将预测流转向指定的目标流，同时将扰动的 L2 范数保持在选定的范围以下。我们的实验证明了 PCFA 在白盒和黑盒设置中的适用性，并表明它发现了比以前的攻击更强的对抗样本。基于这些强大的样本，我们提供了考虑预测质量和对抗鲁棒性的光流方法的第一个联合排名，这表明最先进的方法特别容易受到攻击。代码可在 https://github.com/cv-stuttgart/PCFA 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的对抗攻击方法PCFA，用于评估光流算法的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有光流方法仅关注准确性而忽视鲁棒性，现有对抗攻击侧重现实场景而非最坏情况评估，需设计更强调破坏性的攻击方法。
AI.method: PCFA通过全局优化扰动使预测光流向目标流偏移，同时约束L2范数在预设范围内，实现强破坏性攻击。
AI.result: 实验表明PCFA在白盒/黑盒场景下均有效，生成的对抗样本强于现有方法，并首次综合排名显示SOTA方法存在显著脆弱性。
AI.conclusion: PCFA为评估光流鲁棒性提供新工具，揭示当前先进方法的潜在缺陷，推动鲁棒性研究方向发展。

search_text: A Perturbation-Constrained Adversarial Attack for Evaluating the Robustness of Optical Flow 用于评估光流鲁棒性的扰动约束对抗攻击 Recent optical flow methods are almost exclusively judged in terms of accuracy, while their robustness is often neglected. Although adversarial attacks offer a useful tool to perform such an analysis, current attacks on optical flow methods focus on real-world attacking scenarios rather than a worst case robustness assessment. Hence, in this work, we propose a novel adversarial attack - the Perturbation-Constrained Flow Attack (PCFA) - that emphasizes destructivity over applicability as a real-world attack. PCFA is a global attack that optimizes adversarial perturbations to shift the predicted flow towards a specified target flow, while keeping the L2 norm of the perturbation below a chosen bound. Our experiments demonstrate PCFA's applicability in white- and black-box settings, and show it finds stronger adversarial samples than previous attacks. Based on these strong samples, we provide the first joint ranking of optical flow methods considering both prediction quality and adversarial robustness, which reveals state-of-the-art methods to be particularly vulnerable. Code is available at https://github.com/cv-stuttgart/PCFA. 最近的光流方法几乎完全根据准确性来评判，而其鲁棒性往往被忽视。尽管对抗性攻击提供了执行此类分析的有用工具，但当前对光流方法的攻击侧重于现实世界的攻击场景，而不是最坏情况的鲁棒性评估。因此，在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的对抗性攻击——扰动约束流攻击（PCFA）——它强调破坏性而不是现实世界攻击的适用性。 PCFA 是一种全局攻击，它优化对抗性扰动，将预测流转向指定的目标流，同时将扰动的 L2 范数保持在选定的范围以下。我们的实验证明了 PCFA 在白盒和黑盒设置中的适用性，并表明它发现了比以前的攻击更强的对抗样本。基于这些强大的样本，我们提供了考虑预测质量和对抗鲁棒性的光流方法的第一个联合排名，这表明最先进的方法特别容易受到攻击。代码可在 https://github.com/cv-stuttgart/PCFA 获取。 本文提出一种新的对抗攻击方法PCFA，用于评估光流算法的鲁棒性。 Jenny Schmalfuss,Philipp Scholze,Andrés Bruhn cs.CV

authors_text: Mateusz Pabian,Dominik Rzepka,Mirosław Pawlak
title: Supervised Training of Siamese Spiking Neural Networks with Earth Mover's Distance
title_zh: 具有推土机距离的连体尖峰神经网络的监督训练
comment: Revised paper accepted for presentation at 2022 IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech and Signal Processing (ICASSP)
comments: Revised paper accepted for presentation at 2022 IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech and Signal Processing (ICASSP)
abstract: This study adapts the highly-versatile siamese neural network model to the event data domain. We introduce a supervised training framework for optimizing Earth Mover's Distance (EMD) between spike trains with spiking neural networks (SNN). We train this model on images of the MNIST dataset converted into spiking domain with novel conversion schemes. The quality of the siamese embeddings of input images was evaluated by measuring the classifier performance for different dataset coding types. The models achieved performance similar to existing SNN-based approaches (F1-score of up to 0.9386) while using only about 15% of hidden layer neurons to classify each example. Furthermore, models which did not employ a sparse neural code were about 45% slower than their sparse counterparts. These properties make the model suitable for low energy consumption and low prediction latency applications.
summary: This study adapts the highly-versatile siamese neural network model to the event data domain. We introduce a supervised training framework for optimizing Earth Mover's Distance (EMD) between spike trains with spiking neural networks (SNN). We train this model on images of the MNIST dataset converted into spiking domain with novel conversion schemes. The quality of the siamese embeddings of input images was evaluated by measuring the classifier performance for different dataset coding types. The models achieved performance similar to existing SNN-based approaches (F1-score of up to 0.9386) while using only about 15% of hidden layer neurons to classify each example. Furthermore, models which did not employ a sparse neural code were about 45% slower than their sparse counterparts. These properties make the model suitable for low energy consumption and low prediction latency applications.
abstract_zh: 这项研究将高度通用的暹罗神经网络模型应用于事件数据领域。我们引入了一种监督训练框架，用于通过尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 优化尖峰列车之间的推土机距离 (EMD)。我们在 MNIST 数据集的图像上训练该模型，该图像通过新颖的转换方案转换为尖峰域。通过测量不同数据集编码类型的分类器性能来评估输入图像的连体嵌入的质量。该模型实现了与现有基于 SNN 的方法类似的性能（F1 分数高达 0.9386），同时仅使用约 15% 的隐藏层神经元对每个示例进行分类。此外，不采用稀疏神经代码的模型比稀疏模型慢约 45%。这些属性使该模型适合低能耗和低预测延迟的应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于地球移动距离（EMD）的监督训练框架，用于优化脉冲神经网络（SNN）中脉冲序列的相似性，并在MNIST数据集的脉冲域转换图像上进行训练。
AI.motivation: 传统SNN在处理事件数据时存在效率和精度的不足，需探索更高效的训练方法以满足低功耗和低延迟应用需求。
AI.method: 将MNIST图像转换为脉冲域数据，设计Siamese网络结构并引入EMD作为损失函数，通过对比不同编码类型的分类性能评估嵌入质量。
AI.result: 模型在保持高分类性能（F1分数达0.9386）的同时仅使用15%的隐藏层神经元，非稀疏编码模型比稀疏编码模型慢45%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保证精度的前提下显著降低了计算资源消耗，适用于低功耗和实时性要求高的场景。

Furthermore, models which did not employ a sparse neural code were about 45% slower than their sparse counterparts. These properties make the model suitable for low energy consumption and low prediction latency applications. 这项研究将高度通用的暹罗神经网络模型应用于事件数据领域。我们引入了一种监督训练框架，用于通过尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 优化尖峰列车之间的推土机距离 (EMD)。我们在 MNIST 数据集的图像上训练该模型，该图像通过新颖的转换方案转换为尖峰域。通过测量不同数据集编码类型的分类器性能来评估输入图像的连体嵌入的质量。该模型实现了与现有基于 SNN 的方法类似的性能（F1 分数高达 0.9386），同时仅使用约 15% 的隐藏层神经元对每个示例进行分类。此外，不采用稀疏神经代码的模型比稀疏模型慢约 45%。这些属性使该模型适合低能耗和低预测延迟的应用。 本文提出了一种基于地球移动距离（EMD）的监督训练框架，用于优化脉冲神经网络（SNN）中脉冲序列的相似性，并在MNIST数据集的脉冲域转换图像上进行训练。 Mateusz Pabian,Dominik Rzepka,Mirosław Pawlak cs.NE,cs.LG

authors_text: Abhishek Singh,Ethan Garza,Ayush Chopra,Praneeth Vepakomma,Vivek Sharma,Ramesh Raskar
title: Decouple-and-Sample: Protecting sensitive information in task agnostic data release
title_zh: 解耦和样本：保护任务无关数据发布中的敏感信息
abstract: We propose sanitizer, a framework for secure and task-agnostic data release. While releasing datasets continues to make a big impact in various applications of computer vision, its impact is mostly realized when data sharing is not inhibited by privacy concerns. We alleviate these concerns by sanitizing datasets in a two-stage process. First, we introduce a global decoupling stage for decomposing raw data into sensitive and non-sensitive latent representations. Secondly, we design a local sampling stage to synthetically generate sensitive information with differential privacy and merge it with non-sensitive latent features to create a useful representation while preserving the privacy. This newly formed latent information is a task-agnostic representation of the original dataset with anonymized sensitive information. While most algorithms sanitize data in a task-dependent manner, a few task-agnostic sanitization techniques sanitize data by censoring sensitive information. In this work, we show that a better privacy-utility trade-off is achieved if sensitive information can be synthesized privately. We validate the effectiveness of the sanitizer by outperforming state-of-the-art baselines on the existing benchmark tasks and demonstrating tasks that are not possible using existing techniques.
summary: We propose sanitizer, a framework for secure and task-agnostic data release. While releasing datasets continues to make a big impact in various applications of computer vision, its impact is mostly realized when data sharing is not inhibited by privacy concerns. We alleviate these concerns by sanitizing datasets in a two-stage process. First, we introduce a global decoupling stage for decomposing raw data into sensitive and non-sensitive latent representations. Secondly, we design a local sampling stage to synthetically generate sensitive information with differential privacy and merge it with non-sensitive latent features to create a useful representation while preserving the privacy. This newly formed latent information is a task-agnostic representation of the original dataset with anonymized sensitive information. While most algorithms sanitize data in a task-dependent manner, a few task-agnostic sanitization techniques sanitize data by censoring sensitive information. In this work, we show that a better privacy-utility trade-off is achieved if sensitive information can be synthesized privately. We validate the effectiveness of the sanitizer by outperforming state-of-the-art baselines on the existing benchmark tasks and demonstrating tasks that are not possible using existing techniques.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 sanitizer，一个用于安全且与任务无关的数据发布的框架。虽然发布数据集继续对计算机视觉的各种应用产生重大影响，但当数据共享不受隐私问题的抑制时，其影响才得以实现。我们通过两阶段过程清理数据集来缓解这些担忧。首先，我们引入一个全局解耦阶段，用于将原始数据分解为敏感和不敏感的潜在表示。其次，我们设计了一个局部采样阶段来综合生成具有差异隐私的敏感信息，并将其与非敏感潜在特征合并，以在保护隐私的同时创建有用的表示。这种新形成的潜在信息是具有匿名敏感信息的原始数据集的与任务无关的表示。虽然大多数算法以任务相关的方式清理数据，但一些与任务无关的清理技术通过审查敏感信息来清理数据。在这项工作中，我们表明，如果可以私下合成敏感信息，则可以实现更好的隐私与效用权衡。我们通过在现有基准任务上超越最先进的基线并演示使用现有技术无法完成的任务来验证消毒剂的有效性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种名为Sanitizer的框架，在任务无关的数据发布中保护敏感信息，通过解耦和采样方法平衡隐私与数据效用。
AI.motivation: 数据共享受隐私问题限制，现有方法多依赖任务相关，难以平衡隐私和效用，需更优解决方案。
AI.method: 两阶段方法：全局解耦数据为敏感/非敏感潜在表示，局部采样阶段用差分隐私合成敏感信息并合并至非敏感特征。
AI.result: 在基准任务上优于现有方法，并实现现有技术无法完成的任务。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过合成敏感信息，在隐私保护与数据效用间取得更优平衡，验证了方法的有效性。

ai_content.conclusion: 该框架通过合成敏感信息，在隐私保护与数据效用间取得更优平衡，验证了方法的有效性。

conclusion: 该框架通过合成敏感信息，在隐私保护与数据效用间取得更优平衡，验证了方法的有效性。
search_text: Decouple-and-Sample: Protecting sensitive information in task agnostic data release 解耦和样本：保护任务无关数据发布中的敏感信息 We propose sanitizer, a framework for secure and task-agnostic data release. While releasing datasets continues to make a big impact in various applications of computer vision, its impact is mostly realized when data sharing is not inhibited by privacy concerns. We alleviate these concerns by sanitizing datasets in a two-stage process. First, we introduce a global decoupling stage for decomposing raw data into sensitive and non-sensitive latent representations. Secondly, we design a local sampling stage to synthetically generate sensitive information with differential privacy and merge it with non-sensitive latent features to create a useful representation while preserving the privacy. This newly formed latent information is a task-agnostic representation of the original dataset with anonymized sensitive information. While most algorithms sanitize data in a task-dependent manner, a few task-agnostic sanitization techniques sanitize data by censoring sensitive information. In this work, we show that a better privacy-utility trade-off is achieved if sensitive information can be synthesized privately. We validate the effectiveness of the sanitizer by outperforming state-of-the-art baselines on the existing benchmark tasks and demonstrating tasks that are not possible using existing techniques. 我们提出了 sanitizer，一个用于安全且与任务无关的数据发布的框架。虽然发布数据集继续对计算机视觉的各种应用产生重大影响，但当数据共享不受隐私问题的抑制时，其影响才得以实现。我们通过两阶段过程清理数据集来缓解这些担忧。首先，我们引入一个全局解耦阶段，用于将原始数据分解为敏感和不敏感的潜在表示。其次，我们设计了一个局部采样阶段来综合生成具有差异隐私的敏感信息，并将其与非敏感潜在特征合并，以在保护隐私的同时创建有用的表示。这种新形成的潜在信息是具有匿名敏感信息的原始数据集的与任务无关的表示。虽然大多数算法以任务相关的方式清理数据，但一些与任务无关的清理技术通过审查敏感信息来清理数据。在这项工作中，我们表明，如果可以私下合成敏感信息，则可以实现更好的隐私与效用权衡。我们通过在现有基准任务上超越最先进的基线并演示使用现有技术无法完成的任务来验证消毒剂的有效性。 提出一种名为Sanitizer的框架，在任务无关的数据发布中保护敏感信息，通过解耦和采样方法平衡隐私与数据效用。 Abhishek Singh,Ethan Garza,Ayush Chopra,Praneeth Vepakomma,Vivek Sharma,Ramesh Raskar cs.CR,cs.CV,cs.CY,cs.LG

authors_text: Nasir Ahmad,Ellen Schrader,Marcel van Gerven
title: Constrained Parameter Inference as a Principle for Learning
title_zh: 约束参数推理作为学习原理
abstract: Learning in neural networks is often framed as a problem in which targeted error signals are directly propagated to parameters and used to produce updates that induce more optimal network behaviour. Backpropagation of error (BP) is an example of such an approach and has proven to be a highly successful application of stochastic gradient descent to deep neural networks. We propose constrained parameter inference (COPI) as a new principle for learning. The COPI approach assumes that learning can be set up in a manner where parameters infer their own values based upon observations of their local neuron activities. We find that this estimation of network parameters is possible under the constraints of decorrelated neural inputs and top-down perturbations of neural states for credit assignment. We show that the decorrelation required for COPI allows learning at extremely high learning rates, competitive with that of adaptive optimizers, as used by BP. We further demonstrate that COPI affords a new approach to feature analysis and network compression. Finally, we argue that COPI may shed new light on learning in biological networks given the evidence for decorrelation in the brain.
summary: Learning in neural networks is often framed as a problem in which targeted error signals are directly propagated to parameters and used to produce updates that induce more optimal network behaviour. Backpropagation of error (BP) is an example of such an approach and has proven to be a highly successful application of stochastic gradient descent to deep neural networks. We propose constrained parameter inference (COPI) as a new principle for learning. The COPI approach assumes that learning can be set up in a manner where parameters infer their own values based upon observations of their local neuron activities. We find that this estimation of network parameters is possible under the constraints of decorrelated neural inputs and top-down perturbations of neural states for credit assignment. We show that the decorrelation required for COPI allows learning at extremely high learning rates, competitive with that of adaptive optimizers, as used by BP. We further demonstrate that COPI affords a new approach to feature analysis and network compression. Finally, we argue that COPI may shed new light on learning in biological networks given the evidence for decorrelation in the brain.
abstract_zh: 神经网络中的学习通常被视为一个问题，其中目标误差信号直接传播到参数并用于产生更新，从而引发更优化的网络行为。误差反向传播（BP）就是这种方法的一个例子，并且已被证明是随机梯度下降在深度神经网络中的非常成功的应用。我们提出约束参数推理（COPI）作为新的学习原理。 COPI 方法假设可以通过参数根据对其局部神经元活动的观察来推断其自身值的方式来设置学习。我们发现，在去相关的神经输入和信用分配的神经状态自上而下的扰动的约束下，这种网络参数的估计是可能的。我们表明，COPI 所需的去相关允许以极高的学习率进行学习​​，这与 BP 使用的自适应优化器具有竞争力。我们进一步证明 COPI 提供了一种新的特征分析和网络压缩方法。最后，我们认为，鉴于大脑去相关的证据，COPI 可能为生物网络学习提供新的线索。

AI.tldr: 提出受限参数推断（COPI）作为神经网络学习的新原则，替代传统反向传播方法。
AI.motivation: 传统反向传播存在计算复杂性和生物合理性问题，需探索更符合生物机制的学习原则。
AI.method: 参数根据局部神经元活动推断，结合去相关输入与自上而下扰动实现信用分配。
AI.result: 实现高学习率，媲美自适应优化器，支持特征分析与网络压缩。
AI.conclusion: COPI可能揭示生物网络学习机制，因其符合大脑去相关证据。

authors_text: Mihai Oltean
title: Multi Expression Programming for solving classification problems
title_zh: 用于解决分类问题的多表达式编程
abstract: Multi Expression Programming (MEP) is a Genetic Programming variant which encodes multiple solutions in a single chromosome. This paper introduces and deeply describes several strategies for solving binary and multi-class classification problems within the \textit{multi solutions per chromosome} paradigm of MEP. Extensive experiments on various classification problems are performed. MEP shows similar or better performances than other methods used for comparison (namely Artificial Neural Networks and Linear Genetic Programming).
summary: Multi Expression Programming (MEP) is a Genetic Programming variant which encodes multiple solutions in a single chromosome. This paper introduces and deeply describes several strategies for solving binary and multi-class classification problems within the \textit{multi solutions per chromosome} paradigm of MEP. Extensive experiments on various classification problems are performed. MEP shows similar or better performances than other methods used for comparison (namely Artificial Neural Networks and Linear Genetic Programming).
abstract_zh: 多表达编程（MEP）是一种遗传编程变体，它在单个染色体中编码多个解决方案。本文介绍并深入描述了在 MEP 的 \textit{每染色体多解}范式内解决二元和多类分类问题的几种策略。对各种分类问题进行了广泛的实验。 MEP 显示出与用于比较的其他方法（即人工神经网络和线性遗传规划）相似或更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用多表达式编程（MEP）解决二元和多元分类问题，并通过实验验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统分类方法存在复杂度高或泛化能力不足的问题，而MEP通过单染色体编码多解的特性可能提升分类性能。
AI.method: 基于MEP框架设计多解编码策略，结合遗传编程技术优化分类模型参数，并在多数据集上进行对比实验。
AI.result: MEP在多个分类任务中表现与人工神经网络和线性遗传编程相当或更优，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: MEP为分类问题提供了可行的优化方案，其多解编码机制具有进一步研究和应用的价值。

authors_text: Saeed Ghadiri,Amin Nikanjam
title: Novel Metric based on Walsh Coefficients for measuring problem difficulty in Estimation of Distribution Algorithms
title_zh: 基于沃尔什系数的新度量，用于测量分布算法估计中的问题难度
abstract: Estimation of distribution algorithms are evolutionary algorithms that use extracted information from the population instead of traditional genetic operators to generate new solutions. This information is represented as a probabilistic model and the effectiveness of these algorithms is dependent on the quality of these models. However, some studies have shown that even multivariate EDAs fail to build a proper model in some problems. Usually, in these problems, there is intrinsic pairwise independence between variables. In the literature, there are few studies that investigate the difficulty and the nature of problems that can not be solved by EDAs easily. This paper proposes a new metric for measuring problem difficulty by examining the properties of model-building mechanisms in EDAs. For this purpose, we use the estimated Walsh coefficients of dependent and independent variables. The proposed metric is used to evaluate the difficulty of some well-known benchmark problems in EDAs. Different metrics like Fitness Distance Correlation (FDC) are used to compare how well the proposed metric measures problem difficulty for EDAs. Results indicate that the proposed metric can accurately predict the EDA's performance in different problems.
summary: Estimation of distribution algorithms are evolutionary algorithms that use extracted information from the population instead of traditional genetic operators to generate new solutions. This information is represented as a probabilistic model and the effectiveness of these algorithms is dependent on the quality of these models. However, some studies have shown that even multivariate EDAs fail to build a proper model in some problems. Usually, in these problems, there is intrinsic pairwise independence between variables. In the literature, there are few studies that investigate the difficulty and the nature of problems that can not be solved by EDAs easily. This paper proposes a new metric for measuring problem difficulty by examining the properties of model-building mechanisms in EDAs. For this purpose, we use the estimated Walsh coefficients of dependent and independent variables. The proposed metric is used to evaluate the difficulty of some well-known benchmark problems in EDAs. Different metrics like Fitness Distance Correlation (FDC) are used to compare how well the proposed metric measures problem difficulty for EDAs. Results indicate that the proposed metric can accurately predict the EDA's performance in different problems.
abstract_zh: 分布估计算法是进化算法，它使用从群体中提取的信息而不是传统的遗传算子来生成新的解决方案。该信息表示为概率模型，这些算法的有效性取决于这些模型的质量。然而，一些研究表明，即使是多元 EDA 也无法在某些问题上建立正确的模型。通常，在这些问题中，变量之间存在内在的成对独立性。在文献中，很少有研究调查 EDA 无法轻松解决的问题的难度和性质。本文提出了一种通过检查 EDA 中模型构建机制的属性来衡量问题难度的新指标。为此，我们使用因变量和自变量的估计沃尔什系数。所提出的指标用于评估 EDA 中一些众所周知的基准问题的难度。使用适应度距离相关性 (FDC) 等不同指标来比较所提出的指标衡量 EDA 问题难度的效果。结果表明，所提出的指标可以准确预测 EDA 在不同问题中的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于沃尔什系数的新度量方法，用于评估分布估计算法（EDAs）在解决不同问题时的难度。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对分布估计算法难以处理的问题的难度分析，尤其在变量存在内在独立性时模型构建失效的问题。
AI.method: 通过分析依赖与独立变量的估计沃尔什系数特性，构建新度量指标，并与Fitness Distance Correlation（FDC）等指标对比验证有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明，该度量能准确预测EDAs在多种基准问题中的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 提出的沃尔什系数度量方法有效表征EDAs问题难度，为算法改进和问题分析提供新视角。

However, some studies have shown that even multivariate EDAs fail to build a proper model in some problems. Usually, in these problems, there is intrinsic pairwise independence between variables. In the literature, there are few studies that investigate the difficulty and the nature of problems that can not be solved by EDAs easily. This paper proposes a new metric for measuring problem difficulty by examining the properties of model-building mechanisms in EDAs. For this purpose, we use the estimated Walsh coefficients of dependent and independent variables. The proposed metric is used to evaluate the difficulty of some well-known benchmark problems in EDAs. Different metrics like Fitness Distance Correlation (FDC) are used to compare how well the proposed metric measures problem difficulty for EDAs. Results indicate that the proposed metric can accurately predict the EDA's performance in different problems. 分布估计算法是进化算法，它使用从群体中提取的信息而不是传统的遗传算子来生成新的解决方案。该信息表示为概率模型，这些算法的有效性取决于这些模型的质量。然而，一些研究表明，即使是多元 EDA 也无法在某些问题上建立正确的模型。通常，在这些问题中，变量之间存在内在的成对独立性。在文献中，很少有研究调查 EDA 无法轻松解决的问题的难度和性质。本文提出了一种通过检查 EDA 中模型构建机制的属性来衡量问题难度的新指标。为此，我们使用因变量和自变量的估计沃尔什系数。所提出的指标用于评估 EDA 中一些众所周知的基准问题的难度。使用适应度距离相关性 (FDC) 等不同指标来比较所提出的指标衡量 EDA 问题难度的效果。结果表明，所提出的指标可以准确预测 EDA 在不同问题中的性能。 本文提出一种基于沃尔什系数的新度量方法，用于评估分布估计算法（EDAs）在解决不同问题时的难度。 Saeed Ghadiri,Amin Nikanjam cs.NE,cs.AI

authors_text: Yoshio Martinez,Katya Rodriguez,Carlos Gershenson
title: Temporal Heterogeneity Improves Speed and Convergence in Genetic Algorithms
title_zh: 时间异质性提高了遗传算法的速度和收敛性
abstract: Genetic algorithms have been used in recent decades to solve a broad variety of search problems. These algorithms simulate natural selection to explore a parameter space in search of solutions for a broad variety of problems. In this paper, we explore the effects of introducing temporal heterogeneity in genetic algorithms. In particular, we set the crossover probability to be inversely proportional to the individual's fitness, i.e., better solutions change slower than those with a lower fitness. As case studies, we apply heterogeneity to solve the $N$-Queens and Traveling Salesperson problems. We find that temporal heterogeneity consistently improves search without having prior knowledge of the parameter space.
summary: Genetic algorithms have been used in recent decades to solve a broad variety of search problems. These algorithms simulate natural selection to explore a parameter space in search of solutions for a broad variety of problems. In this paper, we explore the effects of introducing temporal heterogeneity in genetic algorithms. In particular, we set the crossover probability to be inversely proportional to the individual's fitness, i.e., better solutions change slower than those with a lower fitness. As case studies, we apply heterogeneity to solve the $N$-Queens and Traveling Salesperson problems. We find that temporal heterogeneity consistently improves search without having prior knowledge of the parameter space.
abstract_zh: 近几十年来，遗传算法已被用来解决各种各样的搜索问题。这些算法模拟自然选择来探索参数空间，以寻找各种问题的解决方案。在本文中，我们探讨了在遗传算法中引入时间异质性的影响。特别是，我们将交叉概率设置为与个体的适应度成反比，即，更好的解决方案比适应度较低的解决方案变化得更慢。作为案例研究，我们应用异质性来解决 $N$-皇后和旅行推销员问题。我们发现时间异质性持续改善搜索，而无需先验了解参数空间。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在遗传算法中引入时间异质性对搜索速度和收敛性的影响，通过调整交叉概率与个体适应度的反比关系，提升算法性能。
AI.motivation: 传统遗传算法在参数调整上依赖先验知识，而本文旨在探索无需参数空间先验知识的情况下，如何通过时间异质性优化算法效率。
AI.method: 将交叉概率设为个体适应度的反比函数，使高适应度个体变化更慢，低适应度个体变化更快，并在N皇后和旅行商问题中验证该方法。
AI.result: 实验表明，时间异质性策略在两种经典问题中均显著提升了搜索效率，且无需参数空间的先验知识。
AI.conclusion: 时间异质性是一种有效提升遗传算法性能的通用策略，能够在不同问题中实现更快的收敛和更优的搜索结果。

authors_text: Alvaro J. Garcia-Tejedor,Alberto Nogales
title: GEMA: An open-source Python library for self-organizing-maps
title_zh: GEMA：用于自组织映射的开源 Python 库
abstract: Organizations have realized the importance of data analysis and its benefits. This in combination with Machine Learning algorithms has allowed to solve problems more easily, making these processes less time-consuming. Neural networks are the Machine Learning technique that is recently obtaining very good best results. This paper describes an open-source Python library called GEMA developed to work with a type of neural network model called Self-Organizing-Maps. GEMA is freely available under GNU General Public License at GitHub (https://github.com/ufvceiec/GEMA). The library has been evaluated in different a particular use case obtaining accurate results.
summary: Organizations have realized the importance of data analysis and its benefits. This in combination with Machine Learning algorithms has allowed to solve problems more easily, making these processes less time-consuming. Neural networks are the Machine Learning technique that is recently obtaining very good best results. This paper describes an open-source Python library called GEMA developed to work with a type of neural network model called Self-Organizing-Maps. GEMA is freely available under GNU General Public License at GitHub (https://github.com/ufvceiec/GEMA). The library has been evaluated in different a particular use case obtaining accurate results.
abstract_zh: 组织已经意识到数据分析的重要性及其好处。与机器学习算法相结合，可以更轻松地解决问题，从而减少这些过程的耗时。神经网络是最近获得非常好的最佳结果的机器学习技术。本文介绍了一个名为 GEMA 的开源 Python 库，该库是为与一种名为“自组织映射”（Self-Organizing-Maps）的神经网络模型一起使用而开发的。 GEMA 可根据 GNU 通用公共许可证在 GitHub (https://github.com/ufvceiec/GEMA) 上免费获取。该库已在不同的特定用例中进行了评估，获得了准确的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个名为GEMA的开源Python库，用于实现和应用自组织映射（SOM）神经网络模型。
AI.motivation: 随着数据分析和机器学习的重要性提升，神经网络成为解决复杂问题的有效工具，但缺乏专门的SOM实现库，因此开发GEMA以满足需求。
AI.method: 开发基于Python的GEMA库，实现自组织映射神经网络模型，并通过特定用例进行验证。
AI.result: GEMA在特定应用场景中表现出准确的分析结果，证明其有效性。
AI.conclusion: GEMA为SOM模型的应用提供了可靠的开源工具，可促进相关研究和实践。

authors_text: Federica Arrigoni,Willi Menapace,Marcel Seelbach Benkner,Elisa Ricci,Vladislav Golyanik
title: Quantum Motion Segmentation
title_zh: 量子运动分割
abstract: Motion segmentation is a challenging problem that seeks to identify independent motions in two or several input images. This paper introduces the first algorithm for motion segmentation that relies on adiabatic quantum optimization of the objective function. The proposed method achieves on-par performance with the state of the art on problem instances which can be mapped to modern quantum annealers.
summary: Motion segmentation is a challenging problem that seeks to identify independent motions in two or several input images. This paper introduces the first algorithm for motion segmentation that relies on adiabatic quantum optimization of the objective function. The proposed method achieves on-par performance with the state of the art on problem instances which can be mapped to modern quantum annealers.
abstract_zh: 运动分割是一个具有挑战性的问题，旨在识别两个或多个输入图像中的独立运动。本文介绍了第一个依赖于目标函数绝热量子优化的运动分割算法。所提出的方法在可以映射到现代量子退火器的问题实例上实现了与现有技术相当的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于绝热量子优化的运动分割算法，用于在多幅图像中识别独立运动。
AI.motivation: 传统运动分割方法在处理复杂场景时存在局限性，而量子计算提供了潜在的优化途径。
AI.method: 通过绝热量子优化技术对目标函数进行优化，利用现代量子退火器实现运动分割。
AI.result: 该方法在可映射到量子退火器的问题实例上，性能与现有最佳方法相当。
AI.conclusion: 量子优化为运动分割提供了新思路，在量子硬件适用范围内具有实际应用潜力。

authors_text: Xenia Ohmer,Marko Duda,Elia Bruni
title: Emergence of hierarchical reference systems in multi-agent communication
title_zh: 多智能体通信中分层参考系统的出现
abstract: In natural language, referencing objects at different levels of specificity is a fundamental pragmatic mechanism for efficient communication in context. We develop a novel communication game, the hierarchical reference game, to study the emergence of such reference systems in artificial agents. We consider a simplified world, in which concepts are abstractions over a set of primitive attributes (e.g., color, style, shape). Depending on how many attributes are combined, concepts are more general ("circle") or more specific ("red dotted circle"). Based on the context, the agents have to communicate at different levels of this hierarchy. Our results show that the agents learn to play the game successfully and can even generalize to novel concepts. To achieve abstraction, they use implicit (omitting irrelevant information) and explicit (indicating that attributes are irrelevant) strategies. In addition, the compositional structure underlying the concept hierarchy is reflected in the emergent protocols, indicating that the need to develop hierarchical reference systems supports the emergence of compositionality.
summary: In natural language, referencing objects at different levels of specificity is a fundamental pragmatic mechanism for efficient communication in context. We develop a novel communication game, the hierarchical reference game, to study the emergence of such reference systems in artificial agents. We consider a simplified world, in which concepts are abstractions over a set of primitive attributes (e.g., color, style, shape). Depending on how many attributes are combined, concepts are more general ("circle") or more specific ("red dotted circle"). Based on the context, the agents have to communicate at different levels of this hierarchy. Our results show that the agents learn to play the game successfully and can even generalize to novel concepts. To achieve abstraction, they use implicit (omitting irrelevant information) and explicit (indicating that attributes are irrelevant) strategies. In addition, the compositional structure underlying the concept hierarchy is reflected in the emergent protocols, indicating that the need to develop hierarchical reference systems supports the emergence of compositionality.
abstract_zh: 在自然语言中，引用不同特异性级别的对象是上下文中有效沟通的基本实用机制。我们开发了一种新颖的通信游戏，即分层参考游戏，以研究人工代理中此类参考系统的出现。我们考虑一个简化的世界，其中概念是一组原始属性（例如颜色、样式、形状）的抽象。根据组合的属性数量，概念更通用（“圆圈”）或更具体（“红色虚线圆圈”）。根据上下文，代理必须在此层次结构的不同级别进行通信。我们的结果表明，智能体学会了成功地玩游戏，甚至可以推广到新的概念。为了实现抽象，他们使用隐式（省略不相关信息）和显式（表明属性不相关）策略。此外，概念层次结构背后的组合结构反映在新兴协议中，表明开发层次参考系统的需要支持组合性的出现。

AI.tldr: 本文通过设计分层参考游戏，研究多智能体通信中分层参考系统的形成机制。
AI.motivation: 自然语言中通过不同层级的指代实现高效沟通，但人工智能系统中此类分层参考机制的形成机制尚不明确。
AI.method: 构建简化世界模型，定义由基础属性组合而成的概念层级，通过多智能体通信游戏训练智能体在不同层级间进行指代。
AI.result: 智能体成功习得游戏规则并能泛化到新概念，采用隐式（省略无关信息）和显式（标注无关属性）策略实现抽象。
AI.conclusion: 分层参考系统的形成需求推动了组合性结构的产生，为人工智能通信机制研究提供新视角。

search_text: Emergence of hierarchical reference systems in multi-agent communication 多智能体通信中分层参考系统的出现 In natural language, referencing objects at different levels of specificity is a fundamental pragmatic mechanism for efficient communication in context. We develop a novel communication game, the hierarchical reference game, to study the emergence of such reference systems in artificial agents. We consider a simplified world, in which concepts are abstractions over a set of primitive attributes (e.g., color, style, shape). Depending on how many attributes are combined, concepts are more general ("circle") or more specific ("red dotted circle"). Based on the context, the agents have to communicate at different levels of this hierarchy. Our results show that the agents learn to play the game successfully and can even generalize to novel concepts. To achieve abstraction, they use implicit (omitting irrelevant information) and explicit (indicating that attributes are irrelevant) strategies. In addition, the compositional structure underlying the concept hierarchy is reflected in the emergent protocols, indicating that the need to develop hierarchical reference systems supports the emergence of compositionality. 在自然语言中，引用不同特异性级别的对象是上下文中有效沟通的基本实用机制。我们开发了一种新颖的通信游戏，即分层参考游戏，以研究人工代理中此类参考系统的出现。我们考虑一个简化的世界，其中概念是一组原始属性（例如颜色、样式、形状）的抽象。根据组合的属性数量，概念更通用（“圆圈”）或更具体（“红色虚线圆圈”）。根据上下文，代理必须在此层次结构的不同级别进行通信。我们的结果表明，智能体学会了成功地玩游戏，甚至可以推广到新的概念。为了实现抽象，他们使用隐式（省略不相关信息）和显式（表明属性不相关）策略。此外，概念层次结构背后的组合结构反映在新兴协议中，表明开发层次参考系统的需要支持组合性的出现。 本文通过设计分层参考游戏，研究多智能体通信中分层参考系统的形成机制。 Xenia Ohmer,Marko Duda,Elia Bruni cs.AI,cs.CL

authors_text: Runsheng Xu,Weizhe Chen,Hao Xiang,Lantao Liu,Jiaqi Ma
title: Model-Agnostic Multi-Agent Perception Framework
title_zh: 与模型无关的多智能体感知框架
abstract: Existing multi-agent perception systems assume that every agent utilizes the same model with identical parameters and architecture. The performance can be degraded with different perception models due to the mismatch in their confidence scores. In this work, we propose a model-agnostic multi-agent perception framework to reduce the negative effect caused by the model discrepancies without sharing the model information. Specifically, we propose a confidence calibrator that can eliminate the prediction confidence score bias. Each agent performs such calibration independently on a standard public database to protect intellectual property. We also propose a corresponding bounding box aggregation algorithm that considers the confidence scores and the spatial agreement of neighboring boxes. Our experiments shed light on the necessity of model calibration across different agents, and the results show that the proposed framework improves the baseline 3D object detection performance of heterogeneous agents.
summary: Existing multi-agent perception systems assume that every agent utilizes the same model with identical parameters and architecture. The performance can be degraded with different perception models due to the mismatch in their confidence scores. In this work, we propose a model-agnostic multi-agent perception framework to reduce the negative effect caused by the model discrepancies without sharing the model information. Specifically, we propose a confidence calibrator that can eliminate the prediction confidence score bias. Each agent performs such calibration independently on a standard public database to protect intellectual property. We also propose a corresponding bounding box aggregation algorithm that considers the confidence scores and the spatial agreement of neighboring boxes. Our experiments shed light on the necessity of model calibration across different agents, and the results show that the proposed framework improves the baseline 3D object detection performance of heterogeneous agents.
abstract_zh: 现有的多智能体感知系统假设每个智能体都使用具有相同参数和架构的相同模型。由于置信度分数不匹配，不同感知模型的性能可能会下降。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种与模型无关的多智能体感知框架，以在不共享模型信息的情况下减少模型差异造成的负面影响。具体来说，我们提出了一种置信度校准器，可以消除预测置信度得分偏差。每个代理在标准公共数据库上独立执行此类校准，以保护知识产权。我们还提出了一种相应的边界框聚合算法，该算法考虑了相邻框的置信度得分和空间一致性。我们的实验阐明了跨不同智能体进行模型校准的必要性，结果表明所提出的框架提高了异构智能体的基线 3D 对象检测性能。

AI.tldr: 提出一个模型无关的多智能体感知框架，解决异构模型间的置信度不匹配问题，提升3D目标检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有系统假设所有智能体使用相同模型，但异构模型因置信度分数不匹配导致性能下降，且需保护知识产权避免模型信息共享。
AI.method: 设计置信度校准器消除预测偏差，各智能体独立在公共数据库校准；提出结合置信度与空间一致性的边界框聚合算法。
AI.result: 实验验证框架提升异构智能体3D目标检测基线性能，证明跨模型校准的必要性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效缓解模型差异影响，在保护知识产权前提下优化多智能体协作感知性能。

authors_text: Francesco Pelosin,Saurav Jha,Andrea Torsello,Bogdan Raducanu,Joost van de Weijer
title: Towards Exemplar-Free Continual Learning in Vision Transformers: an Account of Attention, Functional and Weight Regularization
title_zh: 迈向视觉变形金刚中的无样本持续学习：注意力、功能和权重正则化的说明
abstract: In this paper, we investigate the continual learning of Vision Transformers (ViT) for the challenging exemplar-free scenario, with special focus on how to efficiently distill the knowledge of its crucial self-attention mechanism (SAM). Our work takes an initial step towards a surgical investigation of SAM for designing coherent continual learning methods in ViTs. We first carry out an evaluation of established continual learning regularization techniques. We then examine the effect of regularization when applied to two key enablers of SAM: (a) the contextualized embedding layers, for their ability to capture well-scaled representations with respect to the values, and (b) the prescaled attention maps, for carrying value-independent global contextual information. We depict the perks of each distilling strategy on two image recognition benchmarks (CIFAR100 and ImageNet-32) -- while (a) leads to a better overall accuracy, (b) helps enhance the rigidity by maintaining competitive performances. Furthermore, we identify the limitation imposed by the symmetric nature of regularization losses. To alleviate this, we propose an asymmetric variant and apply it to the pooled output distillation (POD) loss adapted for ViTs. Our experiments confirm that introducing asymmetry to POD boosts its plasticity while retaining stability across (a) and (b). Moreover, we acknowledge low forgetting measures for all the compared methods, indicating that ViTs might be naturally inclined continual learner
summary: In this paper, we investigate the continual learning of Vision Transformers (ViT) for the challenging exemplar-free scenario, with special focus on how to efficiently distill the knowledge of its crucial self-attention mechanism (SAM). Our work takes an initial step towards a surgical investigation of SAM for designing coherent continual learning methods in ViTs. We first carry out an evaluation of established continual learning regularization techniques. We then examine the effect of regularization when applied to two key enablers of SAM: (a) the contextualized embedding layers, for their ability to capture well-scaled representations with respect to the values, and (b) the prescaled attention maps, for carrying value-independent global contextual information. We depict the perks of each distilling strategy on two image recognition benchmarks (CIFAR100 and ImageNet-32) -- while (a) leads to a better overall accuracy, (b) helps enhance the rigidity by maintaining competitive performances. Furthermore, we identify the limitation imposed by the symmetric nature of regularization losses. To alleviate this, we propose an asymmetric variant and apply it to the pooled output distillation (POD) loss adapted for ViTs. Our experiments confirm that introducing asymmetry to POD boosts its plasticity while retaining stability across (a) and (b). Moreover, we acknowledge low forgetting measures for all the compared methods, indicating that ViTs might be naturally inclined continual learner
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了视觉变换器（ViT）在具有挑战性的无样本场景中的持续学习，特别关注如何有效地提取其关键的自注意力机制（SAM）的知识。我们的工作朝着对 SAM 进行外科手术研究迈出了第一步，以便在 ViT 中设计连贯的持续学习方法。我们首先对已建立的持续学习正则化技术进行评估。然后，我们检查正则化应用于 SAM 的两个关键推动因素时的效果：(a) 上下文化嵌入层，因为它们能够捕获关于值的良好缩放表示，以及 (b) 预缩放注意力图，用于携带与值无关的全局上下文信息。我们在两个图像识别基准（CIFAR100 和 ImageNet-32）上描述了每种提取策略的优点 - (a) 带来更好的整体准确性，(b) 通过保持竞争性能有助于增强刚性。此外，我们还确定了正则化损失的对称性质所带来的限制。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一种不对称变体，并将其应用于适用于 ViT 的池化输出蒸馏（POD）损失。我们的实验证实，向 POD 引入不对称性可以增强其可塑性，同时保持 (a) 和 (b) 的稳定性。此外，我们承认所有比较方法的遗忘测量值都很低，这表明 ViT 可能天生倾向于持续学习

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在无示例的持续学习场景下，如何通过注意机制、功能和权重正则化来改进视觉变换器（ViT）的持续学习方法。
AI.motivation: 视觉变换器（ViT）在持续学习中面临无示例场景下的知识蒸馏挑战，需有效利用其自注意机制（SAM）以提升模型适应新任务的能力。
AI.method: 评估现有正则化技术，针对SAM的两个关键组件（上下文嵌入层和预缩放注意力图）设计正则化策略，并提出不对称的池化输出蒸馏（POD）损失以缓解对称性限制。
AI.result: 在CIFAR100和ImageNet-32数据集上，上下文嵌入层提升整体准确率，预缩放注意力图增强稳定性，不对称POD损失在保持稳定性的同时提升可塑性，且所有方法均表现出较低的遗忘率。
AI.conclusion: 通过优化正则化策略和引入不对称POD损失，本文为ViT的持续学习提供了有效方法，表明ViT可能天然适合持续学习任务。

method: 评估现有正则化技术，针对SAM的两个关键组件（上下文嵌入层和预缩放注意力图）设计正则化策略，并提出不对称的池化输出蒸馏（POD）损失以缓解对称性限制。
result: 在CIFAR100和ImageNet-32数据集上，上下文嵌入层提升整体准确率，预缩放注意力图增强稳定性，不对称POD损失在保持稳定性的同时提升可塑性，且所有方法均表现出较低的遗忘率。
conclusion: 通过优化正则化策略和引入不对称POD损失，本文为ViT的持续学习提供了有效方法，表明ViT可能天然适合持续学习任务。
search_text: Towards Exemplar-Free Continual Learning in Vision Transformers: an Account of Attention, Functional and Weight Regularization 迈向视觉变形金刚中的无样本持续学习：注意力、功能和权重正则化的说明 In this paper, we investigate the continual learning of Vision Transformers (ViT) for the challenging exemplar-free scenario, with special focus on how to efficiently distill the knowledge of its crucial self-attention mechanism (SAM). Our work takes an initial step towards a surgical investigation of SAM for designing coherent continual learning methods in ViTs. We first carry out an evaluation of established continual learning regularization techniques. We then examine the effect of regularization when applied to two key enablers of SAM: (a) the contextualized embedding layers, for their ability to capture well-scaled representations with respect to the values, and (b) the prescaled attention maps, for carrying value-independent global contextual information. We depict the perks of each distilling strategy on two image recognition benchmarks (CIFAR100 and ImageNet-32) -- while (a) leads to a better overall accuracy, (b) helps enhance the rigidity by maintaining competitive performances. Furthermore, we identify the limitation imposed by the symmetric nature of regularization losses. To alleviate this, we propose an asymmetric variant and apply it to the pooled output distillation (POD) loss adapted for ViTs. Our experiments confirm that introducing asymmetry to POD boosts its plasticity while retaining stability across (a) and (b). Moreover, we acknowledge low forgetting measures for all the compared methods, indicating that ViTs might be naturally inclined continual learner 在本文中，我们研究了视觉变换器（ViT）在具有挑战性的无样本场景中的持续学习，特别关注如何有效地提取其关键的自注意力机制（SAM）的知识。我们的工作朝着对 SAM 进行外科手术研究迈出了第一步，以便在 ViT 中设计连贯的持续学习方法。我们首先对已建立的持续学习正则化技术进行评估。然后，我们检查正则化应用于 SAM 的两个关键推动因素时的效果：(a) 上下文化嵌入层，因为它们能够捕获关于值的良好缩放表示，以及 (b) 预缩放注意力图，用于携带与值无关的全局上下文信息。我们在两个图像识别基准（CIFAR100 和 ImageNet-32）上描述了每种提取策略的优点 - (a) 带来更好的整体准确性，(b) 通过保持竞争性能有助于增强刚性。此外，我们还确定了正则化损失的对称性质所带来的限制。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一种不对称变体，并将其应用于适用于 ViT 的池化输出蒸馏（POD）损失。我们的实验证实，向 POD 引入不对称性可以增强其可塑性，同时保持 (a) 和 (b) 的稳定性。此外，我们承认所有比较方法的遗忘测量值都很低，这表明 ViT 可能天生倾向于持续学习 本文研究了在无示例的持续学习场景下，如何通过注意机制、功能和权重正则化来改进视觉变换器（ViT）的持续学习方法。 Francesco Pelosin,Saurav Jha,Andrea Torsello,Bogdan Raducanu,Joost van de Weijer cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Yujiang Wang,Mingzhi Dong,Jie Shen,Yiming Luo,Yiming Lin,Pingchuan Ma,Stavros Petridis,Maja Pantic
title: Self-supervised Video-centralised Transformer for Video Face Clustering
title_zh: 用于视频人脸聚类的自监督视频集中式变压器
comment: Accepted to IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence (TPAMI)
comments: Accepted to IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence (TPAMI)
abstract: This paper presents a novel method for face clustering in videos using a video-centralised transformer. Previous works often employed contrastive learning to learn frame-level representation and used average pooling to aggregate the features along the temporal dimension. This approach may not fully capture the complicated video dynamics. In addition, despite the recent progress in video-based contrastive learning, few have attempted to learn a self-supervised clustering-friendly face representation that benefits the video face clustering task. To overcome these limitations, our method employs a transformer to directly learn video-level representations that can better reflect the temporally-varying property of faces in videos, while we also propose a video-centralised self-supervised framework to train the transformer model. We also investigate face clustering in egocentric videos, a fast-emerging field that has not been studied yet in works related to face clustering. To this end, we present and release the first large-scale egocentric video face clustering dataset named EasyCom-Clustering. We evaluate our proposed method on both the widely used Big Bang Theory (BBT) dataset and the new EasyCom-Clustering dataset. Results show the performance of our video-centralised transformer has surpassed all previous state-of-the-art methods on both benchmarks, exhibiting a self-attentive understanding of face videos.
summary: This paper presents a novel method for face clustering in videos using a video-centralised transformer. Previous works often employed contrastive learning to learn frame-level representation and used average pooling to aggregate the features along the temporal dimension. This approach may not fully capture the complicated video dynamics. In addition, despite the recent progress in video-based contrastive learning, few have attempted to learn a self-supervised clustering-friendly face representation that benefits the video face clustering task. To overcome these limitations, our method employs a transformer to directly learn video-level representations that can better reflect the temporally-varying property of faces in videos, while we also propose a video-centralised self-supervised framework to train the transformer model. We also investigate face clustering in egocentric videos, a fast-emerging field that has not been studied yet in works related to face clustering. To this end, we present and release the first large-scale egocentric video face clustering dataset named EasyCom-Clustering. We evaluate our proposed method on both the widely used Big Bang Theory (BBT) dataset and the new EasyCom-Clustering dataset. Results show the performance of our video-centralised transformer has surpassed all previous state-of-the-art methods on both benchmarks, exhibiting a self-attentive understanding of face videos.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种使用视频集中转换器对视频中的人脸进行聚类的新方法。以前的工作经常采用对比学习来学习帧级表示，并使用平均池化沿时间维度聚合特征。这种方法可能无法完全捕捉复杂的视频动态。此外，尽管基于视频的对比学习最近取得了进展，但很少有人尝试学习有利于视频人脸聚类任务的自监督聚类友好的人脸表示。为了克服这些限制，我们的方法采用 Transformer 直接学习视频级表示，可以更好地反映视频中人脸的时间变化属性，同时我们还提出了一个以视频为中心的自监督框架来训练 Transformer 模型。我们还研究了以自我为中心的视频中的人脸聚类，这是一个快速新兴的领域，尚未在与人脸聚类相关的工作中进行研究。为此，我们提出并发布了第一个大规模以自我为中心的视频人脸聚类数据集，名为 EasyCom-Clustering。我们在广泛使用的大爆炸理论 (BBT) 数据集和新的 EasyCom-Clustering 数据集上评估我们提出的方法。结果表明，我们的视频集中式变压器的性能在两个基准测试中都超过了之前所有最先进的方法，表现出对面部视频的自我关注理解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于视频中心化Transformer的自监督方法，用于视频人脸聚类任务。
AI.motivation: 传统方法通过对比学习和平均池化处理视频人脸，难以捕捉复杂的时间动态特性，且缺乏针对聚类任务的自监督表示学习。
AI.method: 设计视频中心化Transformer直接学习视频级表示，结合自监督框架训练模型，并构建首个大规模第一视角视频人脸聚类数据集EasyCom-Clustering。
AI.result: 在Big Bang Theory和EasyCom-Clustering数据集上均超越现有最先进方法，验证了模型对视频人脸的自注意力理解能力。
AI.conclusion: 视频中心化Transformer有效捕捉了人脸视频的时序特性，为视频人脸聚类提供了新思路，并推动了第一视角视频研究的发展。

authors_text: Xian Liu,Qianyi Wu,Hang Zhou,Yinghao Xu,Rui Qian,Xinyi Lin,Xiaowei Zhou,Wayne Wu,Bo Dai,Bolei Zhou
title: Learning Hierarchical Cross-Modal Association for Co-Speech Gesture Generation
title_zh: 学习用于协同语音手势生成的分层跨模态关联
comment: Accepted by IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) 2022. Camera-Ready Version, 19 Pages
comments: Accepted by IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) 2022. Camera-Ready Version, 19 Pages
abstract: Generating speech-consistent body and gesture movements is a long-standing problem in virtual avatar creation. Previous studies often synthesize pose movement in a holistic manner, where poses of all joints are generated simultaneously. Such a straightforward pipeline fails to generate fine-grained co-speech gestures. One observation is that the hierarchical semantics in speech and the hierarchical structures of human gestures can be naturally described into multiple granularities and associated together. To fully utilize the rich connections between speech audio and human gestures, we propose a novel framework named Hierarchical Audio-to-Gesture (HA2G) for co-speech gesture generation. In HA2G, a Hierarchical Audio Learner extracts audio representations across semantic granularities. A Hierarchical Pose Inferer subsequently renders the entire human pose gradually in a hierarchical manner. To enhance the quality of synthesized gestures, we develop a contrastive learning strategy based on audio-text alignment for better audio representations. Extensive experiments and human evaluation demonstrate that the proposed method renders realistic co-speech gestures and outperforms previous methods in a clear margin. Project page: https://alvinliu0.github.io/projects/HA2G
summary: Generating speech-consistent body and gesture movements is a long-standing problem in virtual avatar creation. Previous studies often synthesize pose movement in a holistic manner, where poses of all joints are generated simultaneously. Such a straightforward pipeline fails to generate fine-grained co-speech gestures. One observation is that the hierarchical semantics in speech and the hierarchical structures of human gestures can be naturally described into multiple granularities and associated together. To fully utilize the rich connections between speech audio and human gestures, we propose a novel framework named Hierarchical Audio-to-Gesture (HA2G) for co-speech gesture generation. In HA2G, a Hierarchical Audio Learner extracts audio representations across semantic granularities. A Hierarchical Pose Inferer subsequently renders the entire human pose gradually in a hierarchical manner. To enhance the quality of synthesized gestures, we develop a contrastive learning strategy based on audio-text alignment for better audio representations. Extensive experiments and human evaluation demonstrate that the proposed method renders realistic co-speech gestures and outperforms previous methods in a clear margin. Project page: https://alvinliu0.github.io/projects/HA2G
abstract_zh: 生成与语音一致的身体和手势动作是虚拟化身创建中长期存在的问题。先前的研究通常以整体方式综合姿势运动，其中所有关节的姿势同时生成。这种简单的管道无法生成细粒度的协同语音手势。一项观察是，语音中的分层语义和人类手势的分层结构可以自然地描述为多个粒度并关联在一起。为了充分利用语音音频和人类手势之间的丰富联系，我们提出了一种名为分层音频到手势（HA2G）的新颖框架，用于协同语音手势生成。在 HA2G 中，分层音频学习器跨语义粒度提取音频表示。分层姿势推断器随后以分层方式逐渐渲染整个人体姿势。为了提高合成手势的质量，我们开发了一种基于音频文本对齐的对比学习策略，以获得更好的音频表示。大量的实验和人类评估表明，所提出的方法可以呈现逼真的协同语音手势，并且明显优于以前的方法。项目页面：https://alvinliu0.github.io/projects/HA2G

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为HA2G的新框架，用于生成与语音一致的共言手势。
AI.motivation: 生成与语音一致的身体和手势动作是虚拟人偶创建中的一个长期问题。先前的研究通常以整体方式合成姿态动作，无法生成细粒度的共言手势。
AI.method: HA2G框架包括一个分层音频学习器，用于提取跨语义粒度的音频表示，以及一个分层姿态推理器，用于逐步生成整个人体姿态。此外，还开发了一种基于音频-文本对齐的对比学习策略，以提高音频表示的质量。
AI.result: 大量实验和人类评估表明，该方法能够生成逼真的共言手势，并在多个方面优于先前的方法。
AI.conclusion: HA2G框架通过利用语音和手势的层次语义结构，有效提升了共言手势生成的质量。

To enhance the quality of synthesized gestures, we develop a contrastive learning strategy based on audio-text alignment for better audio representations. Extensive experiments and human evaluation demonstrate that the proposed method renders realistic co-speech gestures and outperforms previous methods in a clear margin. Project page: https://alvinliu0.github.io/projects/HA2G 生成与语音一致的身体和手势动作是虚拟化身创建中长期存在的问题。先前的研究通常以整体方式综合姿势运动，其中所有关节的姿势同时生成。这种简单的管道无法生成细粒度的协同语音手势。一项观察是，语音中的分层语义和人类手势的分层结构可以自然地描述为多个粒度并关联在一起。为了充分利用语音音频和人类手势之间的丰富联系，我们提出了一种名为分层音频到手势（HA2G）的新颖框架，用于协同语音手势生成。在 HA2G 中，分层音频学习器跨语义粒度提取音频表示。分层姿势推断器随后以分层方式逐渐渲染整个人体姿势。为了提高合成手势的质量，我们开发了一种基于音频文本对齐的对比学习策略，以获得更好的音频表示。大量的实验和人类评估表明，所提出的方法可以呈现逼真的协同语音手势，并且明显优于以前的方法。项目页面：https://alvinliu0.github.io/projects/HA2G 本文提出了一种名为HA2G的新框架，用于生成与语音一致的共言手势。 Xian Liu,Qianyi Wu,Hang Zhou,Yinghao Xu,Rui Qian,Xinyi Lin,Xiaowei Zhou,Wayne Wu,Bo Dai,Bolei Zhou cs.CV

authors_text: Daniel Harasim,Giovanni Affatato,Fabian C. Moss
title: midiVERTO: A Web Application to Visualize Tonality in Real Time
title_zh: midiVERTO：实时可视化音调的 Web 应用程序
abstract: This paper presents a web application for visualizing the tonality of a piece of music -- the organization of its chords and scales -- at a high level of abstraction and with coordinated playback. The application applies the discrete Fourier transform to the pitch-class domain of a user-specified segmentation of a MIDI file and visualizes the Fourier coefficients' trajectories. Since the coefficients indicate different musical properties, such as harmonic function, triadicity, and diatonicity, the application isolates aspects of a piece's tonality and shows their development in time. The aim of the application is to bridge a gap between mathematical music theory, musicology, and the general public by making the discrete Fourier transform as applied to the pitch-class domain accessible without requiring advanced mathematical knowledge or programming skills up front.
summary: This paper presents a web application for visualizing the tonality of a piece of music -- the organization of its chords and scales -- at a high level of abstraction and with coordinated playback. The application applies the discrete Fourier transform to the pitch-class domain of a user-specified segmentation of a MIDI file and visualizes the Fourier coefficients' trajectories. Since the coefficients indicate different musical properties, such as harmonic function, triadicity, and diatonicity, the application isolates aspects of a piece's tonality and shows their development in time. The aim of the application is to bridge a gap between mathematical music theory, musicology, and the general public by making the discrete Fourier transform as applied to the pitch-class domain accessible without requiring advanced mathematical knowledge or programming skills up front.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一个 Web 应用程序，用于在高度抽象和协调播放的情况下可视化一首音乐的调性（其和弦和音阶的组织）。该应用程序将离散傅里叶变换应用于用户指定的 MIDI 文件分段的音高域，并可视化傅里叶系数的轨迹。由于系数表示不同的音乐特性，例如和声函数、三元性和全音阶，因此该应用程序可以隔离乐曲调性的各个方面并及时显示它们的发展。该应用程序的目的是通过将离散傅里叶变换应用于音高域，而不需要预先具备高级数学知识或编程技能，从而弥合数学音乐理论、音乐学和公众之间的差距。

AI.tldr: 开发名为midiVERTO的网络应用，通过离散傅里叶变换实时可视化音乐作品的调性特征（如和声功能、三和弦性等）。
AI.motivation: 弥合数学音乐理论、音乐学与大众之间的理解鸿沟，使非专业人士无需数学或编程基础即可直观分析音乐调性。
AI.method: 对用户指定的MIDI文件进行音高类域分割，应用离散傅里叶变换计算系数轨迹，并通过可视化展示不同调性属性的时间演变。
AI.result: 实现了调性属性（如和声功能、调式性）的动态可视化，使用户能直观观察音乐结构变化，降低数学分析门槛。
AI.conclusion: 该应用验证了离散傅里叶变换在音乐调性分析中的实用性，为跨学科音乐研究与教育提供了可视化工具。

ai_content.tldr: 开发名为midiVERTO的网络应用，通过离散傅里叶变换实时可视化音乐作品的调性特征（如和声功能、三和弦性等）。

authors_text: Hamza El-Kebir,Yongseok Lee,Joseph Bentsman
title: Physics-based Learning of Parameterized Thermodynamics from Real-time Thermography
title_zh: 基于物理的实时热成像参数化热力学学习
comment: Manuscript submitted to IEEE Transactions on Medical Imaging
comments: Manuscript submitted to IEEE Transactions on Medical Imaging
abstract: Progress in automatic control of thermal processes and real-time estimation of heat penetration into live tissue has long been limited by the difficulty of obtaining high-fidelity thermodynamic models. Traditionally, in complex thermodynamic systems, it is often infeasible to estimate the thermophysical parameters of spatiotemporally varying processes, forcing the adoption of model-free control architectures. This comes at the cost of losing any robustness guarantees, and implies a need for extensive real-life testing. In recent years, however, infrared cameras and other thermographic equipment have become readily applicable to these processes, allowing for a real-time, non-invasive means of sensing the thermal state of a process. In this work, we present a novel physics-based approach to learning a thermal process's dynamics directly from such real-time thermographic data, while focusing attention on regions with high thermal activity. We call this process, which applies to any higher-dimensional scalar field, attention-based noise robust averaging (ANRA). Given a partial-differential equation model structure, we show that our approach is robust against noise, and can be used to initialize optimization routines to further refine parameter estimates. We demonstrate our method on several simulation examples, as well as by applying it to electrosurgical thermal response data on in vivo porcine skin tissue.
summary: Progress in automatic control of thermal processes and real-time estimation of heat penetration into live tissue has long been limited by the difficulty of obtaining high-fidelity thermodynamic models. Traditionally, in complex thermodynamic systems, it is often infeasible to estimate the thermophysical parameters of spatiotemporally varying processes, forcing the adoption of model-free control architectures. This comes at the cost of losing any robustness guarantees, and implies a need for extensive real-life testing. In recent years, however, infrared cameras and other thermographic equipment have become readily applicable to these processes, allowing for a real-time, non-invasive means of sensing the thermal state of a process. In this work, we present a novel physics-based approach to learning a thermal process's dynamics directly from such real-time thermographic data, while focusing attention on regions with high thermal activity. We call this process, which applies to any higher-dimensional scalar field, attention-based noise robust averaging (ANRA). Given a partial-differential equation model structure, we show that our approach is robust against noise, and can be used to initialize optimization routines to further refine parameter estimates. We demonstrate our method on several simulation examples, as well as by applying it to electrosurgical thermal response data on in vivo porcine skin tissue.
abstract_zh: 长期以来，由于难以获得高保真热力学模型，热过程自动控制和实时估计热渗透到活体组织方面的进展一直受到限制。传统上，在复杂的热力学系统中，估计时空变化过程的热物理参数通常是不可行的，迫使采用无模型控制架构。这是以失去任何稳健性保证为代价的，并且意味着需要进行广泛的现实测试。然而，近年来，红外热像仪和其他热成像设备已经很容易适用于这些过程，从而可以采用实时、非侵入性的方式来感测过程的热状态。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于物理的新颖方法，可以直接从此类实时热成像数据中学习热过程的动力学，同时将注意力集中在热活动较高的区域。我们将这个适用于任何高维标量场的过程称为基于注意力的噪声鲁棒平均（ANRA）。给定偏微分方程模型结构，我们表明我们的方法对噪声具有鲁棒性，并且可用于初始化优化例程以进一步细化参数估计。我们在几个模拟示例中展示了我们的方法，并将其应用于体内猪皮肤组织的电外科热响应数据。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于物理的新型方法，通过实时热成像数据直接学习热过程的动力学，重点关注高温区域。
AI.motivation: 传统热动力学模型难以处理时空变化的参数估计问题，导致控制架构缺乏鲁棒性，需依赖大量实际测试。
AI.method: 提出注意力机制驱动的噪声鲁棒平均法（ANRA），结合偏微分方程模型结构，从实时热成像数据中学习参数化热力学模型。
AI.result: 方法在多个仿真案例和活体猪皮肤电外科热响应数据中验证了其抗噪能力及参数估计有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为复杂热过程提供了鲁棒的参数估计框架，可提升热控系统的实时性和安全性。
