tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Actor-Critic GPT和编舞记忆的音乐到3D舞蹈生成框架Bailando，解决舞蹈动作的空间约束和时间连贯性问题。
motivation: 现有方法难以在满足编舞规范的同时生成符合不同音乐节奏的连贯3D舞蹈序列，需解决空间约束与时间同步的双重挑战。
method: 框架包含两部分：1) 编舞记忆模块通过量化学习提取3D姿态的关键舞蹈单元；2) 带有节拍对齐奖励函数的Actor-Critic GPT模型，通过强化学习组合单元生成符合音乐节奏的流畅舞蹈。
result: 在标准基准测试中达到最先进的定性和定量效果，且编舞记忆模块能无监督发现人类可解释的舞蹈风格姿势。
conclusion: 该框架通过编舞记忆与强化学习的结合，有效生成符合空间规范且节奏同步的高质量3D舞蹈，展示了无监督学习在舞蹈风格发现中的潜力。
search_text: Bailando: 3D Dance Generation by Actor-Critic GPT with Choreographic Memory Bailando：演员评论家 GPT 的 3D 舞蹈生成与编舞记忆 Driving 3D characters to dance following a piece of music is highly challenging due to the spatial constraints applied to poses by choreography norms. In addition, the generated dance sequence also needs to maintain temporal coherency with different music genres. To tackle these challenges, we propose a novel music-to-dance framework, Bailando, with two powerful components: 1) a choreographic memory that learns to summarize meaningful dancing units from 3D pose sequence to a quantized codebook, 2) an actor-critic Generative Pre-trained Transformer (GPT) that composes these units to a fluent dance coherent to the music. With the learned choreographic memory, dance generation is realized on the quantized units that meet high choreography standards, such that the generated dancing sequences are confined within the spatial constraints. To achieve synchronized alignment between diverse motion tempos and music beats, we introduce an actor-critic-based reinforcement learning scheme to the GPT with a newly-designed beat-align reward function. Extensive experiments on the standard benchmark demonstrate that our proposed framework achieves state-of-the-art performance both qualitatively and quantitatively. Notably, the learned choreographic memory is shown to discover human-interpretable dancing-style poses in an unsupervised manner. 由于编舞规范对姿势施加了空间限制，驾驶 3D 角色随着一段音乐跳舞非常具有挑战性。此外，生成的舞蹈序列还需要与不同音乐流派保持时间一致性。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一种新颖的音乐到舞蹈框架，Bailando，它具有两个强大的组件：1）舞蹈记忆，学习将有意义的舞蹈单元从 3D 姿势序列总结为量化密码本；2）演员评论家生成预训练变压器（GPT），将这些单元组合成与音乐连贯的流畅舞蹈。通过学习的编舞记忆，在满足高编舞标准的量化单元上实现舞蹈生成，使得生成的舞蹈序列被限制在空间限制内。为了实现不同运动节奏和音乐节拍之间的同步对齐，我们在 GPT 中引入了基于演员评论家的强化学习方案，并具有新设计的节拍对齐奖励函数。对标准基准的大量实验表明，我们提出的框架在定性和定量上都实现了最先进的性能。值得注意的是，习得的舞蹈记忆能够以无人监督的方式发现人类可解释的舞蹈风格姿势。 本文提出了一种基于Actor-Critic GPT和编舞记忆的音乐到3D舞蹈生成框架Bailando，解决舞蹈动作的空间约束和时间连贯性问题。 Li Siyao,Weijiang Yu,Tianpei Gu,Chunze Lin,Quan Wang,Chen Qian,Chen Change Loy,Ziwei Liu cs.SD,cs.CV,eess.AS

authors_text: Fanglei Xue,Zichang Tan,Yu Zhu,Zhongsong Ma,Guodong Guo
title: Coarse-to-Fine Cascaded Networks with Smooth Predicting for Video Facial Expression Recognition
title_zh: 具有视频面部表情识别平滑预测功能的从粗到细的级联网络
abstract: Facial expression recognition plays an important role in human-computer interaction. In this paper, we propose the Coarse-to-Fine Cascaded network with Smooth Predicting (CFC-SP) to improve the performance of facial expression recognition. CFC-SP contains two core components, namely Coarse-to-Fine Cascaded networks (CFC) and Smooth Predicting (SP). For CFC, it first groups several similar emotions to form a rough category, and then employs a network to conduct a coarse but accurate classification. Later, an additional network for these grouped emotions is further used to obtain fine-grained predictions. For SP, it improves the recognition capability of the model by capturing both universal and unique expression features. To be specific, the universal features denote the general characteristic of facial emotions within a period and the unique features denote the specific characteristic at this moment. Experiments on Aff-Wild2 show the effectiveness of the proposed CFSP. We achieved 3rd place in the Expression Classification Challenge of the 3rd Competition on Affective Behavior Analysis in-the-wild. The code will be released at https://github.com/BR-IDL/PaddleViT.
summary: Facial expression recognition plays an important role in human-computer interaction. In this paper, we propose the Coarse-to-Fine Cascaded network with Smooth Predicting (CFC-SP) to improve the performance of facial expression recognition. CFC-SP contains two core components, namely Coarse-to-Fine Cascaded networks (CFC) and Smooth Predicting (SP). For CFC, it first groups several similar emotions to form a rough category, and then employs a network to conduct a coarse but accurate classification. Later, an additional network for these grouped emotions is further used to obtain fine-grained predictions. For SP, it improves the recognition capability of the model by capturing both universal and unique expression features. To be specific, the universal features denote the general characteristic of facial emotions within a period and the unique features denote the specific characteristic at this moment. Experiments on Aff-Wild2 show the effectiveness of the proposed CFSP. We achieved 3rd place in the Expression Classification Challenge of the 3rd Competition on Affective Behavior Analysis in-the-wild. The code will be released at https://github.com/BR-IDL/PaddleViT.
abstract_zh: 面部表情识别在人机交互中发挥着重要作用。在本文中，我们提出了带有平滑预测的粗到细级联网络（CFC-SP）来提高面部表情识别的性能。 CFC-SP包含两个核心组件，即粗到细级联网络（CFC）和平滑预测（SP）。对于CFC，它首先将几种相似的情绪进行分组，形成一个粗略的类别，然后利用网络进行粗略但准确的分类。随后，进一步使用这些分组情绪的附加网络来获得细粒度的预测。对于SP，它通过捕获通用和独特的表达特征来提高模型的识别能力。具体来说，普遍特征是指一段时期内面部情绪的普遍特征，独特特征是指此时此刻面部情绪的特定特征。 Aff-Wild2 上的实验表明了所提出的 CFSP 的有效性。我们在第三届野外情感行为分析竞赛表情分类挑战赛中获得第三名。代码将在 https://github.com/BR-IDL/PaddleViT 发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于视频面部表情识别的粗到细级联网络与平滑预测方法（CFC-SP）。
AI.motivation: 面部表情识别在人机交互中具有重要作用，但现有方法在准确性和细粒度预测方面仍有不足。
AI.method: CFC-SP包含两个核心组件：粗到细级联网络（CFC）和平滑预测（SP）。CFC首先将相似情绪分组进行粗分类，再进行细粒度预测；SP通过捕捉通用和独特表情特征来提升模型识别能力。
AI.result: 在Aff-Wild2数据集上的实验表明CFC-SP方法有效，且在第三次野生情感行为分析竞赛的表情分类挑战中获得第三名。
AI.conclusion: CFC-SP方法在视频面部表情识别任务中表现出色，有效提升了模型的分类性能和细粒度预测能力。

authors_text: James M. Borg,Andrew Buskell,Rohan Kapitany,Simon T. Powers,Eva Reindl,Claudio Tennie
title: Evolved Open-Endedness in Cultural Evolution: A New Dimension in Open-Ended Evolution Research
title_zh: 文化进化中的进化开放性：开放进化研究的新维度
comment: 26 pages, 1 figure, 1 table, submitted to Artificial Life journal (special issue on Open-Ended Evolution)
comments: 26 pages, 1 figure, 1 table, submitted to Artificial Life journal (special issue on Open-Ended Evolution)
abstract: The goal of Artificial Life research, as articulated by Chris Langton, is "to contribute to theoretical biology by locating life-as-we-know-it within the larger picture of life-as-it-could-be" (1989, p.1). The study and pursuit of open-ended evolution in artificial evolutionary systems exemplifies this goal. However, open-ended evolution research is hampered by two fundamental issues; the struggle to replicate open-endedness in an artificial evolutionary system, and the fact that we only have one system (genetic evolution) from which to draw inspiration. Here we argue that cultural evolution should be seen not only as another real-world example of an open-ended evolutionary system, but that the unique qualities seen in cultural evolution provide us with a new perspective from which we can assess the fundamental properties of, and ask new questions about, open-ended evolutionary systems, especially in regard to evolved open-endedness and transitions from bounded to unbounded evolution. Here we provide an overview of culture as an evolutionary system, highlight the interesting case of human cultural evolution as an open-ended evolutionary system, and contextualise cultural evolution under the framework of (evolved) open-ended evolution. We go on to provide a set of new questions that can be asked once we consider cultural evolution within the framework of open-ended evolution, and introduce new insights that we may be able to gain about evolved open-endedness as a result of asking these questions.
summary: The goal of Artificial Life research, as articulated by Chris Langton, is "to contribute to theoretical biology by locating life-as-we-know-it within the larger picture of life-as-it-could-be" (1989, p.1). The study and pursuit of open-ended evolution in artificial evolutionary systems exemplifies this goal. However, open-ended evolution research is hampered by two fundamental issues; the struggle to replicate open-endedness in an artificial evolutionary system, and the fact that we only have one system (genetic evolution) from which to draw inspiration. Here we argue that cultural evolution should be seen not only as another real-world example of an open-ended evolutionary system, but that the unique qualities seen in cultural evolution provide us with a new perspective from which we can assess the fundamental properties of, and ask new questions about, open-ended evolutionary systems, especially in regard to evolved open-endedness and transitions from bounded to unbounded evolution. Here we provide an overview of culture as an evolutionary system, highlight the interesting case of human cultural evolution as an open-ended evolutionary system, and contextualise cultural evolution under the framework of (evolved) open-ended evolution. We go on to provide a set of new questions that can be asked once we consider cultural evolution within the framework of open-ended evolution, and introduce new insights that we may be able to gain about evolved open-endedness as a result of asking these questions.
abstract_zh: 正如克里斯·兰顿（Chris Langton）所阐明的，人工生命研究的目标是“通过将我们所知的生命定位在生命可能存在的大图景中，为理论生物学做出贡献”（1989，p.1）。对人工进化系统中开放式进化的研究和追求就是这一目标的例证。然而，开放式进化研究受到两个基本问题的阻碍：在人工进化系统中复制开放性的斗争，以及我们只有一个系统（基因进化）可以从中汲取灵感的事实。在这里，我们认为文化进化不仅应该被视为开放式进化系统的另一个现实世界的例子，而且文化进化中看到的独特品质为我们提供了一个新的视角，从这个角度我们可以评估开放式进化系统的基本属性，并提出关于开放式进化系统的新问题，特别是在进化的开放性和从有界进化到无界进化的转变方面。在这里，我们概述了文化作为一个进化系统，强调了人类文化进化作为一个开放式进化系统的有趣案例，并将文化进化置于（进化的）开放式进化的框架下。我们继续提供一系列新问题，一旦我们在开放式进化的框架内考虑文化进化，就可以提出这些问题，并引入新的见解，通过提出这些问题，我们可能能够获得关于进化的开放性的新见解。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨文化进化作为开放性进化的现实案例，为开放性进化研究提供新视角，提出基于文化进化的理论框架与研究问题。
AI.motivation: 现有开放性进化研究面临人工系统难以复现开放性及仅依赖基因进化作为灵感来源的双重局限，需引入新维度突破瓶颈。
AI.method: 通过分析文化进化作为进化系统的特性，结合人类文化进化的典型案例，将其置于开放性进化框架下进行理论重构，并提出新研究问题。
AI.result: 确立文化进化在开放性进化研究中的理论地位，提出关于进化边界转换等新问题，为理解进化机制提供跨学科视角。
AI.conclusion: 文化进化为开放性进化研究开辟了新路径，通过跨学科整合可深化对进化系统本质特征及演化规律的认识。

Here we argue that cultural evolution should be seen not only as another real-world example of an open-ended evolutionary system, but that the unique qualities seen in cultural evolution provide us with a new perspective from which we can assess the fundamental properties of, and ask new questions about, open-ended evolutionary systems, especially in regard to evolved open-endedness and transitions from bounded to unbounded evolution. Here we provide an overview of culture as an evolutionary system, highlight the interesting case of human cultural evolution as an open-ended evolutionary system, and contextualise cultural evolution under the framework of (evolved) open-ended evolution. We go on to provide a set of new questions that can be asked once we consider cultural evolution within the framework of open-ended evolution, and introduce new insights that we may be able to gain about evolved open-endedness as a result of asking these questions. 正如克里斯·兰顿（Chris Langton）所阐明的，人工生命研究的目标是“通过将我们所知的生命定位在生命可能存在的大图景中，为理论生物学做出贡献”（1989，p.1）。对人工进化系统中开放式进化的研究和追求就是这一目标的例证。然而，开放式进化研究受到两个基本问题的阻碍：在人工进化系统中复制开放性的斗争，以及我们只有一个系统（基因进化）可以从中汲取灵感的事实。在这里，我们认为文化进化不仅应该被视为开放式进化系统的另一个现实世界的例子，而且文化进化中看到的独特品质为我们提供了一个新的视角，从这个角度我们可以评估开放式进化系统的基本属性，并提出关于开放式进化系统的新问题，特别是在进化的开放性和从有界进化到无界进化的转变方面。在这里，我们概述了文化作为一个进化系统，强调了人类文化进化作为一个开放式进化系统的有趣案例，并将文化进化置于（进化的）开放式进化的框架下。我们继续提供一系列新问题，一旦我们在开放式进化的框架内考虑文化进化，就可以提出这些问题，并引入新的见解，通过提出这些问题，我们可能能够获得关于进化的开放性的新见解。 本文探讨文化进化作为开放性进化的现实案例，为开放性进化研究提供新视角，提出基于文化进化的理论框架与研究问题。 James M. Borg,Andrew Buskell,Rohan Kapitany,Simon T. Powers,Eva Reindl,Claudio Tennie cs.AI

authors_text: Juncheng Li,Junlin Xie,Long Qian,Linchao Zhu,Siliang Tang,Fei Wu,Yi Yang,Yueting Zhuang,Xin Eric Wang
title: Compositional Temporal Grounding with Structured Variational Cross-Graph Correspondence Learning
title_zh: 具有结构化变分跨图对应学习的组合时间基础
comment: Proceedings of the IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition 2022
comments: Proceedings of the IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition 2022
abstract: Temporal grounding in videos aims to localize one target video segment that semantically corresponds to a given query sentence. Thanks to the semantic diversity of natural language descriptions, temporal grounding allows activity grounding beyond pre-defined classes and has received increasing attention in recent years. The semantic diversity is rooted in the principle of compositionality in linguistics, where novel semantics can be systematically described by combining known words in novel ways (compositional generalization). However, current temporal grounding datasets do not specifically test for the compositional generalizability. To systematically measure the compositional generalizability of temporal grounding models, we introduce a new Compositional Temporal Grounding task and construct two new dataset splits, i.e., Charades-CG and ActivityNet-CG. Evaluating the state-of-the-art methods on our new dataset splits, we empirically find that they fail to generalize to queries with novel combinations of seen words. To tackle this challenge, we propose a variational cross-graph reasoning framework that explicitly decomposes video and language into multiple structured hierarchies and learns fine-grained semantic correspondence among them. Experiments illustrate the superior compositional generalizability of our approach. The repository of this work is at https://github.com/YYJMJC/ Compositional-Temporal-Grounding.
summary: Temporal grounding in videos aims to localize one target video segment that semantically corresponds to a given query sentence. Thanks to the semantic diversity of natural language descriptions, temporal grounding allows activity grounding beyond pre-defined classes and has received increasing attention in recent years. The semantic diversity is rooted in the principle of compositionality in linguistics, where novel semantics can be systematically described by combining known words in novel ways (compositional generalization). However, current temporal grounding datasets do not specifically test for the compositional generalizability. To systematically measure the compositional generalizability of temporal grounding models, we introduce a new Compositional Temporal Grounding task and construct two new dataset splits, i.e., Charades-CG and ActivityNet-CG. Evaluating the state-of-the-art methods on our new dataset splits, we empirically find that they fail to generalize to queries with novel combinations of seen words. To tackle this challenge, we propose a variational cross-graph reasoning framework that explicitly decomposes video and language into multiple structured hierarchies and learns fine-grained semantic correspondence among them. Experiments illustrate the superior compositional generalizability of our approach. The repository of this work is at https://github.com/YYJMJC/ Compositional-Temporal-Grounding.
abstract_zh: 视频中的时间基础旨在定位在语义上对应于给定查询句子的一个目标视频片段。由于自然语言描述的语义多样性，时间基础允许活动基础超出预定义的类别，并且近年来受到越来越多的关注。语义多样性植根于语言学中的组合性原则，即可以通过以新颖的方式组合已知单词（组合概括）来系统地描述新的语义。然而，当前的时间基础数据集并没有专门测试成分的普遍性。为了系统地测量时间基础模型的组合泛化性，我们引入了一个新的组合时间基础任务并构建了两个新的数据集分割，即 Charades-CG 和 ActivityNet-CG。在评估我们新的数据集分割上的最先进方法时，我们凭经验发现它们无法泛化到具有所见单词的新颖组合的查询。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种变分跨图推理框架，该框架将视频和语言显式分解为多个结构化层次结构，并学习它们之间的细粒度语义对应关系。实验证明了我们的方法具有卓越的组合通用性。这项工作的存储库位于 https://github.com/YYJMJC/Compositional-Temporal-Grounding。

AI.tldr: 本文提出组合时间定位任务，构建新数据集并设计变分跨图推理框架以解决视频中查询句子的语义组合泛化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有时间定位数据集未专门测试模型对语义组合泛化的适应能力，导致模型难以处理新词组合的查询。
AI.method: 提出变分跨图推理框架，将视频和语言分解为结构化层次，并学习细粒度语义对应关系以实现组合泛化。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在Charades-CG和ActivityNet-CG数据集上优于现有方法，展现出更强的组合泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 新任务和框架有效提升了时间定位模型处理语义组合的能力，为未来研究提供了基准和方向。

authors_text: Lauri Suomela,Jussi Kalliola,Atakan Dag,Harry Edelman,Joni-Kristian Kämäräinen
title: Benchmarking Visual Localization for Autonomous Navigation
title_zh: 自主导航视觉定位基准测试
abstract: This work introduces a simulator-based benchmark for visual localization in the autonomous navigation context. The dynamic benchmark enables investigation of how variables such as the time of day, weather, and camera perspective affect the navigation performance of autonomous agents that utilize visual localization for closed-loop control. The experimental part of the paper studies the effects of four such variables by evaluating state-of-the-art visual localization methods as part of the motion planning module of an autonomous navigation stack. The results show major variation in the suitability of the different methods for vision-based navigation. To the authors' best knowledge, the proposed benchmark is the first to study modern visual localization methods as part of a complete navigation stack. We make the benchmark available at https://github.com/lasuomela/carla_vloc_benchmark.
summary: This work introduces a simulator-based benchmark for visual localization in the autonomous navigation context. The dynamic benchmark enables investigation of how variables such as the time of day, weather, and camera perspective affect the navigation performance of autonomous agents that utilize visual localization for closed-loop control. The experimental part of the paper studies the effects of four such variables by evaluating state-of-the-art visual localization methods as part of the motion planning module of an autonomous navigation stack. The results show major variation in the suitability of the different methods for vision-based navigation. To the authors' best knowledge, the proposed benchmark is the first to study modern visual localization methods as part of a complete navigation stack. We make the benchmark available at https://github.com/lasuomela/carla_vloc_benchmark.
abstract_zh: 这项工作介绍了一个基于模拟器的基准，用于自主导航环境中的视觉定位。动态基准可以调查一天中的时间、天气和摄像机视角等变量如何影响利用视觉定位进行闭环控制的自主代理的导航性能。本文的实验部分通过评估最先进的视觉定位方法作为自主导航堆栈运动规划模块的一部分来研究四个此类变量的影响。结果表明，不同方法对基于视觉的导航的适用性存在很大差异。据作者所知，所提出的基准是第一个将现代视觉定位方法作为完整导航堆栈的一部分进行研究的基准。我们在 https://github.com/lasuomela/carla_vloc_benchmark 上提供了基准测试。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个基于模拟器的视觉定位基准测试，用于评估自主导航中不同变量对导航性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对时间、天气等变量对视觉定位方法影响的系统评估，且未在完整导航系统中测试现代方法。
AI.method: 构建动态模拟基准，通过改变时间、天气、相机视角等变量，评估最新视觉定位方法在自主导航系统中的表现。
AI.result: 不同视觉定位方法在基于视觉的导航任务中表现出显著差异的适用性。
AI.conclusion: 该基准是首个在完整导航栈中研究现代视觉定位方法的测试框架，并已开源代码。

authors_text: Wenqiang Jiang,Yannan Wu,Fengsheng Qiao,Liyu Meng,Yuanyuan Deng,Chuanhe Liu
title: Facial Action Unit Recognition With Multi-models Ensembling
title_zh: 多模型集成的面部动作单元识别
abstract: The Affective Behavior Analysis in-the-wild (ABAW) 2022 Competition gives Affective Computing a large promotion. In this paper, we present our method of AU challenge in this Competition. We use improved IResnet100 as backbone. Then we train AU dataset in Aff-Wild2 on three pertained models pretrained by our private au and expression dataset, and Glint360K respectively. Finally, we ensemble the results of our models. We achieved F1 score (macro) 0.731 on AU validation set.
summary: The Affective Behavior Analysis in-the-wild (ABAW) 2022 Competition gives Affective Computing a large promotion. In this paper, we present our method of AU challenge in this Competition. We use improved IResnet100 as backbone. Then we train AU dataset in Aff-Wild2 on three pertained models pretrained by our private au and expression dataset, and Glint360K respectively. Finally, we ensemble the results of our models. We achieved F1 score (macro) 0.731 on AU validation set.
abstract_zh: 2022 年野外情感行为分析 (ABAW) 竞赛给情感计算带来了巨大的提升。在本文中，我们介绍了本次比赛中 AU 挑战的方法。我们使用改进的 IResnet100 作为主干。然后，我们在 Aff-Wild2 中的三个相关模型上训练 AU 数据集，这三个模型分别由我们的私有 au 和表达数据集以及 Glint360K 预训练。最后，我们整合模型的结果。我们在 AU 验证集上取得了 F1 分数（宏观）0.731。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多模型集成的面部动作单元（AU）识别方法，用于ABAW 2022竞赛中的AU挑战任务。
AI.motivation: 通过结合多个预训练模型的优势，提升面部动作单元识别的准确性和鲁棒性。
AI.method: 采用改进的IResnet100作为主干网络，在Aff-Wild2数据集上训练三个预训练模型（基于私有AU/表情数据集和Glint360K），最终通过模型集成结果。
AI.result: 在AU验证集上达到F1分数（宏平均）0.731。
AI.conclusion: 多模型集成方法有效提升了面部动作单元识别性能，验证了模型融合策略的有效性。

search_text: Facial Action Unit Recognition With Multi-models Ensembling 多模型集成的面部动作单元识别 The Affective Behavior Analysis in-the-wild (ABAW) 2022 Competition gives Affective Computing a large promotion. In this paper, we present our method of AU challenge in this Competition. We use improved IResnet100 as backbone. Then we train AU dataset in Aff-Wild2 on three pertained models pretrained by our private au and expression dataset, and Glint360K respectively. Finally, we ensemble the results of our models. We achieved F1 score (macro) 0.731 on AU validation set. 2022 年野外情感行为分析 (ABAW) 竞赛给情感计算带来了巨大的提升。在本文中，我们介绍了本次比赛中 AU 挑战的方法。我们使用改进的 IResnet100 作为主干。然后，我们在 Aff-Wild2 中的三个相关模型上训练 AU 数据集，这三个模型分别由我们的私有 au 和表达数据集以及 Glint360K 预训练。最后，我们整合模型的结果。我们在 AU 验证集上取得了 F1 分数（宏观）0.731。 本文提出了一种基于多模型集成的面部动作单元（AU）识别方法，用于ABAW 2022竞赛中的AU挑战任务。 Wenqiang Jiang,Yannan Wu,Fengsheng Qiao,Liyu Meng,Yuanyuan Deng,Chuanhe Liu cs.CV

authors_text: Hanna Ragnarsdottir,Laura Manduchi,Holger Michel,Fabian Laumer,Sven Wellmann,Ece Ozkan,Julia Vogt
title: Interpretable Prediction of Pulmonary Hypertension in Newborns using Echocardiograms
title_zh: 使用超声心动图对新生儿肺动脉高压进行可解释的预测
abstract: Pulmonary hypertension (PH) in newborns and infants is a complex condition associated with several pulmonary, cardiac, and systemic diseases contributing to morbidity and mortality. Therefore, accurate and early detection of PH is crucial for successful management. Using echocardiography, the primary diagnostic tool in pediatrics, human assessment is both time-consuming and expertise-demanding, raising the need for an automated approach. In this work, we present an interpretable multi-view video-based deep learning approach to predict PH for a cohort of 194 newborns using echocardiograms. We use spatio-temporal convolutional architectures for the prediction of PH from each view, and aggregate the predictions of the different views using majority voting. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work for an automated assessment of PH in newborns using echocardiograms. Our results show a mean F1-score of 0.84 for severity prediction and 0.92 for binary detection using 10-fold cross-validation. We complement our predictions with saliency maps and show that the learned model focuses on clinically relevant cardiac structures, motivating its usage in clinical practice.
summary: Pulmonary hypertension (PH) in newborns and infants is a complex condition associated with several pulmonary, cardiac, and systemic diseases contributing to morbidity and mortality. Therefore, accurate and early detection of PH is crucial for successful management. Using echocardiography, the primary diagnostic tool in pediatrics, human assessment is both time-consuming and expertise-demanding, raising the need for an automated approach. In this work, we present an interpretable multi-view video-based deep learning approach to predict PH for a cohort of 194 newborns using echocardiograms. We use spatio-temporal convolutional architectures for the prediction of PH from each view, and aggregate the predictions of the different views using majority voting. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work for an automated assessment of PH in newborns using echocardiograms. Our results show a mean F1-score of 0.84 for severity prediction and 0.92 for binary detection using 10-fold cross-validation. We complement our predictions with saliency maps and show that the learned model focuses on clinically relevant cardiac structures, motivating its usage in clinical practice.
abstract_zh: 新生儿和婴儿的肺动脉高压 (PH) 是一种复杂的疾病，与多种导致发病率和死亡率的肺部、心脏和全身疾病相关。因此，准确、早期检测 PH 对于成功治疗至关重要。使用超声心动图（儿科的主要诊断工具）进行人工评估既耗时又需要专业知识，因此需要自动化方法。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种可解释的基于多视图视频的深度学习方法，使用超声心动图预测 194 名新生儿的 PH。我们使用时空卷积架构来预测每个视图的 PH，并使用多数投票来聚合不同视图的预测。据我们所知，这是第一项使用超声心动图自动评估新生儿 PH 的工作。我们的结果显示，使用 10 倍交叉验证的严重性预测的平均 F1 分数为 0.84，二元检测的平均 F1 分数为 0.92。我们用显着图来补充我们的预测，并表明学习的模型侧重于临床相关的心脏结构，从而激发了其在临床实践中的使用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于超声心动图的可解释深度学习方法，用于预测新生儿肺动脉高压。
AI.motivation: 新生儿肺动脉高压检测需依赖专业评估且耗时，亟需自动化解决方案以提高诊断效率和准确性。
AI.method: 采用多视角视频的时空卷积网络进行PH预测，通过多数投票聚合各视角结果，并利用显著性图实现模型可解释性。
AI.result: 在194例新生儿数据集上，10折交叉验证显示严重程度预测F1值达0.84，二分类检测准确率达0.92。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为首个新生儿PH自动化评估方案，模型关注临床关键心脏结构，具备临床应用潜力。

authors_text: Jane Cleland-Huang,Ankit Agrawal,Michael Vierhauser,Michael Murphy,Mike Prieto
title: Extending MAPE-K to support Human-Machine Teaming
title_zh: 扩展 MAPE-K 以支持人机协作
comment: Final published version appearing in 17th Symposium on Software Engineering for Adaptive and Self-Managing Systems (SEAMS 2022)
comments: Final published version appearing in 17th Symposium on Software Engineering for Adaptive and Self-Managing Systems (SEAMS 2022)
abstract: The MAPE-K feedback loop has been established as the primary reference model for self-adaptive and autonomous systems in domains such as autonomous driving, robotics, and Cyber-Physical Systems. At the same time, the Human Machine Teaming (HMT) paradigm is designed to promote partnerships between humans and autonomous machines. It goes far beyond the degree of collaboration expected in human-on-the-loop and human-in-the-loop systems and emphasizes interactions, partnership, and teamwork between humans and machines. However, while MAPE-K enables fully autonomous behavior, it does not explicitly address the interactions between humans and machines as intended by HMT. In this paper, we present the MAPE-K-HMT framework which augments the traditional MAPE-K loop with support for HMT. We identify critical human-machine teaming factors and describe the infrastructure needed across the various phases of the MAPE-K loop in order to effectively support HMT. This includes runtime models that are constructed and populated dynamically across monitoring, analysis, planning, and execution phases to support human-machine partnerships. We illustrate MAPE-K-HMT using examples from an autonomous multi-UAV emergency response system, and present guidelines for integrating HMT into MAPE-K.
summary: The MAPE-K feedback loop has been established as the primary reference model for self-adaptive and autonomous systems in domains such as autonomous driving, robotics, and Cyber-Physical Systems. At the same time, the Human Machine Teaming (HMT) paradigm is designed to promote partnerships between humans and autonomous machines. It goes far beyond the degree of collaboration expected in human-on-the-loop and human-in-the-loop systems and emphasizes interactions, partnership, and teamwork between humans and machines. However, while MAPE-K enables fully autonomous behavior, it does not explicitly address the interactions between humans and machines as intended by HMT. In this paper, we present the MAPE-K-HMT framework which augments the traditional MAPE-K loop with support for HMT. We identify critical human-machine teaming factors and describe the infrastructure needed across the various phases of the MAPE-K loop in order to effectively support HMT. This includes runtime models that are constructed and populated dynamically across monitoring, analysis, planning, and execution phases to support human-machine partnerships. We illustrate MAPE-K-HMT using examples from an autonomous multi-UAV emergency response system, and present guidelines for integrating HMT into MAPE-K.
abstract_zh: MAPE-K 反馈回路已被确立为自动驾驶、机器人和网络物理系统等领域自适应和自主系统的主要参考模型。与此同时，人机协作（HMT）范式旨在促进人类与自主机器之间的伙伴关系。它远远超出了人在环和人在环系统中预期的协作程度，并强调人与机器之间的交互、伙伴关系和团队合作。然而，虽然 MAPE-K 能够实现完全自主的行为，但它并没有按照 HMT 的预期明确解决人与机器之间的交互问题。在本文中，我们提出了 MAPE-K-HMT 框架，该框架通过对 HMT 的支持增强了传统的 MAPE-K 循环。我们确定了关键的人机协作因素，并描述了 MAPE-K 循环各个阶段所需的基础设施，以便有效支持 HMT。这包括在监控、分析、规划和执行阶段动态构建和填充的运行时模型，以支持人机伙伴关系。我们使用自主多无人机应急响应系统的示例来说明 MAPE-K-HMT，并提出将 HMT 集成到 MAPE-K 中的指南。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种扩展的MAPE-K框架（MAPE-K-HMT），以支持人机协作（HMT）。
AI.motivation: 传统MAPE-K模型虽适用于自主系统，但未能有效支持HMT中强调的人机互动与协作关系。
AI.method: 通过识别关键人机协作因素，在MAPE-K的监控、分析、规划和执行阶段动态构建运行时模型，增强框架对HMT的适应性。
AI.result: 提出了MAPE-K-HMT框架，并通过多无人机应急响应系统案例验证其有效性，给出HMT集成指南。
AI.conclusion: MAPE-K-HMT框架为实现人机协作提供了系统化方法，可提升复杂场景下人机团队的协同效率。

authors_text: Martina Lippi,Michael C. Welle,Petra Poklukar,Alessandro Marino,Danica Kragic
title: Augment-Connect-Explore: a Paradigm for Visual Action Planning with Data Scarcity
title_zh: 增强-连接-探索：数据稀缺的视觉行动规划范例
abstract: Visual action planning particularly excels in applications where the state of the system cannot be computed explicitly, such as manipulation of deformable objects, as it enables planning directly from raw images. Even though the field has been significantly accelerated by deep learning techniques, a crucial requirement for their success is the availability of a large amount of data. In this work, we propose the Augment-Connect-Explore (ACE) paradigm to enable visual action planning in cases of data scarcity. We build upon the Latent Space Roadmap (LSR) framework which performs planning with a graph built in a low dimensional latent space. In particular, ACE is used to i) Augment the available training dataset by autonomously creating new pairs of datapoints, ii) create new unobserved Connections among representations of states in the latent graph, and iii) Explore new regions of the latent space in a targeted manner. We validate the proposed approach on both simulated box stacking and real-world folding task showing the applicability for rigid and deformable object manipulation tasks, respectively.
summary: Visual action planning particularly excels in applications where the state of the system cannot be computed explicitly, such as manipulation of deformable objects, as it enables planning directly from raw images. Even though the field has been significantly accelerated by deep learning techniques, a crucial requirement for their success is the availability of a large amount of data. In this work, we propose the Augment-Connect-Explore (ACE) paradigm to enable visual action planning in cases of data scarcity. We build upon the Latent Space Roadmap (LSR) framework which performs planning with a graph built in a low dimensional latent space. In particular, ACE is used to i) Augment the available training dataset by autonomously creating new pairs of datapoints, ii) create new unobserved Connections among representations of states in the latent graph, and iii) Explore new regions of the latent space in a targeted manner. We validate the proposed approach on both simulated box stacking and real-world folding task showing the applicability for rigid and deformable object manipulation tasks, respectively.
abstract_zh: 视觉动作规划在无法明确计算系统状态的应用中尤其出色，例如可变形对象的操纵，因为它可以直接根据原始图像进行规划。尽管深度学习技术显着加速了该领域的发展，但其成功的关键要求是大量数据的可用性。在这项工作中，我们提出了增强-连接-探索（ACE）范式，以在数据稀缺的情况下实现视觉行动规划。我们建立在潜在空间路线图（LSR）框架的基础上，该框架使用在低维潜在空间中构建的图来执行规划。特别是，ACE 用于 i) 通过自主创建新的数据点对来增强可用的训练数据集，ii) 在潜在图中的状态表示之间创建新的未观察到的连接，以及 iii) 有针对性地探索潜在空间的新区域。我们在模拟盒子堆叠和现实世界折叠任务上验证了所提出的方法，分别显示了刚性和可变形对象操作任务的适用性。

AI.tldr: 提出ACE范式解决数据稀缺下的视觉动作规划问题
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法依赖大量数据，但实际场景中数据稀缺导致视觉动作规划效果受限
AI.method: 基于潜在空间路线图框架，通过数据增强、潜在空间连接构建和定向探索三阶段提升规划能力
AI.result: 在模拟积木堆叠和现实折叠任务中验证方法有效性，分别适用于刚性与可变形物体操作
AI.conclusion: ACE范式有效缓解数据稀缺问题，提升视觉动作规划在现实场景中的可行性

search_text: Augment-Connect-Explore: a Paradigm for Visual Action Planning with Data Scarcity 增强-连接-探索：数据稀缺的视觉行动规划范例 Visual action planning particularly excels in applications where the state of the system cannot be computed explicitly, such as manipulation of deformable objects, as it enables planning directly from raw images. Even though the field has been significantly accelerated by deep learning techniques, a crucial requirement for their success is the availability of a large amount of data. In this work, we propose the Augment-Connect-Explore (ACE) paradigm to enable visual action planning in cases of data scarcity. We build upon the Latent Space Roadmap (LSR) framework which performs planning with a graph built in a low dimensional latent space. In particular, ACE is used to i) Augment the available training dataset by autonomously creating new pairs of datapoints, ii) create new unobserved Connections among representations of states in the latent graph, and iii) Explore new regions of the latent space in a targeted manner. We validate the proposed approach on both simulated box stacking and real-world folding task showing the applicability for rigid and deformable object manipulation tasks, respectively. 视觉动作规划在无法明确计算系统状态的应用中尤其出色，例如可变形对象的操纵，因为它可以直接根据原始图像进行规划。尽管深度学习技术显着加速了该领域的发展，但其成功的关键要求是大量数据的可用性。在这项工作中，我们提出了增强-连接-探索（ACE）范式，以在数据稀缺的情况下实现视觉行动规划。我们建立在潜在空间路线图（LSR）框架的基础上，该框架使用在低维潜在空间中构建的图来执行规划。特别是，ACE 用于 i) 通过自主创建新的数据点对来增强可用的训练数据集，ii) 在潜在图中的状态表示之间创建新的未观察到的连接，以及 iii) 有针对性地探索潜在空间的新区域。我们在模拟盒子堆叠和现实世界折叠任务上验证了所提出的方法，分别显示了刚性和可变形对象操作任务的适用性。 提出ACE范式解决数据稀缺下的视觉动作规划问题 Martina Lippi,Michael C. Welle,Petra Poklukar,Alessandro Marino,Danica Kragic cs.RO

authors_text: Liyu Meng,Yuchen Liu,Xiaolong Liu,Zhaopei Huang,Yuan Cheng,Meng Wang,Chuanhe Liu,Qin Jin
title: Multi-modal Emotion Estimation for in-the-wild Videos
title_zh: 野外视频的多模态情感估计
abstract: In this paper, we briefly introduce our submission to the Valence-Arousal Estimation Challenge of the 3rd Affective Behavior Analysis in-the-wild (ABAW) competition. Our method utilizes the multi-modal information, i.e., the visual and audio information, and employs a temporal encoder to model the temporal context in the videos. Besides, a smooth processor is applied to get more reasonable predictions, and a model ensemble strategy is used to improve the performance of our proposed method. The experiment results show that our method achieves 65.55% ccc for valence and 70.88% ccc for arousal on the validation set of the Aff-Wild2 dataset, which prove the effectiveness of our proposed method.
summary: In this paper, we briefly introduce our submission to the Valence-Arousal Estimation Challenge of the 3rd Affective Behavior Analysis in-the-wild (ABAW) competition. Our method utilizes the multi-modal information, i.e., the visual and audio information, and employs a temporal encoder to model the temporal context in the videos. Besides, a smooth processor is applied to get more reasonable predictions, and a model ensemble strategy is used to improve the performance of our proposed method. The experiment results show that our method achieves 65.55% ccc for valence and 70.88% ccc for arousal on the validation set of the Aff-Wild2 dataset, which prove the effectiveness of our proposed method.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们简要介绍了我们提交的第三届野外情感行为分析（ABAW）竞赛的效价-唤醒估计挑战赛。我们的方法利用多模态信息，即视觉和音频信息，并采用时间编码器来对视频中的时间上下文进行建模。此外，应用平滑处理器以获得更合理的预测，并使用模型集成策略来提高我们提出的方法的性能。实验结果表明，我们的方法在 Aff-Wild2 数据集的验证集上达到了 65.55% ccc 的效价和 70.88% ccc 的唤醒率，这证明了我们提出的方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多模态情感估计方法，用于真实场景下的视频情感分析。
AI.motivation: 真实场景下视频情感估计面临复杂环境干扰和多模态信息融合困难的挑战。
AI.method: 融合视觉与音频模态信息，采用时间编码器建模视频时序特征，结合平滑处理器优化预测结果，并通过模型集成策略提升性能。
AI.result: 在Aff-Wild2验证集上，该方法达到Valence 65.55% CCC和Arousal 70.88% CCC的评估指标。
AI.conclusion: 多模态特征融合与时序建模相结合的有效性得到验证，模型集成策略显著提升了情感估计性能。

authors_text: Su Zhang,Ruyi An,Yi Ding,Cuntai Guan
title: Continuous Emotion Recognition using Visual-audio-linguistic information: A Technical Report for ABAW3
title_zh: 使用视觉-音频-语言信息进行连续情绪识别：ABAW3 的技术报告
comment: 5 pages, 1 figure. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2107.01175
comments: 5 pages, 1 figure. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2107.01175
abstract: We propose a cross-modal co-attention model for continuous emotion recognition using visual-audio-linguistic information. The model consists of four blocks. The visual, audio, and linguistic blocks are used to learn the spatial-temporal features of the multi-modal input. A co-attention block is designed to fuse the learned features with the multi-head co-attention mechanism. The visual encoding from the visual block is concatenated with the attention feature to emphasize the visual information. To make full use of the data and alleviate over-fitting, cross-validation is carried out on the training and validation set. The concordance correlation coefficient (CCC) centering is used to merge the results from each fold. The achieved CCC on the test set is $0.520$ for valence and $0.602$ for arousal, which significantly outperforms the baseline method with the corresponding CCC of 0.180 and 0.170 for valence and arousal, respectively. The code is available at https://github.com/sucv/ABAW3.
summary: We propose a cross-modal co-attention model for continuous emotion recognition using visual-audio-linguistic information. The model consists of four blocks. The visual, audio, and linguistic blocks are used to learn the spatial-temporal features of the multi-modal input. A co-attention block is designed to fuse the learned features with the multi-head co-attention mechanism. The visual encoding from the visual block is concatenated with the attention feature to emphasize the visual information. To make full use of the data and alleviate over-fitting, cross-validation is carried out on the training and validation set. The concordance correlation coefficient (CCC) centering is used to merge the results from each fold. The achieved CCC on the test set is $0.520$ for valence and $0.602$ for arousal, which significantly outperforms the baseline method with the corresponding CCC of 0.180 and 0.170 for valence and arousal, respectively. The code is available at https://github.com/sucv/ABAW3.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种使用视觉-音频-语言信息进行连续情感识别的跨模式共同注意模型。该模型由四个块组成。视觉、音频和语言块用于学习多模态输入的时空特征。共同注意模块旨在将学习到的特征与多头共同注意机制融合起来。来自视觉块的视觉编码与注意力特征连接以强调视觉信息。为了充分利用数据并缓解过拟合，对训练集和验证集进行交叉验证。一致性相关系数 (CCC) 居中用于合并每次折叠的结果。测试集上实现的 CCC 价为 0.520 美元，唤醒为 0.602 美元，显着优于基线方法，对应的价和唤醒 CCC 分别为 0.180 和 0.170。该代码可在 https://github.com/sucv/ABAW3 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种跨模态共注意力模型，结合视觉、音频和语言信息进行连续情感识别，并在ABAW3数据集上验证效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在融合多模态信息时存在特征对齐不足、模态间关联性挖掘不充分的问题，需设计更有效的跨模态特征融合机制以提升情感识别准确性。
AI.method: 构建包含视觉、音频、语言三模态特征提取模块及共注意力融合模块的模型，通过多头共注意力机制实现跨模态特征交互，采用视觉编码与注意力特征拼接增强视觉信息，结合交叉验证与CCC中心化策略优化模型性能。
AI.result: 在测试集上达到愉悦度CCC=0.520、唤醒度CCC=0.602，分别较基线方法提升289%和254%，显著优于对比方法。
AI.conclusion: 跨模态共注意力机制能有效捕捉多模态特征关联性，验证了该模型在连续情感识别任务中的优越性，开源代码可复现实验。

The code is available at https://github.com/sucv/ABAW3. 我们提出了一种使用视觉-音频-语言信息进行连续情感识别的跨模式共同注意模型。该模型由四个块组成。视觉、音频和语言块用于学习多模态输入的时空特征。共同注意模块旨在将学习到的特征与多头共同注意机制融合起来。来自视觉块的视觉编码与注意力特征连接以强调视觉信息。为了充分利用数据并缓解过拟合，对训练集和验证集进行交叉验证。一致性相关系数 (CCC) 居中用于合并每次折叠的结果。测试集上实现的 CCC 价为 0.520 美元，唤醒为 0.602 美元，显着优于基线方法，对应的价和唤醒 CCC 分别为 0.180 和 0.170。该代码可在 https://github.com/sucv/ABAW3 获取。 本文提出一种跨模态共注意力模型，结合视觉、音频和语言信息进行连续情感识别，并在ABAW3数据集上验证效果。 Su Zhang,Ruyi An,Yi Ding,Cuntai Guan cs.MM,cs.CV

authors_text: Shiri Hodassman,Yuval Meir,Karin Kisos,Itamar Ben-Noam,Yael Tugendhaft,Amir Goldental,Roni Vardi,Ido Kanter
title: Brain inspired neuronal silencing mechanism to enable reliable sequence identification
title_zh: 受大脑启发的神经元沉默机制可实现可靠的序列识别
abstract: Real-time sequence identification is a core use-case of artificial neural networks (ANNs), ranging from recognizing temporal events to identifying verification codes. Existing methods apply recurrent neural networks, which suffer from training difficulties; however, performing this function without feedback loops remains a challenge. Here, we present an experimental neuronal long-term plasticity mechanism for high-precision feedforward sequence identification networks (ID-nets) without feedback loops, wherein input objects have a given order and timing. This mechanism temporarily silences neurons following their recent spiking activity. Therefore, transitory objects act on different dynamically created feedforward sub-networks. ID-nets are demonstrated to reliably identify 10 handwritten digit sequences, and are generalized to deep convolutional ANNs with continuous activation nodes trained on image sequences. Counterintuitively, their classification performance, even with a limited number of training examples, is high for sequences but low for individual objects. ID-nets are also implemented for writer-dependent recognition, and suggested as a cryptographic tool for encrypted authentication. The presented mechanism opens new horizons for advanced ANN algorithms.
summary: Real-time sequence identification is a core use-case of artificial neural networks (ANNs), ranging from recognizing temporal events to identifying verification codes. Existing methods apply recurrent neural networks, which suffer from training difficulties; however, performing this function without feedback loops remains a challenge. Here, we present an experimental neuronal long-term plasticity mechanism for high-precision feedforward sequence identification networks (ID-nets) without feedback loops, wherein input objects have a given order and timing. This mechanism temporarily silences neurons following their recent spiking activity. Therefore, transitory objects act on different dynamically created feedforward sub-networks. ID-nets are demonstrated to reliably identify 10 handwritten digit sequences, and are generalized to deep convolutional ANNs with continuous activation nodes trained on image sequences. Counterintuitively, their classification performance, even with a limited number of training examples, is high for sequences but low for individual objects. ID-nets are also implemented for writer-dependent recognition, and suggested as a cryptographic tool for encrypted authentication. The presented mechanism opens new horizons for advanced ANN algorithms.
abstract_zh: 实时序列识别是人工神经网络 (ANN) 的核心用例，范围从识别时间事件到识别验证码。现有方法采用循环神经网络，训练困难；然而，在没有反馈循环的情况下执行此功能仍然是一个挑战。在这里，我们提出了一种实验性神经元长期可塑性机制，用于没有反馈环的高精度前馈序列识别网络（ID-nets），其中输入对象具有给定的顺序和时间。这种机制在神经元最近的尖峰活动后暂时使其沉默。因此，瞬态对象作用于不同的动态创建的前馈子网络。 ID 网络被证明可以可靠地识别 10 个手写数字序列，并可推广到具有在图像序列上训练的连续激活节点的深度卷积 ANN。与直觉相反，即使训练样本数量有限，它们的分类性能对于序列来说也很高，但对于单个对象来说却很低。 ID-nets 还实现了依赖于作者的识别，并建议作为加密身份验证的加密工具。所提出的机制为高级 ANN 算法开辟了新视野。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种受大脑启发的神经元抑制机制，用于实现无需反馈回路的高精度序列识别网络（ID-nets）。
AI.motivation: 现有循环神经网络在序列识别中存在训练困难，而无需反馈回路的序列识别方法仍面临挑战。
AI.method: 通过暂时抑制神经元近期放电活动，使不同时间点的输入作用于动态创建的前馈子网络，实现序列识别。
AI.result: ID-nets成功识别10个手写数字序列，推广至卷积神经网络处理图像序列，且在序列分类上表现优异但单个对象识别较弱。
AI.conclusion: 该机制为人工神经网络算法开辟了新方向，可能推动序列识别与加密认证技术的发展。

authors_text: Pedro Ramoneda,Nazif Can Tamer,Vsevolod Eremenko,Xavier Serra,Marius Miron
title: Score difficulty analysis for piano performance education based on fingering
title_zh: 基于指法的钢琴演奏教育乐谱难度分析
abstract: In this paper, we introduce score difficulty classification as a sub-task of music information retrieval (MIR), which may be used in music education technologies, for personalised curriculum generation, and score retrieval. We introduce a novel dataset for our task, Mikrokosmos-difficulty, containing 147 piano pieces in symbolic representation and the corresponding difficulty labels derived by its composer Béla Bartók and the publishers. As part of our methodology, we propose piano technique feature representations based on different piano fingering algorithms. We use these features as input for two classifiers: a Gated Recurrent Unit neural network (GRU) with attention mechanism and gradient-boosted trees trained on score segments. We show that for our dataset fingering based features perform better than a simple baseline considering solely the notes in the score. Furthermore, the GRU with attention mechanism classifier surpasses the gradient-boosted trees. Our proposed models are interpretable and are capable of generating difficulty feedback both locally, on short term segments, and globally, for whole pieces. Code, datasets, models, and an online demo are made available for reproducibility
summary: In this paper, we introduce score difficulty classification as a sub-task of music information retrieval (MIR), which may be used in music education technologies, for personalised curriculum generation, and score retrieval. We introduce a novel dataset for our task, Mikrokosmos-difficulty, containing 147 piano pieces in symbolic representation and the corresponding difficulty labels derived by its composer Béla Bartók and the publishers. As part of our methodology, we propose piano technique feature representations based on different piano fingering algorithms. We use these features as input for two classifiers: a Gated Recurrent Unit neural network (GRU) with attention mechanism and gradient-boosted trees trained on score segments. We show that for our dataset fingering based features perform better than a simple baseline considering solely the notes in the score. Furthermore, the GRU with attention mechanism classifier surpasses the gradient-boosted trees. Our proposed models are interpretable and are capable of generating difficulty feedback both locally, on short term segments, and globally, for whole pieces. Code, datasets, models, and an online demo are made available for reproducibility
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们引入乐谱难度分类作为音乐信息检索（MIR）的子任务，可用于音乐教育技术、个性化课程生成和乐谱检索。我们为我们的任务引入了一个新颖的数据集，即 Mikrokosmos-difficulty，其中包含 147 首钢琴曲的符号表示以及由其作曲家 Béla Bartók 和出版商得出的相应难度标签。作为我们方法的一部分，我们提出基于不同钢琴指法算法的钢琴技术特征表示。我们使用这些特征作为两个分类器的输入：具有注意机制的门控循环单元神经网络（GRU）和在分数段上训练的梯度增强树。我们表明，对于我们的数据集，基于指法的特征比仅考虑乐谱中的音符的简单基线表现更好。此外，具有注意力机制分类器的 GRU 超越了梯度提升树。我们提出的模型是可解释的，并且能够在本地（短期片段）和全局（整个片段）生成难度反馈。提供代码、数据集、模型和在线演示以实现可重复性

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于钢琴指法分析的乐谱难度分类方法，用于音乐教育技术中的个性化课程生成和乐谱检索。
AI.motivation: 现有音乐教育缺乏客观的乐谱难度评估体系，需开发可解释的模型辅助个性化教学与曲目推荐。
AI.method: 构建包含147首钢琴曲的Mikrokosmos-difficulty数据集，提取基于指法算法的钢琴技术特征，采用带注意力机制的GRU神经网络和梯度提升树进行分类建模。
AI.result: 指法特征显著优于仅考虑音符的基线模型，GRU分类器准确率超越梯度提升树，模型可提供局部与全局难度反馈。
AI.conclusion: 提出的可解释模型有效支持音乐教育中的难度评估，开源代码与数据集可促进相关研究与应用落地。

authors_text: Reyhaneh Neshatavar,Mohsen Yavartanoo,Sanghyun Son,Kyoung Mu Lee
title: CVF-SID: Cyclic multi-Variate Function for Self-Supervised Image Denoising by Disentangling Noise from Image
title_zh: CVF-SID：通过从图像中解开噪声进行自监督图像去噪的循环多变量函数
abstract: Recently, significant progress has been made on image denoising with strong supervision from large-scale datasets. However, obtaining well-aligned noisy-clean training image pairs for each specific scenario is complicated and costly in practice. Consequently, applying a conventional supervised denoising network on in-the-wild noisy inputs is not straightforward. Although several studies have challenged this problem without strong supervision, they rely on less practical assumptions and cannot be applied to practical situations directly. To address the aforementioned challenges, we propose a novel and powerful self-supervised denoising method called CVF-SID based on a Cyclic multi-Variate Function (CVF) module and a self-supervised image disentangling (SID) framework. The CVF module can output multiple decomposed variables of the input and take a combination of the outputs back as an input in a cyclic manner. Our CVF-SID can disentangle a clean image and noise maps from the input by leveraging various self-supervised loss terms. Unlike several methods that only consider the signal-independent noise models, we also deal with signal-dependent noise components for real-world applications. Furthermore, we do not rely on any prior assumptions about the underlying noise distribution, making CVF-SID more generalizable toward realistic noise. Extensive experiments on real-world datasets show that CVF-SID achieves state-of-the-art self-supervised image denoising performance and is comparable to other existing approaches. The code is publicly available from https://github.com/Reyhanehne/CVF-SID_PyTorch .
summary: Recently, significant progress has been made on image denoising with strong supervision from large-scale datasets. However, obtaining well-aligned noisy-clean training image pairs for each specific scenario is complicated and costly in practice. Consequently, applying a conventional supervised denoising network on in-the-wild noisy inputs is not straightforward. Although several studies have challenged this problem without strong supervision, they rely on less practical assumptions and cannot be applied to practical situations directly. To address the aforementioned challenges, we propose a novel and powerful self-supervised denoising method called CVF-SID based on a Cyclic multi-Variate Function (CVF) module and a self-supervised image disentangling (SID) framework. The CVF module can output multiple decomposed variables of the input and take a combination of the outputs back as an input in a cyclic manner. Our CVF-SID can disentangle a clean image and noise maps from the input by leveraging various self-supervised loss terms. Unlike several methods that only consider the signal-independent noise models, we also deal with signal-dependent noise components for real-world applications. Furthermore, we do not rely on any prior assumptions about the underlying noise distribution, making CVF-SID more generalizable toward realistic noise. Extensive experiments on real-world datasets show that CVF-SID achieves state-of-the-art self-supervised image denoising performance and is comparable to other existing approaches. The code is publicly available from https://github.com/Reyhanehne/CVF-SID_PyTorch .
abstract_zh: 最近，在大规模数据集的强有力监督下，图像去噪方面取得了重大进展。然而，在实践中，为每个特定场景获得对齐良好的噪声-干净训练图像对是复杂且昂贵的。因此，在野外噪声输入上应用传统的监督去噪网络并不简单。尽管一些研究在没有强有力监督的情况下挑战了这个问题，但它们依赖于不太实际的假设，不能直接应用于实际情况。为了解决上述挑战，我们提出了一种新颖且强大的自监督去噪方法，称为 CVF-SID，基于循环多变量函数（CVF）模块和自监督图像解缠（SID）框架。 CVF模块可以输出输入的多个分解变量，并以循环方式将输出的组合作为输入。我们的 CVF-SID 可以利用各种自监督损失项从输入中分离出干净的图像和噪声图。与仅考虑与信号无关的噪声模型的几种方法不同，我们还处理实际应用中与信号相关的噪声分量。此外，我们不依赖于任何关于潜在噪声分布的先前假设，使得 CVF-SID 更适用于现实噪声。对真实世界数据集的大量实验表明，CVF-SID 实现了最先进的自监督图像去噪性能，并且与其他现有方法相当。该代码可从 https://github.com/Reyhanehne/CVF-SID_PyTorch 公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于循环多变量函数（CVF）模块和自监督图像解耦（SID）框架的自监督图像去噪方法CVF-SID，旨在从输入中分离干净图像和噪声图。
AI.motivation: 传统监督去噪方法依赖大规模对齐的噪声-干净图像对，获取成本高且场景特定；现有自监督方法依赖不实际的假设，难以直接应用于真实场景。
AI.method: 通过CVF模块循环分解输入为多变量并组合反馈，结合多种自监督损失项分离噪声与图像，无需假设噪声分布，支持处理信号相关噪声。
AI.result: 在真实数据集上达到自监督去噪最先进水平，性能可与现有方法媲美，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: CVF-SID通过无需先验噪声分布的自监督框架，有效解决了真实场景下的图像去噪问题，具有广泛适用性。

search_text: CVF-SID: Cyclic multi-Variate Function for Self-Supervised Image Denoising by Disentangling Noise from Image CVF-SID：通过从图像中解开噪声进行自监督图像去噪的循环多变量函数 Recently, significant progress has been made on image denoising with strong supervision from large-scale datasets. However, obtaining well-aligned noisy-clean training image pairs for each specific scenario is complicated and costly in practice. Consequently, applying a conventional supervised denoising network on in-the-wild noisy inputs is not straightforward. Although several studies have challenged this problem without strong supervision, they rely on less practical assumptions and cannot be applied to practical situations directly. To address the aforementioned challenges, we propose a novel and powerful self-supervised denoising method called CVF-SID based on a Cyclic multi-Variate Function (CVF) module and a self-supervised image disentangling (SID) framework. The CVF module can output multiple decomposed variables of the input and take a combination of the outputs back as an input in a cyclic manner. Our CVF-SID can disentangle a clean image and noise maps from the input by leveraging various self-supervised loss terms. Unlike several methods that only consider the signal-independent noise models, we also deal with signal-dependent noise components for real-world applications. Furthermore, we do not rely on any prior assumptions about the underlying noise distribution, making CVF-SID more generalizable toward realistic noise. Extensive experiments on real-world datasets show that CVF-SID achieves state-of-the-art self-supervised image denoising performance and is comparable to other existing approaches. The code is publicly available from https://github.com/Reyhanehne/CVF-SID_PyTorch . 最近，在大规模数据集的强有力监督下，图像去噪方面取得了重大进展。然而，在实践中，为每个特定场景获得对齐良好的噪声-干净训练图像对是复杂且昂贵的。因此，在野外噪声输入上应用传统的监督去噪网络并不简单。尽管一些研究在没有强有力监督的情况下挑战了这个问题，但它们依赖于不太实际的假设，不能直接应用于实际情况。为了解决上述挑战，我们提出了一种新颖且强大的自监督去噪方法，称为 CVF-SID，基于循环多变量函数（CVF）模块和自监督图像解缠（SID）框架。 CVF模块可以输出输入的多个分解变量，并以循环方式将输出的组合作为输入。我们的 CVF-SID 可以利用各种自监督损失项从输入中分离出干净的图像和噪声图。与仅考虑与信号无关的噪声模型的几种方法不同，我们还处理实际应用中与信号相关的噪声分量。此外，我们不依赖于任何关于潜在噪声分布的先前假设，使得 CVF-SID 更适用于现实噪声。对真实世界数据集的大量实验表明，CVF-SID 实现了最先进的自监督图像去噪性能，并且与其他现有方法相当。该代码可从 https://github.com/Reyhanehne/CVF-SID_PyTorch 公开获取。 本文提出了一种基于循环多变量函数（CVF）模块和自监督图像解耦（SID）框架的自监督图像去噪方法CVF-SID，旨在从输入中分离干净图像和噪声图。 Reyhaneh Neshatavar,Mohsen Yavartanoo,Sanghyun Son,Kyoung Mu Lee cs.CV

authors_text: Chaoqi Chen,Jiongcheng Li,Xiaoguang Han,Xiaoqing Liu,Yizhou Yu
title: Compound Domain Generalization via Meta-Knowledge Encoding
title_zh: 通过元知识编码的复合域泛化
abstract: Domain generalization (DG) aims to improve the generalization performance for an unseen target domain by using the knowledge of multiple seen source domains. Mainstream DG methods typically assume that the domain label of each source sample is known a priori, which is challenged to be satisfied in many real-world applications. In this paper, we study a practical problem of compound DG, which relaxes the discrete domain assumption to the mixed source domains setting. On the other hand, current DG algorithms prioritize the focus on semantic invariance across domains (one-vs-one), while paying less attention to the holistic semantic structure (many-vs-many). Such holistic semantic structure, referred to as meta-knowledge here, is crucial for learning generalizable representations. To this end, we present Compound Domain Generalization via Meta-Knowledge Encoding (COMEN), a general approach to automatically discover and model latent domains in two steps. Firstly, we introduce Style-induced Domain-specific Normalization (SDNorm) to re-normalize the multi-modal underlying distributions, thereby dividing the mixture of source domains into latent clusters. Secondly, we harness the prototype representations, the centroids of classes, to perform relational modeling in the embedding space with two parallel and complementary modules, which explicitly encode the semantic structure for the out-of-distribution generalization. Experiments on four standard DG benchmarks reveal that COMEN exceeds the state-of-the-art performance without the need of domain supervision.
summary: Domain generalization (DG) aims to improve the generalization performance for an unseen target domain by using the knowledge of multiple seen source domains. Mainstream DG methods typically assume that the domain label of each source sample is known a priori, which is challenged to be satisfied in many real-world applications. In this paper, we study a practical problem of compound DG, which relaxes the discrete domain assumption to the mixed source domains setting. On the other hand, current DG algorithms prioritize the focus on semantic invariance across domains (one-vs-one), while paying less attention to the holistic semantic structure (many-vs-many). Such holistic semantic structure, referred to as meta-knowledge here, is crucial for learning generalizable representations. To this end, we present Compound Domain Generalization via Meta-Knowledge Encoding (COMEN), a general approach to automatically discover and model latent domains in two steps. Firstly, we introduce Style-induced Domain-specific Normalization (SDNorm) to re-normalize the multi-modal underlying distributions, thereby dividing the mixture of source domains into latent clusters. Secondly, we harness the prototype representations, the centroids of classes, to perform relational modeling in the embedding space with two parallel and complementary modules, which explicitly encode the semantic structure for the out-of-distribution generalization. Experiments on four standard DG benchmarks reveal that COMEN exceeds the state-of-the-art performance without the need of domain supervision.
abstract_zh: 域泛化（DG）旨在通过使用多个已见源域的知识来提高未见目标域的泛化性能。主流 DG 方法通常假设每个源样本的域标签是先验已知的，这在许多实际应用中很难满足。在本文中，我们研究了复合 DG 的实际问题，它将离散域假设放宽到混合源域设置。另一方面，当前的 DG 算法优先关注跨领域的语义不变性（一对一），而较少关注整体语义结构（多对多）。这种整体语义结构，在这里被称为元知识，对于学习可概括的表示至关重要。为此，我们提出了通过元知识编码的复合域泛化（COMEN），这是一种分两步自动发现和建模潜在域的通用方法。首先，我们引入风格诱导的域特定归一化（SDNorm）来重新归一化多模态底层分布，从而将源域的混合物划分为潜在簇。其次，我们利用原型表示（类的质心），通过两个并行且互补的模块在嵌入空间中执行关系建模，这两个模块显式编码语义结构以实现分布外泛化。对四个标准 DG 基准测试的实验表明，COMEN 无需域监督即可超越最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文研究无需领域标签的复合领域泛化问题，通过元知识编码提升模型在未知目标领域的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 传统领域泛化方法依赖源领域标签，实际应用中难以满足；现有算法侧重领域间语义不变性，忽视整体语义结构（元知识）对泛化的影响。
AI.method: 提出COMEN方法，分两步：1）SDNorm模块归一化多模态分布以划分潜在领域聚类；2）通过原型表示在嵌入空间建模类间关系，显式编码元知识。
AI.result: 在四个标准领域泛化基准测试中，COMEN在无监督条件下超越现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: COMEN通过自动发现潜在领域和建模元知识，有效解决了混合源领域的泛化问题，为实际应用提供了无需领域标签的解决方案。

authors_text: Mohamed A. Suliman,Logan Z. J. Williams,Abdulah Fawaz,Emma C. Robinson
title: A Deep-Discrete Learning Framework for Spherical Surface Registration
title_zh: 用于球面配准的深度离散学习框架
abstract: Cortical surface registration is a fundamental tool for neuroimaging analysis that has been shown to improve the alignment of functional regions relative to volumetric approaches. Classically, image registration is performed by optimizing a complex objective similarity function, leading to long run times. This contributes to a convention for aligning all data to a global average reference frame that poorly reflects the underlying cortical heterogeneity. In this paper, we propose a novel unsupervised learning-based framework that converts registration to a multi-label classification problem, where each point in a low-resolution control grid deforms to one of fixed, finite number of endpoints. This is learned using a spherical geometric deep learning architecture, in an end-to-end unsupervised way, with regularization imposed using a deep Conditional Random Field (CRF). Experiments show that our proposed framework performs competitively, in terms of similarity and areal distortion, relative to the most popular classical surface registration algorithms and generates smoother deformations than other learning-based surface registration methods, even in subjects with atypical cortical morphology.
summary: Cortical surface registration is a fundamental tool for neuroimaging analysis that has been shown to improve the alignment of functional regions relative to volumetric approaches. Classically, image registration is performed by optimizing a complex objective similarity function, leading to long run times. This contributes to a convention for aligning all data to a global average reference frame that poorly reflects the underlying cortical heterogeneity. In this paper, we propose a novel unsupervised learning-based framework that converts registration to a multi-label classification problem, where each point in a low-resolution control grid deforms to one of fixed, finite number of endpoints. This is learned using a spherical geometric deep learning architecture, in an end-to-end unsupervised way, with regularization imposed using a deep Conditional Random Field (CRF). Experiments show that our proposed framework performs competitively, in terms of similarity and areal distortion, relative to the most popular classical surface registration algorithms and generates smoother deformations than other learning-based surface registration methods, even in subjects with atypical cortical morphology.
abstract_zh: 皮质表面配准是神经影像分析的基本工具，已被证明可以改善功能区域相对于体积方法的对齐。传统上，图像配准是通过优化复杂的目标相似性函数来执行的，从而导致运行时间较长。这有助于将所有数据与全局平均参考系对齐，而该参考系很难反映潜在的皮质异质性。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于无监督学习的框架，它将配准转换为多标签分类问题，其中低分辨率控制网格中的每个点变形为固定的、有限数量的端点之一。这是使用球形几何深度学习架构以端到端无监督方式学习的，并使用深度条件随机场 (CRF) 进行正则化。实验表明，我们提出的框架在相似性和区域失真方面相对于最流行的经典表面配准算法具有竞争力，并且比其他基于学习的表面配准方法产生更平滑的变形，即使在具有非典型皮质形态的受试者中也是如此。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的球面表面配准框架，通过将配准问题转化为多标签分类任务，以提高配准效率和精度。
AI.motivation: 传统配准方法计算复杂且依赖全局平均参考框架，无法有效反映皮质异质性，需开发更高效且适应个体差异的算法。
AI.method: 构建球面几何深度学习架构，将低分辨率控制网格的变形转化为多标签分类问题，并结合深度CRF进行无监督学习正则化。
AI.result: 在相似性度量和面积失真指标上与经典算法相当，生成的变形更平滑，尤其在皮质形态异常的受试者中表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为表面配准提供了高效且鲁棒的解决方案，能够处理复杂个体差异，具有潜在的神经影像分析应用价值。

search_text: A Deep-Discrete Learning Framework for Spherical Surface Registration 用于球面配准的深度离散学习框架 Cortical surface registration is a fundamental tool for neuroimaging analysis that has been shown to improve the alignment of functional regions relative to volumetric approaches. Classically, image registration is performed by optimizing a complex objective similarity function, leading to long run times. This contributes to a convention for aligning all data to a global average reference frame that poorly reflects the underlying cortical heterogeneity. In this paper, we propose a novel unsupervised learning-based framework that converts registration to a multi-label classification problem, where each point in a low-resolution control grid deforms to one of fixed, finite number of endpoints. This is learned using a spherical geometric deep learning architecture, in an end-to-end unsupervised way, with regularization imposed using a deep Conditional Random Field (CRF). Experiments show that our proposed framework performs competitively, in terms of similarity and areal distortion, relative to the most popular classical surface registration algorithms and generates smoother deformations than other learning-based surface registration methods, even in subjects with atypical cortical morphology. 皮质表面配准是神经影像分析的基本工具，已被证明可以改善功能区域相对于体积方法的对齐。传统上，图像配准是通过优化复杂的目标相似性函数来执行的，从而导致运行时间较长。这有助于将所有数据与全局平均参考系对齐，而该参考系很难反映潜在的皮质异质性。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于无监督学习的框架，它将配准转换为多标签分类问题，其中低分辨率控制网格中的每个点变形为固定的、有限数量的端点之一。这是使用球形几何深度学习架构以端到端无监督方式学习的，并使用深度条件随机场 (CRF) 进行正则化。实验表明，我们提出的框架在相似性和区域失真方面相对于最流行的经典表面配准算法具有竞争力，并且比其他基于学习的表面配准方法产生更平滑的变形，即使在具有非典型皮质形态的受试者中也是如此。 本文提出一种基于深度学习的球面表面配准框架，通过将配准问题转化为多标签分类任务，以提高配准效率和精度。 Mohamed A. authors_text: M. Saquib Sarfraz,Marios Koulakis,Constantin Seibold,Rainer Stiefelhagen
title: Hierarchical Nearest Neighbor Graph Embedding for Efficient Dimensionality Reduction
title_zh: 用于高效降维的分层最近邻图嵌入
abstract: Dimensionality reduction is crucial both for visualization and preprocessing high dimensional data for machine learning. We introduce a novel method based on a hierarchy built on 1-nearest neighbor graphs in the original space which is used to preserve the grouping properties of the data distribution on multiple levels. The core of the proposal is an optimization-free projection that is competitive with the latest versions of t-SNE and UMAP in performance and visualization quality while being an order of magnitude faster in run-time. Furthermore, its interpretable mechanics, the ability to project new data, and the natural separation of data clusters in visualizations make it a general purpose unsupervised dimension reduction technique. In the paper, we argue about the soundness of the proposed method and evaluate it on a diverse collection of datasets with sizes varying from 1K to 11M samples and dimensions from 28 to 16K. We perform comparisons with other state-of-the-art methods on multiple metrics and target dimensions highlighting its efficiency and performance. Code is available at https://github.com/koulakis/h-nne
summary: Dimensionality reduction is crucial both for visualization and preprocessing high dimensional data for machine learning. We introduce a novel method based on a hierarchy built on 1-nearest neighbor graphs in the original space which is used to preserve the grouping properties of the data distribution on multiple levels. The core of the proposal is an optimization-free projection that is competitive with the latest versions of t-SNE and UMAP in performance and visualization quality while being an order of magnitude faster in run-time. Furthermore, its interpretable mechanics, the ability to project new data, and the natural separation of data clusters in visualizations make it a general purpose unsupervised dimension reduction technique. In the paper, we argue about the soundness of the proposed method and evaluate it on a diverse collection of datasets with sizes varying from 1K to 11M samples and dimensions from 28 to 16K. We perform comparisons with other state-of-the-art methods on multiple metrics and target dimensions highlighting its efficiency and performance. Code is available at https://github.com/koulakis/h-nne
abstract_zh: 降维对于机器学习的可视化和高维数据预处理都至关重要。我们引入了一种基于原始空间中的近邻图的层次结构的新颖方法，该方法用于保留多个级别上数据分布的分组属性。该提案的核心是免优化投影，在性能和可视化质量方面与最新版本的 t-SNE 和 UMAP 具有竞争力，同时运行时间快一个数量级。此外，其可解释的机制、投射新数据的能力以及可视化中数据集群的自然分离使其成为一种通用的无监督降维技术。在本文中，我们讨论了所提出方法的合理性，并在样本大小从 1K 到 11M 不等、维度从 28 到 16K 不等的各种数据集上对其进行了评估。我们在多个指标和目标维度上与其他最先进的方法进行比较，突出其效率和性能。代码可在 https://github.com/koulakis/h-nne 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于分层最近邻图嵌入的高效降维方法，旨在提升高维数据可视化的效率与质量。
AI.motivation: 传统降维方法如t-SNE和UMAP在处理大规模高维数据时计算效率低，且难以保持数据分布的多层级聚类特性。
AI.method: 构建原始空间中的1-最近邻图分层结构，通过无优化的投影方法保留数据分布的分层聚类特性，实现快速降维。
AI.result: 在1K至11M样本、28至16K维度的多数据集上，该方法较t-SNE和UMAP快一个数量级，且可视化效果和聚类分离度表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 该方法是一种通用的无监督降维技术，兼具高效性、可解释性和新数据投影能力，适用于大规模高维数据分析场景。

authors_text: Daniel Mitchell,Jamie Blanche,Sam T. Harper,Theodore Lim,Valentin Robu,Ikuo Yamamoto,David Flynn
title: Millimeter-wave Foresight Sensing for Safety and Resilience in Autonomous Operations
title_zh: 毫米波前视传感确保自主操作的安全性和弹性
abstract: Robotic platforms are highly programmable, scalable and versatile to complete several tasks including Inspection, Maintenance and Repair (IMR). Mobile robotics offer reduced restrictions in operating environments, resulting in greater flexibility; operation at height, dangerous areas and repetitive tasks. Cyber physical infrastructures have been identified by the UK Robotics Growth Partnership as a key enabler in how we utilize and interact with sensors and machines via the virtual and physical worlds. Cyber Physical Systems (CPS) allow for robotics and artificial intelligence to adapt and repurpose at pace, allowing for the addressment of new challenges in CPS. A challenge exists within robotics to secure an effective partnership in a wide range of areas which include shared workspaces and Beyond Visual Line of Sight (BVLOS). Robotic manipulation abilities have improved a robots accessibility via the ability to open doorways, however, challenges exist in how a robot decides if it is safe to move into a new workspace. Current sensing methods are limited to line of sight and are unable to capture data beyond doorways or walls, therefore, a robot is unable to sense if it is safe to open a door. Another limitation exists as robots are unable to detect if a human is within a shared workspace. Therefore, if a human is detected, extended safety precautions can be taken to ensure the safe autonomous operation of a robot. These challenges are represented as safety, trust and resilience, inhibiting the successful advancement of CPS. This paper evaluates the use of frequency modulated continuous wave radar sensing for human detection and through-wall detection to increase situational awareness. The results validate the use of the sensor to detect the difference between a person and infrastructure, and increased situational awareness for navigation via foresight monitoring through walls.

abstract_zh: 机器人平台具有高度可编程性、可扩展性和多功能性，可以完成包括检查、维护和修理 (IMR) 在内的多项任务。移动机器人减少了操作环境的限制，从而提高了灵活性；高空作业、危险区域作业和重复性作业。英国机器人发展合作伙伴关系已将网络物理基础设施确定为我们如何通过虚拟和物理世界利用传感器和机器并与之交互的关键推动因素。网络物理系统 (CPS) 允许机器人和人工智能快速适应和重新利用，从而解决 CPS 中的新挑战。机器人技术领域存在一个挑战，即如何在共享工作空间和超视距 (BVLOS) 等广泛领域建立有效的合作伙伴关系。机器人操纵能力通过打开门口的能力提高了机器人的可及性，然而，机器人如何决定是否安全地移动到新的工作空间存在挑战。目前的传感方法仅限于视线，无法捕获门口或墙壁之外的数据，因此机器人无法感知开门是否安全。存在另一个限制，因为机器人无法检测人类是否在共享工作空间内。因此，如果检测到有人，可以采取扩展的安全预防措施，以确保机器人安全自主运行。这些挑战表现为安全、信任和弹性，阻碍了 CPS 的成功推进。本文评估了使用调频连续波雷达传感进行人体检测和穿墙检测以提高态势感知能力。结果验证了使用传感器来检测人和基础设施之间的差异，并通过穿墙的前视监测增强了导航的态势感知能力。

AI.tldr: 本文研究毫米波雷达在自主操作中的前景感知技术，以提升机器人安全性和系统韧性。
AI.motivation: 当前机器人传感技术受限于视线范围，无法检测门后或墙体后的人员及环境，导致共享工作空间中的安全风险和信任问题。
AI.method: 采用调频连续波雷达实现穿透墙体的人体检测与环境感知，通过毫米波雷达提升机器人对非视线区域的态势感知能力。
AI.result: 实验验证了雷达传感器可有效区分人员与基础设施，并通过墙体监测实现导航安全性的提升。
AI.conclusion: 毫米波前景感知技术为自主机器人提供了更安全的环境感知方案，增强了 cyber-physical 系统的适应性与可靠性。

ai_content.result: 实验验证了雷达传感器可有效区分人员与基础设施，并通过墙体监测实现导航安全性的提升。

search_text: Millimeter-wave Foresight Sensing for Safety and Resilience in Autonomous Operations 毫米波前视传感确保自主操作的安全性和弹性 Robotic platforms are highly programmable, scalable and versatile to complete several tasks including Inspection, Maintenance and Repair (IMR). Mobile robotics offer reduced restrictions in operating environments, resulting in greater flexibility; operation at height, dangerous areas and repetitive tasks. Cyber physical infrastructures have been identified by the UK Robotics Growth Partnership as a key enabler in how we utilize and interact with sensors and machines via the virtual and physical worlds. Cyber Physical Systems (CPS) allow for robotics and artificial intelligence to adapt and repurpose at pace, allowing for the addressment of new challenges in CPS. A challenge exists within robotics to secure an effective partnership in a wide range of areas which include shared workspaces and Beyond Visual Line of Sight (BVLOS). Robotic manipulation abilities have improved a robots accessibility via the ability to open doorways, however, challenges exist in how a robot decides if it is safe to move into a new workspace. Current sensing methods are limited to line of sight and are unable to capture data beyond doorways or walls, therefore, a robot is unable to sense if it is safe to open a door. Another limitation exists as robots are unable to detect if a human is within a shared workspace. Therefore, if a human is detected, extended safety precautions can be taken to ensure the safe autonomous operation of a robot. These challenges are represented as safety, trust and resilience, inhibiting the successful advancement of CPS. This paper evaluates the use of frequency modulated continuous wave radar sensing for human detection and through-wall detection to increase situational awareness. The results validate the use of the sensor to detect the difference between a person and infrastructure, and increased situational awareness for navigation via foresight monitoring through walls. 机器人平台具有高度可编程性、可扩展性和多功能性，可以完成包括检查、维护和修理 (IMR) 在内的多项任务。移动机器人减少了操作环境的限制，从而提高了灵活性；高空作业、危险区域作业和重复性作业。英国机器人发展合作伙伴关系已将网络物理基础设施确定为我们如何通过虚拟和物理世界利用传感器和机器并与之交互的关键推动因素。网络物理系统 (CPS) 允许机器人和人工智能快速适应和重新利用，从而解决 CPS 中的新挑战。机器人技术领域存在一个挑战，即如何在共享工作空间和超视距 (BVLOS) 等广泛领域建立有效的合作伙伴关系。机器人操纵能力通过打开门口的能力提高了机器人的可及性，然而，机器人如何决定是否安全地移动到新的工作空间存在挑战。目前的传感方法仅限于视线，无法捕获门口或墙壁之外的数据，因此机器人无法感知开门是否安全。存在另一个限制，因为机器人无法检测人类是否在共享工作空间内。因此，如果检测到有人，可以采取扩展的安全预防措施，以确保机器人安全自主运行。这些挑战表现为安全、信任和弹性，阻碍了 CPS 的成功推进。本文评估了使用调频连续波雷达传感进行人体检测和穿墙检测以提高态势感知能力。结果验证了使用传感器来检测人和基础设施之间的差异，并通过穿墙的前视监测增强了导航的态势感知能力。 本文研究毫米波雷达在自主操作中的前景感知技术，以提升机器人安全性和系统韧性。 Daniel Mitchell,Jamie Blanche,Sam T. Harper,Theodore Lim,Valentin Robu,Ikuo Yamamoto,David Flynn cs.RO,eess.SP

authors_text: Qi Li,Weining Wang,Chengzhong Xu,Zhenan Sun,Ming-Hsuan Yang
title: Learning Disentangled Representation for One-shot Progressive Face Swapping
title_zh: 学习一次性渐进脸部交换的解缠结表示
abstract: Although face swapping has attracted much attention in recent years, it remains a challenging problem. Existing methods leverage a large number of data samples to explore the intrinsic properties of face swapping without considering the semantic information of face images. Moreover, the representation of the identity information tends to be fixed, leading to suboptimal face swapping. In this paper, we present a simple yet efficient method named FaceSwapper, for one-shot face swapping based on Generative Adversarial Networks. Our method consists of a disentangled representation module and a semantic-guided fusion module. The disentangled representation module comprises an attribute encoder and an identity encoder, which aims to achieve the disentanglement of the identity and attribute information. The identity encoder is more flexible, and the attribute encoder contains more attribute details than its competitors. Benefiting from the disentangled representation, FaceSwapper can swap face images progressively. In addition, semantic information is introduced into the semantic-guided fusion module to control the swapped region and model the pose and expression more accurately. Experimental results show that our method achieves state-of-the-art results on benchmark datasets with fewer training samples. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/liqi-casia/FaceSwapper.
summary: Although face swapping has attracted much attention in recent years, it remains a challenging problem. Existing methods leverage a large number of data samples to explore the intrinsic properties of face swapping without considering the semantic information of face images. Moreover, the representation of the identity information tends to be fixed, leading to suboptimal face swapping. In this paper, we present a simple yet efficient method named FaceSwapper, for one-shot face swapping based on Generative Adversarial Networks. Our method consists of a disentangled representation module and a semantic-guided fusion module. The disentangled representation module comprises an attribute encoder and an identity encoder, which aims to achieve the disentanglement of the identity and attribute information. The identity encoder is more flexible, and the attribute encoder contains more attribute details than its competitors. Benefiting from the disentangled representation, FaceSwapper can swap face images progressively. In addition, semantic information is introduced into the semantic-guided fusion module to control the swapped region and model the pose and expression more accurately. Experimental results show that our method achieves state-of-the-art results on benchmark datasets with fewer training samples. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/liqi-casia/FaceSwapper.
abstract_zh: 尽管近年来换脸引起了广泛关注，但它仍然是一个具有挑战性的问题。现有方法利用大量数据样本来探索人脸交换的内在属性，而不考虑人脸图像的语义信息。此外，身份信息的表示往往是固定的，导致面部交换效果不佳。在本文中，我们提出了一种简单而有效的方法，名为 FaceSwapper，用于基于生成对抗网络的一次性面部交换。我们的方法由解缠结表示模块和语义引导融合模块组成。解开表示模块包括属性编码器和身份编码器，其目的是实现身份和属性信息的解开。身份编码器更加灵活，属性编码器比竞争对手包含更多的属性细节。受益于解开的表示，FaceSwaper 可以逐步交换面部图像。此外，语义引导融合模块中引入了语义信息，以控制交换区域并更准确地对姿势和表情进行建模。实验结果表明，我们的方法以更少的训练样本在基准数据集上取得了最先进的结果。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/liqi-casia/FaceSwapper 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于生成对抗网络的单次学习人脸替换方法FaceSwapper，通过解耦表示和语义引导融合模块实现渐进式人脸替换。
AI.motivation: 现有方法未充分考虑人脸语义信息且身份表示固定，导致人脸替换效果不佳。需通过解耦身份与属性信息并引入语义指导来提升替换质量。
AI.method: 方法包含解耦表示模块（含属性编码器和身份编码器）与语义引导融合模块，通过分离身份与属性信息并利用语义控制替换区域实现渐进式人脸交换。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上以更少训练样本达到最先进效果，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过解耦身份属性与语义引导融合，有效提升了单次人脸替换的精度与自然度。

authors_text: Wanling Cai,Yucheng Jin,Li Chen
title: Impacts of Personal Characteristics on User Trust in Conversational Recommender Systems
title_zh: 会话推荐系统中个人特征对用户信任的影响
comment: 14 pages, 5 figures, 6 tables, accepted for CHI 2022
comments: 14 pages, 5 figures, 6 tables, accepted for CHI 2022
abstract: Conversational recommender systems (CRSs) imitate human advisors to assist users in finding items through conversations and have recently gained increasing attention in domains such as media and e-commerce. Like in human communication, building trust in human-agent communication is essential given its significant influence on user behavior. However, inspiring user trust in CRSs with a "one-size-fits-all" design is difficult, as individual users may have their own expectations for conversational interactions (e.g., who, user or system, takes the initiative), which are potentially related to their personal characteristics. In this study, we investigated the impacts of three personal characteristics, namely personality traits, trust propensity, and domain knowledge, on user trust in two types of text-based CRSs, i.e., user-initiative and mixed-initiative. Our between-subjects user study (N=148) revealed that users' trust propensity and domain knowledge positively influenced their trust in CRSs, and that users with high conscientiousness tended to trust the mixed-initiative system.
summary: Conversational recommender systems (CRSs) imitate human advisors to assist users in finding items through conversations and have recently gained increasing attention in domains such as media and e-commerce. Like in human communication, building trust in human-agent communication is essential given its significant influence on user behavior. However, inspiring user trust in CRSs with a "one-size-fits-all" design is difficult, as individual users may have their own expectations for conversational interactions (e.g., who, user or system, takes the initiative), which are potentially related to their personal characteristics. In this study, we investigated the impacts of three personal characteristics, namely personality traits, trust propensity, and domain knowledge, on user trust in two types of text-based CRSs, i.e., user-initiative and mixed-initiative. Our between-subjects user study (N=148) revealed that users' trust propensity and domain knowledge positively influenced their trust in CRSs, and that users with high conscientiousness tended to trust the mixed-initiative system.
abstract_zh: 对话式推荐系统（CRS）模仿人类顾问，帮助用户通过对话查找商品，最近在媒体和电子商务等领域受到越来越多的关注。与人类交流一样，鉴于其对用户行为的重大影响，在人类代理通信中建立信任至关重要。然而，通过“一刀切”的设计来激发用户对 CRS 的信任是很困难的，因为个体用户可能对对话交互有自己的期望（例如，谁、用户或系统采取主动），这可能与他们的个人特征有关。在本研究中，我们研究了三种个人特征，即人格特质、信任倾向和领域知识，对两种基于文本的 CRS（即用户主动型和混合主动型）的用户信任的影响。我们的受试者间用户研究（N=148）表明，用户的信任倾向和领域知识对他们对 CRS 的信任产生积极影响，并且高度认真的用户倾向于信任混合主动系统。

AI.tldr: 研究个人特征对用户在两种对话推荐系统（用户主动型和混合主动型）中信任度的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有对话推荐系统采用统一设计难以满足用户个性化信任需求，需探索个人特征（如性格、信任倾向等）对信任的影响机制。
AI.method: 通过被试间用户实验（N=148），分析个性特质、信任倾向和领域知识对两种文本型CRS信任度的差异影响。
AI.result: 用户信任倾向和领域知识显著提升CRS信任度，高尽责性用户更倾向信任混合主动型系统。
AI.conclusion: 设计CRS时需考虑用户个人特征差异，针对性优化交互模式以提升信任，尤其关注尽责性、信任倾向和领域知识因素。
