search_text: Impacts of Personal Characteristics on User Trust in Conversational Recommender Systems 会话推荐系统中个人特征对用户信任的影响 Conversational recommender systems (CRSs) imitate human advisors to assist users in finding items through conversations and have recently gained increasing attention in domains such as media and e-commerce. Like in human communication, building trust in human-agent communication is essential given its significant influence on user behavior. However, inspiring user trust in CRSs with a "one-size-fits-all" design is difficult, as individual users may have their own expectations for conversational interactions (e.g., who, user or system, takes the initiative), which are potentially related to their personal characteristics. In this study, we investigated the impacts of three personal characteristics, namely personality traits, trust propensity, and domain knowledge, on user trust in two types of text-based CRSs, i.e., user-initiative and mixed-initiative. Our between-subjects user study (N=148) revealed that users' trust propensity and domain knowledge positively influenced their trust in CRSs, and that users with high conscientiousness tended to trust the mixed-initiative system. 对话式推荐系统（CRS）模仿人类顾问，帮助用户通过对话查找商品，最近在媒体和电子商务等领域受到越来越多的关注。与人类交流一样，鉴于其对用户行为的重大影响，在人类代理通信中建立信任至关重要。然而，通过“一刀切”的设计来激发用户对 CRS 的信任是很困难的，因为个体用户可能对对话交互有自己的期望（例如，谁、用户或系统采取主动），这可能与他们的个人特征有关。在本研究中，我们研究了三种个人特征，即人格特质、信任倾向和领域知识，对两种基于文本的 CRS（即用户主动型和混合主动型）的用户信任的影响。我们的受试者间用户研究（N=148）表明，用户的信任倾向和领域知识对他们对 CRS 的信任产生积极影响，并且高度认真的用户倾向于信任混合主动系统。 研究个人特征对用户在两种对话推荐系统（用户主动型和混合主动型）中信任度的影响。 Wanling Cai,Yucheng Jin,Li Chen cs.HC

authors_text: Tony Quertier,Benjamin Marais,Stéphane Morucci,Bertrand Fournel
title: MERLIN -- Malware Evasion with Reinforcement LearnINg
title_zh: MERLIN——通过强化学习规避恶意软件
abstract: In addition to signature-based and heuristics-based detection techniques, machine learning (ML) is widely used to generalize to new, never-before-seen malicious software (malware). However, it has been demonstrated that ML models can be fooled by tricking the classifier into returning the incorrect label. These studies, for instance, usually rely on a prediction score that is fragile to gradient-based attacks. In the context of a more realistic situation where an attacker has very little information about the outputs of a malware detection engine, modest evasion rates are achieved. In this paper, we propose a method using reinforcement learning with DQN and REINFORCE algorithms to challenge two state-of-the-art ML-based detection engines (MalConv \& EMBER) and a commercial AV classified by Gartner as a leader AV. Our method combines several actions, modifying a Windows portable execution (PE) file without breaking its functionalities. Our method also identifies which actions perform better and compiles a detailed vulnerability report to help mitigate the evasion. We demonstrate that REINFORCE achieves very good evasion rates even on a commercial AV with limited available information.
summary: In addition to signature-based and heuristics-based detection techniques, machine learning (ML) is widely used to generalize to new, never-before-seen malicious software (malware). However, it has been demonstrated that ML models can be fooled by tricking the classifier into returning the incorrect label. These studies, for instance, usually rely on a prediction score that is fragile to gradient-based attacks. In the context of a more realistic situation where an attacker has very little information about the outputs of a malware detection engine, modest evasion rates are achieved. In this paper, we propose a method using reinforcement learning with DQN and REINFORCE algorithms to challenge two state-of-the-art ML-based detection engines (MalConv \& EMBER) and a commercial AV classified by Gartner as a leader AV. Our method combines several actions, modifying a Windows portable execution (PE) file without breaking its functionalities. Our method also identifies which actions perform better and compiles a detailed vulnerability report to help mitigate the evasion. We demonstrate that REINFORCE achieves very good evasion rates even on a commercial AV with limited available information.
abstract_zh: 除了基于签名和启发式的检测技术之外，机器学习 (ML) 还广泛用于泛化新的、前所未见的恶意软件。然而，事实证明，机器学习模型可以通过欺骗分类器返回错误的标签来欺骗。例如，这些研究通常依赖于对基于梯度的攻击很脆弱的预测分数。在更现实的情况下，攻击者几乎没有关于恶意软件检测引擎输出的信息，因此可以实现适度的逃避率。在本文中，我们提出了一种使用 DQN 和 REINFORCE 算法的强化学习来挑战两个最先进的基于 ML 的检测引擎 (MalConv & EMBER) 和一个被 Gartner 列为领先 AV 的商业 AV。我们的方法结合了多个操作，修改 Windows 可移植执行 (PE) 文件而不破坏其功能。我们的方法还可以识别哪些操作执行得更好，并编制详细的漏洞报告以帮助减少规避行为。我们证明，即使在可用信息有限的商业自动驾驶汽车上，REINFORCE 也能实现非常好的逃避率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于强化学习的恶意软件规避方法MERLIN，通过修改Windows PE文件实现对主流检测系统的有效对抗。
AI.motivation: 现有机器学习检测模型易受对抗样本攻击，且在攻击者信息有限的现实场景中，传统方法的规避效果有限。
AI.method: 结合DQN和REINFORCE强化学习算法，通过修改PE文件特征实现规避，并生成漏洞分析报告辅助防御。
AI.result: REINFORCE算法在商业杀毒软件（Gartner领导者）上达到较高规避率，验证了方法在信息受限场景下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 强化学习为恶意软件规避提供了新思路，既能提升攻击成功率，又能通过漏洞分析促进检测系统改进。

authors_text: Qunjie Zhou,Sérgio Agostinho,Aljosa Osep,Laura Leal-Taixé
title: Is Geometry Enough for Matching in Visual Localization?
title_zh: 几何形状足以进行视觉定位匹配吗？
abstract: In this paper, we propose to go beyond the well-established approach to vision-based localization that relies on visual descriptor matching between a query image and a 3D point cloud. While matching keypoints via visual descriptors makes localization highly accurate, it has significant storage demands, raises privacy concerns and requires update to the descriptors in the long-term. To elegantly address those practical challenges for large-scale localization, we present GoMatch, an alternative to visual-based matching that solely relies on geometric information for matching image keypoints to maps, represented as sets of bearing vectors. Our novel bearing vectors representation of 3D points, significantly relieves the cross-modal challenge in geometric-based matching that prevented prior work to tackle localization in a realistic environment. With additional careful architecture design, GoMatch improves over prior geometric-based matching work with a reduction of (10.67m,95.7deg) and (1.43m, 34.7deg) in average median pose errors on Cambridge Landmarks and 7-Scenes, while requiring as little as 1.5/1.7% of storage capacity in comparison to the best visual-based matching methods. This confirms its potential and feasibility for real-world localization and opens the door to future efforts in advancing city-scale visual localization methods that do not require storing visual descriptors.
summary: In this paper, we propose to go beyond the well-established approach to vision-based localization that relies on visual descriptor matching between a query image and a 3D point cloud. While matching keypoints via visual descriptors makes localization highly accurate, it has significant storage demands, raises privacy concerns and requires update to the descriptors in the long-term. To elegantly address those practical challenges for large-scale localization, we present GoMatch, an alternative to visual-based matching that solely relies on geometric information for matching image keypoints to maps, represented as sets of bearing vectors. Our novel bearing vectors representation of 3D points, significantly relieves the cross-modal challenge in geometric-based matching that prevented prior work to tackle localization in a realistic environment. With additional careful architecture design, GoMatch improves over prior geometric-based matching work with a reduction of (10.67m,95.7deg) and (1.43m, 34.7deg) in average median pose errors on Cambridge Landmarks and 7-Scenes, while requiring as little as 1.5/1.7% of storage capacity in comparison to the best visual-based matching methods. This confirms its potential and feasibility for real-world localization and opens the door to future efforts in advancing city-scale visual localization methods that do not require storing visual descriptors.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们建议超越基于视觉的定位的成熟方法，该方法依赖于查询图像和 3D 点云之间的视觉描述符匹配。虽然通过视觉描述符匹配关键点可以使定位高度准确，但它具有巨大的存储需求，引发隐私问题，并且需要长期更新描述符。为了优雅地解决大规模定位的这些实际挑战，我们提出了 GoMatch，这是基于视觉的匹配的替代方案，它仅依赖于几何信息来将图像关键点与地图（表示为方位矢量集）进行匹配。我们新颖的 3D 点方位向量表示，显着缓解了基于几何的匹配中的跨模式挑战，该挑战阻碍了之前在现实环境中解决定位问题的工作。通过额外仔细的架构设计，GoMatch 改进了之前基于几何的匹配工作，在剑桥地标和 7 个场景上的平均中位姿势误差减少了 (10.67m,95.7deg) 和 (1.43m,34.7deg)，同时与最佳的基于视觉的匹配方法相比，需要的存储容量低至 1.5/1.7%。这证实了其在现实世界定位中的潜力和可行性，并为未来推进不需要存储视觉描述符的城市规模视觉定位方法打开了大门。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于几何信息而非视觉描述符的视觉定位匹配方法GoMatch，以解决大规模定位中的存储、隐私和更新问题。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉定位依赖视觉描述符匹配，但存在存储需求大、隐私问题及长期更新困难等实际挑战，需寻找替代方案。
AI.method: 通过将3D点表示为方位向量集，提出GoMatch方法，仅利用几何信息进行图像关键点与地图的匹配，并优化架构设计以提升性能。
AI.result: 在Cambridge Landmarks和7-Scenes数据集上，GoMatch的中位姿态误差分别降低(10.67m,95.7deg)和(1.43m,34.7deg)，存储需求仅为最佳视觉方法的1.5/1.7%。
AI.conclusion: GoMatch验证了几何信息用于真实场景定位的可行性，为未来无需存储视觉描述符的城市级定位方法提供了新方向。

While matching keypoints via visual descriptors makes localization highly accurate, it has significant storage demands, raises privacy concerns and requires update to the descriptors in the long-term. To elegantly address those practical challenges for large-scale localization, we present GoMatch, an alternative to visual-based matching that solely relies on geometric information for matching image keypoints to maps, represented as sets of bearing vectors. Our novel bearing vectors representation of 3D points, significantly relieves the cross-modal challenge in geometric-based matching that prevented prior work to tackle localization in a realistic environment. With additional careful architecture design, GoMatch improves over prior geometric-based matching work with a reduction of (10.67m,95.7deg) and (1.43m, 34.7deg) in average median pose errors on Cambridge Landmarks and 7-Scenes, while requiring as little as 1.5/1.7% of storage capacity in comparison to the best visual-based matching methods. This confirms its potential and feasibility for real-world localization and opens the door to future efforts in advancing city-scale visual localization methods that do not require storing visual descriptors. 在本文中，我们建议超越基于视觉的定位的成熟方法，该方法依赖于查询图像和 3D 点云之间的视觉描述符匹配。虽然通过视觉描述符匹配关键点可以使定位高度准确，但它具有巨大的存储需求，引发隐私问题，并且需要长期更新描述符。为了优雅地解决大规模定位的这些实际挑战，我们提出了 GoMatch，这是基于视觉的匹配的替代方案，它仅依赖于几何信息来将图像关键点与地图（表示为方位矢量集）进行匹配。我们新颖的 3D 点方位向量表示，显着缓解了基于几何的匹配中的跨模式挑战，该挑战阻碍了之前在现实环境中解决定位问题的工作。通过额外仔细的架构设计，GoMatch 改进了之前基于几何的匹配工作，在剑桥地标和 7 个场景上的平均中位姿势误差减少了 (10.67m,95.7deg) 和 (1.43m,34.7deg)，同时与最佳的基于视觉的匹配方法相比，需要的存储容量低至 1.5/1.7%。这证实了其在现实世界定位中的潜力和可行性，并为未来推进不需要存储视觉描述符的城市规模视觉定位方法打开了大门。 本文提出了一种基于几何信息而非视觉描述符的视觉定位匹配方法GoMatch，以解决大规模定位中的存储、隐私和更新问题。 Qunjie Zhou,Sérgio Agostinho,Aljosa Osep,Laura Leal-Taixé cs.CV

authors_text: Onur Can Koyun,Reyhan Kevser Keser,İbrahim Batuhan Akkaya,Behçet Uğur Töreyin
title: Focus-and-Detect: A Small Object Detection Framework for Aerial Images
title_zh: 聚焦和检测：航空图像的小物体检测框架
abstract: Despite recent advances, object detection in aerial images is still a challenging task. Specific problems in aerial images makes the detection problem harder, such as small objects, densely packed objects, objects in different sizes and with different orientations. To address small object detection problem, we propose a two-stage object detection framework called "Focus-and-Detect". The first stage which consists of an object detector network supervised by a Gaussian Mixture Model, generates clusters of objects constituting the focused regions. The second stage, which is also an object detector network, predicts objects within the focal regions. Incomplete Box Suppression (IBS) method is also proposed to overcome the truncation effect of region search approach. Results indicate that the proposed two-stage framework achieves an AP score of 42.06 on VisDrone validation dataset, surpassing all other state-of-the-art small object detection methods reported in the literature, to the best of authors' knowledge.
summary: Despite recent advances, object detection in aerial images is still a challenging task. Specific problems in aerial images makes the detection problem harder, such as small objects, densely packed objects, objects in different sizes and with different orientations. To address small object detection problem, we propose a two-stage object detection framework called "Focus-and-Detect". The first stage which consists of an object detector network supervised by a Gaussian Mixture Model, generates clusters of objects constituting the focused regions. The second stage, which is also an object detector network, predicts objects within the focal regions. Incomplete Box Suppression (IBS) method is also proposed to overcome the truncation effect of region search approach. Results indicate that the proposed two-stage framework achieves an AP score of 42.06 on VisDrone validation dataset, surpassing all other state-of-the-art small object detection methods reported in the literature, to the best of authors' knowledge.
abstract_zh: 尽管最近取得了进展，航空图像中的目标检测仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务。航空图像中的特定问题使得检测问题变得更加困难，例如小物体、密集物体、不同尺寸和不同方向的物体。为了解决小物体检测问题，我们提出了一种称为“焦点和检测”的两阶段物体检测框架。第一阶段由由高斯混合模型监督的对象检测器网络组成，生成构成聚焦区域的对象簇。第二阶段也是一个对象检测器网络，预测焦点区域内的对象。还提出了不完全盒抑制（IBS）方法来克服区域搜索方法的截断效应。结果表明，据作者所知，所提出的两阶段框架在 VisDrone 验证数据集上取得了 42.06 的 AP 分数，超过了文献中报道的所有其他最先进的小物体检测方法。

AI.motivation: 航拍图像中小物体检测面临物体尺寸小、密度高、尺度方向差异大等挑战，现有方法难以有效处理。

AI.result: 在VisDrone验证集上达到42.06的AP分数，优于现有所有小物体检测方法。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过聚焦机制和IBS方法有效提升了航拍图像中小物体检测的准确率，验证了方法的有效性。

search_text: Focus-and-Detect: A Small Object Detection Framework for Aerial Images 聚焦和检测：航空图像的小物体检测框架 Despite recent advances, object detection in aerial images is still a challenging task. Specific problems in aerial images makes the detection problem harder, such as small objects, densely packed objects, objects in different sizes and with different orientations. To address small object detection problem, we propose a two-stage object detection framework called "Focus-and-Detect". The first stage which consists of an object detector network supervised by a Gaussian Mixture Model, generates clusters of objects constituting the focused regions. The second stage, which is also an object detector network, predicts objects within the focal regions. Incomplete Box Suppression (IBS) method is also proposed to overcome the truncation effect of region search approach. Results indicate that the proposed two-stage framework achieves an AP score of 42.06 on VisDrone validation dataset, surpassing all other state-of-the-art small object detection methods reported in the literature, to the best of authors' knowledge. 尽管最近取得了进展，航空图像中的目标检测仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务。航空图像中的特定问题使得检测问题变得更加困难，例如小物体、密集物体、不同尺寸和不同方向的物体。为了解决小物体检测问题，我们提出了一种称为“焦点和检测”的两阶段物体检测框架。第一阶段由由高斯混合模型监督的对象检测器网络组成，生成构成聚焦区域的对象簇。第二阶段也是一个对象检测器网络，预测焦点区域内的对象。还提出了不完全盒抑制（IBS）方法来克服区域搜索方法的截断效应。结果表明，据作者所知，所提出的两阶段框架在 VisDrone 验证数据集上取得了 42.06 的 AP 分数，超过了文献中报道的所有其他最先进的小物体检测方法。 本文提出一种针对航拍图像中小物体检测的两阶段框架Focus-and-Detect。 Onur Can Koyun,Reyhan Kevser Keser,İbrahim Batuhan Akkaya,Behçet Uğur Töreyin cs.CV,cs.AI

authors: Wil M. P. van der Aalst
authors_json: Wil M. P. van der Aalst
authors_text: Gyunam Park,Marco Comuzzi,Wil M. P. van der Aalst
title: Analyzing Process-Aware Information System Updates Using Digital Twins of Organizations
title_zh: 使用组织的数字孪生分析流程感知信息系统更新
abstract: Digital transformation often entails small-scale changes to information systems supporting the execution of business processes. These changes may increase the operational frictions in process execution, which decreases the process performance. The contributions in the literature providing support to the tracking and impact analysis of small-scale changes are limited in scope and functionality. In this paper, we use the recently developed Digital Twins of Organizations (DTOs) to assess the impact of (process-aware) information systems updates. More in detail, we model the updates using the configuration of DTOs and quantitatively assess different types of impacts of information system updates (structural, operational, and performance-related). We implemented a prototype of the proposed approach. Moreover, we discuss a case study involving a standard ERP procure-to-pay business process.
summary: Digital transformation often entails small-scale changes to information systems supporting the execution of business processes. These changes may increase the operational frictions in process execution, which decreases the process performance. The contributions in the literature providing support to the tracking and impact analysis of small-scale changes are limited in scope and functionality. In this paper, we use the recently developed Digital Twins of Organizations (DTOs) to assess the impact of (process-aware) information systems updates. More in detail, we model the updates using the configuration of DTOs and quantitatively assess different types of impacts of information system updates (structural, operational, and performance-related). We implemented a prototype of the proposed approach. Moreover, we discuss a case study involving a standard ERP procure-to-pay business process.
abstract_zh: 数字化转型通常需要对支持业务流程执行的信息系统进行小规模更改。这些变化可能会增加流程执行中的操作摩擦，从而降低流程性能。为小规模变更的跟踪和影响分析提供支持的文献中的贡献在范围和功能上受到限制。在本文中，我们使用最近开发的组织数字孪生 (DTO) 来评估（流程感知）信息系统更新的影响。更详细地说，我们使用 DTO 的配置对更新进行建模，并定量评估信息系统更新的不同类型的影响（结构、操作和性能相关）。我们实现了所提出方法的原型。此外，我们还讨论了一个涉及标准 ERP 采购到付款业务流程的案例研究。

AI.tldr: 利用数字孪生组织评估流程感知信息系统更新的影响
AI.motivation: 现有研究对信息系统小规模变更的跟踪与影响分析支持不足，需更全面的评估方法
AI.method: 基于DTOs配置建模系统更新，定量分析结构/操作/性能三类影响，开发原型并验证案例
AI.result: 实现评估原型，通过ERP采购流程案例验证方法有效性
AI.conclusion: DTOs方法可系统评估系统更新影响，为数字化转型提供决策支持

authors_text: Cheng Kevin Qu,Asem Wardak,Pulin Gong
title: Extended critical regimes of deep neural networks
title_zh: 深度神经网络的扩展关键机制
abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs) have been successfully applied to many real-world problems, but a complete understanding of their dynamical and computational principles is still lacking. Conventional theoretical frameworks for analysing DNNs often assume random networks with coupling weights obeying Gaussian statistics. However, non-Gaussian, heavy-tailed coupling is a ubiquitous phenomenon in DNNs. Here, by weaving together theories of heavy-tailed random matrices and non-equilibrium statistical physics, we develop a new type of mean field theory for DNNs which predicts that heavy-tailed weights enable the emergence of an extended critical regime without fine-tuning parameters. In this extended critical regime, DNNs exhibit rich and complex propagation dynamics across layers. We further elucidate that the extended criticality endows DNNs with profound computational advantages: balancing the contraction as well as expansion of internal neural representations and speeding up training processes, hence providing a theoretical guide for the design of efficient neural architectures.
summary: Deep neural networks (DNNs) have been successfully applied to many real-world problems, but a complete understanding of their dynamical and computational principles is still lacking. Conventional theoretical frameworks for analysing DNNs often assume random networks with coupling weights obeying Gaussian statistics. However, non-Gaussian, heavy-tailed coupling is a ubiquitous phenomenon in DNNs. Here, by weaving together theories of heavy-tailed random matrices and non-equilibrium statistical physics, we develop a new type of mean field theory for DNNs which predicts that heavy-tailed weights enable the emergence of an extended critical regime without fine-tuning parameters. In this extended critical regime, DNNs exhibit rich and complex propagation dynamics across layers. We further elucidate that the extended criticality endows DNNs with profound computational advantages: balancing the contraction as well as expansion of internal neural representations and speeding up training processes, hence providing a theoretical guide for the design of efficient neural architectures.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络（DNN）已成功应用于许多现实世界的问题，但仍缺乏对其动力学和计算原理的完整理解。分析 DNN 的传统理论框架通常假设随机网络的耦合权重服从高斯统计。然而，非高斯重尾耦合是 DNN 中普遍存在的现象。在这里，通过将重尾随机矩阵和非平衡统计物理理论编织在一起，我们开发了一种新型的 DNN 平均场理论，该理论预测重尾权重能够在无需微调参数的情况下出现扩展的临界状态。在这种扩展的临界状态下，DNN 表现出丰富而复杂的跨层传播动态。我们进一步阐明，扩展的关键性赋予 DNN 深刻的计算优势：平衡内部神经表示的收缩和扩展并加速训练过程，从而为高效神经架构的设计提供理论指导。

AI.tldr: 研究深度神经网络的扩展临界区域及其计算优势
AI.motivation: 传统理论假设DNN权重服从高斯分布，但实际中存在普遍的非高斯重尾耦合，需新理论解释其动态机制
AI.method: 结合重尾随机矩阵理论与非平衡统计物理，建立新的平均场理论分析DNNs
AI.result: 发现扩展临界区域，DNNs在此区域展现复杂传播动力学，具有平衡表示与加速训练的计算优势
AI.conclusion: 扩展临界性为高效神经网络架构设计提供理论依据

authors_text: Shaopeng Fu,Fengxiang He,Dacheng Tao
title: Knowledge Removal in Sampling-based Bayesian Inference
title_zh: 基于采样的贝叶斯推理中的知识去除
comment: In International Conference on Learning Representations, 2022
comments: In International Conference on Learning Representations, 2022
abstract: The right to be forgotten has been legislated in many countries, but its enforcement in the AI industry would cause unbearable costs. When single data deletion requests come, companies may need to delete the whole models learned with massive resources. Existing works propose methods to remove knowledge learned from data for explicitly parameterized models, which however are not appliable to the sampling-based Bayesian inference, i.e., Markov chain Monte Carlo (MCMC), as MCMC can only infer implicit distributions. In this paper, we propose the first machine unlearning algorithm for MCMC. We first convert the MCMC unlearning problem into an explicit optimization problem. Based on this problem conversion, an {\it MCMC influence function} is designed to provably characterize the learned knowledge from data, which then delivers the MCMC unlearning algorithm. Theoretical analysis shows that MCMC unlearning would not compromise the generalizability of the MCMC models. Experiments on Gaussian mixture models and Bayesian neural networks confirm the effectiveness of the proposed algorithm. The code is available at \url{https://github.com/fshp971/mcmc-unlearning}.
summary: The right to be forgotten has been legislated in many countries, but its enforcement in the AI industry would cause unbearable costs. When single data deletion requests come, companies may need to delete the whole models learned with massive resources. Existing works propose methods to remove knowledge learned from data for explicitly parameterized models, which however are not appliable to the sampling-based Bayesian inference, i.e., Markov chain Monte Carlo (MCMC), as MCMC can only infer implicit distributions. In this paper, we propose the first machine unlearning algorithm for MCMC. We first convert the MCMC unlearning problem into an explicit optimization problem. Based on this problem conversion, an {\it MCMC influence function} is designed to provably characterize the learned knowledge from data, which then delivers the MCMC unlearning algorithm. Theoretical analysis shows that MCMC unlearning would not compromise the generalizability of the MCMC models. Experiments on Gaussian mixture models and Bayesian neural networks confirm the effectiveness of the proposed algorithm. The code is available at \url{https://github.com/fshp971/mcmc-unlearning}.
abstract_zh: 被遗忘权在很多国家已经立法，但在人工智能行业强制执行会带来难以承受的成本。当单个数据删除请求到来时，企业可能需要删除使用海量资源学习到的整个模型。现有的工作提出了从显式参数化模型的数据中学习知识的方法，但不适用于基于采样的贝叶斯推理，即马尔可夫链蒙特卡罗（MCMC），因为 MCMC 只能推断隐式分布。在本文中，我们提出了第一个 MCMC 机器取消学习算法。我们首先将 MCMC 失学习问题转化为显式优化问题。基于此问题转换，设计了一个{\it MCMC影响函数}来可证明地表征从数据中学到的知识，然后提供MCMC取消学习算法。理论分析表明，MCMC 遗忘不会损害 MCMC 模型的通用性。高斯混合模型和贝叶斯神经网络的实验证实了该算法的有效性。该代码可在 \url{https://github.com/fshp971/mcmc-unlearning} 获取。

AI.motivation: 《被遗忘权》立法要求AI行业删除数据，但现有方法无法处理MCMC等隐式分布模型，导致删除成本过高。
AI.method: 将MCMC遗忘问题转化为显式优化问题，设计MCMC影响函数量化数据知识，提出可证明的遗忘算法。
AI.result: 在高斯混合模型和贝叶斯神经网络实验中验证算法有效性，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该算法在保证MCMC模型泛化能力的同时，实现了针对采样推断模型的知识移除。

search_text: Knowledge Removal in Sampling-based Bayesian Inference 基于采样的贝叶斯推理中的知识去除 The right to be forgotten has been legislated in many countries, but its enforcement in the AI industry would cause unbearable costs. When single data deletion requests come, companies may need to delete the whole models learned with massive resources. Existing works propose methods to remove knowledge learned from data for explicitly parameterized models, which however are not appliable to the sampling-based Bayesian inference, i.e., Markov chain Monte Carlo (MCMC), as MCMC can only infer implicit distributions. In this paper, we propose the first machine unlearning algorithm for MCMC. We first convert the MCMC unlearning problem into an explicit optimization problem. Based on this problem conversion, an {\it MCMC influence function} is designed to provably characterize the learned knowledge from data, which then delivers the MCMC unlearning algorithm. Theoretical analysis shows that MCMC unlearning would not compromise the generalizability of the MCMC models. Experiments on Gaussian mixture models and Bayesian neural networks confirm the effectiveness of the proposed algorithm. The code is available at \url{https://github.com/fshp971/mcmc-unlearning}. 被遗忘权在很多国家已经立法，但在人工智能行业强制执行会带来难以承受的成本。当单个数据删除请求到来时，企业可能需要删除使用海量资源学习到的整个模型。现有的工作提出了从显式参数化模型的数据中学习知识的方法，但不适用于基于采样的贝叶斯推理，即马尔可夫链蒙特卡罗（MCMC），因为 MCMC 只能推断隐式分布。在本文中，我们提出了第一个 MCMC 机器取消学习算法。我们首先将 MCMC 失学习问题转化为显式优化问题。基于此问题转换，设计了一个{\it MCMC影响函数}来可证明地表征从数据中学到的知识，然后提供MCMC取消学习算法。理论分析表明，MCMC 遗忘不会损害 MCMC 模型的通用性。高斯混合模型和贝叶斯神经网络的实验证实了该算法的有效性。该代码可在 \url{https://github.com/fshp971/mcmc-unlearning} 获取。 本文提出首个针对基于采样的贝叶斯推断（MCMC）的机器遗忘算法，解决数据删除请求下的知识移除问题。 Shaopeng Fu,Fengxiang He,Dacheng Tao cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

authors_text: Adam J. Hepworth,Daniel P. Baxter,Hussein A. Abbass
title: Onto4MAT: A Swarm Shepherding Ontology for Generalised Multi-Agent Teaming
title_zh: Onto4MAT：用于广义多智能体团队的群体牧养本体
abstract: Research in multi-agent teaming has increased substantially over recent years, with knowledge-based systems to support teaming processes typically focused on delivering functional (communicative) solutions for a team to act meaningfully in response to direction. Enabling humans to effectively interact and team with a swarm of autonomous cognitive agents is an open research challenge in Human-Swarm Teaming research, partially due to the focus on developing the enabling architectures to support these systems. Typically, bi-directional transparency and shared semantic understanding between agents has not prioritised a designed mechanism in Human-Swarm Teaming, potentially limiting how a human and a swarm team can share understanding and information\textemdash data through concepts and contexts\textemdash to achieve a goal. To address this, we provide a formal knowledge representation design that enables the swarm Artificial Intelligence to reason about its environment and system, ultimately achieving a shared goal. We propose the Ontology for Generalised Multi-Agent Teaming, Onto4MAT, to enable more effective teaming between humans and teams through the biologically-inspired approach of shepherding.
summary: Research in multi-agent teaming has increased substantially over recent years, with knowledge-based systems to support teaming processes typically focused on delivering functional (communicative) solutions for a team to act meaningfully in response to direction. Enabling humans to effectively interact and team with a swarm of autonomous cognitive agents is an open research challenge in Human-Swarm Teaming research, partially due to the focus on developing the enabling architectures to support these systems. Typically, bi-directional transparency and shared semantic understanding between agents has not prioritised a designed mechanism in Human-Swarm Teaming, potentially limiting how a human and a swarm team can share understanding and information\textemdash data through concepts and contexts\textemdash to achieve a goal. To address this, we provide a formal knowledge representation design that enables the swarm Artificial Intelligence to reason about its environment and system, ultimately achieving a shared goal. We propose the Ontology for Generalised Multi-Agent Teaming, Onto4MAT, to enable more effective teaming between humans and teams through the biologically-inspired approach of shepherding.
abstract_zh: 近年来，多智能体团队的研究大幅增加，支持团队流程的基于知识的系统通常专注于为团队提供功能性（沟通性）解决方案，以便根据指示采取有意义的行动。使人类能够与一群自主认知智能体进行有效的交互和团队合作是人类群体团队研究中的一个开放性研究挑战，部分原因是专注于开发支持这些系统的支持架构。通常，代理之间的双向透明度和共享语义理解并没有优先考虑人类群体团队中设计的机制，这可能限制人类和群体团队如何通过概念和上下文\textemdash共享理解和信息\textemdash数据以实现目标。为了解决这个问题，我们提供了一种正式的知识表示设计，使群体人工智能能够对其环境和系统进行推理，最终实现共同的目标。我们提出了广义多智能体团队的本体论 Onto4MAT，以通过受生物学启发的引导方法在人类和团队之间实现更有效的团队合作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Onto4MAT的本体论，旨在通过生物启发的shepherding方法促进人类与自主智能体群体的有效协作。
AI.motivation: 当前多智能体团队协作研究缺乏双向透明度和共享语义理解机制，限制了人类与自主群体间的有效协作。
AI.method: 设计基于生物学启发的shepherding机制的本体论Onto4MAT，使AI系统能通过概念与上下文推理实现环境与系统的协同理解。
AI.result: Onto4MAT通过形式化知识表示增强了人类与智能体群体间的共享理解能力，为实现共同目标提供了有效协作框架。
AI.conclusion: Onto4MAT为人类-群体协作提供了理论支持，强调共享语义理解的重要性，并为后续研究奠定了基础。

authors_text: Rei Okumura,Ismail Arai,Atarashi Yutaro,Kawabata Kaoru,Kazutoshi Fujikawa
title: Feasibility Study of Magnetism-based Indoor Positioning Methods in an Incineration Plant
title_zh: 焚烧厂磁室内定位方法的可行性研究
abstract: In an incineration plant, remote operation from a centralized control room is now possible, but inspection and cleaning of equipment still require a worker to visit the site. When the plant owner reduces the number of workers due to operation costs, it will be standard for a single worker to visit the site. Therefore, it is necessary to monitor the location of workers in real-time to detect unexpected human accidents quickly. Conventional methods use radio waves, such as Wi-Fi and Bluetooth, but there is little demand for communication equipment in the incineration plant. However, there is not enough demand for communication facilities in the incineration plant. It is too large to bear the cost of installing wireless access points, and Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) beacons just for positioning. Therefore, we are focusing on magnetism using for indoor positioning method. In addition, the incineration plant has a lot of types of equipment that contains a wide range of magnetized metals, large motors, and generators. We could observe the magnetic peculiarity at each point. Based on these assumptions, we have developed a new indoor positioning method at the incineration plant. This paper describes the development of an indoor positioning system for an incineration plant. And we propose three methods for fingerprinting matching: Point matching, Path matching, and DTW matching. The average positioning errors of these methods are 6.89 m, 0.05 m, and 0.06 m, respectively.

abstract_zh: 在焚烧厂中，现在可以从集中控制室进行远程操作，但设备的检查和清洁仍然需要工人亲临现场。当工厂主因运营成本而减少工人数量时，一名工人到现场将成为标准。因此，有必要对作业人员的位置进行实时监控，以快速发现突发的人为事故。传统方法使用无线电波，例如Wi-Fi和蓝牙，但焚烧厂对通信设备的需求很少。然而，焚烧厂内对通讯设施的需求还不够。它太大了，无法承担安装无线接入点和仅用于定位的蓝牙低功耗（BLE）信标的成本。因此，我们重点关注磁力用于室内定位的方法。此外，焚烧厂的设备种类很多，包含各种磁化金属、大型电机、发电机等。我们可以观察到每个点的磁特性。基于这些假设，我们在焚烧厂开发了一种新的室内定位方法。本文介绍了焚烧厂室内定位系统的开发。我们提出了三种指纹匹配方法：点匹配、路径匹配和DTW匹配。这些方法的平均定位误差分别为6.89 m、0.05 m和0.06 m。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于磁性的垃圾焚烧厂室内定位系统，并开发了三种指纹匹配方法。
AI.motivation: 垃圾焚烧厂需实时监控单人作业人员位置以保障安全，但传统无线通信技术因成本高且设备不足难以应用，而厂内大量磁性金属设备为磁定位提供了条件。
AI.method: 利用设备磁特性构建指纹数据库，提出点匹配、路径匹配和DTW匹配三种算法进行定位。
AI.result: 三种方法平均定位误差分别为6.89米、0.05米和0.06米，其中DTW匹配精度最高。
AI.conclusion: 磁定位方法在焚烧厂场景下可行，DTW匹配算法能有效提升定位精度。

conclusion: 磁定位方法在焚烧厂场景下可行，DTW匹配算法能有效提升定位精度。
search_text: Feasibility Study of Magnetism-based Indoor Positioning Methods in an Incineration Plant 焚烧厂磁室内定位方法的可行性研究 In an incineration plant, remote operation from a centralized control room is now possible, but inspection and cleaning of equipment still require a worker to visit the site. When the plant owner reduces the number of workers due to operation costs, it will be standard for a single worker to visit the site. Therefore, it is necessary to monitor the location of workers in real-time to detect unexpected human accidents quickly. Conventional methods use radio waves, such as Wi-Fi and Bluetooth, but there is little demand for communication equipment in the incineration plant. However, there is not enough demand for communication facilities in the incineration plant. It is too large to bear the cost of installing wireless access points, and Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) beacons just for positioning. Therefore, we are focusing on magnetism using for indoor positioning method. In addition, the incineration plant has a lot of types of equipment that contains a wide range of magnetized metals, large motors, and generators. We could observe the magnetic peculiarity at each point. Based on these assumptions, we have developed a new indoor positioning method at the incineration plant. This paper describes the development of an indoor positioning system for an incineration plant. And we propose three methods for fingerprinting matching: Point matching, Path matching, and DTW matching. The average positioning errors of these methods are 6.89 m, 0.05 m, and 0.06 m, respectively. 在焚烧厂中，现在可以从集中控制室进行远程操作，但设备的检查和清洁仍然需要工人亲临现场。当工厂主因运营成本而减少工人数量时，一名工人到现场将成为标准。因此，有必要对作业人员的位置进行实时监控，以快速发现突发的人为事故。传统方法使用无线电波，例如Wi-Fi和蓝牙，但焚烧厂对通信设备的需求很少。然而，焚烧厂内对通讯设施的需求还不够。它太大了，无法承担安装无线接入点和仅用于定位的蓝牙低功耗（BLE）信标的成本。因此，我们重点关注磁力用于室内定位的方法。此外，焚烧厂的设备种类很多，包含各种磁化金属、大型电机、发电机等。我们可以观察到每个点的磁特性。基于这些假设，我们在焚烧厂开发了一种新的室内定位方法。本文介绍了焚烧厂室内定位系统的开发。我们提出了三种指纹匹配方法：点匹配、路径匹配和DTW匹配。这些方法的平均定位误差分别为6.89 m、0.05 m和0.06 m。 本文提出了一种基于磁性的垃圾焚烧厂室内定位系统，并开发了三种指纹匹配方法。 Rei Okumura,Ismail Arai,Atarashi Yutaro,Kawabata Kaoru,Kazutoshi Fujikawa cs.RO

authors_text: Jie Wang,Zhanqiu Zhang,Zhihao Shi,Jianyu Cai,Shuiwang Ji,Feng Wu
title: Duality-Induced Regularizer for Semantic Matching Knowledge Graph Embeddings
title_zh: 用于语义匹配知识图嵌入的对偶诱导正则化器
comment: Accepted to TPAMI. This work is a journal extension of our NeurIPS'20 paper arXiv:2011.05816
comments: Accepted to TPAMI. This work is a journal extension of our NeurIPS'20 paper arXiv:2011.05816
abstract: Semantic matching models -- which assume that entities with similar semantics have similar embeddings -- have shown great power in knowledge graph embeddings (KGE). Many existing semantic matching models use inner products in embedding spaces to measure the plausibility of triples and quadruples in static and temporal knowledge graphs. However, vectors that have the same inner products with another vector can still be orthogonal to each other, which implies that entities with similar semantics may have dissimilar embeddings. This property of inner products significantly limits the performance of semantic matching models. To address this challenge, we propose a novel regularizer -- namely, DUality-induced RegulArizer (DURA) -- which effectively encourages the entities with similar semantics to have similar embeddings. The major novelty of DURA is based on the observation that, for an existing semantic matching KGE model (primal), there is often another distance based KGE model (dual) closely associated with it, which can be used as effective constraints for entity embeddings. Experiments demonstrate that DURA consistently and significantly improves the performance of state-of-the-art semantic matching models on both static and temporal knowledge graph benchmarks.
summary: Semantic matching models -- which assume that entities with similar semantics have similar embeddings -- have shown great power in knowledge graph embeddings (KGE). Many existing semantic matching models use inner products in embedding spaces to measure the plausibility of triples and quadruples in static and temporal knowledge graphs. However, vectors that have the same inner products with another vector can still be orthogonal to each other, which implies that entities with similar semantics may have dissimilar embeddings. This property of inner products significantly limits the performance of semantic matching models. To address this challenge, we propose a novel regularizer -- namely, DUality-induced RegulArizer (DURA) -- which effectively encourages the entities with similar semantics to have similar embeddings. The major novelty of DURA is based on the observation that, for an existing semantic matching KGE model (primal), there is often another distance based KGE model (dual) closely associated with it, which can be used as effective constraints for entity embeddings. Experiments demonstrate that DURA consistently and significantly improves the performance of state-of-the-art semantic matching models on both static and temporal knowledge graph benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 语义匹配模型（假设具有相似语义的实体具有相似的嵌入）在知识图嵌入（KGE）中表现出了强大的力量。许多现有的语义匹配模型使用嵌入空间中的内积来测量静态和时间知识图中三元组和四元组的合理性。然而，与另一个向量具有相同内积的向量仍然可以彼此正交，这意味着具有相似语义的实体可能具有不同的嵌入。内积的这一特性极大地限制了语义匹配模型的性能。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种新颖的正则化器——即 DUality-induced RegulArizer (DURA)——它有效地鼓励具有相似语义的实体具有相似的嵌入。 DURA 的主要新颖性是基于这样的观察：对于现有的语义匹配 KGE 模型（原始），通常存在另一个与其密切相关的基于距离的 KGE 模型（对偶），它可以用作实体嵌入的有效约束。实验表明，DURA 一致且显着地提高了最先进的语义匹配模型在静态和时态知识图基准上的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对偶性的正则化项DURA，用于改进语义匹配知识图谱嵌入模型。
AI.motivation: 现有语义匹配模型依赖内积衡量嵌入相似性，但内积无法保证语义相似实体的嵌入必然相似，导致模型性能受限。
AI.method: 设计DURA正则化项，通过关联原语义匹配模型与其对偶距离模型，利用对偶模型作为实体嵌入的约束条件。
AI.result: 实验表明DURA显著提升多类语义匹配模型在静态和时序知识图谱任务中的表现。
AI.conclusion: DURA通过引入对偶模型约束有效解决了语义匹配模型的嵌入相似性局限问题。

authors_text: Yuting Yang,Licheng Jiao,Xu Liu,Fang Liu,Shuyuan Yang,Zhixi Feng,Xu Tang
title: Transformers Meet Visual Learning Understanding: A Comprehensive Review
title_zh: 变形金刚满足视觉学习理解：全面回顾
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2010.11929, arXiv:1706.03762 by other authors
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2010.11929, arXiv:1706.03762 by other authors
abstract: Dynamic attention mechanism and global modeling ability make Transformer show strong feature learning ability. In recent years, Transformer has become comparable to CNNs methods in computer vision. This review mainly investigates the current research progress of Transformer in image and video applications, which makes a comprehensive overview of Transformer in visual learning understanding. First, the attention mechanism is reviewed, which plays an essential part in Transformer. And then, the visual Transformer model and the principle of each module are introduced. Thirdly, the existing Transformer-based models are investigated, and their performance is compared in visual learning understanding applications. Three image tasks and two video tasks of computer vision are investigated. The former mainly includes image classification, object detection, and image segmentation. The latter contains object tracking and video classification. It is significant for comparing different models' performance in various tasks on several public benchmark data sets. Finally, ten general problems are summarized, and the developing prospects of the visual Transformer are given in this review.
summary: Dynamic attention mechanism and global modeling ability make Transformer show strong feature learning ability. In recent years, Transformer has become comparable to CNNs methods in computer vision. This review mainly investigates the current research progress of Transformer in image and video applications, which makes a comprehensive overview of Transformer in visual learning understanding. First, the attention mechanism is reviewed, which plays an essential part in Transformer. And then, the visual Transformer model and the principle of each module are introduced. Thirdly, the existing Transformer-based models are investigated, and their performance is compared in visual learning understanding applications. Three image tasks and two video tasks of computer vision are investigated. The former mainly includes image classification, object detection, and image segmentation. The latter contains object tracking and video classification. It is significant for comparing different models' performance in various tasks on several public benchmark data sets. Finally, ten general problems are summarized, and the developing prospects of the visual Transformer are given in this review.
abstract_zh: 动态注意力机制和全局建模能力使Transformer表现出强大的特征学习能力。近年来，Transformer 已成为计算机视觉领域与 CNN 方法相媲美的方法。本综述主要考察了目前Transformer在图像和视频应用中的研究进展，对Transformer在视觉学习理解方面做出了全面的概述。首先，回顾一下注意力机制，它在 Transformer 中起着至关重要的作用。然后介绍了可视化Transformer模型以及各模块的原理。第三，研究了现有的基于 Transformer 的模型，并比较了它们在视觉学习理解应用中的性能。研究了计算机视觉的三个图像任务和两个视频任务。前者主要包括图像分类、目标检测和图像分割。后者包含对象跟踪和视频分类。这对于在多个公共基准数据集上比较不同模型在各种任务中的性能具有重要意义。最后总结了十个普遍问题，并对视觉Transformer的发展前景进行了展望。

AI.tldr: 本文全面回顾了Transformer在视觉学习理解中的研究进展，涵盖图像和视频任务的模型结构、性能比较及未来方向。
AI.motivation: Transformer因动态注意力机制和全局建模能力，在视觉任务中表现出与CNN相当的性能，需系统总结其应用现状与挑战。
AI.method: 通过分析注意力机制原理，介绍视觉Transformer模型结构，比较不同模型在图像分类、目标检测、视频分类等任务中的表现，并总结共性问题。
AI.result: Transformer在多个视觉任务中取得优异性能，但存在计算成本高、数据依赖性强等问题，需进一步优化。
AI.conclusion: Transformer为视觉学习提供新思路，未来需在效率提升、小样本适应性及跨模态扩展等方面深入研究。

authors_text: Yuxiang Wu,Matt Gardner,Pontus Stenetorp,Pradeep Dasigi
title: Generating Data to Mitigate Spurious Correlations in Natural Language Inference Datasets
title_zh: 生成数据以减轻自然语言推理数据集中的虚假相关性
abstract: Natural language processing models often exploit spurious correlations between task-independent features and labels in datasets to perform well only within the distributions they are trained on, while not generalising to different task distributions. We propose to tackle this problem by generating a debiased version of a dataset, which can then be used to train a debiased, off-the-shelf model, by simply replacing its training data. Our approach consists of 1) a method for training data generators to generate high-quality, label-consistent data samples; and 2) a filtering mechanism for removing data points that contribute to spurious correlations, measured in terms of z-statistics. We generate debiased versions of the SNLI and MNLI datasets, and we evaluate on a large suite of debiased, out-of-distribution, and adversarial test sets. Results show that models trained on our debiased datasets generalise better than those trained on the original datasets in all settings. On the majority of the datasets, our method outperforms or performs comparably to previous state-of-the-art debiasing strategies, and when combined with an orthogonal technique, product-of-experts, it improves further and outperforms previous best results of SNLI-hard and MNLI-hard.
summary: Natural language processing models often exploit spurious correlations between task-independent features and labels in datasets to perform well only within the distributions they are trained on, while not generalising to different task distributions. We propose to tackle this problem by generating a debiased version of a dataset, which can then be used to train a debiased, off-the-shelf model, by simply replacing its training data. Our approach consists of 1) a method for training data generators to generate high-quality, label-consistent data samples; and 2) a filtering mechanism for removing data points that contribute to spurious correlations, measured in terms of z-statistics. We generate debiased versions of the SNLI and MNLI datasets, and we evaluate on a large suite of debiased, out-of-distribution, and adversarial test sets. Results show that models trained on our debiased datasets generalise better than those trained on the original datasets in all settings. On the majority of the datasets, our method outperforms or performs comparably to previous state-of-the-art debiasing strategies, and when combined with an orthogonal technique, product-of-experts, it improves further and outperforms previous best results of SNLI-hard and MNLI-hard.
abstract_zh: 自然语言处理模型通常利用数据集中与任务无关的特征和标签之间的虚假相关性，仅在它们所训练的分布内表现良好，而不能推广到不同的任务分布。我们建议通过生成数据集的去偏版本来解决这个问题，然后只需替换其训练数据即可将其用于训练去偏的现成模型。我们的方法包括：1）训练数据生成器生成高质量、标签一致的数据样本的方法； 2) 一种过滤机制，用于删除导致虚假相关性的数据点，以 z 统计量来衡量。我们生成 SNLI 和 MNLI 数据集的去偏版本，并对大量去偏、分布外和对抗性测试集进行评估。结果表明，在所有设置中，在我们的去偏数据集上训练的模型比在原始数据集上训练的模型具有更好的泛化能力。在大多数数据集上，我们的方法优于或与以前最先进的去偏策略相当，并且当与正交技术、专家产品相结合时，它进一步改进并优于 SNLI-hard 和 MNLI-hard 以前的最佳结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过生成去偏数据集来缓解自然语言推理任务中的虚假相关性问题，以提升模型在不同分布下的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有模型依赖数据集中的任务无关特征与标签的虚假相关性，导致在训练分布外表现不佳。需通过去偏数据集训练更鲁棒的模型。
AI.method: 1) 训练数据生成器生成高质量、标签一致的样本；2) 基于z统计量过滤贡献虚假相关性的数据点，生成去偏版SNLI和MNLI数据集。
AI.result: 去偏数据集训练的模型在分布外和对抗测试集上表现优于原始数据集，多数情况下超越或匹敌现有最优去偏方法，结合product-of-experts技术后效果进一步提升。
AI.conclusion: 生成去偏数据集能有效缓解虚假相关性问题，提升模型泛化能力，且与正交技术结合可取得更优结果。

search_text: Generating Data to Mitigate Spurious Correlations in Natural Language Inference Datasets 生成数据以减轻自然语言推理数据集中的虚假相关性 Natural language processing models often exploit spurious correlations between task-independent features and labels in datasets to perform well only within the distributions they are trained on, while not generalising to different task distributions. We propose to tackle this problem by generating a debiased version of a dataset, which can then be used to train a debiased, off-the-shelf model, by simply replacing its training data. Our approach consists of 1) a method for training data generators to generate high-quality, label-consistent data samples; and 2) a filtering mechanism for removing data points that contribute to spurious correlations, measured in terms of z-statistics. We generate debiased versions of the SNLI and MNLI datasets, and we evaluate on a large suite of debiased, out-of-distribution, and adversarial test sets. Results show that models trained on our debiased datasets generalise better than those trained on the original datasets in all settings. On the majority of the datasets, our method outperforms or performs comparably to previous state-of-the-art debiasing strategies, and when combined with an orthogonal technique, product-of-experts, it improves further and outperforms previous best results of SNLI-hard and MNLI-hard. 自然语言处理模型通常利用数据集中与任务无关的特征和标签之间的虚假相关性，仅在它们所训练的分布内表现良好，而不能推广到不同的任务分布。我们建议通过生成数据集的去偏版本来解决这个问题，然后只需替换其训练数据即可将其用于训练去偏的现成模型。我们的方法包括：1）训练数据生成器生成高质量、标签一致的数据样本的方法； 2) 一种过滤机制，用于删除导致虚假相关性的数据点，以 z 统计量来衡量。我们生成 SNLI 和 MNLI 数据集的去偏版本，并对大量去偏、分布外和对抗性测试集进行评估。结果表明，在所有设置中，在我们的去偏数据集上训练的模型比在原始数据集上训练的模型具有更好的泛化能力。在大多数数据集上，我们的方法优于或与以前最先进的去偏策略相当，并且当与正交技术、专家产品相结合时，它进一步改进并优于 SNLI-hard 和 MNLI-hard 以前的最佳结果。 本文提出通过生成去偏数据集来缓解自然语言推理任务中的虚假相关性问题，以提升模型在不同分布下的泛化能力。 Yuxiang Wu,Matt Gardner,Pontus Stenetorp,Pradeep Dasigi cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.CY

authors_text: Seong-Hwan Heo,WonKee Lee,Jong-Hyeok Lee
title: mcBERT: Momentum Contrastive Learning with BERT for Zero-Shot Slot Filling
title_zh: mcBERT：使用 BERT 进行动量对比学习，实现零样本槽填充
abstract: Zero-shot slot filling has received considerable attention to cope with the problem of limited available data for the target domain. One of the important factors in zero-shot learning is to make the model learn generalized and reliable representations. For this purpose, we present mcBERT, which stands for momentum contrastive learning with BERT, to develop a robust zero-shot slot filling model. mcBERT uses BERT to initialize the two encoders, the query encoder and key encoder, and is trained by applying momentum contrastive learning. Our experimental results on the SNIPS benchmark show that mcBERT substantially outperforms the previous models, recording a new state-of-the-art. Besides, we also show that each component composing mcBERT contributes to the performance improvement.
summary: Zero-shot slot filling has received considerable attention to cope with the problem of limited available data for the target domain. One of the important factors in zero-shot learning is to make the model learn generalized and reliable representations. For this purpose, we present mcBERT, which stands for momentum contrastive learning with BERT, to develop a robust zero-shot slot filling model. mcBERT uses BERT to initialize the two encoders, the query encoder and key encoder, and is trained by applying momentum contrastive learning. Our experimental results on the SNIPS benchmark show that mcBERT substantially outperforms the previous models, recording a new state-of-the-art. Besides, we also show that each component composing mcBERT contributes to the performance improvement.
abstract_zh: 为了解决目标域可用数据有限的问题，零样本时隙填充受到了相当多的关注。零样本学习的重要因素之一是使模型学习广义且可靠的表示。为此，我们提出了 mcBERT，它代表与 BERT 的动量对比学习，以开发鲁棒的零样本槽填充模型。 mcBERT 使用 BERT 来初始化两个编码器：查询编码器和密钥编码器，并通过应用动量对比学习进行训练。我们在 SNIPS 基准测试上的实验结果表明，mcBERT 大大优于之前的模型，创下了新的最先进水平。此外，我们还表明组成 mcBERT 的每个组件都有助于性能提升。

AI.tldr: 本文提出mcBERT模型，通过动量对比学习与BERT结合，解决零样本槽位填充任务中目标领域数据不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 零样本学习面临目标领域数据稀缺的挑战，需使模型学习到通用且可靠的表示。现有方法在表示学习上存在不足，需改进模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: 基于BERT初始化查询编码器和键编码器，采用动量对比学习框架进行训练，通过自监督对比损失优化表示学习。
AI.result: 在SNIPS基准测试中显著超越先前模型，达到新SOTA；实验验证各组件对性能提升均有贡献。
AI.conclusion: mcBERT通过动量对比学习与BERT结合，有效提升了零样本槽位填充的性能，证明了对比学习在跨领域表示学习中的有效性。

authors_text: Takaaki Saeki,Shinnosuke Takamichi,Tomohiko Nakamura,Naoko Tanji,Hiroshi Saruwatari
title: SelfRemaster: Self-Supervised Speech Restoration with Analysis-by-Synthesis Approach Using Channel Modeling
title_zh: SelfRemaster：使用通道建模通过综合分析方法进行自监督语音恢复
abstract: We present a self-supervised speech restoration method without paired speech corpora. Because the previous general speech restoration method uses artificial paired data created by applying various distortions to high-quality speech corpora, it cannot sufficiently represent acoustic distortions of real data, limiting the applicability. Our model consists of analysis, synthesis, and channel modules that simulate the recording process of degraded speech and is trained with real degraded speech data in a self-supervised manner. The analysis module extracts distortionless speech features and distortion features from degraded speech, while the synthesis module synthesizes the restored speech waveform, and the channel module adds distortions to the speech waveform. Our model also enables audio effect transfer, in which only acoustic distortions are extracted from degraded speech and added to arbitrary high-quality audio. Experimental evaluations with both simulated and real data show that our method achieves significantly higher-quality speech restoration than the previous supervised method, suggesting its applicability to real degraded speech materials.
summary: We present a self-supervised speech restoration method without paired speech corpora. Because the previous general speech restoration method uses artificial paired data created by applying various distortions to high-quality speech corpora, it cannot sufficiently represent acoustic distortions of real data, limiting the applicability. Our model consists of analysis, synthesis, and channel modules that simulate the recording process of degraded speech and is trained with real degraded speech data in a self-supervised manner. The analysis module extracts distortionless speech features and distortion features from degraded speech, while the synthesis module synthesizes the restored speech waveform, and the channel module adds distortions to the speech waveform. Our model also enables audio effect transfer, in which only acoustic distortions are extracted from degraded speech and added to arbitrary high-quality audio. Experimental evaluations with both simulated and real data show that our method achieves significantly higher-quality speech restoration than the previous supervised method, suggesting its applicability to real degraded speech materials.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种无需配对语音语料库的自监督语音恢复方法。由于之前的通用语音恢复方法使用通过对高质量语音语料库应用各种失真而创建的人工配对数据，因此它不能充分表示真实数据的声学失真，限制了适用性。我们的模型由分析、合成和通道模块组成，模拟退化语音的记录过程，并以自监督的方式使用真实的退化语音数据进行训练。分析模块从退化语音中提取无失真语音特征和失真特征，而合成模块合成恢复的语音波形，通道模块向语音波形添加失真。我们的模型还支持音频效果传输，其中仅从降级语音中提取声学失真并将其添加到任意高质量音频中。模拟和真实数据的实验评估表明，我们的方法比以前的监督方法实现了显着更高质量的语音恢复，这表明它适用于真实退化的语音材料。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需配对语音语料的自监督语音修复方法，通过分析-合成框架结合通道建模模拟真实降质过程。
AI.motivation: 传统语音修复方法依赖人工生成的配对数据，难以准确模拟真实声学失真，导致模型泛化能力受限。
AI.method: 构建包含分析、合成和通道模块的模型：分析模块提取无失真语音与失真特征，合成模块生成修复波形，通道模块模拟录音失真过程，通过真实降质数据自监督训练，并支持音频效果迁移。
AI.result: 在模拟和真实降质数据集上均显著优于传统监督方法，验证了模型对真实场景的适应性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法突破了传统配对数据依赖，为真实降质语音修复提供了有效解决方案，凸显自监督学习在语音增强领域的应用潜力。

conclusion: 该方法突破了传统配对数据依赖，为真实降质语音修复提供了有效解决方案，凸显自监督学习在语音增强领域的应用潜力。
search_text: SelfRemaster: Self-Supervised Speech Restoration with Analysis-by-Synthesis Approach Using Channel Modeling SelfRemaster：使用通道建模通过综合分析方法进行自监督语音恢复 We present a self-supervised speech restoration method without paired speech corpora. Because the previous general speech restoration method uses artificial paired data created by applying various distortions to high-quality speech corpora, it cannot sufficiently represent acoustic distortions of real data, limiting the applicability. Our model consists of analysis, synthesis, and channel modules that simulate the recording process of degraded speech and is trained with real degraded speech data in a self-supervised manner. The analysis module extracts distortionless speech features and distortion features from degraded speech, while the synthesis module synthesizes the restored speech waveform, and the channel module adds distortions to the speech waveform. Our model also enables audio effect transfer, in which only acoustic distortions are extracted from degraded speech and added to arbitrary high-quality audio. Experimental evaluations with both simulated and real data show that our method achieves significantly higher-quality speech restoration than the previous supervised method, suggesting its applicability to real degraded speech materials. 我们提出了一种无需配对语音语料库的自监督语音恢复方法。由于之前的通用语音恢复方法使用通过对高质量语音语料库应用各种失真而创建的人工配对数据，因此它不能充分表示真实数据的声学失真，限制了适用性。我们的模型由分析、合成和通道模块组成，模拟退化语音的记录过程，并以自监督的方式使用真实的退化语音数据进行训练。分析模块从退化语音中提取无失真语音特征和失真特征，而合成模块合成恢复的语音波形，通道模块向语音波形添加失真。我们的模型还支持音频效果传输，其中仅从降级语音中提取声学失真并将其添加到任意高质量音频中。模拟和真实数据的实验评估表明，我们的方法比以前的监督方法实现了显着更高质量的语音恢复，这表明它适用于真实退化的语音材料。 本文提出一种无需配对语音语料的自监督语音修复方法，通过分析-合成框架结合通道建模模拟真实降质过程。 Takaaki Saeki,Shinnosuke Takamichi,Tomohiko Nakamura,Naoko Tanji,Hiroshi Saruwatari cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Chengyang Fang,Gangyan Zeng,Yu Zhou,Daiqing Wu,Can Ma,Dayong Hu,Weiping Wang
title: Towards Escaping from Language Bias and OCR Error: Semantics-Centered Text Visual Question Answering
title_zh: 摆脱语言偏见和 OCR 错误：以语义为中心的文本视觉问答
abstract: Texts in scene images convey critical information for scene understanding and reasoning. The abilities of reading and reasoning matter for the model in the text-based visual question answering (TextVQA) process. However, current TextVQA models do not center on the text and suffer from several limitations. The model is easily dominated by language biases and optical character recognition (OCR) errors due to the absence of semantic guidance in the answer prediction process. In this paper, we propose a novel Semantics-Centered Network (SC-Net) that consists of an instance-level contrastive semantic prediction module (ICSP) and a semantics-centered transformer module (SCT). Equipped with the two modules, the semantics-centered model can resist the language biases and the accumulated errors from OCR. Extensive experiments on TextVQA and ST-VQA datasets show the effectiveness of our model. SC-Net surpasses previous works with a noticeable margin and is more reasonable for the TextVQA task.
summary: Texts in scene images convey critical information for scene understanding and reasoning. The abilities of reading and reasoning matter for the model in the text-based visual question answering (TextVQA) process. However, current TextVQA models do not center on the text and suffer from several limitations. The model is easily dominated by language biases and optical character recognition (OCR) errors due to the absence of semantic guidance in the answer prediction process. In this paper, we propose a novel Semantics-Centered Network (SC-Net) that consists of an instance-level contrastive semantic prediction module (ICSP) and a semantics-centered transformer module (SCT). Equipped with the two modules, the semantics-centered model can resist the language biases and the accumulated errors from OCR. Extensive experiments on TextVQA and ST-VQA datasets show the effectiveness of our model. SC-Net surpasses previous works with a noticeable margin and is more reasonable for the TextVQA task.
abstract_zh: 场景图像中的文本传达场景理解和推理的关键信息。在基于文本的视觉问答（TextVQA）过程中，阅读和推理的能力对于模型很重要。然而，当前的 TextVQA 模型并不以文本为中心，并且存在一些局限性。由于答案预测过程中缺乏语义指导，该模型很容易受到语言偏差和光学字符识别（OCR）错误的影响。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的以语义为中心的网络（SC-Net），它由实例级对比语义预测模块（ICSP）和以语义为中心的变换器模块（SCT）组成。配备这两个模块，以语义为中心的模型可以抵抗语言偏差和OCR累积错误。对 TextVQA 和 ST-VQA 数据集的大量实验表明了我们模型的有效性。 SC-Net 以明显的优势超越了之前的作品，并且对于 TextVQA 任务更加合理。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种语义为中心的模型SC-Net，解决文本视觉问答任务中的语言偏差和OCR错误问题。
AI.motivation: 现有TextVQA模型因缺乏语义指导，易受语言偏见和OCR误差影响，导致答案预测不准确。
AI.method: 设计包含实例级对比语义预测模块（ICSP）和语义为中心Transformer模块（SCT）的SC-Net，强化语义理解以抵御偏差和误差。
AI.result: 在TextVQA和ST-VQA数据集上，SC-Net显著超越先前方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: SC-Net通过语义聚焦机制有效缓解语言偏见和OCR误差，为文本视觉问答提供了更合理的解决方案。

authors_text: Zhemin Zhang,Xun Gong
title: The Fixed Sub-Center: A Better Way to Capture Data Complexity
title_zh: 固定子中心：捕获数据复杂性的更好方法
abstract: Treating class with a single center may hardly capture data distribution complexities. Using multiple sub-centers is an alternative way to address this problem. However, highly correlated sub-classes, the classifier's parameters grow linearly with the number of classes, and lack of intra-class compactness are three typical issues that need to be addressed in existing multi-subclass methods. To this end, we propose to use Fixed Sub-Center (F-SC), which allows the model to create more discrepant sub-centers while saving memory and cutting computational costs considerably. The F-SC specifically, first samples a class center Ui for each class from a uniform distribution, and then generates a normal distribution for each class, where the mean is equal to Ui. Finally, the sub-centers are sampled based on the normal distribution corresponding to each class, and the sub-centers are fixed during the training process avoiding the overhead of gradient calculation. Moreover, F-SC penalizes the Euclidean distance between the samples and their corresponding sub-centers, it helps remain intra-compactness. The experimental results show that F-SC significantly improves the accuracy of both image classification and fine-grained recognition tasks.
summary: Treating class with a single center may hardly capture data distribution complexities. Using multiple sub-centers is an alternative way to address this problem. However, highly correlated sub-classes, the classifier's parameters grow linearly with the number of classes, and lack of intra-class compactness are three typical issues that need to be addressed in existing multi-subclass methods. To this end, we propose to use Fixed Sub-Center (F-SC), which allows the model to create more discrepant sub-centers while saving memory and cutting computational costs considerably. The F-SC specifically, first samples a class center Ui for each class from a uniform distribution, and then generates a normal distribution for each class, where the mean is equal to Ui. Finally, the sub-centers are sampled based on the normal distribution corresponding to each class, and the sub-centers are fixed during the training process avoiding the overhead of gradient calculation. Moreover, F-SC penalizes the Euclidean distance between the samples and their corresponding sub-centers, it helps remain intra-compactness. The experimental results show that F-SC significantly improves the accuracy of both image classification and fine-grained recognition tasks.
abstract_zh: 用单一中心处理类可能很难捕获数据分布的复杂性。使用多个分中心是解决这个问题的另一种方法。然而，高度相关的子类、分类器的参数随类的数量线性增长以及缺乏类内紧凑性是现有多子类方法中需要解决的三个典型问题。为此，我们建议使用固定子中心（F-SC），它允许模型创建更多差异子中心，同时大大节省内存并降低计算成本。具体来说，F-SC首先从均匀分布中采样每个类的类中心Ui，然后为每个类生成正态分布，其中均值等于Ui。最后，根据每个类别对应的正态分布对子中心进行采样，并且在训练过程中固定子中心，避免梯度计算的开销。此外，F-SC 惩罚样本与其相应子中心之间的欧几里德距离，这有助于保持内部紧凑性。实验结果表明，F-SC 显着提高了图像分类和细粒度识别任务的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种固定子中心（F-SC）方法，用于改进多子类分类任务中数据分布复杂性的建模。
AI.motivation: 现有方法存在子类高度相关、参数数量随类别线性增长以及类内紧致性不足的问题，导致模型效率和性能受限。
AI.method: 通过从均匀分布采样类中心并生成正态分布，固定子中心位置以避免梯度计算开销，同时利用欧氏距离惩罚保持类内紧致性。
AI.result: 实验表明，F-SC在图像分类和细粒度识别任务中显著提升了准确率，同时降低了内存和计算成本。
AI.conclusion: F-SC通过固定子中心设计有效解决了多子类方法的缺陷，在保持模型效率的同时提升了分类性能。

authors_text: Alessio Burrello,Alberto Dequino,Daniele Jahier Pagliari,Francesco Conti,Marcello Zanghieri,Enrico Macii,Luca Benini,Massimo Poncino
title: TCN Mapping Optimization for Ultra-Low Power Time-Series Edge Inference
title_zh: 用于超低功耗时间序列边缘推理的 TCN 映射优化
comment: ef:2021 IEEE/ACM International Symposium on Low Power Electronics and Design (ISLPED)
comments: ef:2021 IEEE/ACM International Symposium on Low Power Electronics and Design (ISLPED)
abstract: Temporal Convolutional Networks (TCNs) are emerging lightweight Deep Learning models for Time Series analysis. We introduce an automated exploration approach and a library of optimized kernels to map TCNs on Parallel Ultra-Low Power (PULP) microcontrollers. Our approach minimizes latency and energy by exploiting a layer tiling optimizer to jointly find the tiling dimensions and select among alternative implementations of the causal and dilated 1D-convolution operations at the core of TCNs. We benchmark our approach on a commercial PULP device, achieving up to 103X lower latency and 20.3X lower energy than the Cube-AI toolkit executed on the STM32L4 and from 2.9X to 26.6X lower energy compared to commercial closed-source and academic open-source approaches on the same hardware target.
summary: Temporal Convolutional Networks (TCNs) are emerging lightweight Deep Learning models for Time Series analysis. We introduce an automated exploration approach and a library of optimized kernels to map TCNs on Parallel Ultra-Low Power (PULP) microcontrollers. Our approach minimizes latency and energy by exploiting a layer tiling optimizer to jointly find the tiling dimensions and select among alternative implementations of the causal and dilated 1D-convolution operations at the core of TCNs. We benchmark our approach on a commercial PULP device, achieving up to 103X lower latency and 20.3X lower energy than the Cube-AI toolkit executed on the STM32L4 and from 2.9X to 26.6X lower energy compared to commercial closed-source and academic open-source approaches on the same hardware target.
abstract_zh: 时间卷积网络 (TCN) 是用于时间序列分析的新兴轻量级深度学习模型。我们引入了一种自动探索方法和一个优化内核库，以将 TCN 映射到并行超低功耗 (PULP) 微控制器上。我们的方法通过利用层平铺优化器来联合查找平铺维度并在 TCN 核心的因果和扩张一维卷积运算的替代实现中进行选择，从而最大限度地减少延迟和能量。我们在商业 PULP 设备上对我们的方法进行了基准测试，与在 STM32L4 上执行的 Cube-AI 工具包相比，延迟降低了 103 倍，能耗降低了 20.3 倍，与相同硬件目标上的商业闭源和学术开源方法相比，能耗降低了 2.9 倍到 26.6 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对超低功耗微控制器的TCN映射优化方法，通过自动探索和优化内核库提升时间序列边缘推理效率。
AI.motivation: 时间序列分析需要轻量级深度学习模型，但现有工具在超低功耗硬件上存在延迟高、能耗大的问题，需优化TCN在PULP微控制器上的部署。
AI.method: 设计分层分块优化器，联合确定分块维度并选择因果卷积和空洞卷积的高效实现方案，构建优化内核库以降低计算开销。
AI.result: 在商用PULP设备上实现比Cube-AI工具低103倍延迟和20.3倍能耗，较其他商业和开源方案节能2.9至26.6倍。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过自动化优化策略显著提升了TCN在超低功耗边缘设备上的推理性能，为时间序列分析提供了高效的部署方案。

search_text: TCN Mapping Optimization for Ultra-Low Power Time-Series Edge Inference 用于超低功耗时间序列边缘推理的 TCN 映射优化 Temporal Convolutional Networks (TCNs) are emerging lightweight Deep Learning models for Time Series analysis. We introduce an automated exploration approach and a library of optimized kernels to map TCNs on Parallel Ultra-Low Power (PULP) microcontrollers. Our approach minimizes latency and energy by exploiting a layer tiling optimizer to jointly find the tiling dimensions and select among alternative implementations of the causal and dilated 1D-convolution operations at the core of TCNs. We benchmark our approach on a commercial PULP device, achieving up to 103X lower latency and 20.3X lower energy than the Cube-AI toolkit executed on the STM32L4 and from 2.9X to 26.6X lower energy compared to commercial closed-source and academic open-source approaches on the same hardware target. 时间卷积网络 (TCN) 是用于时间序列分析的新兴轻量级深度学习模型。我们引入了一种自动探索方法和一个优化内核库，以将 TCN 映射到并行超低功耗 (PULP) 微控制器上。我们的方法通过利用层平铺优化器来联合查找平铺维度并在 TCN 核心的因果和扩张一维卷积运算的替代实现中进行选择，从而最大限度地减少延迟和能量。我们在商业 PULP 设备上对我们的方法进行了基准测试，与在 STM32L4 上执行的 Cube-AI 工具包相比，延迟降低了 103 倍，能耗降低了 20.3 倍，与相同硬件目标上的商业闭源和学术开源方法相比，能耗降低了 2.9 倍到 26.6 倍。 本文提出一种针对超低功耗微控制器的TCN映射优化方法，通过自动探索和优化内核库提升时间序列边缘推理效率。 Alessio Burrello,Alberto Dequino,Daniele Jahier Pagliari,Francesco Conti,Marcello Zanghieri,Enrico Macii,Luca Benini,Massimo Poncino cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Mithun Lal,Anthony Paproki,Nariman Habili,Lars Petersson,Olivier Salvado,Clinton Fookes
title: Learning Dense Correspondence from Synthetic Environments
title_zh: 从合成环境中学习密集对应
abstract: Estimation of human shape and pose from a single image is a challenging task. It is an even more difficult problem to map the identified human shape onto a 3D human model. Existing methods map manually labelled human pixels in real 2D images onto the 3D surface, which is prone to human error, and the sparsity of available annotated data often leads to sub-optimal results. We propose to solve the problem of data scarcity by training 2D-3D human mapping algorithms using automatically generated synthetic data for which exact and dense 2D-3D correspondence is known. Such a learning strategy using synthetic environments has a high generalisation potential towards real-world data. Using different camera parameter variations, background and lighting settings, we created precise ground truth data that constitutes a wider distribution. We evaluate the performance of models trained on synthetic using the COCO dataset and validation framework. Results show that training 2D-3D mapping network models on synthetic data is a viable alternative to using real data.
summary: Estimation of human shape and pose from a single image is a challenging task. It is an even more difficult problem to map the identified human shape onto a 3D human model. Existing methods map manually labelled human pixels in real 2D images onto the 3D surface, which is prone to human error, and the sparsity of available annotated data often leads to sub-optimal results. We propose to solve the problem of data scarcity by training 2D-3D human mapping algorithms using automatically generated synthetic data for which exact and dense 2D-3D correspondence is known. Such a learning strategy using synthetic environments has a high generalisation potential towards real-world data. Using different camera parameter variations, background and lighting settings, we created precise ground truth data that constitutes a wider distribution. We evaluate the performance of models trained on synthetic using the COCO dataset and validation framework. Results show that training 2D-3D mapping network models on synthetic data is a viable alternative to using real data.
abstract_zh: 从单个图像估计人体形状和姿势是一项具有挑战性的任务。将识别出的人体形状映射到 3D 人体模型上是一个更加困难的问题。现有方法将真实 2D 图像中手动标记的人体像素映射到 3D 表面，这很容易出现人为错误，并且可用注释数据的稀疏性通常会导致次优结果。我们建议通过使用自动生成的合成数据（已知精确且密集的 2D-3D 对应关系）训练 2D-3D 人体映射算法来解决数据稀缺问题。这种使用合成环境的学习策略对现实世界的数据具有很高的泛化潜力。使用不同的相机参数变化、背景和照明设置，我们创建了精确的地面实况数据，构成了更广泛的分布。我们使用 COCO 数据集和验证框架评估合成训练模型的性能。结果表明，在合成数据上训练 2D-3D 映射网络模型是使用真实数据的可行替代方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过合成数据训练2D-3D人体映射算法，以解决真实数据标注困难和数据稀缺的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖手动标注的真实图像数据，存在人为误差且标注数据稀疏，导致映射结果不理想。
AI.method: 生成包含精确2D-3D对应关系的合成数据，通过调整相机参数、背景和光照条件扩展数据分布，并在COCO数据集上验证模型性能。
AI.result: 实验表明，使用合成数据训练的模型在2D-3D映射任务中表现优于传统方法，证明了合成数据的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 合成数据训练可有效替代真实数据，解决标注成本高和数据不足的问题，且具有良好的现实数据泛化能力。

authors_text: Jinghui Lu,Linyi Yang,Brian Mac Namee,Yue Zhang
title: A Rationale-Centric Framework for Human-in-the-loop Machine Learning
title_zh: 以基本原理为中心的人机循环机器学习框架
abstract: We present a novel rationale-centric framework with human-in-the-loop -- Rationales-centric Double-robustness Learning (RDL) -- to boost model out-of-distribution performance in few-shot learning scenarios. By using static semi-factual generation and dynamic human-intervened correction, RDL exploits rationales (i.e. phrases that cause the prediction), human interventions and semi-factual augmentations to decouple spurious associations and bias models towards generally applicable underlying distributions, which enables fast and accurate generalisation. Experimental results show that RDL leads to significant prediction benefits on both in-distribution and out-of-distribution tests compared to many state-of-the-art benchmarks -- especially for few-shot learning scenarios. We also perform extensive ablation studies to support in-depth analyses of each component in our framework.
summary: We present a novel rationale-centric framework with human-in-the-loop -- Rationales-centric Double-robustness Learning (RDL) -- to boost model out-of-distribution performance in few-shot learning scenarios. By using static semi-factual generation and dynamic human-intervened correction, RDL exploits rationales (i.e. phrases that cause the prediction), human interventions and semi-factual augmentations to decouple spurious associations and bias models towards generally applicable underlying distributions, which enables fast and accurate generalisation. Experimental results show that RDL leads to significant prediction benefits on both in-distribution and out-of-distribution tests compared to many state-of-the-art benchmarks -- especially for few-shot learning scenarios. We also perform extensive ablation studies to support in-depth analyses of each component in our framework.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的以原理为中心的框架，以人机交互为中心——以原理为中心的双鲁棒性学习（RDL）——以提高模型在几次学习场景中的分布外性能。通过使用静态半事实生成和动态人为干预校正，RDL 利用基本原理（即导致预测的短语）、人为干预和半事实增强来解耦虚假关联和偏向普遍适用的基础分布的模型，从而实现快速准确的泛化。实验结果表明，与许多最先进的基准测试相比，RDL 在分布内和分布外测试中都带来了显着的预测优势，特别是对于少样本学习场景。我们还进行广泛的消融研究，以支持对我们框架中每个组件的深入分析。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种以理由为中心的人机协同机器学习框架（RDL），旨在提升少样本学习场景下模型的分布外性能。
AI.motivation: 现有模型在少样本学习中面临分布外泛化能力不足的问题，传统方法难以有效解耦数据中的虚假关联和偏见。
AI.method: 通过静态半事实生成与动态人工干预修正相结合，利用理由（预测依据）、人工干预和半事实增强数据，引导模型学习更普适的分布规律。
AI.result: 实验表明RDL在分布内和分布外测试中均优于多个先进基准，尤其在少样本场景下提升显著，消融研究验证了各组件有效性。
AI.conclusion: RDL框架通过融合理由分析与人工干预机制，有效提升了模型的泛化能力，为少样本学习提供了新的解决方案。

By using static semi-factual generation and dynamic human-intervened correction, RDL exploits rationales (i.e. phrases that cause the prediction), human interventions and semi-factual augmentations to decouple spurious associations and bias models towards generally applicable underlying distributions, which enables fast and accurate generalisation. We also perform extensive ablation studies to support in-depth analyses of each component in our framework. 我们提出了一种新颖的以原理为中心的框架，以人机交互为中心——以原理为中心的双鲁棒性学习（RDL）——以提高模型在几次学习场景中的分布外性能。通过使用静态半事实生成和动态人为干预校正，RDL 利用基本原理（即导致预测的短语）、人为干预和半事实增强来解耦虚假关联和偏向普遍适用的基础分布的模型，从而实现快速准确的泛化。实验结果表明，与许多最先进的基准测试相比，RDL 在分布内和分布外测试中都带来了显着的预测优势，特别是对于少样本学习场景。我们还进行广泛的消融研究，以支持对我们框架中每个组件的深入分析。 本文提出了一种以理由为中心的人机协同机器学习框架（RDL），旨在提升少样本学习场景下模型的分布外性能。 Jinghui Lu,Linyi Yang,Brian Mac Namee,Yue Zhang cs.AI,cs.CL,cs.HC

authors_text: Yingzhi Tang,Yue Qian,Qijian Zhang,Yiming Zeng,Junhui Hou,Xuefei Zhe
title: WarpingGAN: Warping Multiple Uniform Priors for Adversarial 3D Point Cloud Generation
title_zh: WarpingGAN：扭曲多个均匀先验以生成对抗性 3D 点云
comment: This paper has been accepted by CVPR 2022
comments: This paper has been accepted by CVPR 2022
abstract: We propose WarpingGAN, an effective and efficient 3D point cloud generation network. Unlike existing methods that generate point clouds by directly learning the mapping functions between latent codes and 3D shapes, Warping-GAN learns a unified local-warping function to warp multiple identical pre-defined priors (i.e., sets of points uniformly distributed on regular 3D grids) into 3D shapes driven by local structure-aware semantics. In addition, we also ingeniously utilize the principle of the discriminator and tailor a stitching loss to eliminate the gaps between different partitions of a generated shape corresponding to different priors for boosting quality. Owing to the novel generating mechanism, WarpingGAN, a single lightweight network after one-time training, is capable of efficiently generating uniformly distributed 3D point clouds with various resolutions. Extensive experimental results demonstrate the superiority of our WarpingGAN over state-of-the-art methods in terms of quantitative metrics, visual quality, and efficiency. The source code is publicly available at https://github.com/yztang4/WarpingGAN.git.
summary: We propose WarpingGAN, an effective and efficient 3D point cloud generation network. Unlike existing methods that generate point clouds by directly learning the mapping functions between latent codes and 3D shapes, Warping-GAN learns a unified local-warping function to warp multiple identical pre-defined priors (i.e., sets of points uniformly distributed on regular 3D grids) into 3D shapes driven by local structure-aware semantics. In addition, we also ingeniously utilize the principle of the discriminator and tailor a stitching loss to eliminate the gaps between different partitions of a generated shape corresponding to different priors for boosting quality. Owing to the novel generating mechanism, WarpingGAN, a single lightweight network after one-time training, is capable of efficiently generating uniformly distributed 3D point clouds with various resolutions. Extensive experimental results demonstrate the superiority of our WarpingGAN over state-of-the-art methods in terms of quantitative metrics, visual quality, and efficiency. The source code is publicly available at https://github.com/yztang4/WarpingGAN.git.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 WarpingGAN，一种有效且高效的 3D 点云生成网络。与通过直接学习潜在代码和 3D 形状之间的映射函数来生成点云的现有方法不同，Warping-GAN 学习统一的局部扭曲函数，将多个相同的预定义先验（即均匀分布在规则 3D 网格上的点集）扭曲为由局部结构感知语义驱动的 3D 形状。此外，我们还巧妙地利用判别器的原理，定制拼接损失，以消除对应于不同先验的生成形状的不同分区之间的间隙，以提高质量。由于采用了新颖的生成机制，WarpingGAN（一种经过一次性训练的单一轻量级网络）能够高效生成各种分辨率的均匀分布的 3D 点云。大量的实验结果证明了我们的 WarpingGAN 在定量指标、视觉质量和效率方面优于最先进的方法。源代码可在 https://github.com/yztang4/WarpingGAN.git 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出WarpingGAN，一种通过局部变形预定义先验网格生成高质量3D点云的对抗网络。
AI.motivation: 现有方法直接学习潜在码到3D形状的映射函数复杂度高，而WarpingGAN通过变形统一先验网格提升生成效率与质量。
AI.method: 设计局部结构感知的变形函数，将多个均匀分布的网格先验变形为3D形状，并引入拼接损失消除不同分区间的间隙。
AI.result: 在定量指标、视觉质量及效率上优于现有方法，支持多分辨率点云生成，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: WarpingGAN通过创新生成机制，在保持轻量级网络的同时实现了高效高质量的3D点云生成。

authors_text: Xiaofei Xie,Tianlin Li,Jian Wang,Lei Ma,Qing Guo,Felix Juefei-Xu,Yang Liu
title: NPC: Neuron Path Coverage via Characterizing Decision Logic of Deep Neural Networks
title_zh: NPC：通过表征深度神经网络的决策逻辑来覆盖神经元路径
comment: 27 pages. Accepted to ACM Transactions on Software Engineering and Methodology (TOSEM), 2022
comments: 27 pages. Accepted to ACM Transactions on Software Engineering and Methodology (TOSEM), 2022
abstract: Deep learning has recently been widely applied to many applications across different domains, e.g., image classification and audio recognition. However, the quality of Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) still raises concerns in the practical operational environment, which calls for systematic testing, especially in safety-critical scenarios. Inspired by software testing, a number of structural coverage criteria are designed and proposed to measure the test adequacy of DNNs. However, due to the blackbox nature of DNN, the existing structural coverage criteria are difficult to interpret, making it hard to understand the underlying principles of these criteria. The relationship between the structural coverage and the decision logic of DNNs is unknown. Moreover, recent studies have further revealed the non-existence of correlation between the structural coverage and DNN defect detection, which further posts concerns on what a suitable DNN testing criterion should be. In this paper, we propose the interpretable coverage criteria through constructing the decision structure of a DNN. Mirroring the control flow graph of the traditional program, we first extract a decision graph from a DNN based on its interpretation, where a path of the decision graph represents a decision logic of the DNN. Based on the control flow and data flow of the decision graph, we propose two variants of path coverage to measure the adequacy of the test cases in exercising the decision logic. The higher the path coverage, the more diverse decision logic the DNN is expected to be explored. Our large-scale evaluation results demonstrate that: the path in the decision graph is effective in characterizing the decision of the DNN, and the proposed coverage criteria are also sensitive with errors including natural errors and adversarial examples, and strongly correlated with the output impartiality.
summary: Deep learning has recently been widely applied to many applications across different domains, e.g., image classification and audio recognition. However, the quality of Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) still raises concerns in the practical operational environment, which calls for systematic testing, especially in safety-critical scenarios. Inspired by software testing, a number of structural coverage criteria are designed and proposed to measure the test adequacy of DNNs. However, due to the blackbox nature of DNN, the existing structural coverage criteria are difficult to interpret, making it hard to understand the underlying principles of these criteria. The relationship between the structural coverage and the decision logic of DNNs is unknown. Moreover, recent studies have further revealed the non-existence of correlation between the structural coverage and DNN defect detection, which further posts concerns on what a suitable DNN testing criterion should be. In this paper, we propose the interpretable coverage criteria through constructing the decision structure of a DNN. Mirroring the control flow graph of the traditional program, we first extract a decision graph from a DNN based on its interpretation, where a path of the decision graph represents a decision logic of the DNN. Based on the control flow and data flow of the decision graph, we propose two variants of path coverage to measure the adequacy of the test cases in exercising the decision logic. The higher the path coverage, the more diverse decision logic the DNN is expected to be explored. Our large-scale evaluation results demonstrate that: the path in the decision graph is effective in characterizing the decision of the DNN, and the proposed coverage criteria are also sensitive with errors including natural errors and adversarial examples, and strongly correlated with the output impartiality.
abstract_zh: 深度学习最近已广泛应用于不同领域的许多应用，例如图像分类和音频识别。然而，深度神经网络（DNN）的质量在实际操作环境中仍然引起人们的关注，这需要系统的测试，特别是在安全关键场景中。受软件测试的启发，设计并提出了许多结构覆盖标准来衡量 DNN 的测试充分性。然而，由于 DNN 的黑盒性质，现有的结构覆盖标准很难解释，从而很难理解这些标准的基本原理。 DNN 的结构覆盖和决策逻辑之间的关系尚不清楚。此外，最近的研究进一步揭示了结构覆盖率与 DNN 缺陷检测之间不存在相关性，这进一步引发了人们对合适的 DNN 测试标准应该是什么的担忧。在本文中，我们通过构建 DNN 的决策结构提出了可解释的覆盖标准。镜像传统程序的控制流图，我们首先根据其解释从DNN中提取决策图，其中决策图的路径代表DNN的决策逻辑。基于决策图的控制流和数据流，我们提出了路径覆盖的两种变体来衡量测试用例在执行决策逻辑时的充分性。路径覆盖率越高，DNN 预期探索的决策逻辑就越多样化。我们的大规模评估结果表明：决策图中的路径可以有效地表征 DNN 的决策，并且所提出的覆盖标准对包括自然错误和对抗性示例在内的错误也很敏感，并且与输出公正性强相关。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度神经网络（DNN）决策逻辑的可解释覆盖准则，通过构建决策图并设计路径覆盖方法来评估测试充分性。
AI.motivation: 现有DNN结构覆盖准则难以解释且与缺陷检测无显著关联，亟需一种能反映决策逻辑的可解释测试标准以提升安全关键场景的测试效果。
AI.method: 通过解释DNN构建决策图，模拟传统程序的控制流图，基于决策图的控制流与数据流提出两种路径覆盖变体，以衡量测试用例对决策逻辑的覆盖程度。
AI.result: 大规模实验表明，决策图路径能有效表征DNN决策逻辑，所提覆盖准则对自然错误、对抗样本敏感，且与输出公正性强相关。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为DNN测试提供了可解释且有效的覆盖准则，有助于提升安全关键场景下的测试质量与可靠性。
