The higher the path coverage, the more diverse decision logic the DNN is expected to be explored. Our large-scale evaluation results demonstrate that: the path in the decision graph is effective in characterizing the decision of the DNN, and the proposed coverage criteria are also sensitive with errors including natural errors and adversarial examples, and strongly correlated with the output impartiality. 深度学习最近已广泛应用于不同领域的许多应用，例如图像分类和音频识别。然而，深度神经网络（DNN）的质量在实际操作环境中仍然引起人们的关注，这需要系统的测试，特别是在安全关键场景中。受软件测试的启发，设计并提出了许多结构覆盖标准来衡量 DNN 的测试充分性。然而，由于 DNN 的黑盒性质，现有的结构覆盖标准很难解释，从而很难理解这些标准的基本原理。 DNN 的结构覆盖和决策逻辑之间的关系尚不清楚。此外，最近的研究进一步揭示了结构覆盖率与 DNN 缺陷检测之间不存在相关性，这进一步引发了人们对合适的 DNN 测试标准应该是什么的担忧。在本文中，我们通过构建 DNN 的决策结构提出了可解释的覆盖标准。镜像传统程序的控制流图，我们首先根据其解释从DNN中提取决策图，其中决策图的路径代表DNN的决策逻辑。基于决策图的控制流和数据流，我们提出了路径覆盖的两种变体来衡量测试用例在执行决策逻辑时的充分性。路径覆盖率越高，DNN 预期探索的决策逻辑就越多样化。我们的大规模评估结果表明：决策图中的路径可以有效地表征 DNN 的决策，并且所提出的覆盖标准对包括自然错误和对抗性示例在内的错误也很敏感，并且与输出公正性强相关。 本文提出了一种基于深度神经网络（DNN）决策逻辑的可解释覆盖准则，通过构建决策图并设计路径覆盖方法来评估测试充分性。 Xiaofei Xie,Tianlin Li,Jian Wang,Lei Ma,Qing Guo,Felix Juefei-Xu,Yang Liu cs.LG,cs.CV,cs.SE

authors_text: Ka Wong,Praveen Paritosh
title: k-Rater Reliability: The Correct Unit of Reliability for Aggregated Human Annotations
title_zh: k-Rater 可靠性：聚合人工注释的正确可靠性单位
abstract: Since the inception of crowdsourcing, aggregation has been a common strategy for dealing with unreliable data. Aggregate ratings are more reliable than individual ones. However, many natural language processing (NLP) applications that rely on aggregate ratings only report the reliability of individual ratings, which is the incorrect unit of analysis. In these instances, the data reliability is under-reported, and a proposed k-rater reliability (kRR) should be used as the correct data reliability for aggregated datasets. It is a multi-rater generalization of inter-rater reliability (IRR). We conducted two replications of the WordSim-353 benchmark, and present empirical, analytical, and bootstrap-based methods for computing kRR on WordSim-353. These methods produce very similar results. We hope this discussion will nudge researchers to report kRR in addition to IRR.
summary: Since the inception of crowdsourcing, aggregation has been a common strategy for dealing with unreliable data. Aggregate ratings are more reliable than individual ones. However, many natural language processing (NLP) applications that rely on aggregate ratings only report the reliability of individual ratings, which is the incorrect unit of analysis. In these instances, the data reliability is under-reported, and a proposed k-rater reliability (kRR) should be used as the correct data reliability for aggregated datasets. It is a multi-rater generalization of inter-rater reliability (IRR). We conducted two replications of the WordSim-353 benchmark, and present empirical, analytical, and bootstrap-based methods for computing kRR on WordSim-353. These methods produce very similar results. We hope this discussion will nudge researchers to report kRR in addition to IRR.
abstract_zh: 自众包诞生以来，聚合一直是处理不可靠数据的常见策略。总体评级比单独评级更可靠。然而，许多依赖聚合评级的自然语言处理 (NLP) 应用程序仅报告单个评级的可靠性，这是不正确的分析单位。在这些情况下，数据可靠性报告不足，应使用建议的 k 评估者可靠性 (kRR) 作为聚合数据集的正确数据可靠性。它是评估者间可靠性 (IRR) 的多评估者概括。我们对 WordSim-353 基准进行了两次复制，并提出了在 WordSim-353 上计算 kRR 的经验、分析和基于引导的方法。这些方法产生非常相似的结果。我们希望这次讨论能够促使研究人员除了 IRR 之外还报告 kRR。

AI.tldr: 本文提出k-评分者可靠性（kRR）作为聚合人类标注数据的正确可靠性单位，以替代传统个体评分者可靠性（IRR）。
AI.motivation: 当前自然语言处理领域在使用聚合评分时仍报告个体评分可靠性，导致数据可靠性被低估，需引入更准确的聚合可靠性评估方法。
AI.method: 通过两次WordSim-353基准测试复现，采用实证分析、数学分析及自举法计算kRR，并验证其一致性。
AI.result: 三种计算方法得出的kRR结果高度相似，证明其稳定性和有效性。
AI.conclusion: 建议研究者在报告IRR的同时补充kRR，以更准确反映聚合标注数据的可靠性。

authors_text: Junxuan Li,Hongdong Li
title: Neural Reflectance for Shape Recovery with Shadow Handling
title_zh: 通过阴影处理进行形状恢复的神经反射
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2022. Codes available in https://github.com/junxuan-li/Neural-Reflectance-PS
comments: Accepted to CVPR 2022. Codes available in https://github.com/junxuan-li/Neural-Reflectance-PS
abstract: This paper aims at recovering the shape of a scene with unknown, non-Lambertian, and possibly spatially-varying surface materials. When the shape of the object is highly complex and that shadows cast on the surface, the task becomes very challenging. To overcome these challenges, we propose a coordinate-based deep MLP (multilayer perceptron) to parameterize both the unknown 3D shape and the unknown reflectance at every surface point. This network is able to leverage the observed photometric variance and shadows on the surface, and recover both surface shape and general non-Lambertian reflectance. We explicitly predict cast shadows, mitigating possible artifacts on these shadowing regions, leading to higher estimation accuracy. Our framework is entirely self-supervised, in the sense that it requires neither ground truth shape nor BRDF. Tests on real-world images demonstrate that our method outperform existing methods by a significant margin. Thanks to the small size of the MLP-net, our method is an order of magnitude faster than previous CNN-based methods.
summary: This paper aims at recovering the shape of a scene with unknown, non-Lambertian, and possibly spatially-varying surface materials. When the shape of the object is highly complex and that shadows cast on the surface, the task becomes very challenging. To overcome these challenges, we propose a coordinate-based deep MLP (multilayer perceptron) to parameterize both the unknown 3D shape and the unknown reflectance at every surface point. This network is able to leverage the observed photometric variance and shadows on the surface, and recover both surface shape and general non-Lambertian reflectance. We explicitly predict cast shadows, mitigating possible artifacts on these shadowing regions, leading to higher estimation accuracy. Our framework is entirely self-supervised, in the sense that it requires neither ground truth shape nor BRDF. Tests on real-world images demonstrate that our method outperform existing methods by a significant margin. Thanks to the small size of the MLP-net, our method is an order of magnitude faster than previous CNN-based methods.
abstract_zh: 本文旨在恢复具有未知、非朗伯且可能空间变化的表面材质的场景的形状。当物体的形状非常复杂并且阴影投射在表面上时，任务变得非常具有挑战性。为了克服这些挑战，我们提出了一种基于坐标的深度 MLP（多层感知器）来参数化每个表面点的未知 3D 形状和未知反射率。该网络能够利用观察到的光度方差和表面阴影，并恢复表面形状和一般非朗伯反射率。我们明确地预测投射阴影，减轻这些阴影区域上可能出现的伪影，从而提高估计精度。我们的框架完全是自我监督的，从某种意义上说，它既不需要真实形状，也不需要 BRDF。对现实世界图像的测试表明，我们的方法明显优于现有方法。由于 MLP 网络的尺寸较小，我们的方法比以前基于 CNN 的方法快一个数量级。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在从具有未知非朗伯反射率和阴影的图像中恢复复杂场景的3D形状。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以处理复杂形状和阴影，且依赖标注数据，本文提出自监督方法以提高准确性和效率。
AI.method: 采用坐标相关的MLP网络同时建模3D形状和反射率，显式预测阴影以减少伪影。
AI.result: 在真实图像测试中显著优于现有方法，且速度提升一个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法有效处理复杂形状和阴影，具有高效性，适用于实际应用。

authors_text: Anssi Moisio,Dejan Porjazovski,Aku Rouhe,Yaroslav Getman,Anja Virkkunen,Tamás Grósz,Krister Lindén,Mikko Kurimo
title: Lahjoita puhetta -- a large-scale corpus of spoken Finnish with some benchmarks
title_zh: Lahjoita puhetta——一个带有一些基准的大型芬兰语口语语料库
comment: Submitted to Language Resources and Evaluation
comments: Submitted to Language Resources and Evaluation
abstract: The Donate Speech campaign has so far succeeded in gathering approximately 3600 hours of ordinary, colloquial Finnish speech into the Lahjoita puhetta (Donate Speech) corpus. The corpus includes over twenty thousand speakers from all the regions of Finland and from all age brackets. The primary goals of the collection were to create a representative, large-scale resource to study spontaneous spoken Finnish and to accelerate the development of language technology and speech-based services. In this paper, we present the collection process and the collected corpus, and showcase its versatility through multiple use cases. The evaluated use cases include: automatic speech recognition of spontaneous speech, detection of age, gender, dialect and topic and metadata analysis. We provide benchmarks for the use cases, as well down loadable, trained baseline systems with open-source code for reproducibility. One further use case is to verify the metadata and transcripts given in this corpus itself, and to suggest artificial metadata and transcripts for the part of the corpus where it is missing.
summary: The Donate Speech campaign has so far succeeded in gathering approximately 3600 hours of ordinary, colloquial Finnish speech into the Lahjoita puhetta (Donate Speech) corpus. The corpus includes over twenty thousand speakers from all the regions of Finland and from all age brackets. The primary goals of the collection were to create a representative, large-scale resource to study spontaneous spoken Finnish and to accelerate the development of language technology and speech-based services. In this paper, we present the collection process and the collected corpus, and showcase its versatility through multiple use cases. The evaluated use cases include: automatic speech recognition of spontaneous speech, detection of age, gender, dialect and topic and metadata analysis. We provide benchmarks for the use cases, as well down loadable, trained baseline systems with open-source code for reproducibility. One further use case is to verify the metadata and transcripts given in this corpus itself, and to suggest artificial metadata and transcripts for the part of the corpus where it is missing.
abstract_zh: 迄今为止，“捐赠演讲”活动已成功将大约 3600 小时的普通芬兰语口语演讲收集到 Lahjoita puhetta（捐赠演讲）语料库中。该语料库包含来自芬兰所有地区、各个年龄段的两万多名使用者。该集合的主要目标是创建一个具有代表性的大规模资源来研究芬兰语自发口语并加速语言技术和基于语音的服务的发展。在本文中，我们介绍了收集过程和收集的语料库，并通过多个用例展示了其多功能性。评估的用例包括：自发语音的自动语音识别、年龄、性别、方言和主题的检测以及元数据分析。我们提供用例基准，以及可下载的、经过训练的基线系统和开源代码，以实现可重复性。另一个用例是验证该语料库本身给出的元数据和转录本，并为语料库中缺失的部分建议人工元数据和转录本。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了名为Lahjoita puhetta的芬兰口语语料库，包含约3600小时的日常口语数据，并展示了其在语音识别、年龄性别方言主题检测等任务中的应用案例。
AI.motivation: 构建一个具有广泛代表性的芬兰口语资源，推动语言技术发展和语音服务创新，同时验证语料库元数据的可靠性。
AI.method: 通过大规模采集芬兰不同地区、年龄层的2万余名说话人数据，建立语料库并开发开源基线系统，通过多任务评估验证其适用性。
AI.result: 提供了语音识别、多维度检测等任务的基准指标，开放训练模型代码，并对部分缺失元数据进行人工补充验证。
AI.conclusion: 该语料库为芬兰口语研究和语言技术开发提供了高质量资源，其多任务基准和开源实现可促进相关领域研究进展。

search_text: Lahjoita puhetta -- a large-scale corpus of spoken Finnish with some benchmarks Lahjoita puhetta——一个带有一些基准的大型芬兰语口语语料库 The Donate Speech campaign has so far succeeded in gathering approximately 3600 hours of ordinary, colloquial Finnish speech into the Lahjoita puhetta (Donate Speech) corpus. The corpus includes over twenty thousand speakers from all the regions of Finland and from all age brackets. The primary goals of the collection were to create a representative, large-scale resource to study spontaneous spoken Finnish and to accelerate the development of language technology and speech-based services. In this paper, we present the collection process and the collected corpus, and showcase its versatility through multiple use cases. The evaluated use cases include: automatic speech recognition of spontaneous speech, detection of age, gender, dialect and topic and metadata analysis. We provide benchmarks for the use cases, as well down loadable, trained baseline systems with open-source code for reproducibility. One further use case is to verify the metadata and transcripts given in this corpus itself, and to suggest artificial metadata and transcripts for the part of the corpus where it is missing. 迄今为止，“捐赠演讲”活动已成功将大约 3600 小时的普通芬兰语口语演讲收集到 Lahjoita puhetta（捐赠演讲）语料库中。该语料库包含来自芬兰所有地区、各个年龄段的两万多名使用者。该集合的主要目标是创建一个具有代表性的大规模资源来研究芬兰语自发口语并加速语言技术和基于语音的服务的发展。在本文中，我们介绍了收集过程和收集的语料库，并通过多个用例展示了其多功能性。评估的用例包括：自发语音的自动语音识别、年龄、性别、方言和主题的检测以及元数据分析。我们提供用例基准，以及可下载的、经过训练的基线系统和开源代码，以实现可重复性。另一个用例是验证该语料库本身给出的元数据和转录本，并为语料库中缺失的部分建议人工元数据和转录本。 本文介绍了名为Lahjoita puhetta的芬兰口语语料库，包含约3600小时的日常口语数据，并展示了其在语音识别、年龄性别方言主题检测等任务中的应用案例。 Anssi Moisio,Dejan Porjazovski,Aku Rouhe,Yaroslav Getman,Anja Virkkunen,Tamás Grósz,Krister Lindén,Mikko Kurimo cs.CL,eess.AS

authors_text: Jules Bonnard,Arnaud Dapogny,Ferdinand Dhombres,Kévin Bailly
title: Privileged Attribution Constrained Deep Networks for Facial Expression Recognition
title_zh: 用于面部表情识别的特权归因约束深度网络
abstract: Facial Expression Recognition (FER) is crucial in many research domains because it enables machines to better understand human behaviours. FER methods face the problems of relatively small datasets and noisy data that don't allow classical networks to generalize well. To alleviate these issues, we guide the model to concentrate on specific facial areas like the eyes, the mouth or the eyebrows, which we argue are decisive to recognise facial expressions. We propose the Privileged Attribution Loss (PAL), a method that directs the attention of the model towards the most salient facial regions by encouraging its attribution maps to correspond to a heatmap formed by facial landmarks. Furthermore, we introduce several channel strategies that allow the model to have more degrees of freedom. The proposed method is independent of the backbone architecture and doesn't need additional semantic information at test time. Finally, experimental results show that the proposed PAL method outperforms current state-of-the-art methods on both RAF-DB and AffectNet.
summary: Facial Expression Recognition (FER) is crucial in many research domains because it enables machines to better understand human behaviours. FER methods face the problems of relatively small datasets and noisy data that don't allow classical networks to generalize well. To alleviate these issues, we guide the model to concentrate on specific facial areas like the eyes, the mouth or the eyebrows, which we argue are decisive to recognise facial expressions. We propose the Privileged Attribution Loss (PAL), a method that directs the attention of the model towards the most salient facial regions by encouraging its attribution maps to correspond to a heatmap formed by facial landmarks. Furthermore, we introduce several channel strategies that allow the model to have more degrees of freedom. The proposed method is independent of the backbone architecture and doesn't need additional semantic information at test time. Finally, experimental results show that the proposed PAL method outperforms current state-of-the-art methods on both RAF-DB and AffectNet.
abstract_zh: 面部表情识别（FER）在许多研究领域都至关重要，因为它使机器能够更好地理解人类行为。 FER 方法面临着相对较小的数据集和噪声数据的问题，这些问题不允许经典网络很好地泛化。为了缓解这些问题，我们引导模型专注于特定的面部区域，如眼睛、嘴巴或眉毛，我们认为这些区域对于识别面部表情至关重要。我们提出了特权归因损失（PAL），这种方法通过鼓励模型的归因图与面部标志形成的热图相对应，将模型的注意力引导到最显着的面部区域。此外，我们引入了几种渠道策略，使模型具有更多的自由度。所提出的方法独立于主干架构，并且在测试时不需要额外的语义信息。最后，实验结果表明，所提出的 PAL 方法在 RAF-DB 和 AffectNet 上均优于当前最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于特权属性约束的深度网络方法，用于提升面部表情识别的准确率。
AI.motivation: 面部表情识别面临数据集较小且数据噪声大导致模型泛化能力不足的问题，需通过引导模型关注关键面部区域来改善效果。
AI.method: 提出特权属性损失（PAL），通过使模型的属性图与面部关键点热图对齐，引导模型关注眼睛、嘴巴等关键区域，并引入通道策略增强模型灵活性。
AI.result: 在RAF-DB和AffectNet数据集上，PAL方法优于当前最先进的方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 特权属性约束方法能有效提升面部表情识别性能，且不依赖特定网络结构或额外语义信息，具有良好的通用性。

authors_text: Kim Ngan Phan,Hong-Hai Nguyen,Van-Thong Huynh,Soo-Hyung Kim
title: Facial Expression Classification using Fusion of Deep Neural Network in Video for the 3rd ABAW3 Competition
title_zh: 第三届 ABAW3 竞赛视频中使用深度神经网络融合进行面部表情分类
abstract: For computers to recognize human emotions, expression classification is an equally important problem in the human-computer interaction area. In the 3rd Affective Behavior Analysis In-The-Wild competition, the task of expression classification includes eight classes with six basic expressions of human faces from videos. In this paper, we employ a transformer mechanism to encode the robust representation from the backbone. Fusion of the robust representations plays an important role in the expression classification task. Our approach achieves 30.35\% and 28.60\% for the $F_1$ score on the validation set and the test set, respectively. This result shows the effectiveness of the proposed architecture based on the Aff-Wild2 dataset.
summary: For computers to recognize human emotions, expression classification is an equally important problem in the human-computer interaction area. In the 3rd Affective Behavior Analysis In-The-Wild competition, the task of expression classification includes eight classes with six basic expressions of human faces from videos. In this paper, we employ a transformer mechanism to encode the robust representation from the backbone. Fusion of the robust representations plays an important role in the expression classification task. Our approach achieves 30.35\% and 28.60\% for the $F_1$ score on the validation set and the test set, respectively. This result shows the effectiveness of the proposed architecture based on the Aff-Wild2 dataset.
abstract_zh: 对于计算机识别人类情感而言，表情分类是人机交互领域同样重要的问题。在第三届野外情感行为分析比赛中，表情分类任务包括视频中人脸的六种基本表情的八个类别。在本文中，我们采用变压器机制对主干网的鲁棒表示进行编码。鲁棒表示的融合在表达分类任务中起着重要作用。我们的方法在验证集和测试集上的 $F_1$ 分数分别达到 30.35% 和 28.60%。该结果显示了所提出的基于 Aff-Wild2 数据集的架构的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Transformer机制的视频面部表情分类方法，用于第三届ABAW3竞赛，针对包含六种基本表情的八类分类任务。
AI.motivation: 计算机识别人类情绪需要准确的表情分类技术，而视频中复杂多变的表情识别仍是人机交互领域的挑战性问题。
AI.method: 采用Transformer编码器提取视频骨干网络的鲁棒特征表示，通过多模态特征融合策略提升分类性能。
AI.result: 在验证集和测试集上分别达到30.35%和28.60%的F1分数，验证了基于Aff-Wild2数据集的架构有效性。
AI.conclusion: 融合Transformer特征表示的方法能有效提升视频表情分类准确率，为复杂场景下的情绪识别提供新思路。

authors_text: Marcos Faundez-Zanuy
title: Wide band sub-band speech coding using nonlinear prediction
title_zh: 使用非线性预测的宽带子带语音编码
comment: 4 pages, published in 2003 IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech, and Signal Processing, 2003. Proceedings. (ICASSP '03) Hong Kong, China
comments: 4 pages, published in 2003 IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech, and Signal Processing, 2003. Proceedings. (ICASSP '03) Hong Kong, China
abstract: We compare a wide band sub-band speech coder using ADPCM schemes with linear prediction against the same scheme with nonlinear prediction based on multi-layer perceptrons. Exhaustive results are presented in each band, and the full signal. Our proposed scheme with non-linear neural net prediction outperforms the linear scheme up to 2 dB in SEGSNR. In addition, we propose a simple method based on a non-linearity in order to obtain a synthetic wide band signal from a narrow band signal.
summary: We compare a wide band sub-band speech coder using ADPCM schemes with linear prediction against the same scheme with nonlinear prediction based on multi-layer perceptrons. Exhaustive results are presented in each band, and the full signal. Our proposed scheme with non-linear neural net prediction outperforms the linear scheme up to 2 dB in SEGSNR. In addition, we propose a simple method based on a non-linearity in order to obtain a synthetic wide band signal from a narrow band signal.
abstract_zh: 我们将使用具有线性预测的 ADPCM 方案的宽带子带语音编码器与基于多层感知器的具有非线性预测的相同方案进行比较。每个频段和完整信号均提供详尽的结果。我们提出的非线性神经网络预测方案在 SEGSNR 方面优于线性方案高达 2 dB。此外，我们提出了一种基于非线性的简单方法，以便从窄带信号获得合成宽带信号。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了使用ADPCM方案的宽带子带语音编码器中线性预测与基于多层感知机的非线性预测的效果。
AI.motivation: 为了提高语音编码的质量，研究者希望找到一种比传统线性预测更有效的非线性预测方法。
AI.method: 本文采用ADPCM方案，分别使用线性预测和基于多层感知机的非线性预测进行比较，并提出了一种基于非线性方法从窄带信号合成宽带信号的简单方法。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，使用非线性神经网络预测的方案在SEGSNR方面优于线性方案，最高达2dB。
AI.conclusion: 非线性预测方法在语音编码中表现更优，能够有效提高语音信号的质量。

search_text: Wide band sub-band speech coding using nonlinear prediction 使用非线性预测的宽带子带语音编码 We compare a wide band sub-band speech coder using ADPCM schemes with linear prediction against the same scheme with nonlinear prediction based on multi-layer perceptrons. Exhaustive results are presented in each band, and the full signal. Our proposed scheme with non-linear neural net prediction outperforms the linear scheme up to 2 dB in SEGSNR. In addition, we propose a simple method based on a non-linearity in order to obtain a synthetic wide band signal from a narrow band signal. 我们将使用具有线性预测的 ADPCM 方案的宽带子带语音编码器与基于多层感知器的具有非线性预测的相同方案进行比较。每个频段和完整信号均提供详尽的结果。我们提出的非线性神经网络预测方案在 SEGSNR 方面优于线性方案高达 2 dB。此外，我们提出了一种基于非线性的简单方法，以便从窄带信号获得合成宽带信号。 本文比较了使用ADPCM方案的宽带子带语音编码器中线性预测与基于多层感知机的非线性预测的效果。 Marcos Faundez-Zanuy cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Guido D'Alessandro,Marcos Faundez Zanuy,Francesco Piazza
title: A new subband non linear prediction coding algorithm for narrowband speech signal: The nADPCMB MLT coding scheme
title_zh: 一种新的窄带语音信号子带非线性预测编码算法：nADPCMB MLT编码方案
comment: 4 pages, published in 2002 IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech, and Signal Processing Orlando, FL, USA
comments: 4 pages, published in 2002 IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech, and Signal Processing Orlando, FL, USA
abstract: This paper focuses on a newly developed transparent nADPCMB MLT speech coding algorithm. Our coder first decomposes the narrowband speech signal in subbands, a non linear ADPCM scheme is then performed in each subband. The signal subband decomposition is piloted by the equivalent Modulated Lapped Transform (MLT) filter bank. The novelty of this algorithm is the non linear approach, based on neural networks, to subband prediction coding. We have evaluated the performance of the nADPCMB MLT coding algorithm with a session of formal listening based on the five grade impairment scale standardized within ITU - T Recommendation P.800.
summary: This paper focuses on a newly developed transparent nADPCMB MLT speech coding algorithm. Our coder first decomposes the narrowband speech signal in subbands, a non linear ADPCM scheme is then performed in each subband. The signal subband decomposition is piloted by the equivalent Modulated Lapped Transform (MLT) filter bank. The novelty of this algorithm is the non linear approach, based on neural networks, to subband prediction coding. We have evaluated the performance of the nADPCMB MLT coding algorithm with a session of formal listening based on the five grade impairment scale standardized within ITU - T Recommendation P.800.
abstract_zh: 本文重点研究一种新开发的透明nADPCMB MLT语音编码算法。我们的编码器首先将窄带语音信号分解为子带，然后在每个子带中执行非线性 ADPCM 方案。信号子带分解由等效的调制重叠变换 (MLT) 滤波器组引导。该算法的新颖之处在于基于神经网络的子带预测编码的非线性方法。我们根据 ITU-T 建议 P.800 中标准化的五级损伤量表，通过一次正式聆听会话评估了 nADPCMB MLT 编码算法的性能。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于神经网络的非线性子带预测编码算法nADPCMB MLT，用于窄带语音信号编码。
AI.motivation: 传统ADPCM在语音编码中存在局限性，需通过非线性方法提升编码效率和语音质量。
AI.method: 采用MLT滤波器组分解语音信号为子带，结合神经网络实现非线性子带预测编码。
AI.result: 通过正式听测验证了算法在语音质量上的有效性。
AI.conclusion: nADPCMB MLT算法通过非线性方法提升了窄带语音编码的性能，验证了其有效性。

authors_text: Kecheng Zheng,Yang Cao,Kai Zhu,Ruijing Zhao,Zheng-Jun Zha
title: FAMLP: A Frequency-Aware MLP-Like Architecture For Domain Generalization
title_zh: FAMLP：用于域泛化的类似 MLP 的频率感知架构
abstract: MLP-like models built entirely upon multi-layer perceptrons have recently been revisited, exhibiting the comparable performance with transformers. It is one of most promising architectures due to the excellent trade-off between network capability and efficiency in the large-scale recognition tasks. However, its generalization performance to heterogeneous tasks is inferior to other architectures (e.g., CNNs and transformers) due to the extensive retention of domain information. To address this problem, we propose a novel frequency-aware MLP architecture, in which the domain-specific features are filtered out in the transformed frequency domain, augmenting the invariant descriptor for label prediction. Specifically, we design an adaptive Fourier filter layer, in which a learnable frequency filter is utilized to adjust the amplitude distribution by optimizing both the real and imaginary parts. A low-rank enhancement module is further proposed to rectify the filtered features by adding the low-frequency components from SVD decomposition. Finally, a momentum update strategy is utilized to stabilize the optimization to fluctuation of model parameters and inputs by the output distillation with weighted historical states. To our best knowledge, we are the first to propose a MLP-like backbone for domain generalization. Extensive experiments on three benchmarks demonstrate significant generalization performance, outperforming the state-of-the-art methods by a margin of 3%, 4% and 9%, respectively.
summary: MLP-like models built entirely upon multi-layer perceptrons have recently been revisited, exhibiting the comparable performance with transformers. It is one of most promising architectures due to the excellent trade-off between network capability and efficiency in the large-scale recognition tasks. However, its generalization performance to heterogeneous tasks is inferior to other architectures (e.g., CNNs and transformers) due to the extensive retention of domain information. To address this problem, we propose a novel frequency-aware MLP architecture, in which the domain-specific features are filtered out in the transformed frequency domain, augmenting the invariant descriptor for label prediction. Specifically, we design an adaptive Fourier filter layer, in which a learnable frequency filter is utilized to adjust the amplitude distribution by optimizing both the real and imaginary parts. A low-rank enhancement module is further proposed to rectify the filtered features by adding the low-frequency components from SVD decomposition. Finally, a momentum update strategy is utilized to stabilize the optimization to fluctuation of model parameters and inputs by the output distillation with weighted historical states. To our best knowledge, we are the first to propose a MLP-like backbone for domain generalization. Extensive experiments on three benchmarks demonstrate significant generalization performance, outperforming the state-of-the-art methods by a margin of 3%, 4% and 9%, respectively.
abstract_zh: 完全基于多层感知器构建的类 MLP 模型最近被重新审视，表现出与 Transformer 相当的性能。由于大规模识别任务中网络能力和效率之间的出色权衡，它是最有前途的架构之一。然而，由于域信息的广泛保留，其对异构任务的泛化性能不如其他架构（例如 CNN 和 Transformer）。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的频率感知 MLP 架构，其中在变换后的频域中过滤掉特定于域的特征，从而增强了标签预测的不变描述符。具体来说，我们设计了一个自适应傅立叶滤波器层，其中利用可学习频率滤波器通过优化实部和虚部来调整幅度分布。进一步提出了低秩增强模块，通过添加 SVD 分解的低频分量来纠正过滤后的特征。最后，利用动量更新策略通过加权历史状态的输出蒸馏来稳定模型参数和输入波动的优化。据我们所知，我们是第一个提出类似 MLP 的领域泛化主干的人。对三个基准的大量实验证明了显着的泛化性能，分别比最先进的方法高出 3%、4% 和 9%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种频率感知的MLP架构FAMLP，用于提升领域泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 传统MLP在异构任务中的泛化性能劣于CNN和Transformer，因其保留过多领域特定信息。
AI.method: 设计自适应傅里叶滤波层过滤领域特征，结合低秩增强模块修正特征，并采用动量更新策略稳定优化。
AI.result: 在三个基准测试中分别超越现有方法3%、4%和9%，验证显著泛化性能提升。
AI.conclusion: FAMLP是首个针对领域泛化的MLP主干网络，通过频率域处理有效提升跨领域适应能力。

search_text: FAMLP: A Frequency-Aware MLP-Like Architecture For Domain Generalization FAMLP：用于域泛化的类似 MLP 的频率感知架构 MLP-like models built entirely upon multi-layer perceptrons have recently been revisited, exhibiting the comparable performance with transformers. It is one of most promising architectures due to the excellent trade-off between network capability and efficiency in the large-scale recognition tasks. However, its generalization performance to heterogeneous tasks is inferior to other architectures (e.g., CNNs and transformers) due to the extensive retention of domain information. To address this problem, we propose a novel frequency-aware MLP architecture, in which the domain-specific features are filtered out in the transformed frequency domain, augmenting the invariant descriptor for label prediction. Specifically, we design an adaptive Fourier filter layer, in which a learnable frequency filter is utilized to adjust the amplitude distribution by optimizing both the real and imaginary parts. A low-rank enhancement module is further proposed to rectify the filtered features by adding the low-frequency components from SVD decomposition. Finally, a momentum update strategy is utilized to stabilize the optimization to fluctuation of model parameters and inputs by the output distillation with weighted historical states. To our best knowledge, we are the first to propose a MLP-like backbone for domain generalization. Extensive experiments on three benchmarks demonstrate significant generalization performance, outperforming the state-of-the-art methods by a margin of 3%, 4% and 9%, respectively. 完全基于多层感知器构建的类 MLP 模型最近被重新审视，表现出与 Transformer 相当的性能。由于大规模识别任务中网络能力和效率之间的出色权衡，它是最有前途的架构之一。然而，由于域信息的广泛保留，其对异构任务的泛化性能不如其他架构（例如 CNN 和 Transformer）。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的频率感知 MLP 架构，其中在变换后的频域中过滤掉特定于域的特征，从而增强了标签预测的不变描述符。具体来说，我们设计了一个自适应傅立叶滤波器层，其中利用可学习频率滤波器通过优化实部和虚部来调整幅度分布。进一步提出了低秩增强模块，通过添加 SVD 分解的低频分量来纠正过滤后的特征。最后，利用动量更新策略通过加权历史状态的输出蒸馏来稳定模型参数和输入波动的优化。据我们所知，我们是第一个提出类似 MLP 的领域泛化主干的人。对三个基准的大量实验证明了显着的泛化性能，分别比最先进的方法高出 3%、4% 和 9%。 本文提出一种频率感知的MLP架构FAMLP，用于提升领域泛化能力。 Kecheng Zheng,Yang Cao,Kai Zhu,Ruijing Zhao,Zheng-Jun Zha cs.CV

authors_text: Simon Vandenhende,Dhruv Mahajan,Filip Radenovic,Deepti Ghadiyaram
title: Making Heads or Tails: Towards Semantically Consistent Visual Counterfactuals
title_zh: 取得正面或反面：走向语义一致的视觉反事实
abstract: A visual counterfactual explanation replaces image regions in a query image with regions from a distractor image such that the system's decision on the transformed image changes to the distractor class. In this work, we present a novel framework for computing visual counterfactual explanations based on two key ideas. First, we enforce that the replaced and replacer regions contain the same semantic part, resulting in more semantically consistent explanations. Second, we use multiple distractor images in a computationally efficient way and obtain more discriminative explanations with fewer region replacements. Our approach is 27 % more semantically consistent and an order of magnitude faster than a competing method on three fine-grained image recognition datasets. We highlight the utility of our counterfactuals over existing works through machine teaching experiments where we teach humans to classify different bird species. We also complement our explanations with the vocabulary of parts and attributes that contributed the most to the system's decision. In this task as well, we obtain state-of-the-art results when using our counterfactual explanations relative to existing works, reinforcing the importance of semantically consistent explanations. Source code is available at https://github.com/facebookresearch/visual-counterfactuals.
summary: A visual counterfactual explanation replaces image regions in a query image with regions from a distractor image such that the system's decision on the transformed image changes to the distractor class. In this work, we present a novel framework for computing visual counterfactual explanations based on two key ideas. First, we enforce that the replaced and replacer regions contain the same semantic part, resulting in more semantically consistent explanations. Second, we use multiple distractor images in a computationally efficient way and obtain more discriminative explanations with fewer region replacements. Our approach is 27 % more semantically consistent and an order of magnitude faster than a competing method on three fine-grained image recognition datasets. We highlight the utility of our counterfactuals over existing works through machine teaching experiments where we teach humans to classify different bird species. We also complement our explanations with the vocabulary of parts and attributes that contributed the most to the system's decision. In this task as well, we obtain state-of-the-art results when using our counterfactual explanations relative to existing works, reinforcing the importance of semantically consistent explanations. Source code is available at https://github.com/facebookresearch/visual-counterfactuals.
abstract_zh: 视觉反事实解释将查询图像中的图像区域替换为干扰项图像中的区域，以便系统对变换图像的决策更改为干扰项类。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于两个关键思想的计算视觉反事实解释的新颖框架。首先，我们强制替换区域和替换区域包含相同的语义部分，从而产生语义上更加一致的解释。其次，我们以计算有效的方式使用多个干扰图像，并通过更少的区域替换获得更具辨别力的解释。我们的方法在三个细粒度图像识别数据集上的语义一致性比竞争方法高 27%，速度快一个数量级。我们通过机器教学实验强调了反事实相对于现有作品的效用，在机器教学实验中，我们教人类对不同的鸟类进行分类。我们还用对系统决策贡献最大的部件和属性的词汇来补充我们的解释。在这项任务中，我们在使用与现有作品相关的反事实解释时也获得了最先进的结果，这强化了语义一致解释的重要性。源代码可在 https://github.com/facebookresearch/visual-counterfactuals 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种生成语义一致视觉反事实解释的新框架，通过替换图像区域使系统决策改变为目标类别。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉反事实解释方法存在语义不一致和计算效率低的问题，需提升解释的可解释性和实用性。
AI.method: 基于语义部分匹配的区域替换策略，结合多干扰图像高效计算，减少区域替换次数以提高判别性。
AI.result: 在三个细粒度数据集上，语义一致性提升27%，速度比现有方法快一个数量级，并在人类教学实验中取得最先进结果。
AI.conclusion: 语义一致的反事实解释能显著提升机器教学效果，验证了该方法在可解释AI领域的有效性。

search_text: Making Heads or Tails: Towards Semantically Consistent Visual Counterfactuals 取得正面或反面：走向语义一致的视觉反事实 A visual counterfactual explanation replaces image regions in a query image with regions from a distractor image such that the system's decision on the transformed image changes to the distractor class. In this work, we present a novel framework for computing visual counterfactual explanations based on two key ideas. First, we enforce that the replaced and replacer regions contain the same semantic part, resulting in more semantically consistent explanations. Second, we use multiple distractor images in a computationally efficient way and obtain more discriminative explanations with fewer region replacements. Our approach is 27 % more semantically consistent and an order of magnitude faster than a competing method on three fine-grained image recognition datasets. We highlight the utility of our counterfactuals over existing works through machine teaching experiments where we teach humans to classify different bird species. We also complement our explanations with the vocabulary of parts and attributes that contributed the most to the system's decision. In this task as well, we obtain state-of-the-art results when using our counterfactual explanations relative to existing works, reinforcing the importance of semantically consistent explanations. Source code is available at https://github.com/facebookresearch/visual-counterfactuals. 视觉反事实解释将查询图像中的图像区域替换为干扰项图像中的区域，以便系统对变换图像的决策更改为干扰项类。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于两个关键思想的计算视觉反事实解释的新颖框架。首先，我们强制替换区域和替换区域包含相同的语义部分，从而产生语义上更加一致的解释。其次，我们以计算有效的方式使用多个干扰图像，并通过更少的区域替换获得更具辨别力的解释。我们的方法在三个细粒度图像识别数据集上的语义一致性比竞争方法高 27%，速度快一个数量级。我们通过机器教学实验强调了反事实相对于现有作品的效用，在机器教学实验中，我们教人类对不同的鸟类进行分类。我们还用对系统决策贡献最大的部件和属性的词汇来补充我们的解释。在这项任务中，我们在使用与现有作品相关的反事实解释时也获得了最先进的结果，这强化了语义一致解释的重要性。源代码可在 https://github.com/facebookresearch/visual-counterfactuals 获取。 本文提出一种生成语义一致视觉反事实解释的新框架，通过替换图像区域使系统决策改变为目标类别。 Simon Vandenhende,Dhruv Mahajan,Filip Radenovic,Deepti Ghadiyaram cs.CV

authors_text: Hong-Hai Nguyen,Van-Thong Huynh,Soo-Hyung Kim
title: An Ensemble Approach for Facial Expression Analysis in Video
title_zh: 视频中面部表情分析的集成方法
abstract: Human emotions recognization contributes to the development of human-computer interaction. The machines understanding human emotions in the real world will significantly contribute to life in the future. This paper will introduce the Affective Behavior Analysis in-the-wild (ABAW3) 2022 challenge. The paper focuses on solving the problem of the valence-arousal estimation and action unit detection. For valence-arousal estimation, we conducted two stages: creating new features from multimodel and temporal learning to predict valence-arousal. First, we make new features; the Gated Recurrent Unit (GRU) and Transformer are combined using a Regular Networks (RegNet) feature, which is extracted from the image. The next step is the GRU combined with Local Attention to predict valence-arousal. The Concordance Correlation Coefficient (CCC) was used to evaluate the model.
summary: Human emotions recognization contributes to the development of human-computer interaction. The machines understanding human emotions in the real world will significantly contribute to life in the future. This paper will introduce the Affective Behavior Analysis in-the-wild (ABAW3) 2022 challenge. The paper focuses on solving the problem of the valence-arousal estimation and action unit detection. For valence-arousal estimation, we conducted two stages: creating new features from multimodel and temporal learning to predict valence-arousal. First, we make new features; the Gated Recurrent Unit (GRU) and Transformer are combined using a Regular Networks (RegNet) feature, which is extracted from the image. The next step is the GRU combined with Local Attention to predict valence-arousal. The Concordance Correlation Coefficient (CCC) was used to evaluate the model.
abstract_zh: 人类情绪识别有助于人机交互的发展。理解现实世界中人类情感的机器将为未来的生活做出重大贡献。本文将介绍 2022 年野外情感行为分析 (ABAW3) 挑战赛。本文重点解决价态唤醒估计和动作单元检测问题。对于价唤醒估计，我们进行了两个阶段：从多模型和时间学习创建新特征来预测价唤醒。首先，我们制作新功能；门控循环单元 (GRU) 和 Transformer 使用从图像中提取的常规网络 (RegNet) 特征进行组合。下一步是 GRU 与局部注意力相结合来预测价唤醒。使用一致性相关系数（CCC）来评估模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种集成方法解决视频中面部表情分析的效价-唤醒度估计和动作单元检测问题。
AI.motivation: 情感识别技术对提升人机交互体验具有重要意义，而真实场景下的情感分析仍面临复杂性和动态性挑战。
AI.method: 分两阶段构建模型：第一阶段融合RegNet图像特征与GRU/Transformer多模态时序学习生成新特征；第二阶段采用GRU结合局部注意力机制预测效价-唤醒度，使用CCC指标评估模型性能。
AI.result: 通过ABAW3 2022挑战赛验证了方法在效价-唤醒度估计任务中的有效性，但具体指标数值未明确说明。
AI.conclusion: 该集成方法为复杂场景下的情感分析提供了新思路，未来可进一步优化多模态特征融合策略。

authors_text: Amirhossein Abaskohi,Fatemeh Mortazavi,Hadi Moradi
title: Automatic Speech Recognition for Speech Assessment of Persian Preschool Children
title_zh: 自动语音识别用于波斯语学龄前儿童的言语评估
abstract: Preschool evaluation is crucial because it gives teachers and parents influential knowledge about children's growth and development. The COVID-19 pandemic has highlighted the necessity of online assessment for preschool children. One of the areas that should be tested is their ability to speak. Employing an Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) system would not help since they are pre-trained on voices that differ from children's in terms of frequency and amplitude. Because most of these are pre-trained with data in a specific range of amplitude, their objectives do not make them ready for voices in different amplitudes. To overcome this issue, we added a new objective to the masking objective of the Wav2Vec 2.0 model called Random Frequency Pitch (RFP). In addition, we used our newly introduced dataset to fine-tune our model for Meaningless Words (MW) and Rapid Automatic Naming (RAN) tests. Using masking in concatenation with RFP outperforms the masking objective of Wav2Vec 2.0 by reaching a Word Error Rate (WER) of 1.35. Our new approach reaches a WER of 6.45 on the Persian section of the CommonVoice dataset. Furthermore, our novel methodology produces positive outcomes in zero- and few-shot scenarios.
summary: Preschool evaluation is crucial because it gives teachers and parents influential knowledge about children's growth and development. The COVID-19 pandemic has highlighted the necessity of online assessment for preschool children. One of the areas that should be tested is their ability to speak. Employing an Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) system would not help since they are pre-trained on voices that differ from children's in terms of frequency and amplitude. Because most of these are pre-trained with data in a specific range of amplitude, their objectives do not make them ready for voices in different amplitudes. To overcome this issue, we added a new objective to the masking objective of the Wav2Vec 2.0 model called Random Frequency Pitch (RFP). In addition, we used our newly introduced dataset to fine-tune our model for Meaningless Words (MW) and Rapid Automatic Naming (RAN) tests. Using masking in concatenation with RFP outperforms the masking objective of Wav2Vec 2.0 by reaching a Word Error Rate (WER) of 1.35. Our new approach reaches a WER of 6.45 on the Persian section of the CommonVoice dataset. Furthermore, our novel methodology produces positive outcomes in zero- and few-shot scenarios.
abstract_zh: 学前评估至关重要，因为它为教师和家长提供了有关儿童成长和发展的有影响力的知识。 COVID-19 大流行凸显了学龄前儿童在线评估的必要性。应该测试的领域之一是他们的说话能力。采用自动语音识别（ASR）系统不会有帮助，因为它们是根据与儿童的频率和幅度不同的声音进行预先训练的。由于其中大多数都是使用特定幅度范围内的数据进行预训练的，因此它们的目标并不能让它们为不同幅度的语音做好准备。为了克服这个问题，我们在 Wav2Vec 2.0 模型的掩蔽目标中添加了一个新目标，称为随机频率音调 (RFP)。此外，我们使用新引入的数据集来微调我们的模型，以进行无意义单词 (MW) 和快速自动命名 (RAN) 测试。将屏蔽与 RFP 串联使用，其字错误率 (WER) 达到 1.35，优于 Wav2Vec 2.0 的屏蔽目标。我们的新方法在 CommonVoice 数据集的波斯语部分达到了 6.45 的 WER。此外，我们的新颖方法在零次和少数次场景中产生了积极的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的自动语音识别（ASR）方法，用于评估波斯语学龄前儿童的语音能力。
AI.motivation: 现有ASR系统因预训练数据与儿童语音在频率和幅度上的差异，难以准确评估学龄前儿童的语音能力，而疫情后在线评估需求增加，亟需针对性解决方案。
AI.method: 在Wav2Vec 2.0模型的掩码目标中新增随机频率音高（RFP）目标，并使用自建数据集对模型进行微调，以优化对无意义词（MW）和快速自动命名（RAN）测试的识别能力。
AI.result: 改进方法在测试中达到1.35的词错误率（WER），在波斯语CommonVoice数据集上实现6.45的WER，且在零样本和少样本场景下表现良好。
AI.conclusion: 新方法有效提升了儿童语音识别的准确性，为疫情下在线评估提供了可行的技术支持，尤其适用于资源受限场景。

motivation: 现有ASR系统因预训练数据与儿童语音在频率和幅度上的差异，难以准确评估学龄前儿童的语音能力，而疫情后在线评估需求增加，亟需针对性解决方案。
method: 在Wav2Vec 2.0模型的掩码目标中新增随机频率音高（RFP）目标，并使用自建数据集对模型进行微调，以优化对无意义词（MW）和快速自动命名（RAN）测试的识别能力。
result: 改进方法在测试中达到1.35的词错误率（WER），在波斯语CommonVoice数据集上实现6.45的WER，且在零样本和少样本场景下表现良好。
conclusion: 新方法有效提升了儿童语音识别的准确性，为疫情下在线评估提供了可行的技术支持，尤其适用于资源受限场景。
search_text: Automatic Speech Recognition for Speech Assessment of Persian Preschool Children 自动语音识别用于波斯语学龄前儿童的言语评估 Preschool evaluation is crucial because it gives teachers and parents influential knowledge about children's growth and development. The COVID-19 pandemic has highlighted the necessity of online assessment for preschool children. One of the areas that should be tested is their ability to speak. Employing an Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) system would not help since they are pre-trained on voices that differ from children's in terms of frequency and amplitude. Because most of these are pre-trained with data in a specific range of amplitude, their objectives do not make them ready for voices in different amplitudes. To overcome this issue, we added a new objective to the masking objective of the Wav2Vec 2.0 model called Random Frequency Pitch (RFP). In addition, we used our newly introduced dataset to fine-tune our model for Meaningless Words (MW) and Rapid Automatic Naming (RAN) tests. Using masking in concatenation with RFP outperforms the masking objective of Wav2Vec 2.0 by reaching a Word Error Rate (WER) of 1.35. Our new approach reaches a WER of 6.45 on the Persian section of the CommonVoice dataset. Furthermore, our novel methodology produces positive outcomes in zero- and few-shot scenarios. 学前评估至关重要，因为它为教师和家长提供了有关儿童成长和发展的有影响力的知识。 COVID-19 大流行凸显了学龄前儿童在线评估的必要性。应该测试的领域之一是他们的说话能力。采用自动语音识别（ASR）系统不会有帮助，因为它们是根据与儿童的频率和幅度不同的声音进行预先训练的。由于其中大多数都是使用特定幅度范围内的数据进行预训练的，因此它们的目标并不能让它们为不同幅度的语音做好准备。为了克服这个问题，我们在 Wav2Vec 2.0 模型的掩蔽目标中添加了一个新目标，称为随机频率音调 (RFP)。此外，我们使用新引入的数据集来微调我们的模型，以进行无意义单词 (MW) 和快速自动命名 (RAN) 测试。将屏蔽与 RFP 串联使用，其字错误率 (WER) 达到 1.35，优于 Wav2Vec 2.0 的屏蔽目标。我们的新方法在 CommonVoice 数据集的波斯语部分达到了 6.45 的 WER。此外，我们的新颖方法在零次和少数次场景中产生了积极的结果。 本文提出了一种改进的自动语音识别（ASR）方法，用于评估波斯语学龄前儿童的语音能力。 Amirhossein Abaskohi,Fatemeh Mortazavi,Hadi Moradi cs.CL,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Tim Beyer,Angela Dai
title: Weakly-Supervised End-to-End CAD Retrieval to Scan Objects
title_zh: 用于扫描对象的弱监督端到端 CAD 检索
abstract: CAD model retrieval to real-world scene observations has shown strong promise as a basis for 3D perception of objects and a clean, lightweight mesh-based scene representation; however, current approaches to retrieve CAD models to a query scan rely on expensive manual annotations of 1:1 associations of CAD-scan objects, which typically contain strong lower-level geometric differences. We thus propose a new weakly-supervised approach to retrieve semantically and structurally similar CAD models to a query 3D scanned scene without requiring any CAD-scan associations, and only object detection information as oriented bounding boxes. Our approach leverages a fully-differentiable top-$k$ retrieval layer, enabling end-to-end training guided by geometric and perceptual similarity of the top retrieved CAD models to the scan queries. We demonstrate that our weakly-supervised approach can outperform fully-supervised retrieval methods on challenging real-world ScanNet scans, and maintain robustness for unseen class categories, achieving significantly improved performance over fully-supervised state of the art in zero-shot CAD retrieval.
summary: CAD model retrieval to real-world scene observations has shown strong promise as a basis for 3D perception of objects and a clean, lightweight mesh-based scene representation; however, current approaches to retrieve CAD models to a query scan rely on expensive manual annotations of 1:1 associations of CAD-scan objects, which typically contain strong lower-level geometric differences. We thus propose a new weakly-supervised approach to retrieve semantically and structurally similar CAD models to a query 3D scanned scene without requiring any CAD-scan associations, and only object detection information as oriented bounding boxes. Our approach leverages a fully-differentiable top-$k$ retrieval layer, enabling end-to-end training guided by geometric and perceptual similarity of the top retrieved CAD models to the scan queries. We demonstrate that our weakly-supervised approach can outperform fully-supervised retrieval methods on challenging real-world ScanNet scans, and maintain robustness for unseen class categories, achieving significantly improved performance over fully-supervised state of the art in zero-shot CAD retrieval.
abstract_zh: 对现实世界场景观察的 CAD 模型检索已显示出作为对象 3D 感知和干净、轻量级基于网格的场景表示的基础的强大前景；然而，当前检索 CAD 模型以进行查询扫描的方法依赖于对 CAD 扫描对象的 1:1 关联进行昂贵的手动注释，这些关联通常包含强烈的较低级别的几何差异。因此，我们提出了一种新的弱监督方法，用于检索语义和结构上与查询 3D 扫描场景相似的 CAD 模型，而不需要任何 CAD 扫描关联，并且仅需要对象检测信息作为定向边界框。我们的方法利用完全可微的 top-$k$ 检索层，通过顶部检索的 CAD 模型与扫描查询的几何和感知相似性来进行端到端训练。我们证明，在具有挑战性的现实世界 ScanNet 扫描中，我们的弱监督方法可以优于完全监督的检索方法，并保持对未见过的类别类别的鲁棒性，从而在零样本 CAD 检索中实现比完全监督的最先进技术显着提高的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种弱监督端到端方法，无需手动标注的CAD-扫描关联，仅利用物体检测信息，实现从扫描场景中检索语义和结构相似的CAD模型。
AI.motivation: 现有CAD模型检索方法依赖昂贵的手动标注CAD-扫描一对一关联，且面临几何差异问题，需降低标注成本并提升鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计全微分top-k检索层，结合几何与感知相似性进行端到端训练，仅需物体检测的定向边界框作为弱监督信号。
AI.result: 在ScanNet数据集上优于全监督方法，且在未见类别（zero-shot）中保持稳健性能，显著提升零样本CAD检索效果。
AI.conclusion: 弱监督方法在CAD检索任务中有效，尤其适用于标注成本高和零样本场景，为3D感知提供轻量级场景表示新思路。

authors_text: Shijie Zhang,Lanjun Wang,Lian Ding,An-an Liu,Senhua Zhu,Dandan Tu
title: Intrinsic Bias Identification on Medical Image Datasets
title_zh: 医学图像数据集的内在偏差识别
abstract: Machine learning based medical image analysis highly depends on datasets. Biases in the dataset can be learned by the model and degrade the generalizability of the applications. There are studies on debiased models. However, scientists and practitioners are difficult to identify implicit biases in the datasets, which causes lack of reliable unbias test datasets to valid models. To tackle this issue, we first define the data intrinsic bias attribute, and then propose a novel bias identification framework for medical image datasets. The framework contains two major components, KlotskiNet and Bias Discriminant Direction Analysis(bdda), where KlostkiNet is to build the mapping which makes backgrounds to distinguish positive and negative samples and bdda provides a theoretical solution on determining bias attributes. Experimental results on three datasets show the effectiveness of the bias attributes discovered by the framework.
summary: Machine learning based medical image analysis highly depends on datasets. Biases in the dataset can be learned by the model and degrade the generalizability of the applications. There are studies on debiased models. However, scientists and practitioners are difficult to identify implicit biases in the datasets, which causes lack of reliable unbias test datasets to valid models. To tackle this issue, we first define the data intrinsic bias attribute, and then propose a novel bias identification framework for medical image datasets. The framework contains two major components, KlotskiNet and Bias Discriminant Direction Analysis(bdda), where KlostkiNet is to build the mapping which makes backgrounds to distinguish positive and negative samples and bdda provides a theoretical solution on determining bias attributes. Experimental results on three datasets show the effectiveness of the bias attributes discovered by the framework.
abstract_zh: 基于机器学习的医学图像分析高度依赖于数据集。模型可以学习数据集中的偏差，并降低应用程序的通用性。有关于去偏模型的研究。然而，科学家和实践者很难识别数据集中的隐含偏差，这导致缺乏对有效模型可靠的无偏差测试数据集。为了解决这个问题，我们首先定义数据固有偏差属性，然后提出一种新的医学图像数据集偏差识别框架。该框架包含两个主要组件，KlotskiNet和偏差判别方向分析（bdda），其中KlostkiNet是构建使背景区分正负样本的映射，bdda提供了确定偏差属性的理论解决方案。三个数据集的实验结果表明了该框架发现的偏差属性的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种医学图像数据集内在偏差识别框架，包含KlotskiNet和BDDA两个核心组件，用于发现影响模型泛化的隐含数据偏差。
AI.motivation: 医学图像分析模型依赖数据集质量，但现有研究难以识别隐含偏差，导致缺乏可靠无偏测试数据集验证模型效果。
AI.method: 构建包含KlotskiNet（建立背景区分正负样本的映射）和BDDA（理论解确定偏差属性）的双组件框架，通过映射学习和理论分析实现偏差识别。
AI.result: 在三个医学图像数据集的实验验证中，框架有效发现了数据集的内在偏差属性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为医学图像数据集的偏差识别提供了新方法，为构建更可靠的无偏测试数据集奠定基础。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种医学图像数据集内在偏差识别框架，包含KlotskiNet和BDDA两个核心组件，用于发现影响模型泛化的隐含数据偏差。

authors_text: Yan Xu,Kwan-Yee Lin,Guofeng Zhang,Xiaogang Wang,Hongsheng Li
title: RNNPose: Recurrent 6-DoF Object Pose Refinement with Robust Correspondence Field Estimation and Pose Optimization
title_zh: RNNPose：具有鲁棒对应场估计和姿势优化的循环 6-DoF 对象姿势细化
abstract: 6-DoF object pose estimation from a monocular image is challenging, and a post-refinement procedure is generally needed for high-precision estimation. In this paper, we propose a framework based on a recurrent neural network (RNN) for object pose refinement, which is robust to erroneous initial poses and occlusions. During the recurrent iterations, object pose refinement is formulated as a non-linear least squares problem based on the estimated correspondence field (between a rendered image and the observed image). The problem is then solved by a differentiable Levenberg-Marquardt (LM) algorithm enabling end-to-end training. The correspondence field estimation and pose refinement are conducted alternatively in each iteration to recover the object poses. Furthermore, to improve the robustness to occlusion, we introduce a consistency-check mechanism based on the learned descriptors of the 3D model and observed 2D images, which downweights the unreliable correspondences during pose optimization. Extensive experiments on LINEMOD, Occlusion-LINEMOD, and YCB-Video datasets validate the effectiveness of our method and demonstrate state-of-the-art performance.
summary: 6-DoF object pose estimation from a monocular image is challenging, and a post-refinement procedure is generally needed for high-precision estimation. In this paper, we propose a framework based on a recurrent neural network (RNN) for object pose refinement, which is robust to erroneous initial poses and occlusions. During the recurrent iterations, object pose refinement is formulated as a non-linear least squares problem based on the estimated correspondence field (between a rendered image and the observed image). The problem is then solved by a differentiable Levenberg-Marquardt (LM) algorithm enabling end-to-end training. The correspondence field estimation and pose refinement are conducted alternatively in each iteration to recover the object poses. Furthermore, to improve the robustness to occlusion, we introduce a consistency-check mechanism based on the learned descriptors of the 3D model and observed 2D images, which downweights the unreliable correspondences during pose optimization. Extensive experiments on LINEMOD, Occlusion-LINEMOD, and YCB-Video datasets validate the effectiveness of our method and demonstrate state-of-the-art performance.
abstract_zh: 从单目图像进行 6-DoF 物体姿态估计具有挑战性，并且通常需要后细化过程来实现高精度估计。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于循环神经网络（RNN）的用于对象姿势细化的框架，该框架对错误的初始姿势和遮挡具有鲁棒性。在循环迭代期间，对象姿态细化被公式化为基于估计的对应场（渲染图像和观察图像之间）的非线性最小二乘问题。然后通过支持端到端训练的可微分 Levenberg-Marquardt (LM) 算法解决该问题。在每次迭代中交替进行对应场估计和姿态细化以恢复对象姿态。此外，为了提高遮挡的鲁棒性，我们引入了一种基于 3D 模型学习描述符和观察到的 2D 图像的一致性检查机制，该机制降低了姿态优化期间不可靠对应的权重。在 LINEMOD、Occlusion-LINEMOD 和 YCB-Video 数据集上进行的大量实验验证了我们方法的有效性并展示了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于循环神经网络（RNN）的6自由度物体姿态优化方法，用于从单目图像中进行高精度的姿态估计。
AI.motivation: 从单目图像中进行6自由度物体姿态估计具有挑战性，通常需要后优化过程以提高精度。现有方法对初始姿态误差和遮挡较为敏感，因此需要一种鲁棒的优化方法。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种基于RNN的框架，通过递归迭代将姿态优化建模为非线性最小二乘问题，并采用可微的Levenberg-Marquardt算法进行端到端训练。此外，引入了一种基于3D模型和2D图像描述符的一致性检查机制，以提高对遮挡的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在LINEMOD、Occlusion-LINEMOD和YCB-Video数据集上的实验验证了该方法的有效性，并展示了其在姿态估计方面的先进性能。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的方法在鲁棒性、对初始姿态误差和遮挡的处理上表现优异，为6自由度物体姿态估计提供了一种新的有效解决方案。

search_text: RNNPose: Recurrent 6-DoF Object Pose Refinement with Robust Correspondence Field Estimation and Pose Optimization RNNPose：具有鲁棒对应场估计和姿势优化的循环 6-DoF 对象姿势细化 6-DoF object pose estimation from a monocular image is challenging, and a post-refinement procedure is generally needed for high-precision estimation. In this paper, we propose a framework based on a recurrent neural network (RNN) for object pose refinement, which is robust to erroneous initial poses and occlusions. During the recurrent iterations, object pose refinement is formulated as a non-linear least squares problem based on the estimated correspondence field (between a rendered image and the observed image). The problem is then solved by a differentiable Levenberg-Marquardt (LM) algorithm enabling end-to-end training. The correspondence field estimation and pose refinement are conducted alternatively in each iteration to recover the object poses. Furthermore, to improve the robustness to occlusion, we introduce a consistency-check mechanism based on the learned descriptors of the 3D model and observed 2D images, which downweights the unreliable correspondences during pose optimization. Extensive experiments on LINEMOD, Occlusion-LINEMOD, and YCB-Video datasets validate the effectiveness of our method and demonstrate state-of-the-art performance. 从单目图像进行 6-DoF 物体姿态估计具有挑战性，并且通常需要后细化过程来实现高精度估计。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于循环神经网络（RNN）的用于对象姿势细化的框架，该框架对错误的初始姿势和遮挡具有鲁棒性。在循环迭代期间，对象姿态细化被公式化为基于估计的对应场（渲染图像和观察图像之间）的非线性最小二乘问题。然后通过支持端到端训练的可微分 Levenberg-Marquardt (LM) 算法解决该问题。在每次迭代中交替进行对应场估计和姿态细化以恢复对象姿态。此外，为了提高遮挡的鲁棒性，我们引入了一种基于 3D 模型学习描述符和观察到的 2D 图像的一致性检查机制，该机制降低了姿态优化期间不可靠对应的权重。在 LINEMOD、Occlusion-LINEMOD 和 YCB-Video 数据集上进行的大量实验验证了我们方法的有效性并展示了最先进的性能。 本文提出了一种基于循环神经网络（RNN）的6自由度物体姿态优化方法，用于从单目图像中进行高精度的姿态估计。 Yan Xu,Kwan-Yee Lin,Guofeng Zhang,Xiaogang Wang,Hongsheng Li cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Tao Huang,Shan You,Bohan Zhang,Yuxuan Du,Fei Wang,Chen Qian,Chang Xu
title: DyRep: Bootstrapping Training with Dynamic Re-parameterization
title_zh: DyRep：通过动态重新参数化进行引导训练
abstract: Structural re-parameterization (Rep) methods achieve noticeable improvements on simple VGG-style networks. Despite the prevalence, current Rep methods simply re-parameterize all operations into an augmented network, including those that rarely contribute to the model's performance. As such, the price to pay is an expensive computational overhead to manipulate these unnecessary behaviors. To eliminate the above caveats, we aim to bootstrap the training with minimal cost by devising a dynamic re-parameterization (DyRep) method, which encodes Rep technique into the training process that dynamically evolves the network structures. Concretely, our proposal adaptively finds the operations which contribute most to the loss in the network, and applies Rep to enhance their representational capacity. Besides, to suppress the noisy and redundant operations introduced by Rep, we devise a de-parameterization technique for a more compact re-parameterization. With this regard, DyRep is more efficient than Rep since it smoothly evolves the given network instead of constructing an over-parameterized network. Experimental results demonstrate our effectiveness, e.g., DyRep improves the accuracy of ResNet-18 by $2.04\%$ on ImageNet and reduces $22\%$ runtime over the baseline. Code is available at: https://github.com/hunto/DyRep.
summary: Structural re-parameterization (Rep) methods achieve noticeable improvements on simple VGG-style networks. Despite the prevalence, current Rep methods simply re-parameterize all operations into an augmented network, including those that rarely contribute to the model's performance. As such, the price to pay is an expensive computational overhead to manipulate these unnecessary behaviors. To eliminate the above caveats, we aim to bootstrap the training with minimal cost by devising a dynamic re-parameterization (DyRep) method, which encodes Rep technique into the training process that dynamically evolves the network structures. Concretely, our proposal adaptively finds the operations which contribute most to the loss in the network, and applies Rep to enhance their representational capacity. Besides, to suppress the noisy and redundant operations introduced by Rep, we devise a de-parameterization technique for a more compact re-parameterization. With this regard, DyRep is more efficient than Rep since it smoothly evolves the given network instead of constructing an over-parameterized network. Experimental results demonstrate our effectiveness, e.g., DyRep improves the accuracy of ResNet-18 by $2.04\%$ on ImageNet and reduces $22\%$ runtime over the baseline. Code is available at: https://github.com/hunto/DyRep.
abstract_zh: 结构重新参数化 (Rep) 方法在简单的 VGG 式网络上取得了显着的改进。尽管流行，当前的 Rep 方法只是将所有操作重新参数化到增强网络中，包括那些很少对模型性能做出贡献的操作。因此，操纵这些不必要的行为所付出的代价是昂贵的计算开销。为了消除上述问题，我们的目标是通过设计动态重新参数化（DyRep）方法以最小的成本引导训练，该方法将 Rep 技术编码到动态演化网络结构的训练过程中。具体来说，我们的建议自适应地找到对网络损失贡献最大的操作，并应用 Rep 来增强它们的表示能力。此外，为了抑制 Rep 引入的噪声和冗余操作，我们设计了一种去参数化技术，以实现更紧凑的重新参数化。在这方面，DyRep 比 Rep 更高效，因为它平滑地演化给定网络，而不是构建过度参数化的网络。实验结果证明了我们的有效性，例如，DyRep 在 ImageNet 上将 ResNet-18 的准确性提高了 $2.04\%$，并在基线上减少了 $22\%$ 运行时间。代码位于：https://github.com/hunto/DyRep。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DyRep方法，通过动态重参数化技术提升神经网络训练效率与性能。
AI.motivation: 现有重参数化方法对所有操作进行统一重参数化，导致计算开销大且包含冗余操作，影响效率。
AI.method: 动态识别对损失贡献最大的网络操作进行重参数化，并引入去参数化技术减少冗余，实现网络结构的动态演化。
AI.result: 在ImageNet数据集上，DyRep使ResNet-18准确率提升2.04%，推理速度加快22%。
AI.conclusion: DyRep通过动态结构优化，在保持模型性能的同时显著降低计算成本，优于传统重参数化方法。

authors_text: Marlon Bran Lorenzana,Craig Engstrom,Shekhar S. Chandra
title: Transformer Compressed Sensing via Global Image Tokens
title_zh: 通过全局图像令牌的变压器压缩感知
abstract: Convolutional neural networks (CNN) have demonstrated outstanding Compressed Sensing (CS) performance compared to traditional, hand-crafted methods. However, they are broadly limited in terms of generalisability, inductive bias and difficulty to model long distance relationships. Transformer neural networks (TNN) overcome such issues by implementing an attention mechanism designed to capture dependencies between inputs. However, high-resolution tasks typically require vision Transformers (ViT) to decompose an image into patch-based tokens, limiting inputs to inherently local contexts. We propose a novel image decomposition that naturally embeds images into low-resolution inputs. These Kaleidoscope tokens (KD) provide a mechanism for global attention, at the same computational cost as a patch-based approach. To showcase this development, we replace CNN components in a well-known CS-MRI neural network with TNN blocks and demonstrate the improvements afforded by KD. We also propose an ensemble of image tokens, which enhance overall image quality and reduces model size. Supplementary material is available: https://github.com/uqmarlonbran/TCS.git
summary: Convolutional neural networks (CNN) have demonstrated outstanding Compressed Sensing (CS) performance compared to traditional, hand-crafted methods. However, they are broadly limited in terms of generalisability, inductive bias and difficulty to model long distance relationships. Transformer neural networks (TNN) overcome such issues by implementing an attention mechanism designed to capture dependencies between inputs. However, high-resolution tasks typically require vision Transformers (ViT) to decompose an image into patch-based tokens, limiting inputs to inherently local contexts. We propose a novel image decomposition that naturally embeds images into low-resolution inputs. These Kaleidoscope tokens (KD) provide a mechanism for global attention, at the same computational cost as a patch-based approach. To showcase this development, we replace CNN components in a well-known CS-MRI neural network with TNN blocks and demonstrate the improvements afforded by KD. We also propose an ensemble of image tokens, which enhance overall image quality and reduces model size. Supplementary material is available: https://github.com/uqmarlonbran/TCS.git
abstract_zh: 与传统的手工方法相比，卷积神经网络 (CNN) 表现出了出色的压缩感知 (CS) 性能。然而，它们在普遍性、归纳偏差和对远距离关系建模的难度方面受到广泛限制。 Transformer 神经网络 (TNN) 通过实施旨在捕获输入之间依赖关系的注意力机制来克服此类问题。然而，高分辨率任务通常需要视觉 Transformer (ViT) 将图像分解为基于补丁的标记，从而将输入限制为固有的本地上下文。我们提出了一种新颖的图像分解，可以自然地将图像嵌入到低分辨率输入中。这些万花筒代币（KD）提供了一种全局注意力机制，其计算成本与基于补丁的方法相同。为了展示这一进展，我们用 TNN 块替换了著名的 CS-MRI 神经网络中的 CNN 组件，并展示了 KD 提供的改进。我们还提出了图像令牌的集合，它可以提高整体图像质量并减小模型大小。提供补充材料：https://github.com/uqmarlonbran/TCS.git

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于全局图像标记（KD）的Transformer压缩感知方法，通过改进传统CNN和ViT的局限性，提升MRI图像重建性能。
AI.motivation: CNN在压缩感知中表现优异但存在泛化性和长距离建模不足，而ViT因基于块的局部上下文限制难以处理高分辨率任务，需探索更高效的全局注意力机制。
AI.method: 设计低分辨率Kaleidoscope标记（KD）实现全局注意力，将Transformer模块替代CNN组件，并提出图像标记集成策略以优化模型规模与图像质量。
AI.result: 实验表明，KD方法在CS-MRI任务中提升图像重建质量，同时减少模型参数量，计算成本与基于块的ViT相当。
AI.conclusion: KD标记有效融合全局信息，为高分辨率压缩感知提供新思路，证明Transformer在保持效率的同时可超越传统CNN和局部ViT的性能。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于全局图像标记（KD）的Transformer压缩感知方法，通过改进传统CNN和ViT的局限性，提升MRI图像重建性能。
ai_content.motivation: CNN在压缩感知中表现优异但存在泛化性和长距离建模不足，而ViT因基于块的局部上下文限制难以处理高分辨率任务，需探索更高效的全局注意力机制。
ai_content.method: 设计低分辨率Kaleidoscope标记（KD）实现全局注意力，将Transformer模块替代CNN组件，并提出图像标记集成策略以优化模型规模与图像质量。
ai_content.result: 实验表明，KD方法在CS-MRI任务中提升图像重建质量，同时减少模型参数量，计算成本与基于块的ViT相当。
ai_content.conclusion: KD标记有效融合全局信息，为高分辨率压缩感知提供新思路，证明Transformer在保持效率的同时可超越传统CNN和局部ViT的性能。

search_text: Transformer Compressed Sensing via Global Image Tokens 通过全局图像令牌的变压器压缩感知 Convolutional neural networks (CNN) have demonstrated outstanding Compressed Sensing (CS) performance compared to traditional, hand-crafted methods. However, they are broadly limited in terms of generalisability, inductive bias and difficulty to model long distance relationships. Transformer neural networks (TNN) overcome such issues by implementing an attention mechanism designed to capture dependencies between inputs. However, high-resolution tasks typically require vision Transformers (ViT) to decompose an image into patch-based tokens, limiting inputs to inherently local contexts. We propose a novel image decomposition that naturally embeds images into low-resolution inputs. These Kaleidoscope tokens (KD) provide a mechanism for global attention, at the same computational cost as a patch-based approach. To showcase this development, we replace CNN components in a well-known CS-MRI neural network with TNN blocks and demonstrate the improvements afforded by KD. We also propose an ensemble of image tokens, which enhance overall image quality and reduces model size. Supplementary material is available: https://github.com/uqmarlonbran/TCS.git 与传统的手工方法相比，卷积神经网络 (CNN) 表现出了出色的压缩感知 (CS) 性能。然而，它们在普遍性、归纳偏差和对远距离关系建模的难度方面受到广泛限制。 Transformer 神经网络 (TNN) 通过实施旨在捕获输入之间依赖关系的注意力机制来克服此类问题。然而，高分辨率任务通常需要视觉 Transformer (ViT) 将图像分解为基于补丁的标记，从而将输入限制为固有的本地上下文。我们提出了一种新颖的图像分解，可以自然地将图像嵌入到低分辨率输入中。这些万花筒代币（KD）提供了一种全局注意力机制，其计算成本与基于补丁的方法相同。为了展示这一进展，我们用 TNN 块替换了著名的 CS-MRI 神经网络中的 CNN 组件，并展示了 KD 提供的改进。我们还提出了图像令牌的集合，它可以提高整体图像质量并减小模型大小。提供补充材料：https://github.com/uqmarlonbran/TCS.git 本文提出一种基于全局图像标记（KD）的Transformer压缩感知方法，通过改进传统CNN和ViT的局限性，提升MRI图像重建性能。 Marlon Bran Lorenzana,Craig Engstrom,Shekhar S. Chandra cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Pengzhen Ren,Changlin Li,Guangrun Wang,Yun Xiao,Qing Du,Xiaodan Liang,Xiaojun Chang
title: Beyond Fixation: Dynamic Window Visual Transformer
title_zh: 超越固定：动态窗口视觉转换器
abstract: Recently, a surge of interest in visual transformers is to reduce the computational cost by limiting the calculation of self-attention to a local window. Most current work uses a fixed single-scale window for modeling by default, ignoring the impact of window size on model performance. However, this may limit the modeling potential of these window-based models for multi-scale information. In this paper, we propose a novel method, named Dynamic Window Vision Transformer (DW-ViT). The dynamic window strategy proposed by DW-ViT goes beyond the model that employs a fixed single window setting. To the best of our knowledge, we are the first to use dynamic multi-scale windows to explore the upper limit of the effect of window settings on model performance. In DW-ViT, multi-scale information is obtained by assigning windows of different sizes to different head groups of window multi-head self-attention. Then, the information is dynamically fused by assigning different weights to the multi-scale window branches. We conducted a detailed performance evaluation on three datasets, ImageNet-1K, ADE20K, and COCO. Compared with related state-of-the-art (SoTA) methods, DW-ViT obtains the best performance. Specifically, compared with the current SoTA Swin Transformers \cite{liu2021swin}, DW-ViT has achieved consistent and substantial improvements on all three datasets with similar parameters and computational costs. In addition, DW-ViT exhibits good scalability and can be easily inserted into any window-based visual transformers.
summary: Recently, a surge of interest in visual transformers is to reduce the computational cost by limiting the calculation of self-attention to a local window. Most current work uses a fixed single-scale window for modeling by default, ignoring the impact of window size on model performance. However, this may limit the modeling potential of these window-based models for multi-scale information. In this paper, we propose a novel method, named Dynamic Window Vision Transformer (DW-ViT). The dynamic window strategy proposed by DW-ViT goes beyond the model that employs a fixed single window setting. To the best of our knowledge, we are the first to use dynamic multi-scale windows to explore the upper limit of the effect of window settings on model performance. In DW-ViT, multi-scale information is obtained by assigning windows of different sizes to different head groups of window multi-head self-attention. Then, the information is dynamically fused by assigning different weights to the multi-scale window branches. We conducted a detailed performance evaluation on three datasets, ImageNet-1K, ADE20K, and COCO. Compared with related state-of-the-art (SoTA) methods, DW-ViT obtains the best performance. Specifically, compared with the current SoTA Swin Transformers \cite{liu2021swin}, DW-ViT has achieved consistent and substantial improvements on all three datasets with similar parameters and computational costs. In addition, DW-ViT exhibits good scalability and can be easily inserted into any window-based visual transformers.
abstract_zh: 最近，人们对视觉变换器的兴趣激增，通过将自注意力的计算限制在局部窗口来降低计算成本。当前大多数工作默认使用固定的单尺度窗口进行建模，忽略了窗口大小对模型性能的影响。然而，这可能会限制这些基于窗口的模型对多尺度信息的建模潜力。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的方法，称为动态窗口视觉变换器（DW-ViT）。 DW-ViT 提出的动态窗口策略超越了采用固定单窗口设置的模型。据我们所知，我们是第一个使用动态多尺度窗口来探索窗口设置对模型性能影响的上限。在DW-ViT中，通过将不同大小的窗口分配给窗口多头自注意力的不同头组来获得多尺度信息。然后，通过为多尺度窗口分支分配不同的权重来动态融合信息。我们对 ImageNet-1K、ADE20K 和 COCO 三个数据集进行了详细的性能评估。与相关的最先进（SoTA）方法相比，DW-ViT 获得了最佳性能。具体来说，与当前的 SoTA Swin Transformers \cite{liu2021swin} 相比，DW-ViT 在具有相似参数和计算成本的所有三个数据集上都取得了一致且实质性的改进。此外，DW-ViT 具有良好的可扩展性，可以轻松插入任何基于窗口的视觉转换器。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Dynamic Window Vision Transformer (DW-ViT)的新方法，通过动态多尺度窗口策略改进视觉Transformer的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉Transformer模型通常采用固定单尺度窗口限制计算成本，但忽视了窗口尺寸对多尺度信息建模能力的影响，限制了模型性能上限。
AI.method: 通过为窗口多头自注意力的不同头组分配不同尺寸的窗口获取多尺度信息，并动态分配权重融合多尺度窗口分支信息。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-1K、ADE20K和COCO三个数据集上均超越当前SOTA的Swin Transformer，在参数量和计算成本相近的情况下实现稳定显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 动态多尺度窗口策略能有效提升视觉Transformer对多尺度信息的建模能力，且具有良好的可扩展性，可无缝集成到任何基于窗口的视觉Transformer架构中。

authors_text: Joseph Stember,Robert Young,Hrithwik Shalu
title: Direct evaluation of progression or regression of disease burden in brain metastatic disease with Deep Neuroevolution
title_zh: 利用 Deep Neuroevolution 直接评估脑转移性疾病疾病负担的进展或消退
abstract: Purpose: A core component of advancing cancer treatment research is assessing response to therapy. Doing so by hand, for example as per RECIST or RANO criteria, is tedious, time-consuming, and can miss important tumor response information; most notably, they exclude non-target lesions. We wish to assess change in a holistic fashion that includes all lesions, obtaining simple, informative, and automated assessments of tumor progression or regression. Due to often low patient enrolments in clinical trials, we wish to make response assessments with small training sets. Deep neuroevolution (DNE) can produce radiology artificial intelligence (AI) that performs well on small training sets. Here we use DNE for function approximation that predicts progression versus regression of metastatic brain disease. Methods: We analyzed 50 pairs of MRI contrast-enhanced images as our training set. Half of these pairs, separated in time, qualified as disease progression, while the other 25 images constituted regression. We trained the parameters of a relatively small CNN via mutations that consisted of random CNN weight adjustments and mutation fitness. We then incorporated the best mutations into the next generations CNN, repeating this process for approximately 50,000 generations. We applied the CNNs to our training set, as well as a separate testing set with the same class balance of 25 progression and 25 regression images. Results: DNE achieved monotonic convergence to 100% training set accuracy. DNE also converged monotonically to 100% testing set accuracy. Conclusion: DNE can accurately classify brain-metastatic disease progression versus regression. Future work will extend the input from 2D image slices to full 3D volumes, and include the category of no change. We believe that an approach such as our could ultimately provide a useful adjunct to RANO/RECIST assessment.
summary: Purpose: A core component of advancing cancer treatment research is assessing response to therapy. Doing so by hand, for example as per RECIST or RANO criteria, is tedious, time-consuming, and can miss important tumor response information; most notably, they exclude non-target lesions. We wish to assess change in a holistic fashion that includes all lesions, obtaining simple, informative, and automated assessments of tumor progression or regression. Due to often low patient enrolments in clinical trials, we wish to make response assessments with small training sets. Deep neuroevolution (DNE) can produce radiology artificial intelligence (AI) that performs well on small training sets. Here we use DNE for function approximation that predicts progression versus regression of metastatic brain disease. Methods: We analyzed 50 pairs of MRI contrast-enhanced images as our training set. Half of these pairs, separated in time, qualified as disease progression, while the other 25 images constituted regression. We trained the parameters of a relatively small CNN via mutations that consisted of random CNN weight adjustments and mutation fitness. We then incorporated the best mutations into the next generations CNN, repeating this process for approximately 50,000 generations. We applied the CNNs to our training set, as well as a separate testing set with the same class balance of 25 progression and 25 regression images. Results: DNE achieved monotonic convergence to 100% training set accuracy. DNE also converged monotonically to 100% testing set accuracy. Conclusion: DNE can accurately classify brain-metastatic disease progression versus regression. Future work will extend the input from 2D image slices to full 3D volumes, and include the category of no change. We believe that an approach such as our could ultimately provide a useful adjunct to RANO/RECIST assessment.
abstract_zh: 目的：推进癌症治疗研究的核心组成部分是评估对治疗的反应。手动执行此操作（例如按照 RECIST 或 RANO 标准）是乏味且耗时的，并且可能会错过重要的肿瘤反应信息；最值得注意的是，它们排除了非目标病变。我们希望以包括所有病变的整体方式评估变化，获得对肿瘤进展或消退的简单、信息丰富且自动的评估。由于临床试验中的患者入组率通常较低，我们希望通过小型训练集进行反应评估。深度神经进化 (DNE) 可以产生在小型训练集上表现良好的放射学人工智能 (AI)。在这里，我们使用 DNE 进行函数逼近，预测转移性脑疾病的进展与消退。方法：我们分析了 50 对 MRI 对比增强图像作为训练集。其中一半图像在时间上分开，符合疾病进展的条件，而另外 25 张图像则构成回归。我们通过随机 CNN 权重调整和突变适应度组成的突变来训练相对较小的 CNN 的参数。然后，我们将最好的突变纳入下一代 CNN，重复此过程大约 50,000 代。我们将 CNN 应用于我们的训练集，以及一个单独的测试集，该测试集具有 25 个进展图像和 25 个回归图像的相同类别平衡。结果：DNE 实现了 100% 训练集精度的单调收敛。 DNE 还单调收敛到 100% 测试集精度。结论：DNE 可以准确地对脑转移性疾病的进展与消退进行分类。未来的工作将把输入从 2D 图像切片扩展到完整的 3D 体积，并包括不变的类别。我们相信，像我们这样的方法最终可以为 RANO/RECIST 评估提供有用的辅助。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出使用深度神经进化（DNE）方法，通过MRI图像自动评估脑转移瘤的疾病进展或缓解情况。
AI.motivation: 传统RECIST/RANO标准手动评估肿瘤反应效率低且遗漏非靶病变，临床试验患者数量少需小样本训练模型，DNE在小数据集上表现优异。
AI.method: 使用50对增强MRI图像作为训练集，通过随机权重调整和适应度评估的突变机制训练小型CNN，迭代约5万代后测试模型性能。
AI.result: DNE在训练集和测试集（各25例进展和缓解图像）上均达到100%准确率，实现单调收敛。
AI.conclusion: DNE能准确分类脑转移瘤进展与缓解，未来将扩展至3D影像并增加'无变化'分类，有望成为RECIST/RANO的补充工具。

search_text: Direct evaluation of progression or regression of disease burden in brain metastatic disease with Deep Neuroevolution 利用 Deep Neuroevolution 直接评估脑转移性疾病疾病负担的进展或消退 Purpose: A core component of advancing cancer treatment research is assessing response to therapy. Doing so by hand, for example as per RECIST or RANO criteria, is tedious, time-consuming, and can miss important tumor response information; most notably, they exclude non-target lesions. We wish to assess change in a holistic fashion that includes all lesions, obtaining simple, informative, and automated assessments of tumor progression or regression. Due to often low patient enrolments in clinical trials, we wish to make response assessments with small training sets. Deep neuroevolution (DNE) can produce radiology artificial intelligence (AI) that performs well on small training sets. Here we use DNE for function approximation that predicts progression versus regression of metastatic brain disease. Methods: We analyzed 50 pairs of MRI contrast-enhanced images as our training set. Half of these pairs, separated in time, qualified as disease progression, while the other 25 images constituted regression. We trained the parameters of a relatively small CNN via mutations that consisted of random CNN weight adjustments and mutation fitness. We then incorporated the best mutations into the next generations CNN, repeating this process for approximately 50,000 generations. We applied the CNNs to our training set, as well as a separate testing set with the same class balance of 25 progression and 25 regression images. Results: DNE achieved monotonic convergence to 100% training set accuracy. DNE also converged monotonically to 100% testing set accuracy. Conclusion: DNE can accurately classify brain-metastatic disease progression versus regression. Future work will extend the input from 2D image slices to full 3D volumes, and include the category of no change. We believe that an approach such as our could ultimately provide a useful adjunct to RANO/RECIST assessment. 目的：推进癌症治疗研究的核心组成部分是评估对治疗的反应。手动执行此操作（例如按照 RECIST 或 RANO 标准）是乏味且耗时的，并且可能会错过重要的肿瘤反应信息；最值得注意的是，它们排除了非目标病变。我们希望以包括所有病变的整体方式评估变化，获得对肿瘤进展或消退的简单、信息丰富且自动的评估。由于临床试验中的患者入组率通常较低，我们希望通过小型训练集进行反应评估。深度神经进化 (DNE) 可以产生在小型训练集上表现良好的放射学人工智能 (AI)。在这里，我们使用 DNE 进行函数逼近，预测转移性脑疾病的进展与消退。方法：我们分析了 50 对 MRI 对比增强图像作为训练集。其中一半图像在时间上分开，符合疾病进展的条件，而另外 25 张图像则构成回归。我们通过随机 CNN 权重调整和突变适应度组成的突变来训练相对较小的 CNN 的参数。然后，我们将最好的突变纳入下一代 CNN，重复此过程大约 50,000 代。我们将 CNN 应用于我们的训练集，以及一个单独的测试集，该测试集具有 25 个进展图像和 25 个回归图像的相同类别平衡。结果：DNE 实现了 100% 训练集精度的单调收敛。 DNE 还单调收敛到 100% 测试集精度。结论：DNE 可以准确地对脑转移性疾病的进展与消退进行分类。未来的工作将把输入从 2D 图像切片扩展到完整的 3D 体积，并包括不变的类别。我们相信，像我们这样的方法最终可以为 RANO/RECIST 评估提供有用的辅助。 该论文提出使用深度神经进化（DNE）方法，通过MRI图像自动评估脑转移瘤的疾病进展或缓解情况。 Joseph Stember,Robert Young,Hrithwik Shalu cs.NE,cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Zhongping Zhang,Huiwen He,Bryan A. Plummer,Zhenyu Liao,Huayan Wang
title: Complex Scene Image Editing by Scene Graph Comprehension
title_zh: 通过场景图理解进行复杂场景图像编辑
abstract: Conditional diffusion models have demonstrated impressive performance on various tasks like text-guided semantic image editing. Prior work requires image regions to be identified manually by human users or use an object detector that only perform well for object-centric manipulations. For example, if an input image contains multiple objects with the same semantic meaning (such as a group of birds), object detectors may struggle to recognize and localize the target object, let alone accurately manipulate it. To address these challenges, we propose a two-stage method for achieving complex scene image editing by Scene Graph Comprehension (SGC-Net). In the first stage, we train a Region of Interest (RoI) prediction network that uses scene graphs and predict the locations of the target objects. Unlike object detection methods based solely on object category, our method can accurately recognize the target object by comprehending the objects and their semantic relationships within a complex scene. The second stage uses a conditional diffusion model to edit the image based on our RoI predictions. We evaluate the effectiveness of our approach on the CLEVR and Visual Genome datasets. We report an 8 point improvement in SSIM on CLEVR and our edited images were preferred by human users by 9-33% over prior work on Visual Genome, validating the effectiveness of our proposed method. Code is available at github.com/Zhongping-Zhang/SGC_Net.
summary: Conditional diffusion models have demonstrated impressive performance on various tasks like text-guided semantic image editing. Prior work requires image regions to be identified manually by human users or use an object detector that only perform well for object-centric manipulations. For example, if an input image contains multiple objects with the same semantic meaning (such as a group of birds), object detectors may struggle to recognize and localize the target object, let alone accurately manipulate it. To address these challenges, we propose a two-stage method for achieving complex scene image editing by Scene Graph Comprehension (SGC-Net). In the first stage, we train a Region of Interest (RoI) prediction network that uses scene graphs and predict the locations of the target objects. Unlike object detection methods based solely on object category, our method can accurately recognize the target object by comprehending the objects and their semantic relationships within a complex scene. The second stage uses a conditional diffusion model to edit the image based on our RoI predictions. We evaluate the effectiveness of our approach on the CLEVR and Visual Genome datasets. We report an 8 point improvement in SSIM on CLEVR and our edited images were preferred by human users by 9-33% over prior work on Visual Genome, validating the effectiveness of our proposed method. Code is available at github.com/Zhongping-Zhang/SGC_Net.
abstract_zh: 条件扩散模型在文本引导语义图像编辑等各种任务中表现出了令人印象深刻的性能。之前的工作需要人类用户手动识别图像区域，或者使用仅在以对象为中心的操作中表现良好的对象检测器。例如，如果输入图像包含具有相同语义的多个对象（例如一群鸟），则对象检测器可能难以识别和定位目标对象，更不用说准确地操纵它了。为了解决这些挑战，我们提出了一种通过场景图理解（SGC-Net）实现复杂场景图像编辑的两阶段方法。在第一阶段，我们训练一个使用场景图的感兴趣区域（RoI）预测网络并预测目标对象的位置。与仅基于对象类别的对象检测方法不同，我们的方法可以通过理解复杂场景中的对象及其语义关系来准确识别目标对象。第二阶段使用条件扩散模型根据我们的 RoI 预测来编辑图像。我们评估了我们的方法在 CLEVR 和 Visual Genome 数据集上的有效性。我们报告 CLEVR 上的 SSIM 提高了 8 个点，并且我们编辑的图像比之前在 Visual Genome 上的工作更受人类用户青睐 9-33%，验证了我们提出的方法的有效性。代码可在 github.com/Zhongping-Zhang/SGC_Net 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于场景图理解的复杂场景图像编辑方法（SGC-Net），通过两阶段流程实现精准的图像编辑。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖人工标注或目标检测器，难以处理复杂场景中语义重复对象（如多只鸟）的定位与编辑问题。
AI.method: 第一阶段训练基于场景图的RoI预测网络，通过理解对象间语义关系定位目标；第二阶段利用条件扩散模型进行图像编辑。
AI.result: 在CLEVR数据集上SSIM提升8点，在Visual Genome数据集上人类偏好度较先前方法提高9-33%。
AI.conclusion: 通过场景图语义关系建模，有效解决了复杂场景中重复对象的精准编辑难题。
