authors_text: Oleksii Nasypanyi,Francois Rameau
title: Keypoints Tracking via Transformer Networks
title_zh: 通过 Transformer Network 进行关键点跟踪
abstract: In this thesis, we propose a pioneering work on sparse keypoints tracking across images using transformer networks. While deep learning-based keypoints matching have been widely investigated using graph neural networks - and more recently transformer networks, they remain relatively too slow to operate in real-time and are particularly sensitive to the poor repeatability of the keypoints detectors. In order to address these shortcomings, we propose to study the particular case of real-time and robust keypoints tracking. Specifically, we propose a novel architecture which ensures a fast and robust estimation of the keypoints tracking between successive images of a video sequence. Our method takes advantage of a recent breakthrough in computer vision, namely, visual transformer networks. Our method consists of two successive stages, a coarse matching followed by a fine localization of the keypoints' correspondences prediction. Through various experiments, we demonstrate that our approach achieves competitive results and demonstrates high robustness against adverse conditions, such as illumination change, occlusion and viewpoint differences.
summary: In this thesis, we propose a pioneering work on sparse keypoints tracking across images using transformer networks. While deep learning-based keypoints matching have been widely investigated using graph neural networks - and more recently transformer networks, they remain relatively too slow to operate in real-time and are particularly sensitive to the poor repeatability of the keypoints detectors. In order to address these shortcomings, we propose to study the particular case of real-time and robust keypoints tracking. Specifically, we propose a novel architecture which ensures a fast and robust estimation of the keypoints tracking between successive images of a video sequence. Our method takes advantage of a recent breakthrough in computer vision, namely, visual transformer networks. Our method consists of two successive stages, a coarse matching followed by a fine localization of the keypoints' correspondences prediction. Through various experiments, we demonstrate that our approach achieves competitive results and demonstrates high robustness against adverse conditions, such as illumination change, occlusion and viewpoint differences.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一项使用变压器网络进行跨图像稀疏关键点跟踪的开创性工作。虽然基于深度学习的关键点匹配已经使用图神经网络以及最近的变压器网络进行了广泛研究，但它们仍然相对太慢而无法实时运行，并且对关键点检测器的重复性差特别敏感。为了解决这些缺点，我们建议研究实时和鲁棒的关键点跟踪的特殊情况。具体来说，我们提出了一种新颖的架构，可确保对视频序列的连续图像之间的关键点跟踪进行快速且稳健的估计。我们的方法利用了计算机视觉领域最近的突破，即视觉变换网络。我们的方法由两个连续的阶段组成，先是粗略匹配，然后是关键点对应预测的精细定位。通过各种实验，我们证明我们的方法取得了有竞争力的结果，并且对不利条件（例如光照变化、遮挡和视点差异）表现出高度鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Transformer网络的实时鲁棒关键点跟踪方法，解决现有方法速度慢及对关键点重复性敏感的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习关键点匹配方法（如图神经网络和Transformer）存在实时性不足且对关键点检测器重复性敏感的缺陷，需改进实时性与鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计包含粗匹配与细定位两阶段的新型架构，结合视觉Transformer网络实现快速且鲁棒的关键点跟踪。
AI.result: 实验表明方法在光照变化、遮挡和视角差异等恶劣条件下具有高鲁棒性，且性能具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了实时性与鲁棒性问题，未来可进一步优化架构以提升效率。

In order to address these shortcomings, we propose to study the particular case of real-time and robust keypoints tracking. Specifically, we propose a novel architecture which ensures a fast and robust estimation of the keypoints tracking between successive images of a video sequence. Our method takes advantage of a recent breakthrough in computer vision, namely, visual transformer networks. Our method consists of two successive stages, a coarse matching followed by a fine localization of the keypoints' correspondences prediction. Through various experiments, we demonstrate that our approach achieves competitive results and demonstrates high robustness against adverse conditions, such as illumination change, occlusion and viewpoint differences. 在本文中，我们提出了一项使用变压器网络进行跨图像稀疏关键点跟踪的开创性工作。虽然基于深度学习的关键点匹配已经使用图神经网络以及最近的变压器网络进行了广泛研究，但它们仍然相对太慢而无法实时运行，并且对关键点检测器的重复性差特别敏感。为了解决这些缺点，我们建议研究实时和鲁棒的关键点跟踪的特殊情况。具体来说，我们提出了一种新颖的架构，可确保对视频序列的连续图像之间的关键点跟踪进行快速且稳健的估计。我们的方法利用了计算机视觉领域最近的突破，即视觉变换网络。我们的方法由两个连续的阶段组成，先是粗略匹配，然后是关键点对应预测的精细定位。通过各种实验，我们证明我们的方法取得了有竞争力的结果，并且对不利条件（例如光照变化、遮挡和视点差异）表现出高度鲁棒性。 本文提出一种基于Transformer网络的实时鲁棒关键点跟踪方法，解决现有方法速度慢及对关键点重复性敏感的问题。 Oleksii Nasypanyi,Francois Rameau cs.CV

authors_text: Didan Deng
title: Multiple Emotion Descriptors Estimation at the ABAW3 Challenge
title_zh: ABAW3 挑战赛中的多种情绪描述符估计
comment: The technical report for our multi-task approach in the ABAW3 Challenge
comments: The technical report for our multi-task approach in the ABAW3 Challenge
abstract: To describe complex emotional states, psychologists have proposed multiple emotion descriptors: sparse descriptors like facial action units; continuous descriptors like valence and arousal; and discrete class descriptors like happiness and anger. According to Ekman and Friesen, 1969, facial action units are sign vehicles that convey the emotion message, while discrete or continuous emotion descriptors are the messages perceived and expressed by human. In this paper, we designed an architecture for multiple emotion descriptors estimation in participating the ABAW3 Challenge. Based on the theory of Ekman and Friesen, 1969, we designed distinct architectures to measure the sign vehicles (i.e., facial action units) and the message (i.e., discrete emotions, valence and arousal) given their different properties. The quantitative experiments on the ABAW3 challenge dataset has shown the superior performance of our approach over two baseline models.
summary: To describe complex emotional states, psychologists have proposed multiple emotion descriptors: sparse descriptors like facial action units; continuous descriptors like valence and arousal; and discrete class descriptors like happiness and anger. According to Ekman and Friesen, 1969, facial action units are sign vehicles that convey the emotion message, while discrete or continuous emotion descriptors are the messages perceived and expressed by human. In this paper, we designed an architecture for multiple emotion descriptors estimation in participating the ABAW3 Challenge. Based on the theory of Ekman and Friesen, 1969, we designed distinct architectures to measure the sign vehicles (i.e., facial action units) and the message (i.e., discrete emotions, valence and arousal) given their different properties. The quantitative experiments on the ABAW3 challenge dataset has shown the superior performance of our approach over two baseline models.
abstract_zh: 为了描述复杂的情绪状态，心理学家提出了多种情绪描述符：面部动作单元等稀疏描述符；连续的描述符，如效价和唤醒度；以及离散的类别描述符，例如快乐和愤怒。根据 Ekman 和 Friesen 1969 的观点，面部动作单元是传达情感信息的符号载体，而离散或连续的情感描述符是人类感知和表达的信息。在本文中，我们设计了一种用于参与 ABAW3 挑战赛的多种情绪描述符估计的架构。基于 1969 年 Ekman 和 Friesen 的理论，我们设计了不同的架构来测量符号载体（即面部动作单元）和消息（即离散情绪、效价和唤醒），因为它们具有不同的属性。 ABAW3 挑战数据集上的定量实验表明，我们的方法比两个基线模型具有优越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种用于估计多类情绪描述符（如面部动作单元、离散情绪、效价和唤醒度）的架构，以应对ABAW3挑战赛中的复杂情绪状态描述任务。
AI.motivation: 基于Ekman和Friesen的理论，面部动作单元作为情绪表达的‘信号载体’与离散/连续情绪描述符作为‘感知信息’具有不同特性，需分别建模以提升准确性。
AI.method: 针对信号载体（面部动作单元）和情绪信息（离散情绪、效价、唤醒度）设计不同架构，利用其特性分别建模并整合结果。
AI.result: 在ABAW3数据集上的定量实验表明，该方法在两个基线模型上表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 分离建模信号载体与情绪信息的架构能有效提升多情绪描述符估计性能，验证了理论假设的合理性。

authors_text: Hai Su,Meiyin Han,Junle Liang,Songsen Yu
title: Steganalysis of Image with Adaptively Parametric Activation
title_zh: 具有自适应参数激活的图像隐写分析
abstract: Steganalysis as a method to detect whether image contains se-cret message, is a crucial study avoiding the imperils from abus-ing steganography. The point of steganalysis is to detect the weak embedding signals which is hardly learned by convolution-al layer and easily suppressed. In this paper, to enhance embed-ding signals, we study the insufficiencies of activation function, filters and loss function from the aspects of reduce embedding signal loss and enhance embedding signal capture ability. Adap-tive Parametric Activation Module is designed to reserve nega-tive embedding signal. For embedding signal capture ability enhancement, we add constraints on the high-pass filters to im-prove residual diversity which enables the filters extracts rich embedding signals. Besides, a loss function based on contrastive learning is applied to overcome the limitations of cross-entropy loss by maximum inter-class distance. It helps the network make a distinction between embedding signals and semantic edges. We use images from BOSSbase 1.01 and make stegos by WOW and S-UNIWARD for experiments. Compared to state-of-the-art methods, our method has a competitive performance.
summary: Steganalysis as a method to detect whether image contains se-cret message, is a crucial study avoiding the imperils from abus-ing steganography. The point of steganalysis is to detect the weak embedding signals which is hardly learned by convolution-al layer and easily suppressed. In this paper, to enhance embed-ding signals, we study the insufficiencies of activation function, filters and loss function from the aspects of reduce embedding signal loss and enhance embedding signal capture ability. Adap-tive Parametric Activation Module is designed to reserve nega-tive embedding signal. For embedding signal capture ability enhancement, we add constraints on the high-pass filters to im-prove residual diversity which enables the filters extracts rich embedding signals. Besides, a loss function based on contrastive learning is applied to overcome the limitations of cross-entropy loss by maximum inter-class distance. It helps the network make a distinction between embedding signals and semantic edges. We use images from BOSSbase 1.01 and make stegos by WOW and S-UNIWARD for experiments. Compared to state-of-the-art methods, our method has a competitive performance.
abstract_zh: 隐写分析作为一种检测图像是否包含秘密信息的方法，是避免滥用隐写术带来危险的一项重要研究。隐写分析的目的是检测卷积层难以学习且容易抑制的弱嵌入信号。本文针对增强嵌入信号，从减少嵌入信号损失、增强嵌入信号捕获能力等方面研究了激活函数、滤波器和损失函数的不足。自适应参数激活模块旨在保留负嵌入信号。为了增强嵌入信号捕获能力，我们对高通滤波器添加约束以改善残余多样性，从而使滤波器能够提取丰富的嵌入信号。此外，应用基于对比学习的损失函数来克服最大类间距离交叉熵损失的局限性。它帮助网络区分嵌入信号和语义边缘。我们使用BOSSbase 1.01中的图像并使用WOW和S-UNIWARD制作stegos进行实验。与最先进的方法相比，我们的方法具有竞争性的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自适应参数激活模块，用于增强图像隐写分析中嵌入信号的检测能力。
AI.motivation: 传统卷积层难以学习并容易抑制微弱的嵌入信号，导致隐写分析效果受限，需改进激活函数、滤波器和损失函数以提升信号捕获能力。
AI.method: 设计自适应参数激活模块保留负嵌入信号；对高通滤波器添加约束以增强残差多样性；采用基于对比学习的损失函数扩大类间距离，区分嵌入信号与语义边缘。
AI.result: 在BOSSbase 1.01数据集上使用WOW和S-UNIWARD算法进行实验，相比现有方法表现出竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 通过激活模块、滤波器约束和对比损失函数的协同优化，有效提升了隐写分析中嵌入信号的检测性能。

authors_text: Hitesh Sapkota,Qi Yu
title: Bayesian Nonparametric Submodular Video Partition for Robust Anomaly Detection
title_zh: 用于鲁棒异常检测的贝叶斯非参数子模视频分区
comment: 2022 Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition
comments: 2022 Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition
abstract: Multiple-instance learning (MIL) provides an effective way to tackle the video anomaly detection problem by modeling it as a weakly supervised problem as the labels are usually only available at the video level while missing for frames due to expensive labeling cost. We propose to conduct novel Bayesian non-parametric submodular video partition (BN-SVP) to significantly improve MIL model training that can offer a highly reliable solution for robust anomaly detection in practical settings that include outlier segments or multiple types of abnormal events. BN-SVP essentially performs dynamic non-parametric hierarchical clustering with an enhanced self-transition that groups segments in a video into temporally consistent and semantically coherent hidden states that can be naturally interpreted as scenes. Each segment is assumed to be generated through a non-parametric mixture process that allows variations of segments within the same scenes to accommodate the dynamic and noisy nature of many real-world surveillance videos. The scene and mixture component assignment of BN-SVP also induces a pairwise similarity among segments, resulting in non-parametric construction of a submodular set function. Integrating this function with an MIL loss effectively exposes the model to a diverse set of potentially positive instances to improve its training. A greedy algorithm is developed to optimize the submodular function and support efficient model training. Our theoretical analysis ensures a strong performance guarantee of the proposed algorithm. The effectiveness of the proposed approach is demonstrated over multiple real-world anomaly video datasets with robust detection performance.
summary: Multiple-instance learning (MIL) provides an effective way to tackle the video anomaly detection problem by modeling it as a weakly supervised problem as the labels are usually only available at the video level while missing for frames due to expensive labeling cost. We propose to conduct novel Bayesian non-parametric submodular video partition (BN-SVP) to significantly improve MIL model training that can offer a highly reliable solution for robust anomaly detection in practical settings that include outlier segments or multiple types of abnormal events. BN-SVP essentially performs dynamic non-parametric hierarchical clustering with an enhanced self-transition that groups segments in a video into temporally consistent and semantically coherent hidden states that can be naturally interpreted as scenes. Each segment is assumed to be generated through a non-parametric mixture process that allows variations of segments within the same scenes to accommodate the dynamic and noisy nature of many real-world surveillance videos. The scene and mixture component assignment of BN-SVP also induces a pairwise similarity among segments, resulting in non-parametric construction of a submodular set function. Integrating this function with an MIL loss effectively exposes the model to a diverse set of potentially positive instances to improve its training. A greedy algorithm is developed to optimize the submodular function and support efficient model training. Our theoretical analysis ensures a strong performance guarantee of the proposed algorithm. The effectiveness of the proposed approach is demonstrated over multiple real-world anomaly video datasets with robust detection performance.
abstract_zh: 多实例学习（MIL）提供了一种有效的方法来解决视频异常检测问题，将其建模为弱监督问题，因为标签通常仅在视频级别可用，而由于昂贵的标签成本而缺少帧。我们建议进行新颖的贝叶斯非参数子模视频分割（BN-SVP），以显着改进 MIL 模型训练，为包括离群片段或多种类型异常事件的实际设置中的鲁棒异常检测提供高度可靠的解决方案。 BN-SVP 本质上是通过增强的自转换来执行动态非参数层次聚类，将视频中的片段分组为时间一致和语义连贯的隐藏状态，这些隐藏状态可以自然地解释为场景。假设每个片段都是通过非参数混合过程生成的，该过程允许同一场景内的片段发生变化，以适应许多现实世界监控视频的动态和噪声性质。 BN-SVP 的场景和混合组件分配也会引起片段之间的成对相似性，从而导致子模集函数的非参数构造。将此函数与 MIL 损失集成，可以有效地将模型暴露于一组不同的潜在积极实例中，以改进其训练。开发了贪婪算法来优化子模函数并支持高效的模型训练。我们的理论分析确保了所提出算法的强大性能保证。该方法的有效性在多个真实世界异常视频数据集上得到了证明，具有强大的检测性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于贝叶斯非参数子模视频分割（BN-SVP）的方法，用于提升弱监督视频异常检测的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有视频异常检测方法在处理包含异常片段或多种异常事件的复杂场景时存在局限性，需更可靠且适应动态噪声的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过动态非参数分层聚类与增强自转移机制，将视频分割为时序一致且语义连贯的场景隐状态，并利用非参数混合过程建模片段多样性。结合子模集函数与MIL损失函数，设计贪心算法优化模型训练。
AI.result: 在多个真实世界异常视频数据集上验证了方法的有效性，表现出稳健的检测性能。
AI.conclusion: BN-SVP通过子模优化与非参数建模有效提升了复杂场景下视频异常检测的鲁棒性，具有理论保证与实际应用价值。

search_text: Bayesian Nonparametric Submodular Video Partition for Robust Anomaly Detection 用于鲁棒异常检测的贝叶斯非参数子模视频分区 Multiple-instance learning (MIL) provides an effective way to tackle the video anomaly detection problem by modeling it as a weakly supervised problem as the labels are usually only available at the video level while missing for frames due to expensive labeling cost. We propose to conduct novel Bayesian non-parametric submodular video partition (BN-SVP) to significantly improve MIL model training that can offer a highly reliable solution for robust anomaly detection in practical settings that include outlier segments or multiple types of abnormal events. BN-SVP essentially performs dynamic non-parametric hierarchical clustering with an enhanced self-transition that groups segments in a video into temporally consistent and semantically coherent hidden states that can be naturally interpreted as scenes. Each segment is assumed to be generated through a non-parametric mixture process that allows variations of segments within the same scenes to accommodate the dynamic and noisy nature of many real-world surveillance videos. The scene and mixture component assignment of BN-SVP also induces a pairwise similarity among segments, resulting in non-parametric construction of a submodular set function. Integrating this function with an MIL loss effectively exposes the model to a diverse set of potentially positive instances to improve its training. A greedy algorithm is developed to optimize the submodular function and support efficient model training. Our theoretical analysis ensures a strong performance guarantee of the proposed algorithm. The effectiveness of the proposed approach is demonstrated over multiple real-world anomaly video datasets with robust detection performance. 多实例学习（MIL）提供了一种有效的方法来解决视频异常检测问题，将其建模为弱监督问题，因为标签通常仅在视频级别可用，而由于昂贵的标签成本而缺少帧。我们建议进行新颖的贝叶斯非参数子模视频分割（BN-SVP），以显着改进 MIL 模型训练，为包括离群片段或多种类型异常事件的实际设置中的鲁棒异常检测提供高度可靠的解决方案。 BN-SVP 本质上是通过增强的自转换来执行动态非参数层次聚类，将视频中的片段分组为时间一致和语义连贯的隐藏状态，这些隐藏状态可以自然地解释为场景。假设每个片段都是通过非参数混合过程生成的，该过程允许同一场景内的片段发生变化，以适应许多现实世界监控视频的动态和噪声性质。 BN-SVP 的场景和混合组件分配也会引起片段之间的成对相似性，从而导致子模集函数的非参数构造。将此函数与 MIL 损失集成，可以有效地将模型暴露于一组不同的潜在积极实例中，以改进其训练。开发了贪婪算法来优化子模函数并支持高效的模型训练。我们的理论分析确保了所提出算法的强大性能保证。该方法的有效性在多个真实世界异常视频数据集上得到了证明，具有强大的检测性能。 本文提出了一种基于贝叶斯非参数子模视频分割（BN-SVP）的方法，用于提升弱监督视频异常检测的鲁棒性。 Hitesh Sapkota,Qi Yu cs.CV

authors_text: Jinchao Yang,Fei Guo,Shuo Chen,Jun Li,Jian Yang
title: Industrial Style Transfer with Large-scale Geometric Warping and Content Preservation
title_zh: 具有大规模几何变形和内容保存的工业风格转移
abstract: We propose a novel style transfer method to quickly create a new visual product with a nice appearance for industrial designers' reference. Given a source product, a target product, and an art style image, our method produces a neural warping field that warps the source shape to imitate the geometric style of the target and a neural texture transformation network that transfers the artistic style to the warped source product. Our model, Industrial Style Transfer (InST), consists of large-scale geometric warping (LGW) and interest-consistency texture transfer (ICTT). LGW aims to explore an unsupervised transformation between the shape masks of the source and target products for fitting large-scale shape warping. Furthermore, we introduce a mask smoothness regularization term to prevent the abrupt changes of the details of the source product. ICTT introduces an interest regularization term to maintain important contents of the warped product when it is stylized by using the art style image. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that InST achieves state-of-the-art performance on multiple visual product design tasks, e.g., companies' snail logos and classical bottles (please see Fig. 1). To the best of our knowledge, we are the first to extend the neural style transfer method to create industrial product appearances. Project page: \ulr{https://jcyang98.github.io/InST/home.html}. Code available at: \url{https://github.com/jcyang98/InST}.
summary: We propose a novel style transfer method to quickly create a new visual product with a nice appearance for industrial designers' reference. Given a source product, a target product, and an art style image, our method produces a neural warping field that warps the source shape to imitate the geometric style of the target and a neural texture transformation network that transfers the artistic style to the warped source product. Our model, Industrial Style Transfer (InST), consists of large-scale geometric warping (LGW) and interest-consistency texture transfer (ICTT). LGW aims to explore an unsupervised transformation between the shape masks of the source and target products for fitting large-scale shape warping. Furthermore, we introduce a mask smoothness regularization term to prevent the abrupt changes of the details of the source product. ICTT introduces an interest regularization term to maintain important contents of the warped product when it is stylized by using the art style image. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that InST achieves state-of-the-art performance on multiple visual product design tasks, e.g., companies' snail logos and classical bottles (please see Fig. 1). To the best of our knowledge, we are the first to extend the neural style transfer method to create industrial product appearances. Project page: \ulr{https://jcyang98.github.io/InST/home.html}. Code available at: \url{https://github.com/jcyang98/InST}.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的风格转移方法，可以快速创建外观漂亮的新视觉产品​​，供工业设计师参考。给定源产品、目标产品和艺术风格图像，我们的方法会产生一个神经扭曲场，该神经扭曲场扭曲源形状以模仿目标的几何风格，以及一个神经纹理变换网络，将艺术风格转移到扭曲的源产品。我们的模型工业风格转移（InST）由大规模几何变形（LGW）和兴趣一致性纹理转移（ICTT）组成。 LGW 旨在探索源产品和目标产品的形状掩模之间的无监督转换，以适应大规模形状扭曲。此外，我们引入了掩模平滑正则化项，以防止源产品细节的突然变化。 ICTT引入了兴趣正则化项，以在使用艺术风格图像对其进行风格化时保留变形产品的重要内容。大量的实验结果表明，InST 在多种视觉产品设计任务上实现了最先进的性能，例如公司的蜗牛徽标和经典瓶子（请参见图 1）。据我们所知，我们是第一个将神经风格迁移方法扩展到创建工业产品外观的人。项目页面：\ulr{https://jcyang98.github.io/InST/home.html}。代码位于：\url{https://github.com/jcyang98/InST}。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种工业风格迁移方法InST，通过大规模几何变形和内容保持技术，将艺术风格快速应用到工业产品设计中。
AI.motivation: 工业设计师需要快速生成具有美观外观的参考设计，但现有方法难以处理大规模形状变形且易丢失关键细节。
AI.method: 方法包含两部分：1) 大规模几何变形（LGW）通过形状掩码进行无监督变换并引入平滑正则化；2) 兴趣一致性纹理迁移（ICTT）通过兴趣区域正则化保持变形后的产品内容。
AI.result: 在公司标志和经典瓶体等工业设计任务中达到SOTA性能，代码和项目页面已公开。
AI.conclusion: 首次将神经风格迁移扩展至工业产品外观生成领域，为设计参考提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Harel Biggie,Steve McGuire
title: Heterogeneous Ground-Air Autonomous Vehicle Networking in Austere Environments: Practical Implementation of a Mesh Network in the DARPA Subterranean Challenge
title_zh: 严峻环境中的异构地空自主车辆网络：网状网络在 DARPA 地下挑战中的实际实施
abstract: Implementing a wireless mesh network in a real-life scenario requires a significant systems engineering effort to turn a network concept into a complete system. This paper presents an evaluation of a fielded system within the DARPA Subterranean (SubT) Challenge Final Event that contributed to a 3rd place finish. Our system included a team of air and ground robots, deployable mesh extender nodes, and a human operator base station. This paper presents a real-world evaluation of a stack optimized for air and ground robotic exploration in a RF-limited environment under practical system design limitations. Our highly customizable solution utilizes a minimum of non-free components with form factor options suited for UAV operations and provides insight into network operations at all levels. We present performance metrics based on our performance in the Final Event of the DARPA Subterranean Challenge, demonstrating the practical successes and limitations of our approach, as well as a set of lessons learned and suggestions for future improvements.
summary: Implementing a wireless mesh network in a real-life scenario requires a significant systems engineering effort to turn a network concept into a complete system. This paper presents an evaluation of a fielded system within the DARPA Subterranean (SubT) Challenge Final Event that contributed to a 3rd place finish. Our system included a team of air and ground robots, deployable mesh extender nodes, and a human operator base station. This paper presents a real-world evaluation of a stack optimized for air and ground robotic exploration in a RF-limited environment under practical system design limitations. Our highly customizable solution utilizes a minimum of non-free components with form factor options suited for UAV operations and provides insight into network operations at all levels. We present performance metrics based on our performance in the Final Event of the DARPA Subterranean Challenge, demonstrating the practical successes and limitations of our approach, as well as a set of lessons learned and suggestions for future improvements.
abstract_zh: 在现实场景中实施无线网状网络需要大量的系统工程工作才能将网络概念转变为完整的系统。本文对 DARPA 地下 (SubT) 挑战赛决赛中的现场系统进行了评估，该系统为获得第三名做出了贡献。我们的系统包括一组空中和地面机器人、可部署的网格扩展节点和一个人类操作员基站。本文介绍了在实际系统设计限制下，对射频有限环境中针对空中和地面机器人探索进行优化的堆栈的实际评估。我们高度可定制的解决方案利用最少的非自由组件以及适合无人机操作的外形尺寸选项，并提供对各级网络操作的深入了解。我们根据 DARPA 地下挑战赛决赛的表现提出绩效指标，展示我们方法的实际成功和局限性，以及一系列经验教训和未来改进的建议。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了在DARPA地下挑战赛中实现的异构地面-空中自主车辆网状网络系统，展示了其在射频受限环境下的实际应用效果。
AI.motivation: 在极端环境下实现异构地面和空中自主车辆的可靠通信网络存在技术挑战，需解决射频资源受限和系统设计限制问题。
AI.method: 构建包含空中/地面机器人、可部署网状节点和基站的系统，优化适用于UAV的轻量化网络协议栈，采用最少非开源组件实现定制化部署。
AI.result: 系统在DARPA地下挑战赛决赛中取得第三名，验证了网络架构的有效性，同时揭示了在复杂地形中的通信延迟和覆盖局限性。
AI.conclusion: 该方案为极端环境下的异构机器人网络提供了可行实现路径，未来需进一步优化协议效率和硬件适配性以提升鲁棒性。

search_text: Heterogeneous Ground-Air Autonomous Vehicle Networking in Austere Environments: Practical Implementation of a Mesh Network in the DARPA Subterranean Challenge 严峻环境中的异构地空自主车辆网络：网状网络在 DARPA 地下挑战中的实际实施 Implementing a wireless mesh network in a real-life scenario requires a significant systems engineering effort to turn a network concept into a complete system. This paper presents an evaluation of a fielded system within the DARPA Subterranean (SubT) Challenge Final Event that contributed to a 3rd place finish. Our system included a team of air and ground robots, deployable mesh extender nodes, and a human operator base station. This paper presents a real-world evaluation of a stack optimized for air and ground robotic exploration in a RF-limited environment under practical system design limitations. Our highly customizable solution utilizes a minimum of non-free components with form factor options suited for UAV operations and provides insight into network operations at all levels. We present performance metrics based on our performance in the Final Event of the DARPA Subterranean Challenge, demonstrating the practical successes and limitations of our approach, as well as a set of lessons learned and suggestions for future improvements. 在现实场景中实施无线网状网络需要大量的系统工程工作才能将网络概念转变为完整的系统。本文对 DARPA 地下 (SubT) 挑战赛决赛中的现场系统进行了评估，该系统为获得第三名做出了贡献。我们的系统包括一组空中和地面机器人、可部署的网格扩展节点和一个人类操作员基站。本文介绍了在实际系统设计限制下，对射频有限环境中针对空中和地面机器人探索进行优化的堆栈的实际评估。我们高度可定制的解决方案利用最少的非自由组件以及适合无人机操作的外形尺寸选项，并提供对各级网络操作的深入了解。我们根据 DARPA 地下挑战赛决赛的表现提出绩效指标，展示我们方法的实际成功和局限性，以及一系列经验教训和未来改进的建议。 本文评估了在DARPA地下挑战赛中实现的异构地面-空中自主车辆网状网络系统，展示了其在射频受限环境下的实际应用效果。 Harel Biggie,Steve McGuire cs.MA,cs.RO

authors_text: Brady Moon,Satrajit Chatterjee,Sebastian Scherer
title: TIGRIS: An Informed Sampling-based Algorithm for Informative Path Planning
title_zh: TIGRIS：一种基于知情采样的信息路径规划算法
abstract: Informative path planning is an important and challenging problem in robotics that remains to be solved in a manner that allows for wide-spread implementation and real-world practical adoption. Among various reasons for this, one is the lack of approaches that allow for informative path planning in high-dimensional spaces and non-trivial sensor constraints. In this work we present a sampling-based approach that allows us to tackle the challenges of large and high-dimensional search spaces. This is done by performing informed sampling in the high-dimensional continuous space and incorporating potential information gain along edges in the reward estimation. This method rapidly generates a global path that maximizes information gain for the given path budget constraints. We discuss the details of our implementation for an example use case of searching for multiple objects of interest in a large search space using a fixed-wing UAV with a forward-facing camera. We compare our approach to a sampling-based planner baseline and demonstrate how our contributions allow our approach to consistently out-perform the baseline by 18.0%. With this we thus present a practical and generalizable informative path planning framework that can be used for very large environments, limited budgets, and high dimensional search spaces, such as robots with motion constraints or high-dimensional configuration spaces.
summary: Informative path planning is an important and challenging problem in robotics that remains to be solved in a manner that allows for wide-spread implementation and real-world practical adoption. Among various reasons for this, one is the lack of approaches that allow for informative path planning in high-dimensional spaces and non-trivial sensor constraints. In this work we present a sampling-based approach that allows us to tackle the challenges of large and high-dimensional search spaces. This is done by performing informed sampling in the high-dimensional continuous space and incorporating potential information gain along edges in the reward estimation. This method rapidly generates a global path that maximizes information gain for the given path budget constraints. We discuss the details of our implementation for an example use case of searching for multiple objects of interest in a large search space using a fixed-wing UAV with a forward-facing camera. We compare our approach to a sampling-based planner baseline and demonstrate how our contributions allow our approach to consistently out-perform the baseline by 18.0%. With this we thus present a practical and generalizable informative path planning framework that can be used for very large environments, limited budgets, and high dimensional search spaces, such as robots with motion constraints or high-dimensional configuration spaces.
abstract_zh: 信息路径规划是机器人技术中一个重要且具有挑战性的问题，仍有待以允许广泛实施和现实世界实际采用的方式解决。造成这种情况的原因有很多，其中之一是缺乏允许在高维空间和重要传感器约束下进行信息路径规划的方法。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于采样的方法，使我们能够应对大型和高维搜索空间的挑战。这是通过在高维连续空间中执行知情采样并将沿边缘的潜在信息增益纳入奖励估计来完成的。该方法快速生成一条全局路径，在给定的路径预算约束下最大化信息增益。我们讨论了使用带有前置摄像头的固定翼无人机在大型搜索空间中搜索多个感兴趣对象的示例用例的实现细节。我们将我们的方法与基于抽样的规划器基线进行比较，并展示我们的贡献如何使我们的方法始终优于基线 18.0%。因此，我们提出了一个实用且可概括的信息路径规划框架，可用于非常大的环境、有限的预算和高维搜索空间，例如具有运动约束或高维配置空间的机器人。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于采样的信息路径规划算法TIGRIS，用于在高维空间和复杂传感器约束下实现高效的机器人路径规划。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以处理高维搜索空间和非平凡传感器约束，导致信息路径规划在实际应用中存在局限性，亟需更通用且高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过在高维连续空间中进行有指导的采样，并在奖励估计中结合路径边缘的潜在信息增益，快速生成符合预算约束的最大化信息增益全局路径。
AI.result: 在固定翼无人机搜索任务中，该方法相比基线算法性能提升18.0%，验证了其在大规模环境和高维空间中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: TIGRIS框架为受限预算、高维配置空间和运动约束的机器人提供了实用且可推广的信息路径规划方案。

authors_text: Snehesh Shrestha,Cornelia Fermüller,Tianyu Huang,Pyone Thant Win,Adam Zukerman,Chethan M. Parameshwara,Yiannis Aloimonos
title: AIMusicGuru: Music Assisted Human Pose Correction
title_zh: AIMusicGuru：音乐辅助人体姿势校正
abstract: Pose Estimation techniques rely on visual cues available through observations represented in the form of pixels. But the performance is bounded by the frame rate of the video and struggles from motion blur, occlusions, and temporal coherence. This issue is magnified when people are interacting with objects and instruments, for example playing the violin. Standard approaches for postprocessing use interpolation and smoothing functions to filter noise and fill gaps, but they cannot model highly non-linear motion. We present a method that leverages our understanding of the high degree of a causal relationship between the sound produced and the motion that produces them. We use the audio signature to refine and predict accurate human body pose motion models. We propose MAPnet (Music Assisted Pose network) for generating a fine grain motion model from sparse input pose sequences but continuous audio. To accelerate further research in this domain, we also open-source MAPdat, a new multi-modal dataset of 3D violin playing motion with music. We perform a comparison of different standard machine learning models and perform analysis on input modalities, sampling techniques, and audio and motion features. Experiments on MAPdat suggest multi-modal approaches like ours as a promising direction for tasks previously approached with visual methods only. Our results show both qualitatively and quantitatively how audio can be combined with visual observation to help improve any pose estimation methods.
summary: Pose Estimation techniques rely on visual cues available through observations represented in the form of pixels. But the performance is bounded by the frame rate of the video and struggles from motion blur, occlusions, and temporal coherence. This issue is magnified when people are interacting with objects and instruments, for example playing the violin. Standard approaches for postprocessing use interpolation and smoothing functions to filter noise and fill gaps, but they cannot model highly non-linear motion. We present a method that leverages our understanding of the high degree of a causal relationship between the sound produced and the motion that produces them. We use the audio signature to refine and predict accurate human body pose motion models. We propose MAPnet (Music Assisted Pose network) for generating a fine grain motion model from sparse input pose sequences but continuous audio. To accelerate further research in this domain, we also open-source MAPdat, a new multi-modal dataset of 3D violin playing motion with music. We perform a comparison of different standard machine learning models and perform analysis on input modalities, sampling techniques, and audio and motion features. Experiments on MAPdat suggest multi-modal approaches like ours as a promising direction for tasks previously approached with visual methods only. Our results show both qualitatively and quantitatively how audio can be combined with visual observation to help improve any pose estimation methods.
abstract_zh: 姿势估计技术依赖于通过以像素形式表示的观察获得的视觉线索。但性能受到视频帧速率的限制，并且受到运动模糊、遮挡和时间连贯性的困扰。当人们与物体和乐器互动时（例如拉小提琴），这个问题会被放大。后处理的标准方法使用插值和平滑函数来过滤噪声和填充间隙，但它们无法对高度非线性运动进行建模。我们提出了一种方法，利用我们对产生的声音和产生声音的运动之间高度因果关系的理解。我们使用音频签名来完善和预测准确的人体姿势运动模型。我们提出 MAPnet（音乐辅助姿势网络），用于从稀疏输入姿势序列但连续音频生成细粒度运动模型。为了加速该领域的进一步研究，我们还开源了 MAPdat，这是一个新的 3D 小提琴与音乐演奏动作的多模态数据集。我们对不同标准机器学习模型进行比较，并对输入模式、采样技术以及音频和运动特征进行分析。 MAPdat 上的实验表明，像我们这样的多模式方法对于以前仅使用视觉方法处理的任务来说是一个有前途的方向。我们的结果定性和定量地展示了如何将音频与视觉观察相结合，以帮助改进任何姿势估计方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合音频信息的人体姿态校正方法MAPnet，通过音乐辅助提升复杂场景下的姿态估计精度。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉姿态估计受帧率限制、运动模糊和遮挡影响显著，尤其在演奏乐器等交互场景中难以准确捕捉非线性运动。
AI.method: 构建MAPnet网络模型，融合稀疏姿态序列与连续音频特征，利用声音与动作的因果关系生成精细运动模型，并发布多模态数据集MAPdat进行验证。
AI.result: 实验表明多模态方法在MAPdat数据集上显著优于纯视觉方法，音频与视觉信息融合有效提升了姿态估计的定性和定量表现。

search_text: AIMusicGuru: Music Assisted Human Pose Correction AIMusicGuru：音乐辅助人体姿势校正 Pose Estimation techniques rely on visual cues available through observations represented in the form of pixels. But the performance is bounded by the frame rate of the video and struggles from motion blur, occlusions, and temporal coherence. This issue is magnified when people are interacting with objects and instruments, for example playing the violin. Standard approaches for postprocessing use interpolation and smoothing functions to filter noise and fill gaps, but they cannot model highly non-linear motion. We present a method that leverages our understanding of the high degree of a causal relationship between the sound produced and the motion that produces them. We use the audio signature to refine and predict accurate human body pose motion models. We propose MAPnet (Music Assisted Pose network) for generating a fine grain motion model from sparse input pose sequences but continuous audio. To accelerate further research in this domain, we also open-source MAPdat, a new multi-modal dataset of 3D violin playing motion with music. We perform a comparison of different standard machine learning models and perform analysis on input modalities, sampling techniques, and audio and motion features. Experiments on MAPdat suggest multi-modal approaches like ours as a promising direction for tasks previously approached with visual methods only. Our results show both qualitatively and quantitatively how audio can be combined with visual observation to help improve any pose estimation methods. 姿势估计技术依赖于通过以像素形式表示的观察获得的视觉线索。但性能受到视频帧速率的限制，并且受到运动模糊、遮挡和时间连贯性的困扰。当人们与物体和乐器互动时（例如拉小提琴），这个问题会被放大。后处理的标准方法使用插值和平滑函数来过滤噪声和填充间隙，但它们无法对高度非线性运动进行建模。我们提出了一种方法，利用我们对产生的声音和产生声音的运动之间高度因果关系的理解。我们使用音频签名来完善和预测准确的人体姿势运动模型。我们提出 MAPnet（音乐辅助姿势网络），用于从稀疏输入姿势序列但连续音频生成细粒度运动模型。为了加速该领域的进一步研究，我们还开源了 MAPdat，这是一个新的 3D 小提琴与音乐演奏动作的多模态数据集。我们对不同标准机器学习模型进行比较，并对输入模式、采样技术以及音频和运动特征进行分析。 MAPdat 上的实验表明，像我们这样的多模式方法对于以前仅使用视觉方法处理的任务来说是一个有前途的方向。我们的结果定性和定量地展示了如何将音频与视觉观察相结合，以帮助改进任何姿势估计方法。 本文提出一种结合音频信息的人体姿态校正方法MAPnet，通过音乐辅助提升复杂场景下的姿态估计精度。 Snehesh Shrestha,Cornelia Fermüller,Tianyu Huang,Pyone Thant Win,Adam Zukerman,Chethan M. Parameshwara,Yiannis Aloimonos cs.CV,cs.MM

authors_text: Tianheng Cheng,Xinggang Wang,Shaoyu Chen,Wenqiang Zhang,Qian Zhang,Chang Huang,Zhaoxiang Zhang,Wenyu Liu
title: Sparse Instance Activation for Real-Time Instance Segmentation
title_zh: 用于实时实例分割的稀疏实例激活
abstract: In this paper, we propose a conceptually novel, efficient, and fully convolutional framework for real-time instance segmentation. Previously, most instance segmentation methods heavily rely on object detection and perform mask prediction based on bounding boxes or dense centers. In contrast, we propose a sparse set of instance activation maps, as a new object representation, to highlight informative regions for each foreground object. Then instance-level features are obtained by aggregating features according to the highlighted regions for recognition and segmentation. Moreover, based on bipartite matching, the instance activation maps can predict objects in a one-to-one style, thus avoiding non-maximum suppression (NMS) in post-processing. Owing to the simple yet effective designs with instance activation maps, SparseInst has extremely fast inference speed and achieves 40 FPS and 37.9 AP on the COCO benchmark, which significantly outperforms the counterparts in terms of speed and accuracy. Code and models are available at https://github.com/hustvl/SparseInst.
summary: In this paper, we propose a conceptually novel, efficient, and fully convolutional framework for real-time instance segmentation. Previously, most instance segmentation methods heavily rely on object detection and perform mask prediction based on bounding boxes or dense centers. In contrast, we propose a sparse set of instance activation maps, as a new object representation, to highlight informative regions for each foreground object. Then instance-level features are obtained by aggregating features according to the highlighted regions for recognition and segmentation. Moreover, based on bipartite matching, the instance activation maps can predict objects in a one-to-one style, thus avoiding non-maximum suppression (NMS) in post-processing. Owing to the simple yet effective designs with instance activation maps, SparseInst has extremely fast inference speed and achieves 40 FPS and 37.9 AP on the COCO benchmark, which significantly outperforms the counterparts in terms of speed and accuracy. Code and models are available at https://github.com/hustvl/SparseInst.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种概念新颖、高效且​​全卷积的实时实例分割框架。以前，大多数实例分割方法严重依赖于对象检测并基于边界框或密集中心执行掩模预测。相比之下，我们提出了一组稀疏的实例激活图作为新的对象表示，以突出显示每个前景对象的信息区域。然后根据突出显示的区域聚合特征来获得实例级特征以进行识别和分割。此外，基于二分匹配，实例激活图可以以一对一的方式预测对象，从而避免后处理中的非极大值抑制（NMS）。由于简单而有效的实例激活图设计，SparseInst 具有极快的推理速度，在 COCO 基准上达到 40 FPS 和 37.9 AP，在速度和准确性方面显着优于同行。代码和模型可在 https://github.com/hustvl/SparseInst 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于稀疏实例激活图的实时实例分割框架SparseInst，通过新的对象表示方法提升分割效率和精度。
AI.motivation: 传统实例分割方法依赖对象检测和密集中心点预测，存在计算复杂度高、后处理繁琐（如NMS）等问题，难以满足实时性需求。
AI.method: 设计稀疏实例激活图作为新型对象表示，通过特征聚合获取实例级特征，并基于二分图匹配实现一对一预测，无需NMS后处理。
AI.result: 在COCO数据集上达到40 FPS推理速度和37.9 AP指标，在速度和精度上显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过简洁有效的稀疏激活图设计，实现了实时性与精度的平衡，为实例分割任务提供了新的高效解决方案。

authors_text: Seonghyeon Moon,Samuel S. Sohn,Honglu Zhou,Sejong Yoon,Vladimir Pavlovic,Muhammad Haris Khan,Mubbasir Kapadia
title: HM: Hybrid Masking for Few-Shot Segmentation
title_zh: HM：用于少镜头分割的混合掩蔽
abstract: We study few-shot semantic segmentation that aims to segment a target object from a query image when provided with a few annotated support images of the target class. Several recent methods resort to a feature masking (FM) technique to discard irrelevant feature activations which eventually facilitates the reliable prediction of segmentation mask. A fundamental limitation of FM is the inability to preserve the fine-grained spatial details that affect the accuracy of segmentation mask, especially for small target objects. In this paper, we develop a simple, effective, and efficient approach to enhance feature masking (FM). We dub the enhanced FM as hybrid masking (HM). Specifically, we compensate for the loss of fine-grained spatial details in FM technique by investigating and leveraging a complementary basic input masking method. Experiments have been conducted on three publicly available benchmarks with strong few-shot segmentation (FSS) baselines. We empirically show improved performance against the current state-of-the-art methods by visible margins across different benchmarks. Our code and trained models are available at: https://github.com/moonsh/HM-Hybrid-Masking
summary: We study few-shot semantic segmentation that aims to segment a target object from a query image when provided with a few annotated support images of the target class. Several recent methods resort to a feature masking (FM) technique to discard irrelevant feature activations which eventually facilitates the reliable prediction of segmentation mask. A fundamental limitation of FM is the inability to preserve the fine-grained spatial details that affect the accuracy of segmentation mask, especially for small target objects. In this paper, we develop a simple, effective, and efficient approach to enhance feature masking (FM). We dub the enhanced FM as hybrid masking (HM). Specifically, we compensate for the loss of fine-grained spatial details in FM technique by investigating and leveraging a complementary basic input masking method. Experiments have been conducted on three publicly available benchmarks with strong few-shot segmentation (FSS) baselines. We empirically show improved performance against the current state-of-the-art methods by visible margins across different benchmarks. Our code and trained models are available at: https://github.com/moonsh/HM-Hybrid-Masking
abstract_zh: 我们研究了少样本语义分割，其目的是在提供目标类的一些带注释的支持图像时从查询图像中分割目标对象。最近的几种方法采用特征掩蔽（FM）技术来丢弃不相关的特征激活，这最终有利于分割掩码的可靠预测。 FM 的一个基本限制是无法保留影响分割掩模准确性的细粒度空间细节，尤其是对于小目标物体。在本文中，我们开发了一种简单、有效且高效的方法来增强特征掩蔽（FM）。我们将增强型 FM 称为混合掩蔽 (HM)。具体来说，我们通过研究和利用互补的基本输入掩蔽方法来补偿 FM 技术中细粒度空间细节的损失。实验已在三个公开可用的基准上进行，这些基准具有强大的小样本分割 (FSS) 基线。我们凭经验证明，在不同基准测试中，与当前最先进的方法相比，性能有了明显的提高。我们的代码和经过训练的模型位于：https://github.com/moonsh/HM-Hybrid-Masking

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种混合掩码（HM）方法，用于改进少样本语义分割中的特征掩码技术，以提升小目标分割的精度。
AI.motivation: 现有特征掩码（FM）方法在少样本分割中无法有效保留细粒度空间细节，导致小目标分割精度不足。
AI.method: 通过结合特征掩码与互补的输入掩码方法，补偿细粒度细节损失，形成混合掩码（HM）技术。
AI.result: 在三个公开基准测试中，HM方法在多个指标上显著优于当前最先进的少样本分割方法。
AI.conclusion: 混合掩码（HM）有效解决了特征掩码的细节保留问题，代码和模型已开源供研究使用。

Experiments have been conducted on three publicly available benchmarks with strong few-shot segmentation (FSS) baselines. We empirically show improved performance against the current state-of-the-art methods by visible margins across different benchmarks. Our code and trained models are available at: https://github.com/moonsh/HM-Hybrid-Masking 我们研究了少样本语义分割，其目的是在提供目标类的一些带注释的支持图像时从查询图像中分割目标对象。最近的几种方法采用特征掩蔽（FM）技术来丢弃不相关的特征激活，这最终有利于分割掩码的可靠预测。 FM 的一个基本限制是无法保留影响分割掩模准确性的细粒度空间细节，尤其是对于小目标物体。在本文中，我们开发了一种简单、有效且高效的方法来增强特征掩蔽（FM）。我们将增强型 FM 称为混合掩蔽 (HM)。具体来说，我们通过研究和利用互补的基本输入掩蔽方法来补偿 FM 技术中细粒度空间细节的损失。实验已在三个公开可用的基准上进行，这些基准具有强大的小样本分割 (FSS) 基线。我们凭经验证明，在不同基准测试中，与当前最先进的方法相比，性能有了明显的提高。我们的代码和经过训练的模型位于：https://github.com/moonsh/HM-Hybrid-Masking 本文提出一种混合掩码（HM）方法，用于改进少样本语义分割中的特征掩码技术，以提升小目标分割的精度。 Seonghyeon Moon,Samuel S. Sohn,Honglu Zhou,Sejong Yoon,Vladimir Pavlovic,Muhammad Haris Khan,Mubbasir Kapadia cs.CV

authors_text: Xiangxu Yu,Zhenqiang Ying,Neil Birkbeck,Yilin Wang,Balu Adsumilli,Alan C. Bovik
title: Subjective and Objective Analysis of Streamed Gaming Videos
title_zh: 流媒体游戏视频的主客观分析
abstract: The rising popularity of online User-Generated-Content (UGC) in the form of streamed and shared videos, has hastened the development of perceptual Video Quality Assessment (VQA) models, which can be used to help optimize their delivery. Gaming videos, which are a relatively new type of UGC videos, are created when skilled gamers post videos of their gameplay. These kinds of screenshots of UGC gameplay videos have become extremely popular on major streaming platforms like YouTube and Twitch. Synthetically-generated gaming content presents challenges to existing VQA algorithms, including those based on natural scene/video statistics models. Synthetically generated gaming content presents different statistical behavior than naturalistic videos. A number of studies have been directed towards understanding the perceptual characteristics of professionally generated gaming videos arising in gaming video streaming, online gaming, and cloud gaming. However, little work has been done on understanding the quality of UGC gaming videos, and how it can be characterized and predicted. Towards boosting the progress of gaming video VQA model development, we conducted a comprehensive study of subjective and objective VQA models on UGC gaming videos. To do this, we created a novel UGC gaming video resource, called the LIVE-YouTube Gaming video quality (LIVE-YT-Gaming) database, comprised of 600 real UGC gaming videos. We conducted a subjective human study on this data, yielding 18,600 human quality ratings recorded by 61 human subjects. We also evaluated a number of state-of-the-art (SOTA) VQA models on the new database, including a new one, called GAME-VQP, based on both natural video statistics and CNN-learned features. To help support work in this field, we are making the new LIVE-YT-Gaming Database, publicly available through the link: https://live.ece.utexas.edu/research/LIVE-YT-Gaming/index.html .

Towards boosting the progress of gaming video VQA model development, we conducted a comprehensive study of subjective and objective VQA models on UGC gaming videos. To do this, we created a novel UGC gaming video resource, called the LIVE-YouTube Gaming video quality (LIVE-YT-Gaming) database, comprised of 600 real UGC gaming videos. To help support work in this field, we are making the new LIVE-YT-Gaming Database, publicly available through the link: https://live.ece.utexas.edu/research/LIVE-YT-Gaming/index.html .
abstract_zh: 以流媒体和共享视频形式出现的在线用户生成内容 (UGC) 的日益普及，加速了感知视频质量评估 (VQA) 模型的发展，该模型可用于帮助优化其交付。游戏视频是一种相对较新的 UGC 视频，是由熟练的游戏玩家发布其游戏玩法视频而创建的。这类 UGC 游戏视频的屏幕截图在 YouTube 和 Twitch 等主要流媒体平台上变得非常流行。综合生成的游戏内容对现有 VQA 算法提出了挑战，包括基于自然场景/视频统计模型的算法。合成生成的游戏内容呈现出与自然视频不同的统计行为。许多研究旨在了解游戏视频流、在线游戏和云游戏中出现的专业生成的游戏视频的感知特征。然而，在了解 UGC 游戏视频的质量以及如何对其进行表征和预测方面所做的工作却很少。为了推动游戏视频VQA模型开发的进展，我们对UGC游戏视频的主观和客观VQA模型进行了全面的研究。为此，我们创建了一个新颖的 UGC 游戏视频资源，称为 LIVE-YouTube 游戏视频质量（LIVE-YT-Gaming）数据库，由 600 个真实的 UGC 游戏视频组成。我们对这些数据进行了主观人类研究，得出了 61 名人类受试者记录的 18,600 个人类质量评级。我们还在新数据库上评估了许多最先进的 (SOTA) VQA 模型，其中包括一种名为 GAME-VQP 的新模型，它基于自然视频统计数据和 CNN 学习的特征。为了帮助支持这一领域的工作，我们正在制作新的 LIVE-YT-Gaming 数据库，可通过以下链接公开获取：https://live.ece.utexas.edu/research/LIVE-YT-Gaming/index.html。

AI.tldr: 本文通过创建LIVE-YT-Gaming数据库并评估主客观视频质量评估模型，研究用户生成内容（UGC）游戏视频的质量特性。
AI.motivation: 现有VQA模型难以处理合成生成的游戏视频，且针对UGC游戏视频的质量评估研究不足，需建立新方法和数据集推动领域发展。
AI.method: 构建包含600个真实UGC游戏视频的LIVE-YT-Gaming数据库，进行61名参与者的主观评分实验，收集18,600个评分数据，并评估包括新提出的GAME-VQP模型在内的多个先进VQA模型。
AI.result: 公开LIVE-YT-Gaming数据库，获取主观质量数据，验证现有模型在UGC游戏视频上的性能局限，提出结合自然统计与CNN特征的GAME-VQP模型。
AI.conclusion: 通过数据库和模型研究，为UGC游戏视频质量评估提供新资源和方法，推动该领域研究进展。

authors_text: Jiawei Sun,Ruoxin Chen,Jie Li,Chentao Wu,Yue Ding,Junchi Yan
title: On Understanding and Mitigating the Dimensional Collapse of Graph Contrastive Learning: a Non-Maximum Removal Approach
title_zh: 关于理解和缓解图对比学习的维度崩溃：一种非极大值去除方法
abstract: Graph Contrastive Learning (GCL) has shown promising performance in graph representation learning (GRL) without the supervision of manual annotations. GCL can generate graph-level embeddings by maximizing the Mutual Information (MI) between different augmented views of the same graph (positive pairs). However, the GCL is limited by dimensional collapse, i.e., embedding vectors only occupy a low-dimensional subspace. In this paper, we show that the smoothing effect of the graph pooling and the implicit regularization of the graph convolution are two causes of the dimensional collapse in GCL. To mitigate the above issue, we propose a non-maximum removal graph contrastive learning approach (nmrGCL), which removes "prominent'' dimensions (i.e., contribute most in similarity measurement) for positive pair in the pre-text task. Comprehensive experiments on various benchmark datasets are conducted to demonstrate the effectiveness of nmrGCL, and the results show that our model outperforms the state-of-the-art methods. Source code will be made publicly available.
summary: Graph Contrastive Learning (GCL) has shown promising performance in graph representation learning (GRL) without the supervision of manual annotations. GCL can generate graph-level embeddings by maximizing the Mutual Information (MI) between different augmented views of the same graph (positive pairs). However, the GCL is limited by dimensional collapse, i.e., embedding vectors only occupy a low-dimensional subspace. In this paper, we show that the smoothing effect of the graph pooling and the implicit regularization of the graph convolution are two causes of the dimensional collapse in GCL. To mitigate the above issue, we propose a non-maximum removal graph contrastive learning approach (nmrGCL), which removes "prominent'' dimensions (i.e., contribute most in similarity measurement) for positive pair in the pre-text task. Comprehensive experiments on various benchmark datasets are conducted to demonstrate the effectiveness of nmrGCL, and the results show that our model outperforms the state-of-the-art methods. Source code will be made publicly available.
abstract_zh: 图对比学习（GCL）在没有手动注释监督的图表示学习（GRL）中表现出了良好的性能。 GCL 可以通过最大化同一图的不同增强视图（正对）之间的互信息（MI）来生成图级嵌入。然而，GCL 受到维度崩溃的限制，即嵌入向量仅占据低维子空间。在本文中，我们证明图池化的平滑效果和图卷积的隐式正则化是 GCL 中维度崩溃的两个原因。为了缓解上述问题，我们提出了一种非最大去除图对比学习方法（nmrGCL），该方法去除了前置任务中正对的“突出”维度（即在相似性测量中贡献最大）。在各种基准数据集上进行了综合实验来证明 nmrGCL 的有效性，结果表明我们的模型优于最先进的方法。源代码将公开。

AI.tldr: 本文研究图对比学习（GCL）中的维度坍塌问题，提出通过非最大值去除（nmrGCL）方法缓解该问题。
AI.motivation: 图对比学习虽能生成高质量图嵌入，但存在维度坍塌问题，导致表示能力受限，需寻找有效缓解方法。
AI.method: 提出nmrGCL方法，在预文本任务中移除正样本对中贡献最大的维度，打破低维子空间限制。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上实验表明，nmrGCL优于现有最先进方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 非最大值去除策略有效缓解GCL的维度坍塌问题，提升了图表示学习的性能。

authors_text: Saurabh Hinduja,Shaun Canavan,Liza Jivnani,Sk Rahatul Jannat,V Sri Chakra Kumar
title: Random Forest Regression for continuous affect using Facial Action Units
title_zh: 使用面部动作单元进行连续影响的随机森林回归
abstract: In this paper we describe our approach to the arousal and valence track of the 3rd Workshop and Competition on Affective Behavior Analysis in-the-wild (ABAW). We extracted facial features using OpenFace and used them to train a multiple output random forest regressor. Our approach performed comparable to the baseline approach.
summary: In this paper we describe our approach to the arousal and valence track of the 3rd Workshop and Competition on Affective Behavior Analysis in-the-wild (ABAW). We extracted facial features using OpenFace and used them to train a multiple output random forest regressor. Our approach performed comparable to the baseline approach.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们描述了第三届野外情感行为分析（ABAW）研讨会和竞赛的唤醒和效价轨迹方法。我们使用 OpenFace 提取面部特征，并用它们来训练多输出随机森林回归器。我们的方法的表现与基线方法相当。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于面部动作单元的随机森林回归方法，用于预测连续情感维度（唤醒度和效价）。
AI.motivation: 为解决真实场景下连续情感预测的挑战，参与ABAW竞赛并探索有效的人脸特征分析方法。
AI.method: 使用OpenFace工具提取面部动作单元特征，构建多输出随机森林回归模型进行情感预测。
AI.result: 模型在竞赛中的表现与基线方法相当，未显著超越现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 验证了随机森林回归在连续情感预测中的可行性，但需进一步优化以提升性能。

authors_text: Bo Liu,Qiang Liu,Peter Stone
title: Continual Learning and Private Unlearning
title_zh: 持续学习和私人忘却
abstract: As intelligent agents become autonomous over longer periods of time, they may eventually become lifelong counterparts to specific people. If so, it may be common for a user to want the agent to master a task temporarily but later on to forget the task due to privacy concerns. However enabling an agent to \emph{forget privately} what the user specified without degrading the rest of the learned knowledge is a challenging problem. With the aim of addressing this challenge, this paper formalizes this continual learning and private unlearning (CLPU) problem. The paper further introduces a straightforward but exactly private solution, CLPU-DER++, as the first step towards solving the CLPU problem, along with a set of carefully designed benchmark problems to evaluate the effectiveness of the proposed solution. The code is available at https://github.com/Cranial-XIX/Continual-Learning-Private-Unlearning.
summary: As intelligent agents become autonomous over longer periods of time, they may eventually become lifelong counterparts to specific people. If so, it may be common for a user to want the agent to master a task temporarily but later on to forget the task due to privacy concerns. However enabling an agent to \emph{forget privately} what the user specified without degrading the rest of the learned knowledge is a challenging problem. With the aim of addressing this challenge, this paper formalizes this continual learning and private unlearning (CLPU) problem. The paper further introduces a straightforward but exactly private solution, CLPU-DER++, as the first step towards solving the CLPU problem, along with a set of carefully designed benchmark problems to evaluate the effectiveness of the proposed solution. The code is available at https://github.com/Cranial-XIX/Continual-Learning-Private-Unlearning.
abstract_zh: 随着智能体在较长时间内变得自主，它们最终可能成为特定人的终身对应物。如果是这样，用户通常希望代理暂时掌握某项任务，但后来由于隐私问题而忘记该任务。然而，让代理能够\emph{私下忘记}用户指定的内容而不降低其余学到的知识是一个具有挑战性的问题。为了解决这一挑战，本文将持续学习和私人忘却（CLPU）问题形式化。本文进一步介绍了一个简单但完全私有的解决方案 CLPU-DER++，作为解决 CLPU 问题的第一步，以及一组精心设计的基准问题来评估所提出的解决方案的有效性。该代码位于 https://github.com/Cranial-XIX/Continual-Learning-Private-Unlearning。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种解决持续学习与私有遗忘（CLPU）问题的方法，使智能代理能够在忘记特定任务的同时保留其他知识。
AI.motivation: 随着智能代理长期自主运行，用户可能因隐私问题要求代理临时遗忘某些任务，但现有方法难以在保证隐私的同时避免知识退化。
AI.method: 提出CLPU-DER++方法，通过精确私有机制实现任务遗忘，并设计基准问题验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 首次针对CLPU问题提出解决方案，并构建基准测试套件验证其可行性。
AI.conclusion: CLPU-DER++为解决CLPU问题提供了初步方案，未来需进一步优化算法性能与适用场景。

authors_text: Zi-Chao Zhang,Zhen-Duo Chen,Yongxin Wang,Xin Luo,Xin-Shun Xu
title: ViT-FOD: A Vision Transformer based Fine-grained Object Discriminator
title_zh: ViT-FOR：基于 Vision Transformer 的细粒度对象鉴别器
abstract: Recently, several Vision Transformer (ViT) based methods have been proposed for Fine-Grained Visual Classification (FGVC).These methods significantly surpass existing CNN-based ones, demonstrating the effectiveness of ViT in FGVC tasks.However, there are some limitations when applying ViT directly to FGVC.First, ViT needs to split images into patches and calculate the attention of every pair, which may result in heavy redundant calculation and unsatisfying performance when handling fine-grained images with complex background and small objects.Second, a standard ViT only utilizes the class token in the final layer for classification, which is not enough to extract comprehensive fine-grained information. To address these issues, we propose a novel ViT based fine-grained object discriminator for FGVC tasks, ViT-FOD for short. Specifically, besides a ViT backbone, it further introduces three novel components, i.e, Attention Patch Combination (APC), Critical Regions Filter (CRF), and Complementary Tokens Integration (CTI). Thereinto, APC pieces informative patches from two images to generate a new image so that the redundant calculation can be reduced. CRF emphasizes tokens corresponding to discriminative regions to generate a new class token for subtle feature learning. To extract comprehensive information, CTI integrates complementary information captured by class tokens in different ViT layers. We conduct comprehensive experiments on widely used datasets and the results demonstrate that ViT-FOD is able to achieve state-of-the-art performance.
summary: Recently, several Vision Transformer (ViT) based methods have been proposed for Fine-Grained Visual Classification (FGVC).These methods significantly surpass existing CNN-based ones, demonstrating the effectiveness of ViT in FGVC tasks.However, there are some limitations when applying ViT directly to FGVC.First, ViT needs to split images into patches and calculate the attention of every pair, which may result in heavy redundant calculation and unsatisfying performance when handling fine-grained images with complex background and small objects.Second, a standard ViT only utilizes the class token in the final layer for classification, which is not enough to extract comprehensive fine-grained information. To address these issues, we propose a novel ViT based fine-grained object discriminator for FGVC tasks, ViT-FOD for short. Specifically, besides a ViT backbone, it further introduces three novel components, i.e, Attention Patch Combination (APC), Critical Regions Filter (CRF), and Complementary Tokens Integration (CTI). Thereinto, APC pieces informative patches from two images to generate a new image so that the redundant calculation can be reduced. CRF emphasizes tokens corresponding to discriminative regions to generate a new class token for subtle feature learning. To extract comprehensive information, CTI integrates complementary information captured by class tokens in different ViT layers. We conduct comprehensive experiments on widely used datasets and the results demonstrate that ViT-FOD is able to achieve state-of-the-art performance.
abstract_zh: 最近，针对细粒度视觉分类（FGVC）提出了几种基于视觉变换器（ViT）的方法。这些方法显着超越了现有的基于CNN的方法，证明了ViT在FGVC任务中的有效性。但是，将ViT直接应用于FGVC时存在一些限制。首先，ViT需要将图像分割成块并计算每对的注意力，这可能会导致大量的冗余计算，并且在处理具有复杂背景和小尺寸的细粒度图像时可能会导致大量的冗余计算和性能不理想。其次，标准ViT仅利用最后一层的类标记进行分类，这不足以提取全面的细粒度信息。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种用于 FGVC 任务的基于 ViT 的新型细粒度对象鉴别器，简称 ViT-FOD。具体来说，除了 ViT 主干之外，它还引入了三个新颖的组件，即注意力补丁组合（APC）、关键区域过滤器（CRF）和互补令牌集成（CTI）。其中，APC将两幅图像中的信息块分割成新图像，从而减少冗余计算。 CRF 强调与判别区域相对应的标记，以生成用于细微特征学习的新类别标记。为了提取全面的信息，CTI 集成了不同 ViT 层中的类标记捕获的补充信息。我们对广泛使用的数据集进行了全面的实验，结果表明 ViT-FOD 能够实现最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于视觉Transformer的细粒度物体辨别器ViT-FOD，以解决细粒度视觉分类任务中的计算冗余和特征提取不足问题。
AI.motivation: 直接应用ViT到细粒度分类任务时存在计算冗余高、背景复杂和小目标处理性能不足的问题，且标准ViT仅依赖最终层的class token无法充分提取细粒度信息。
AI.method: 在ViT主干网络基础上引入三个组件：注意力块组合（APC）通过跨图像信息块重组减少冗余计算；关键区域过滤器（CRF）强化判别区域的token生成新class token；互补token集成（CTI）融合不同层class token的信息以提取全面特征。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上实验表明，ViT-FOD在细粒度分类任务中达到当时最先进的性能水平。
AI.conclusion: ViT-FOD通过设计的三个创新组件有效解决了ViT在细粒度任务中的局限性，为后续研究提供了新的技术思路。

CRF emphasizes tokens corresponding to discriminative regions to generate a new class token for subtle feature learning. To extract comprehensive information, CTI integrates complementary information captured by class tokens in different ViT layers. We conduct comprehensive experiments on widely used datasets and the results demonstrate that ViT-FOD is able to achieve state-of-the-art performance. 最近，针对细粒度视觉分类（FGVC）提出了几种基于视觉变换器（ViT）的方法。这些方法显着超越了现有的基于CNN的方法，证明了ViT在FGVC任务中的有效性。但是，将ViT直接应用于FGVC时存在一些限制。首先，ViT需要将图像分割成块并计算每对的注意力，这可能会导致大量的冗余计算，并且在处理具有复杂背景和小尺寸的细粒度图像时可能会导致大量的冗余计算和性能不理想。其次，标准ViT仅利用最后一层的类标记进行分类，这不足以提取全面的细粒度信息。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种用于 FGVC 任务的基于 ViT 的新型细粒度对象鉴别器，简称 ViT-FOD。具体来说，除了 ViT 主干之外，它还引入了三个新颖的组件，即注意力补丁组合（APC）、关键区域过滤器（CRF）和互补令牌集成（CTI）。其中，APC将两幅图像中的信息块分割成新图像，从而减少冗余计算。 CRF 强调与判别区域相对应的标记，以生成用于细微特征学习的新类别标记。为了提取全面的信息，CTI 集成了不同 ViT 层中的类标记捕获的补充信息。我们对广泛使用的数据集进行了全面的实验，结果表明 ViT-FOD 能够实现最先进的性能。 本文提出一种基于视觉Transformer的细粒度物体辨别器ViT-FOD，以解决细粒度视觉分类任务中的计算冗余和特征提取不足问题。 Zi-Chao Zhang,Zhen-Duo Chen,Yongxin Wang,Xin Luo,Xin-Shun Xu cs.CV

authors_text: Zhou Yu,Zitian Jin,Jun Yu,Mingliang Xu,Hongbo Wang,Jianping Fan
title: Bilaterally Slimmable Transformer for Elastic and Efficient Visual Question Answering
title_zh: 双边可瘦身变压器，实现弹性高效的视觉问答
comment: Accepted at IEEE Transactions on Multimedia, 2023. Code available at https://github.com/MILVLG/bst
comments: Accepted at IEEE Transactions on Multimedia, 2023. Code available at https://github.com/MILVLG/bst
abstract: Recent advances in Transformer architectures [1] have brought remarkable improvements to visual question answering (VQA). Nevertheless, Transformer-based VQA models are usually deep and wide to guarantee good performance, so they can only run on powerful GPU servers and cannot run on capacity-restricted platforms such as mobile phones. Therefore, it is desirable to learn an elastic VQA model that supports adaptive pruning at runtime to meet the efficiency constraints of different platforms. To this end, we present the bilaterally slimmable Transformer (BST), a general framework that can be seamlessly integrated into arbitrary Transformer-based VQA models to train a single model once and obtain various slimmed submodels of different widths and depths. To verify the effectiveness and generality of this method, we integrate the proposed BST framework with three typical Transformer-based VQA approaches, namely MCAN [2], UNITER [3], and CLIP-ViL [4], and conduct extensive experiments on two commonly-used benchmark datasets. In particular, one slimmed MCAN-BST submodel achieves comparable accuracy on VQA-v2, while being 0.38x smaller in model size and having 0.27x fewer FLOPs than the reference MCAN model. The smallest MCAN-BST submodel only has 9M parameters and 0.16G FLOPs during inference, making it possible to deploy it on a mobile device with less than 60 ms latency.
summary: Recent advances in Transformer architectures [1] have brought remarkable improvements to visual question answering (VQA). Nevertheless, Transformer-based VQA models are usually deep and wide to guarantee good performance, so they can only run on powerful GPU servers and cannot run on capacity-restricted platforms such as mobile phones. Therefore, it is desirable to learn an elastic VQA model that supports adaptive pruning at runtime to meet the efficiency constraints of different platforms. To this end, we present the bilaterally slimmable Transformer (BST), a general framework that can be seamlessly integrated into arbitrary Transformer-based VQA models to train a single model once and obtain various slimmed submodels of different widths and depths. To verify the effectiveness and generality of this method, we integrate the proposed BST framework with three typical Transformer-based VQA approaches, namely MCAN [2], UNITER [3], and CLIP-ViL [4], and conduct extensive experiments on two commonly-used benchmark datasets. In particular, one slimmed MCAN-BST submodel achieves comparable accuracy on VQA-v2, while being 0.38x smaller in model size and having 0.27x fewer FLOPs than the reference MCAN model. The smallest MCAN-BST submodel only has 9M parameters and 0.16G FLOPs during inference, making it possible to deploy it on a mobile device with less than 60 ms latency.
abstract_zh: Transformer 架构 [1] 的最新进展为视觉问答 (VQA) 带来了显着改进。然而，基于Transformer的VQA模型通常很深很宽，以保证良好的性能，因此它们只能运行在强大的GPU服务器上，而无法运行在手机等容量受限的平台上。因此，需要学习一种支持运行时自适应剪枝的弹性VQA模型，以满足不同平台的效率约束。为此，我们提出了双边瘦身 Transformer (BST)，这是一个通用框架，可以无缝集成到任意基于 Transformer 的 VQA 模型中，对单个模型进行一次训练，并获得不同宽度和深度的各种瘦身子模型。为了验证该方法的有效性和通用性，我们将所提出的 BST 框架与三种典型的基于 Transformer 的 VQA 方法（即 MCAN [2]、UNITER [3] 和 CLIP-ViL [4]）集成，并在两个常用的基准数据集上进行了广泛的实验。特别是，一种精简的 MCAN-BST 子模型在 VQA-v2 上实现了相当的精度，同时模型大小比参考 MCAN 模型小 0.38 倍，FLOP 数减少 0.27 倍。最小的 MCAN-BST 子模型在推理过程中只有 9M 个参数和 0.16G FLOP，使其可以以低于 60 ms 的延迟部署在移动设备上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种双边可瘦身的Transformer框架（BST），用于实现弹性且高效的视觉问答（VQA）模型，支持运行时自适应剪枝以适应不同硬件平台。
AI.motivation: 现有基于Transformer的VQA模型通常参数量大、计算量高，难以部署在移动端等资源受限设备上，亟需一种能在保持性能的同时适应不同计算能力的弹性模型方案。
AI.method: 设计双边可瘦身Transformer（BST）框架，通过统一训练流程生成不同宽度和深度的子模型，无缝集成到MCAN、UNITER、CLIP-ViL等三种典型VQA模型中。
AI.result: 在VQA-v2数据集上，瘦身后的MCAN-BST子模型参数量减少至9M，FLOPs降至0.16G，推理延迟低于60ms，准确率与原始模型相当。
AI.conclusion: BST框架有效实现了VQA模型的弹性部署，在保持性能的同时显著降低计算和存储开销，验证了方法的通用性和实用性。

authors_text: Xintao Zhao,Feng Liu,Changhe Song,Zhiyong Wu,Shiyin Kang,Deyi Tuo,Helen Meng
title: Disentangleing Content and Fine-grained Prosody Information via Hybrid ASR Bottleneck Features for Voice Conversion
title_zh: 通过混合 ASR 语音转换瓶颈功能理清内容和细粒度韵律信息
abstract: Non-parallel data voice conversion (VC) have achieved considerable breakthroughs recently through introducing bottleneck features (BNFs) extracted by the automatic speech recognition(ASR) model. However, selection of BNFs have a significant impact on VC result. For example, when extracting BNFs from ASR trained with Cross Entropy loss (CE-BNFs) and feeding into neural network to train a VC system, the timbre similarity of converted speech is significantly degraded. If BNFs are extracted from ASR trained using Connectionist Temporal Classification loss (CTC-BNFs), the naturalness of the converted speech may decrease. This phenomenon is caused by the difference of information contained in BNFs. In this paper, we proposed an any-to-one VC method using hybrid bottleneck features extracted from CTC-BNFs and CE-BNFs to complement each other advantages. Gradient reversal layer and instance normalization were used to extract prosody information from CE-BNFs and content information from CTC-BNFs. Auto-regressive decoder and Hifi-GAN vocoder were used to generate high-quality waveform. Experimental results show that our proposed method achieves higher similarity, naturalness, quality than baseline method and reveals the differences between the information contained in CE-BNFs and CTC-BNFs as well as the influence they have on the converted speech.
summary: Non-parallel data voice conversion (VC) have achieved considerable breakthroughs recently through introducing bottleneck features (BNFs) extracted by the automatic speech recognition(ASR) model. However, selection of BNFs have a significant impact on VC result. For example, when extracting BNFs from ASR trained with Cross Entropy loss (CE-BNFs) and feeding into neural network to train a VC system, the timbre similarity of converted speech is significantly degraded. If BNFs are extracted from ASR trained using Connectionist Temporal Classification loss (CTC-BNFs), the naturalness of the converted speech may decrease. This phenomenon is caused by the difference of information contained in BNFs. In this paper, we proposed an any-to-one VC method using hybrid bottleneck features extracted from CTC-BNFs and CE-BNFs to complement each other advantages. Gradient reversal layer and instance normalization were used to extract prosody information from CE-BNFs and content information from CTC-BNFs. Auto-regressive decoder and Hifi-GAN vocoder were used to generate high-quality waveform. Experimental results show that our proposed method achieves higher similarity, naturalness, quality than baseline method and reveals the differences between the information contained in CE-BNFs and CTC-BNFs as well as the influence they have on the converted speech.
abstract_zh: 非并行数据语音转换（VC）最近通过引入自动语音识别（ASR）模型提取的瓶颈特征（BNF）取得了相当大的突破。然而，BNF 的选择对 VC 结果有显着影响。例如，当从使用交叉熵损失（CE-BNF）训练的 ASR 中提取 BNF 并将其输入神经网络来训练 VC 系统时，转换后的语音的音色相似度会显着降低。如果从使用连接主义时间分类损失 (CTC-BNF) 训练的 ASR 中提取 BNF，则转换后的语音的自然度可能会降低。这种现象是由BNF所包含的信息差异造成的。在本文中，我们提出了一种使用从 CTC-BNF 和 CE-BNF 中提取的混合瓶颈特征来互补彼此优势的任意对一 VC 方法。使用梯度反转层和实例归一化从CE-BNF中提取韵律信息，从CTC-BNF中提取内容信息。使用自回归解码器和 Hifi-GAN 声码器生成高质量波形。实验结果表明，我们提出的方法比基线方法具有更高的相似性、自然度和质量，并揭示了CE-BNF和CTC-BNF中包含的信息之间的差异以及它们对转换后的语音的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于混合瓶颈特征的任意到单一语音转换方法，通过结合CTC-BNFs和CE-BNFs的优势提升语音转换质量。
AI.motivation: 现有基于ASR瓶颈特征的语音转换方法在选择CE-BNFs或CTC-BNFs时存在明显缺陷，分别导致音色相似度下降或自然度降低，需探索更优的特征融合方案。
AI.method: 采用梯度反转层和实例归一化技术，从CTC-BNFs中提取韵律信息、从CE-BNFs中提取内容信息，结合自回归解码器与HiFi-GAN声码器生成高质量波形。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在相似度、自然度和音质指标上均优于基线方法，验证了混合特征对信息差异的补偿效果。
AI.conclusion: 混合CTC-BNFs与CE-BNFs可有效平衡音色保持与自然度需求，为非平行数据语音转换提供了新的特征利用范式。

Experimental results show that our proposed method achieves higher similarity, naturalness, quality than baseline method and reveals the differences between the information contained in CE-BNFs and CTC-BNFs as well as the influence they have on the converted speech. 非并行数据语音转换（VC）最近通过引入自动语音识别（ASR）模型提取的瓶颈特征（BNF）取得了相当大的突破。然而，BNF 的选择对 VC 结果有显着影响。例如，当从使用交叉熵损失（CE-BNF）训练的 ASR 中提取 BNF 并将其输入神经网络来训练 VC 系统时，转换后的语音的音色相似度会显着降低。如果从使用连接主义时间分类损失 (CTC-BNF) 训练的 ASR 中提取 BNF，则转换后的语音的自然度可能会降低。这种现象是由BNF所包含的信息差异造成的。在本文中，我们提出了一种使用从 CTC-BNF 和 CE-BNF 中提取的混合瓶颈特征来互补彼此优势的任意对一 VC 方法。使用梯度反转层和实例归一化从CE-BNF中提取韵律信息，从CTC-BNF中提取内容信息。使用自回归解码器和 Hifi-GAN 声码器生成高质量波形。实验结果表明，我们提出的方法比基线方法具有更高的相似性、自然度和质量，并揭示了CE-BNF和CTC-BNF中包含的信息之间的差异以及它们对转换后的语音的影响。 本文提出一种基于混合瓶颈特征的任意到单一语音转换方法，通过结合CTC-BNFs和CE-BNFs的优势提升语音转换质量。 Xintao Zhao,Feng Liu,Changhe Song,Zhiyong Wu,Shiyin Kang,Deyi Tuo,Helen Meng cs.SD,cs.CL,eess.AS

authors_text: Shun Taguchi,Noriaki Hirose
title: Unsupervised Simultaneous Learning for Camera Re-Localization and Depth Estimation from Video
title_zh: 用于摄像机重新定位和视频深度估计的无监督同步学习
abstract: We present an unsupervised simultaneous learning framework for the task of monocular camera re-localization and depth estimation from unlabeled video sequences. Monocular camera re-localization refers to the task of estimating the absolute camera pose from an instance image in a known environment, which has been intensively studied for alternative localization in GPS-denied environments. In recent works, camera re-localization methods are trained via supervised learning from pairs of camera images and camera poses. In contrast to previous works, we propose a completely unsupervised learning framework for camera re-localization and depth estimation, requiring only monocular video sequences for training. In our framework, we train two networks that estimate the scene coordinates using directions and the depth map from each image which are then combined to estimate the camera pose. The networks can be trained through the minimization of loss functions based on our loop closed view synthesis. In experiments with the 7-scenes dataset, the proposed method outperformed the re-localization of the state-of-the-art visual SLAM, ORB-SLAM3. Our method also outperforms state-of-the-art monocular depth estimation in a trained environment.
summary: We present an unsupervised simultaneous learning framework for the task of monocular camera re-localization and depth estimation from unlabeled video sequences. Monocular camera re-localization refers to the task of estimating the absolute camera pose from an instance image in a known environment, which has been intensively studied for alternative localization in GPS-denied environments. In recent works, camera re-localization methods are trained via supervised learning from pairs of camera images and camera poses. In contrast to previous works, we propose a completely unsupervised learning framework for camera re-localization and depth estimation, requiring only monocular video sequences for training. In our framework, we train two networks that estimate the scene coordinates using directions and the depth map from each image which are then combined to estimate the camera pose. The networks can be trained through the minimization of loss functions based on our loop closed view synthesis. In experiments with the 7-scenes dataset, the proposed method outperformed the re-localization of the state-of-the-art visual SLAM, ORB-SLAM3. Our method also outperforms state-of-the-art monocular depth estimation in a trained environment.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种无监督同步学习框架，用于单目相机重新定位和未标记视频序列的深度估计的任务。单目相机重定位是指根据已知环境中的实例图像估计绝对相机位姿的任务，该任务已针对 GPS 拒绝环境中的替代定位进行了深入研究。在最近的工作中，相机重定位方法是通过对相机图像和相机姿势的监督学习来训练的。与之前的工作相比，我们提出了一种完全无监督的学习框架，用于相机重新定位和深度估计，仅需要单目视频序列进行训练。在我们的框架中，我们训练两个网络，使用每个图像的方向和深度图来估计场景坐标，然后将它们组合起来估计相机姿态。可以通过基于我们的循环闭视图合成的损失函数最小化来训练网络。在 7 个场景数据集的实验中，所提出的方法优于最先进的视觉 SLAM ORB-SLAM3 的重新定位。我们的方法在经过训练的环境中也优于最先进的单目深度估计。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无监督联合学习框架，从未标记视频序列中同时学习单目相机重新定位和深度估计。
AI.motivation: 传统相机重新定位依赖标注的图像-姿态对进行监督学习，而实际场景中获取此类标注数据困难，尤其在GPS不可用环境。本文旨在开发无需标注数据的无监督方法。
AI.method: 训练两个网络：一个估计场景坐标，另一个生成深度图，通过闭环视图合成的损失函数联合优化，最终结合输出估计相机姿态。
AI.result: 在7-scenes数据集上，该方法在相机重新定位任务中超越ORB-SLAM3，在单目深度估计上也优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 无监督联合学习框架有效解决了单目相机重新定位和深度估计问题，为实际应用提供了新方案。

authors_text: Alexandros Shikun Zhang,Naomi Fengqi Li
title: A Two-Stage Federated Transfer Learning Framework in Medical Images Classification on Limited Data: A COVID-19 Case Study
title_zh: 有限数据医学图像分类中的两阶段联合迁移学习框架：COVID-19 案例研究
abstract: COVID-19 pandemic has spread rapidly and caused a shortage of global medical resources. The efficiency of COVID-19 diagnosis has become highly significant. As deep learning and convolutional neural network (CNN) has been widely utilized and been verified in analyzing medical images, it has become a powerful tool for computer-assisted diagnosis. However, there are two most significant challenges in medical image classification with the help of deep learning and neural networks, one of them is the difficulty of acquiring enough samples, which may lead to model overfitting. Privacy concerns mainly bring the other challenge since medical-related records are often deemed patients' private information and protected by laws such as GDPR and HIPPA. Federated learning can ensure the model training is decentralized on different devices and no data is shared among them, which guarantees privacy. However, with data located on different devices, the accessible data of each device could be limited. Since transfer learning has been verified in dealing with limited data with good performance, therefore, in this paper, We made a trial to implement federated learning and transfer learning techniques using CNNs to classify COVID-19 using lung CT scans. We also explored the impact of dataset distribution at the client-side in federated learning and the number of training epochs a model is trained. Finally, we obtained very high performance with federated learning, demonstrating our success in leveraging accuracy and privacy.
summary: COVID-19 pandemic has spread rapidly and caused a shortage of global medical resources. The efficiency of COVID-19 diagnosis has become highly significant. As deep learning and convolutional neural network (CNN) has been widely utilized and been verified in analyzing medical images, it has become a powerful tool for computer-assisted diagnosis. However, there are two most significant challenges in medical image classification with the help of deep learning and neural networks, one of them is the difficulty of acquiring enough samples, which may lead to model overfitting. Privacy concerns mainly bring the other challenge since medical-related records are often deemed patients' private information and protected by laws such as GDPR and HIPPA. Federated learning can ensure the model training is decentralized on different devices and no data is shared among them, which guarantees privacy. However, with data located on different devices, the accessible data of each device could be limited. Since transfer learning has been verified in dealing with limited data with good performance, therefore, in this paper, We made a trial to implement federated learning and transfer learning techniques using CNNs to classify COVID-19 using lung CT scans. We also explored the impact of dataset distribution at the client-side in federated learning and the number of training epochs a model is trained. Finally, we obtained very high performance with federated learning, demonstrating our success in leveraging accuracy and privacy.
abstract_zh: COVID-19大流行迅速蔓延，导致全球医疗资源短缺。 COVID-19 诊断的效率变得非常重要。随着深度学习和卷积神经网络（CNN）在医学图像分析中的广泛应用和验证，它已成为计算机辅助诊断的有力工具。然而，借助深度学习和神经网络进行医学图像分类存在两个最显着的挑战，其中之一是难以获取足够的样本，这可能导致模型过拟合。隐私问题主要带来了另一个挑战，因为医疗相关记录通常被视为患者的私人信息，并受到 GDPR 和 HIPPA 等法律的保护。联邦学习可以保证模型训练分散在不同的设备上，并且设备之间不共享数据，从而保证了隐私。然而，由于数据位于不同的设备上，每个设备可访问的数据可能会受到限制。由于迁移学习已在处理有限数据方面得到了良好的性能验证，因此，在本文中，我们尝试使用 CNN 实施联邦学习和迁移学习技术，以使用肺部 CT 扫描对 COVID-19 进行分类。我们还探讨了联邦学习中客户端数据集分布的影响以及模型训练的训练周期数。最后，我们通过联邦学习获得了非常高的性能，证明了我们在利用准确性和隐私方面的成功。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合联邦学习与迁移学习的两阶段框架，用于在有限数据条件下通过肺部CT扫描对COVID-19进行医学图像分类。
AI.motivation: 针对医疗图像分类中数据不足导致的模型过拟合问题及隐私保护需求，利用联邦学习保障数据隐私，结合迁移学习解决小样本学习挑战。
AI.method: 采用卷积神经网络（CNN）构建联邦学习框架，通过迁移学习技术优化模型参数，研究客户端数据分布及训练轮数对模型性能的影响。
AI.result: 在联邦学习环境下实现了高分类准确率，验证了框架在隐私保护与模型性能间的平衡能力。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效解决了医疗数据隐私与小样本学习的矛盾，为联邦迁移学习在医学图像诊断中的应用提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Bu XuSong,Nie Hao,Zhang Zhan,Zhang Qin
title: A platform for causal knowledge representation and inference in industrial fault diagnosis based on cubic DUCG
title_zh: 基于三次DUCG的工业故障诊断因果知识表示与推理平台
abstract: The working conditions of large-scale industrial systems are very complex. Once a failure occurs, it will affect industrial production, cause property damage, and even endanger the workers' lives. Therefore, it is important to control the operation of the system to accurately grasp the operation status of the system and find out the failure in time. The occurrence of system failure is a gradual process, and the occurrence of the current system failure may depend on the previous state of the system, which is sequential. The fault diagnosis technology based on time series can monitor the operating status of the system in real-time, detect the abnormal operation of the system within the allowable time interval, diagnose the root cause of the fault and predict the status trend. In order to guide the technical personnel to troubleshoot and solve related faults, in this paper, an industrial fault diagnosis system is implemented based on the cubic DUCG theory. The diagnostic model of the system is constructed based on expert knowledge and experience. At the same time, it can perform real-time fault diagnosis based on time sequence, which solves the problem of fault diagnosis of industrial systems without sample data.

Once a failure occurs, it will affect industrial production, cause property damage, and even endanger the workers' lives. The occurrence of system failure is a gradual process, and the occurrence of the current system failure may depend on the previous state of the system, which is sequential. The fault diagnosis technology based on time series can monitor the operating status of the system in real-time, detect the abnormal operation of the system within the allowable time interval, diagnose the root cause of the fault and predict the status trend. In order to guide the technical personnel to troubleshoot and solve related faults, in this paper, an industrial fault diagnosis system is implemented based on the cubic DUCG theory. abstract_zh: 大型工业系统的工作条件非常复杂。一旦发生故障，就会影响工业生产，造成财产损失，甚至危及工人生命。因此，控制系统的运行，准确掌握系统的运行状态，及时发现故障显得尤为重要。系统故障的发生是一个渐进的过程，当前系统故障的发生可能依赖于系统之前的状态，是有顺序的。基于时间序列的故障诊断技术可以实时监测系统的运行状态，在允许的时间间隔内检测系统运行的异常情况，诊断故障的根本原因并预测状态趋势。为了指导技术人员排查和解决相关故障，本文实现了一种基于三次DUCG理论的工业故障诊断系统。系统的诊断模型是基于专家知识和经验构建的。同时可以基于时序进行实时故障诊断，解决了工业系统无样本数据的故障诊断问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于立方DUCG理论的工业故障诊断平台，用于因果知识表示与推理，解决无样本数据情况下的故障诊断问题。
AI.motivation: 工业系统故障可能导致严重损失，传统方法依赖样本数据且难以处理时序依赖性，需开发无需样本数据的实时诊断技术。
AI.method: 基于立方DUCG理论构建诊断模型，结合专家知识与经验，利用时间序列进行实时故障检测与因果推理。
AI.result: 实现工业故障诊断系统，可在无样本数据条件下完成实时故障诊断与趋势预测，提升诊断准确性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为复杂工业系统的故障诊断提供了新思路，尤其适用于样本数据不足的场景，具有实际应用价值。
