authors_text: Jae Shin Yoon,Duygu Ceylan,Tuanfeng Y. Wang,Jingwan Lu,Jimei Yang,Zhixin Shu,Hyun Soo Park
title: Learning Motion-Dependent Appearance for High-Fidelity Rendering of Dynamic Humans from a Single Camera
title_zh: 学习运动相关的外观，以通过单个摄像机对动态人体进行高保真度渲染
abstract: Appearance of dressed humans undergoes a complex geometric transformation induced not only by the static pose but also by its dynamics, i.e., there exists a number of cloth geometric configurations given a pose depending on the way it has moved. Such appearance modeling conditioned on motion has been largely neglected in existing human rendering methods, resulting in rendering of physically implausible motion. A key challenge of learning the dynamics of the appearance lies in the requirement of a prohibitively large amount of observations. In this paper, we present a compact motion representation by enforcing equivariance -- a representation is expected to be transformed in the way that the pose is transformed. We model an equivariant encoder that can generate the generalizable representation from the spatial and temporal derivatives of the 3D body surface. This learned representation is decoded by a compositional multi-task decoder that renders high fidelity time-varying appearance. Our experiments show that our method can generate a temporally coherent video of dynamic humans for unseen body poses and novel views given a single view video.
summary: Appearance of dressed humans undergoes a complex geometric transformation induced not only by the static pose but also by its dynamics, i.e., there exists a number of cloth geometric configurations given a pose depending on the way it has moved. Such appearance modeling conditioned on motion has been largely neglected in existing human rendering methods, resulting in rendering of physically implausible motion. A key challenge of learning the dynamics of the appearance lies in the requirement of a prohibitively large amount of observations. In this paper, we present a compact motion representation by enforcing equivariance -- a representation is expected to be transformed in the way that the pose is transformed. We model an equivariant encoder that can generate the generalizable representation from the spatial and temporal derivatives of the 3D body surface. This learned representation is decoded by a compositional multi-task decoder that renders high fidelity time-varying appearance. Our experiments show that our method can generate a temporally coherent video of dynamic humans for unseen body poses and novel views given a single view video.
abstract_zh: 穿着的人的外观经历了复杂的几何变换，这不仅是由静态姿势引起的，而且也是由其动态引起的，即，根据其移动的方式，存在多种给定姿势的布料几何配置。这种以运动为条件的外观建模在现有的人类渲染方法中很大程度上被忽略了，导致渲染出物理上不可信的运动。学习外观动态的一个关键挑战在于需要大量的观察。在本文中，我们通过强制等变性提出了一种紧凑的运动表示——预计表示会以姿态变换的方式进行变换。我们建模了一个等变编码器，它可以根据 3D 身体表面的空间和时间导数生成可概括的表示。这种学习到的表示由组合多任务解码器解码，呈现高保真度的时变外观。我们的实验表明，我们的方法可以在给定单视图视频的情况下，针对看不见的身体姿势和新颖的视图生成动态人体的时间连贯视频。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种从单目视频学习动态人类高保真渲染的方法，重点建模运动对服装外观的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有方法忽视了运动对服装几何形态的动态影响，导致渲染结果物理不合理，且动态外观建模需要大量观测数据。
AI.method: 通过强制等变性约束构建紧凑运动表征，利用3D身体表面时空导数训练等变编码器，并采用组合多任务解码器生成时变外观。
AI.result: 实验表明方法能生成时间连贯的动态人类视频，支持未见过的体态和新视角渲染。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了动态人类渲染中运动依赖外观建模的挑战，提升了渲染的真实感和泛化能力。

authors_text: Max Zuo,Logan Schick,Matthew Gombolay,Nakul Gopalan
title: Efficient Exploration via First-Person Behavior Cloning Assisted Rapidly-Exploring Random Trees
title_zh: 通过第一人称行为克隆辅助快速探索随机树进行高效探索
comment: Published in HRI 2022 Workshop - MLHRC. This is a replacement to include broader citations from works in the field
comments: Published in HRI 2022 Workshop - MLHRC. This is a replacement to include broader citations from works in the field
abstract: Modern day computer games have extremely large state and action spaces. To detect bugs in these games' models, human testers play the games repeatedly to explore the game and find errors in the games. Such gameplay is exhaustive and time consuming. Moreover, since robotics simulators depend on similar methods of model specification and debugging, the problem of finding errors in the model is of interest to the robotics community to ensure robot behaviors and interactions are consistent in simulators. Previous methods have used reinforcement learning arXiv:2103.13798 and search based methods (Chang, 2019, (Chang, 2021) arXiv:1811.06962 including Rapidly-exploring Random Trees (RRT) to explore a game's state-action space to find bugs. However, such search and exploration based methods are not efficient at exploring the state-action space without a pre-defined heuristic. In this work we attempt to combine a human-tester's expertise in solving games, and the RRT's exhaustiveness to search a game's state space efficiently with high coverage. This paper introduces Cloning Assisted RRT (CA-RRT) to test a game through search. We compare our methods to two existing baselines: 1) a weighted-RRT as described by arXiv:1812.03125; 2) human demonstration seeded RRT as described by Chang et. al. We find CA-RRT is applicable to more game maps and explores more game states in fewer tree expansions/iterations when compared to the existing baselines. In each test, CA-RRT reached more states on average in the same number of iterations as weighted-RRT. In our tested environments, CA-RRT reached the same number of states as weighted-RRT by more than 5000 fewer iterations on average, almost a 50% reduction and applied to more scenarios than. Moreover, as a consequence of our first person behavior cloning approach, CA-RRT worked on unseen game maps than just seeding the RRT with human demonstrated states.

To detect bugs in these games' models, human testers play the games repeatedly to explore the game and find errors in the games. Such gameplay is exhaustive and time consuming. Moreover, since robotics simulators depend on similar methods of model specification and debugging, the problem of finding errors in the model is of interest to the robotics community to ensure robot behaviors and interactions are consistent in simulators. Previous methods have used reinforcement learning arXiv:2103.13798 and search based methods (Chang, 2019, (Chang, 2021) arXiv:1811.06962 including Rapidly-exploring Random Trees (RRT) to explore a game's state-action space to find bugs. However, such search and exploration based methods are not efficient at exploring the state-action space without a pre-defined heuristic. In this work we attempt to combine a human-tester's expertise in solving games, and the RRT's exhaustiveness to search a game's state space efficiently with high coverage. This paper introduces Cloning Assisted RRT (CA-RRT) to test a game through search. We compare our methods to two existing baselines: 1) a weighted-RRT as described by arXiv:1812.03125; 2) human demonstration seeded RRT as described by Chang et. al. We find CA-RRT is applicable to more game maps and explores more game states in fewer tree expansions/iterations when compared to the existing baselines. In each test, CA-RRT reached more states on average in the same number of iterations as weighted-RRT. In our tested environments, CA-RRT reached the same number of states as weighted-RRT by more than 5000 fewer iterations on average, almost a 50% reduction and applied to more scenarios than. Moreover, as a consequence of our first person behavior cloning approach, CA-RRT worked on unseen game maps than just seeding the RRT with human demonstrated states.
abstract_zh: 现代计算机游戏具有非常大的状态和动作空间。为了检测这些游戏模型中的错误，人类测试人员会反复玩游戏来探索游戏并发现游戏中的错误。这样的游戏玩法是详尽且耗时的。此外，由于机器人模拟器依赖于类似的模型规范和调试方法，因此机器人社区对寻找模型中的错误感兴趣，以确保机器人行为和交互在模拟器中保持一致。以前的方法使用强化学习 arXiv:2103.13798 和基于搜索的方法 (Chang, 2019, (Chang, 2021) arXiv:1811.06962，包括快速探索随机树 (RRT) 来探索游戏的状态动作空间以查找错误。但是，这种基于搜索和探索的方法在没有预定义启发式的情况下探索状态动作空间时效率不高。在这项工作中，我们尝试将人类测试人员在解决游戏方面的专业知识与 RRT 的详尽性结合起来，以高覆盖率有效地搜索游戏的状态空间。本文介绍了克隆辅助 RRT (CA-RRT)，以通过搜索来测试游戏。我们将我们的方法与两个现有基线进行比较：1) arXiv:1812.03125 中描述的加权 RRT； 2) 人体示范播种 RRT，如 Chang 等人所述。等人。我们发现与现有基线相比，CA-RRT 适用于更多游戏地图，并以更少的树扩展/迭代探索更多游戏状态。在每次测试中，CA-RRT 在与加权 RRT 相同的迭代次数中平均达到更多状态。在我们的测试环境中，CA-RRT 达到与加权 RRT 相同的状态数，平均减少了 5000 多次迭代，几乎减少了 50%，并且适用于更多场景。此外，由于我们采用第一人称行为克隆方法，CA-RRT 在看不见的游戏地图上工作，而不仅仅是在 RRT 中植入人类演示的状态。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合第一视角行为克隆与快速探索随机树（RRT）的算法CA-RRT，用于高效探索游戏状态空间以检测模型错误。
AI.motivation: 现有基于搜索和强化学习的方法在探索游戏状态空间时效率低下，且依赖预定义启发式规则，难以适应复杂场景和未见过的地图。
AI.method: 通过第一视角行为克隆技术获取人类测试者的游戏策略，辅助RRT算法生成探索路径，无需预定义启发式规则即可高效覆盖状态空间。
AI.result: CA-RRT在相同迭代次数下覆盖更多游戏状态，平均迭代次数比现有方法减少50%以上，并能有效应用于未见过的游戏地图。
AI.conclusion: CA-RRT通过融合人类行为克隆与RRT算法，显著提升了状态空间探索效率，适用于更广泛的场景且具备良好的泛化能力。

search_text: Efficient Exploration via First-Person Behavior Cloning Assisted Rapidly-Exploring Random Trees 通过第一人称行为克隆辅助快速探索随机树进行高效探索 Modern day computer games have extremely large state and action spaces. To detect bugs in these games' models, human testers play the games repeatedly to explore the game and find errors in the games. Such gameplay is exhaustive and time consuming. Moreover, since robotics simulators depend on similar methods of model specification and debugging, the problem of finding errors in the model is of interest to the robotics community to ensure robot behaviors and interactions are consistent in simulators. Previous methods have used reinforcement learning arXiv:2103.13798 and search based methods (Chang, 2019, (Chang, 2021) arXiv:1811.06962 including Rapidly-exploring Random Trees (RRT) to explore a game's state-action space to find bugs. However, such search and exploration based methods are not efficient at exploring the state-action space without a pre-defined heuristic. In this work we attempt to combine a human-tester's expertise in solving games, and the RRT's exhaustiveness to search a game's state space efficiently with high coverage. This paper introduces Cloning Assisted RRT (CA-RRT) to test a game through search. We compare our methods to two existing baselines: 1) a weighted-RRT as described by arXiv:1812.03125; 2) human demonstration seeded RRT as described by Chang et. al. We find CA-RRT is applicable to more game maps and explores more game states in fewer tree expansions/iterations when compared to the existing baselines. In each test, CA-RRT reached more states on average in the same number of iterations as weighted-RRT. In our tested environments, CA-RRT reached the same number of states as weighted-RRT by more than 5000 fewer iterations on average, almost a 50% reduction and applied to more scenarios than. Moreover, as a consequence of our first person behavior cloning approach, CA-RRT worked on unseen game maps than just seeding the RRT with human demonstrated states. 现代计算机游戏具有非常大的状态和动作空间。为了检测这些游戏模型中的错误，人类测试人员会反复玩游戏来探索游戏并发现游戏中的错误。这样的游戏玩法是详尽且耗时的。此外，由于机器人模拟器依赖于类似的模型规范和调试方法，因此机器人社区对寻找模型中的错误感兴趣，以确保机器人行为和交互在模拟器中保持一致。以前的方法使用强化学习 arXiv:2103.13798 和基于搜索的方法 (Chang, 2019, (Chang, 2021) arXiv:1811.06962，包括快速探索随机树 (RRT) 来探索游戏的状态动作空间以查找错误。但是，这种基于搜索和探索的方法在没有预定义启发式的情况下探索状态动作空间时效率不高。在这项工作中，我们尝试将人类测试人员在解决游戏方面的专业知识与 RRT 的详尽性结合起来，以高覆盖率有效地搜索游戏的状态空间。本文介绍了克隆辅助 RRT (CA-RRT)，以通过搜索来测试游戏。我们将我们的方法与两个现有基线进行比较：1) arXiv:1812.03125 中描述的加权 RRT； 2) 人体示范播种 RRT，如 Chang 等人所述。等人。我们发现与现有基线相比，CA-RRT 适用于更多游戏地图，并以更少的树扩展/迭代探索更多游戏状态。在每次测试中，CA-RRT 在与加权 RRT 相同的迭代次数中平均达到更多状态。在我们的测试环境中，CA-RRT 达到与加权 RRT 相同的状态数，平均减少了 5000 多次迭代，几乎减少了 50%，并且适用于更多场景。此外，由于我们采用第一人称行为克隆方法，CA-RRT 在看不见的游戏地图上工作，而不仅仅是在 RRT 中植入人类演示的状态。 本文提出了一种结合第一视角行为克隆与快速探索随机树（RRT）的算法CA-RRT，用于高效探索游戏状态空间以检测模型错误。 Max Zuo,Logan Schick,Matthew Gombolay,Nakul Gopalan cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.RO

authors_text: Deep Pandey,Qi Yu
title: Multidimensional Belief Quantification for Label-Efficient Meta-Learning
title_zh: 标签高效元学习的多维信念量化
abstract: Optimization-based meta-learning offers a promising direction for few-shot learning that is essential for many real-world computer vision applications. However, learning from few samples introduces uncertainty, and quantifying model confidence for few-shot predictions is essential for many critical domains. Furthermore, few-shot tasks used in meta training are usually sampled randomly from a task distribution for an iterative model update, leading to high labeling costs and computational overhead in meta-training. We propose a novel uncertainty-aware task selection model for label efficient meta-learning. The proposed model formulates a multidimensional belief measure, which can quantify the known uncertainty and lower bound the unknown uncertainty of any given task. Our theoretical result establishes an important relationship between the conflicting belief and the incorrect belief. The theoretical result allows us to estimate the total uncertainty of a task, which provides a principled criterion for task selection. A novel multi-query task formulation is further developed to improve both the computational and labeling efficiency of meta-learning. Experiments conducted over multiple real-world few-shot image classification tasks demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed model.
summary: Optimization-based meta-learning offers a promising direction for few-shot learning that is essential for many real-world computer vision applications. However, learning from few samples introduces uncertainty, and quantifying model confidence for few-shot predictions is essential for many critical domains. Furthermore, few-shot tasks used in meta training are usually sampled randomly from a task distribution for an iterative model update, leading to high labeling costs and computational overhead in meta-training. We propose a novel uncertainty-aware task selection model for label efficient meta-learning. The proposed model formulates a multidimensional belief measure, which can quantify the known uncertainty and lower bound the unknown uncertainty of any given task. Our theoretical result establishes an important relationship between the conflicting belief and the incorrect belief. The theoretical result allows us to estimate the total uncertainty of a task, which provides a principled criterion for task selection. A novel multi-query task formulation is further developed to improve both the computational and labeling efficiency of meta-learning. Experiments conducted over multiple real-world few-shot image classification tasks demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed model.
abstract_zh: 基于优化的元学习为小样本学习提供了一个有前途的方向，这对于许多现实世界的计算机视觉应用至关重要。然而，从少量样本中学习会带来不确定性，并且量化少量样本预测的模型置信度对于许多关键领域至关重要。此外，元训练中使用的小样本任务通常是从任务分布中随机采样以进行迭代模型更新，导致元训练中的标记成本和计算开销较高。我们提出了一种新颖的不确定性感知任务选择模型，用于标签高效元学习。所提出的模型制定了多维信念度量，它可以量化已知的不确定性并降低任何给定任务的未知不确定性。我们的理论结果在相互冲突的信念和不正确的信念之间建立了重要的关系。理论结果使我们能够估计任务的总体不确定性，这为任务选择提供了原则性标准。进一步开发了一种新颖的多查询任务公式，以提高元学习的计算和标记效率。对多个现实世界的少镜头图像分类任务进行的实验证明了所提出模型的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多维信念量化的方法，用于提高标签高效元学习中的任务选择效率。
AI.motivation: 元学习中的少样本任务随机采样导致标签成本高且计算开销大，需量化模型不确定性以优化任务选择。
AI.method: 构建多维信念度量框架，区分已知与未知不确定性，并通过冲突信念与错误信念的理论关系指导任务选择，同时引入多查询任务机制提升效率。
AI.result: 在多个真实少样本图像分类任务中验证了该方法在降低标签成本和提升元学习性能方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过不确定性感知的任务选择模型，本文为标签高效元学习提供了理论依据和实践方案，平衡了计算与标注效率。

authors_text: Yufeng Yuan,A. Rupam Mahmood
title: Asynchronous Reinforcement Learning for Real-Time Control of Physical Robots
title_zh: 用于实时控制物理机器人的异步强化学习
comment: Appears in Proceedings of the 2022 International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA). Source code at https://github.com/YufengYuan/ur5_async_rl and companion video at https://youtu.be/B9icTcV1wNQ
comments: Appears in Proceedings of the 2022 International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA). Source code at https://github.com/YufengYuan/ur5_async_rl and companion video at https://youtu.be/B9icTcV1wNQ
abstract: An oft-ignored challenge of real-world reinforcement learning is that the real world does not pause when agents make learning updates. As standard simulated environments do not address this real-time aspect of learning, most available implementations of RL algorithms process environment interactions and learning updates sequentially. As a consequence, when such implementations are deployed in the real world, they may make decisions based on significantly delayed observations and not act responsively. Asynchronous learning has been proposed to solve this issue, but no systematic comparison between sequential and asynchronous reinforcement learning was conducted using real-world environments. In this work, we set up two vision-based tasks with a robotic arm, implement an asynchronous learning system that extends a previous architecture, and compare sequential and asynchronous reinforcement learning across different action cycle times, sensory data dimensions, and mini-batch sizes. Our experiments show that when the time cost of learning updates increases, the action cycle time in sequential implementation could grow excessively long, while the asynchronous implementation can always maintain an appropriate action cycle time. Consequently, when learning updates are expensive, the performance of sequential learning diminishes and is outperformed by asynchronous learning by a substantial margin. Our system learns in real-time to reach and track visual targets from pixels within two hours of experience and does so directly using real robots, learning completely from scratch.
summary: An oft-ignored challenge of real-world reinforcement learning is that the real world does not pause when agents make learning updates. As standard simulated environments do not address this real-time aspect of learning, most available implementations of RL algorithms process environment interactions and learning updates sequentially. As a consequence, when such implementations are deployed in the real world, they may make decisions based on significantly delayed observations and not act responsively. Asynchronous learning has been proposed to solve this issue, but no systematic comparison between sequential and asynchronous reinforcement learning was conducted using real-world environments. In this work, we set up two vision-based tasks with a robotic arm, implement an asynchronous learning system that extends a previous architecture, and compare sequential and asynchronous reinforcement learning across different action cycle times, sensory data dimensions, and mini-batch sizes. Our experiments show that when the time cost of learning updates increases, the action cycle time in sequential implementation could grow excessively long, while the asynchronous implementation can always maintain an appropriate action cycle time. Consequently, when learning updates are expensive, the performance of sequential learning diminishes and is outperformed by asynchronous learning by a substantial margin. Our system learns in real-time to reach and track visual targets from pixels within two hours of experience and does so directly using real robots, learning completely from scratch.
abstract_zh: 现实世界强化学习的一个经常被忽视的挑战是，当代理进行学习更新时，现实世界不会暂停。由于标准模拟环境无法解决学习的实时问题，因此大多数可用的 RL 算法实现都会按顺序处理环境交互和学习更新。因此，当在现实世界中部署此类实现时，它们可能会根据明显延迟的观察结果做出决策，并且不会做出响应。异步学习已经被提出来解决这个问题，但是没有使用真实环境对顺序强化学习和异步强化学习进行系统比较。在这项工作中，我们使用机械臂设置了两个基于视觉的任务，实现了一个扩展先前架构的异步学习系统，并比较了不同动作周期时间、传感数据维度和小批量大小的顺序和异步强化学习。我们的实验表明，当学习更新的时间成本增加时，顺序实现中的动作周期时间可能会变得过长，而异步实现始终可以保持适当的动作周期时间。因此，当学习更新成本高昂时，顺序学习的性能就会下降，并且远远优于异步学习。我们的系统可以在两小时内实时学习从像素到达并跟踪视觉目标，并直接使用真实的机器人来实现这一点，完全从头开始学习。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种异步强化学习方法，用于实现实时控制物理机器人。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中的强化学习面临一个常被忽视的问题，即现实世界不会在智能体进行学习更新时暂停，而现有模拟环境无法解决这一实时性问题，导致在实际部署时决策可能基于延迟的观察。
AI.method: 作者设计了两个基于视觉的任务，并实现了一个异步学习系统，扩展了先前的架构，比较了在不同动作周期时间、感官数据维度和小批量尺寸下的顺序和异步强化学习。
AI.result: 实验表明，当学习更新的时间成本增加时，顺序实现的动作周期时间可能变得过长，而异步实现能够始终维持适当的动作周期时间。在学习更新成本较高时，异步学习显著优于顺序学习。
AI.conclusion: 异步强化学习在学习更新成本较高时表现出更优性能，能够在真实机器人上实时从像素中学习并跟踪视觉目标。

search_text: Asynchronous Reinforcement Learning for Real-Time Control of Physical Robots 用于实时控制物理机器人的异步强化学习 An oft-ignored challenge of real-world reinforcement learning is that the real world does not pause when agents make learning updates. As standard simulated environments do not address this real-time aspect of learning, most available implementations of RL algorithms process environment interactions and learning updates sequentially. As a consequence, when such implementations are deployed in the real world, they may make decisions based on significantly delayed observations and not act responsively. Asynchronous learning has been proposed to solve this issue, but no systematic comparison between sequential and asynchronous reinforcement learning was conducted using real-world environments. In this work, we set up two vision-based tasks with a robotic arm, implement an asynchronous learning system that extends a previous architecture, and compare sequential and asynchronous reinforcement learning across different action cycle times, sensory data dimensions, and mini-batch sizes. Our experiments show that when the time cost of learning updates increases, the action cycle time in sequential implementation could grow excessively long, while the asynchronous implementation can always maintain an appropriate action cycle time. Consequently, when learning updates are expensive, the performance of sequential learning diminishes and is outperformed by asynchronous learning by a substantial margin. Our system learns in real-time to reach and track visual targets from pixels within two hours of experience and does so directly using real robots, learning completely from scratch. 现实世界强化学习的一个经常被忽视的挑战是，当代理进行学习更新时，现实世界不会暂停。由于标准模拟环境无法解决学习的实时问题，因此大多数可用的 RL 算法实现都会按顺序处理环境交互和学习更新。因此，当在现实世界中部署此类实现时，它们可能会根据明显延迟的观察结果做出决策，并且不会做出响应。异步学习已经被提出来解决这个问题，但是没有使用真实环境对顺序强化学习和异步强化学习进行系统比较。在这项工作中，我们使用机械臂设置了两个基于视觉的任务，实现了一个扩展先前架构的异步学习系统，并比较了不同动作周期时间、传感数据维度和小批量大小的顺序和异步强化学习。我们的实验表明，当学习更新的时间成本增加时，顺序实现中的动作周期时间可能会变得过长，而异步实现始终可以保持适当的动作周期时间。因此，当学习更新成本高昂时，顺序学习的性能就会下降，并且远远优于异步学习。我们的系统可以在两小时内实时学习从像素到达并跟踪视觉目标，并直接使用真实的机器人来实现这一点，完全从头开始学习。 本文提出了一种异步强化学习方法，用于实现实时控制物理机器人。 Yufeng Yuan,A. Rupam Mahmood cs.RO,cs.AI

authors_text: Luca Massari,Giulia Fransvea,Jessica D'Abbraccio,Mariangela Filosa,Giuseppe Terruso,Andrea Aliperta,Giacomo D'Alesio,Martina Zaltieri,Emiliano Schena,Eduardo Palermo,Edoardo Sinibaldi,Calogero Maria Oddo
title: Functional mimicry of Ruffini receptors with Fiber Bragg Gratings and Deep Neural Networks enables a bio-inspired large-area tactile sensitive skin
title_zh: 通过光纤布拉格光栅和深度神经网络对鲁菲尼受体进行功能模拟，实现仿生大面积触觉敏感皮肤
comment: 6 figures, 4 extended data figures, 2 extended data tables, 39 pages
comments: 6 figures, 4 extended data figures, 2 extended data tables, 39 pages
abstract: Collaborative robots are expected to physically interact with humans in daily living and workplace, including industrial and healthcare settings. A related key enabling technology is tactile sensing, which currently requires addressing the outstanding scientific challenge to simultaneously detect contact location and intensity by means of soft conformable artificial skins adapting over large areas to the complex curved geometries of robot embodiments. In this work, the development of a large-area sensitive soft skin with a curved geometry is presented, allowing for robot total-body coverage through modular patches. The biomimetic skin consists of a soft polymeric matrix, resembling a human forearm, embedded with photonic Fiber Bragg Grating (FBG) transducers, which partially mimics Ruffini mechanoreceptor functionality with diffuse, overlapping receptive fields. A Convolutional Neural Network deep learning algorithm and a multigrid Neuron Integration Process were implemented to decode the FBG sensor outputs for inferring contact force magnitude and localization through the skin surface. Results achieved 35 mN (IQR = 56 mN) and 3.2 mm (IQR = 2.3 mm) median errors, for force and localization predictions, respectively. Demonstrations with an anthropomorphic arm pave the way towards AI-based integrated skins enabling safe human-robot cooperation via machine intelligence.
summary: Collaborative robots are expected to physically interact with humans in daily living and workplace, including industrial and healthcare settings. A related key enabling technology is tactile sensing, which currently requires addressing the outstanding scientific challenge to simultaneously detect contact location and intensity by means of soft conformable artificial skins adapting over large areas to the complex curved geometries of robot embodiments. In this work, the development of a large-area sensitive soft skin with a curved geometry is presented, allowing for robot total-body coverage through modular patches. The biomimetic skin consists of a soft polymeric matrix, resembling a human forearm, embedded with photonic Fiber Bragg Grating (FBG) transducers, which partially mimics Ruffini mechanoreceptor functionality with diffuse, overlapping receptive fields. A Convolutional Neural Network deep learning algorithm and a multigrid Neuron Integration Process were implemented to decode the FBG sensor outputs for inferring contact force magnitude and localization through the skin surface. Results achieved 35 mN (IQR = 56 mN) and 3.2 mm (IQR = 2.3 mm) median errors, for force and localization predictions, respectively. Demonstrations with an anthropomorphic arm pave the way towards AI-based integrated skins enabling safe human-robot cooperation via machine intelligence.
abstract_zh: 协作机器人有望在日常生活和工作场所（包括工业和医疗保健环境）中与人类进行物理交互。相关的关键实现技术是触觉传感，目前需要解决突出的科学挑战，通过柔软舒适的人造皮肤来同时检测接触位置和强度，该人造皮肤大面积适应机器人实施例的复杂弯曲几何形状。在这项工作中，提出了具有弯曲几何形状的大面积敏感软皮肤的开发，允许通过模块化贴片覆盖机器人全身。仿生皮肤由柔软的聚合物基质组成，类似于人类前臂，嵌入光子光纤布拉格光栅（FBG）传感器，该传感器部分模仿鲁菲尼机械感受器的功能，具有扩散、重叠的感受野。采用卷积神经网络深度学习算法和多重网格神经元集成过程来解码 FBG 传感器输出，以推断接触力大小和通过皮肤表面的定位。力和定位预测的中值误差分别为 35 mN (IQR = 56 mN) 和 3.2 mm (IQR = 2.3 mm)。拟人化手臂的演示为基于人工智能的集成皮肤铺平了道路，通过机器智能实现安全的人机合作。

AI.tldr: 开发一种基于光纤光栅和深度神经网络的仿生大区域触觉皮肤，以实现机器人全身覆盖的触觉感知。
AI.motivation: 协作机器人需要与人类安全交互，但现有技术难以同时检测大面积复杂曲面的接触位置和强度，亟需新型触觉传感方案。
AI.method: 采用软质聚合物基质嵌入光纤光栅传感器，模拟鲁菲尼感受器的弥散感受野，结合卷积神经网络与多网格神经整合算法解码传感器数据。
AI.result: 力反馈中位数误差35 mN（IQR=56 mN），定位误差3.2 mm（IQR=2.3 mm），在类人机械臂上验证了技术可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该仿生触觉皮肤通过人工智能算法实现了高精度触觉感知，为安全人机协作提供了新型硬件基础。

authors_text: Tan Gemicioglu,Noah Teuscher,Brahmi Dwivedi,Soobin Park,Emerson Miller,Celeste Mason,Caitlyn Seim,Thad Starner
title: Passive Haptic Rehearsal for Accelerated Piano Skill Acquisition
title_zh: 被动触觉排练加速钢琴技能习得
comment: 4 pages, 3 figures. Accepted to the IMI 2022 workshop at the CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (CHI '22). Updated and finalized for conference
comments: 4 pages, 3 figures. Accepted to the IMI 2022 workshop at the CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (CHI '22). Updated and finalized for conference
abstract: Passive haptic learning (PHL) uses vibrotactile stimulation to train piano songs using repetition, even when the recipient of stimulation is focused on other tasks. However, many of the benefits of playing piano cannot be acquired without actively playing the instrument. In this position paper, we posit that passive haptic rehearsal, where active piano practice is assisted by separate sessions of passive stimulation, is of greater everyday use than solely PHL. We propose a study to examine the effects of passive haptic rehearsal for self-paced piano learners and consider how to incorporate passive rehearsal into everyday practice.
summary: Passive haptic learning (PHL) uses vibrotactile stimulation to train piano songs using repetition, even when the recipient of stimulation is focused on other tasks. However, many of the benefits of playing piano cannot be acquired without actively playing the instrument. In this position paper, we posit that passive haptic rehearsal, where active piano practice is assisted by separate sessions of passive stimulation, is of greater everyday use than solely PHL. We propose a study to examine the effects of passive haptic rehearsal for self-paced piano learners and consider how to incorporate passive rehearsal into everyday practice.
abstract_zh: 被动触觉学习 (PHL) 使用振动触觉刺激通过重复来训练钢琴歌曲，即使刺激的接受者专注于其他任务也是如此。然而，如果不积极演奏钢琴，就无法获得弹钢琴的许多好处。在这份立场文件中，我们认为被动触觉排练（通过单独的被动刺激来辅助主动钢琴练习）比单独的 PHL 更适合日常使用。我们提出了一项研究，旨在检验被动触觉排练对自定进度的钢琴学习者的影响，并考虑如何将被动排练融入日常练习中。

AI.tldr: 探讨被动触觉复习在加速钢琴技能获取中的应用
AI.motivation: 单独的被动触觉学习无法完全替代主动演奏，需结合被动刺激辅助主动练习以提升日常实用性
AI.method: 提出一项研究，考察被动触觉复习对自定进度钢琴学习者的影响，并探讨其日常练习整合方式
AI.result: 尚未进行实证研究，需进一步实验验证效果

search_text: Passive Haptic Rehearsal for Accelerated Piano Skill Acquisition 被动触觉排练加速钢琴技能习得 Passive haptic learning (PHL) uses vibrotactile stimulation to train piano songs using repetition, even when the recipient of stimulation is focused on other tasks. However, many of the benefits of playing piano cannot be acquired without actively playing the instrument. In this position paper, we posit that passive haptic rehearsal, where active piano practice is assisted by separate sessions of passive stimulation, is of greater everyday use than solely PHL. We propose a study to examine the effects of passive haptic rehearsal for self-paced piano learners and consider how to incorporate passive rehearsal into everyday practice. 被动触觉学习 (PHL) 使用振动触觉刺激通过重复来训练钢琴歌曲，即使刺激的接受者专注于其他任务也是如此。然而，如果不积极演奏钢琴，就无法获得弹钢琴的许多好处。在这份立场文件中，我们认为被动触觉排练（通过单独的被动刺激来辅助主动钢琴练习）比单独的 PHL 更适合日常使用。我们提出了一项研究，旨在检验被动触觉排练对自定进度的钢琴学习者的影响，并考虑如何将被动排练融入日常练习中。 探讨被动触觉复习在加速钢琴技能获取中的应用 Tan Gemicioglu,Noah Teuscher,Brahmi Dwivedi,Soobin Park,Emerson Miller,Celeste Mason,Caitlyn Seim,Thad Starner cs.HC

authors_text: Natalie Dullerud,Karsten Roth,Kimia Hamidieh,Nicolas Papernot,Marzyeh Ghassemi
title: Is Fairness Only Metric Deep? Evaluating and Addressing Subgroup Gaps in Deep Metric Learning
title_zh: 公平只是深度度量吗？评估和解决深度度量学习中的子组差距
comment: Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2022
comments: Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2022
abstract: Deep metric learning (DML) enables learning with less supervision through its emphasis on the similarity structure of representations. There has been much work on improving generalization of DML in settings like zero-shot retrieval, but little is known about its implications for fairness. In this paper, we are the first to evaluate state-of-the-art DML methods trained on imbalanced data, and to show the negative impact these representations have on minority subgroup performance when used for downstream tasks. In this work, we first define fairness in DML through an analysis of three properties of the representation space -- inter-class alignment, intra-class alignment, and uniformity -- and propose finDML, the fairness in non-balanced DML benchmark to characterize representation fairness. Utilizing finDML, we find bias in DML representations to propagate to common downstream classification tasks. Surprisingly, this bias is propagated even when training data in the downstream task is re-balanced. To address this problem, we present Partial Attribute De-correlation (PARADE) to de-correlate feature representations from sensitive attributes and reduce performance gaps between subgroups in both embedding space and downstream metrics.
summary: Deep metric learning (DML) enables learning with less supervision through its emphasis on the similarity structure of representations. There has been much work on improving generalization of DML in settings like zero-shot retrieval, but little is known about its implications for fairness. In this paper, we are the first to evaluate state-of-the-art DML methods trained on imbalanced data, and to show the negative impact these representations have on minority subgroup performance when used for downstream tasks. In this work, we first define fairness in DML through an analysis of three properties of the representation space -- inter-class alignment, intra-class alignment, and uniformity -- and propose finDML, the fairness in non-balanced DML benchmark to characterize representation fairness. Utilizing finDML, we find bias in DML representations to propagate to common downstream classification tasks. Surprisingly, this bias is propagated even when training data in the downstream task is re-balanced. To address this problem, we present Partial Attribute De-correlation (PARADE) to de-correlate feature representations from sensitive attributes and reduce performance gaps between subgroups in both embedding space and downstream metrics.
abstract_zh: 深度度量学习 (DML) 通过强调表示的相似性结构，可以在更少的监督下进行学习。在零样本检索等设置中改进 DML 的泛化方面已经做了很多工作，但对其对公平性的影响却知之甚少。在本文中，我们首次评估了在不平衡数据上训练的最先进的 DML 方法，并展示了这些表示在用于下游任务时对少数子组性能的负面影响。在这项工作中，我们首先通过分析表示空间的三个属性（类间对齐、类内对齐和一致性）来定义 DML 中的公平性，并提出 finDML（非平衡 DML 基准中的公平性）来表征表示公平性。利用 finDML，我们发现 DML 表示中的偏差传播到常见的下游分类任务。令人惊讶的是，即使下游任务中的训练数据重新平衡，这种偏差也会传播。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了部分属性去相关（PARADE）来将特征表示与敏感属性去相关，并减少嵌入空间和下游指标中子组之间的性能差距。

AI.tldr: 本文评估并解决深度度量学习中因数据不平衡导致的子群公平性问题，提出方法以减少下游任务中的性能差距。
AI.motivation: 现有深度度量学习（DML）方法在处理不平衡数据时可能对少数子群产生不公平影响，但该问题尚未被充分研究。
AI.method: 通过分析表示空间的三个属性（类间对齐、类内对齐和均匀性）定义公平性，构建finDML基准，并提出Partial Attribute De-correlation（PARADE）方法以消除敏感属性相关性。
AI.result: 发现DML表示中的偏差会传播到下游分类任务，即使下游任务数据重新平衡后仍存在偏差；PARADE有效缩小了子群间的性能差距。
AI.conclusion: 数据不平衡会影响DML的公平性，需采用公平感知方法（如PARADE）来缓解子群性能差距问题。

authors_text: Ye Liu,Siyuan Li,Yang Wu,Chang Wen Chen,Ying Shan,Xiaohu Qie
title: UMT: Unified Multi-modal Transformers for Joint Video Moment Retrieval and Highlight Detection
title_zh: UMT：用于联合视频时刻检索和亮点检测的统一多模态变压器
comment: Accepted to Proceedings of the IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR 2022)
comments: Accepted to Proceedings of the IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR 2022)
abstract: Finding relevant moments and highlights in videos according to natural language queries is a natural and highly valuable common need in the current video content explosion era. Nevertheless, jointly conducting moment retrieval and highlight detection is an emerging research topic, even though its component problems and some related tasks have already been studied for a while. In this paper, we present the first unified framework, named Unified Multi-modal Transformers (UMT), capable of realizing such joint optimization while can also be easily degenerated for solving individual problems. As far as we are aware, this is the first scheme to integrate multi-modal (visual-audio) learning for either joint optimization or the individual moment retrieval task, and tackles moment retrieval as a keypoint detection problem using a novel query generator and query decoder. Extensive comparisons with existing methods and ablation studies on QVHighlights, Charades-STA, YouTube Highlights, and TVSum datasets demonstrate the effectiveness, superiority, and flexibility of the proposed method under various settings. Source code and pre-trained models are available at https://github.com/TencentARC/UMT.
summary: Finding relevant moments and highlights in videos according to natural language queries is a natural and highly valuable common need in the current video content explosion era. Nevertheless, jointly conducting moment retrieval and highlight detection is an emerging research topic, even though its component problems and some related tasks have already been studied for a while. In this paper, we present the first unified framework, named Unified Multi-modal Transformers (UMT), capable of realizing such joint optimization while can also be easily degenerated for solving individual problems. As far as we are aware, this is the first scheme to integrate multi-modal (visual-audio) learning for either joint optimization or the individual moment retrieval task, and tackles moment retrieval as a keypoint detection problem using a novel query generator and query decoder. Extensive comparisons with existing methods and ablation studies on QVHighlights, Charades-STA, YouTube Highlights, and TVSum datasets demonstrate the effectiveness, superiority, and flexibility of the proposed method under various settings. Source code and pre-trained models are available at https://github.com/TencentARC/UMT.
abstract_zh: 根据自然语言查询找到视频中的相关时刻和亮点，是当前视频内容爆炸时代自然且极具价值的共同需求。然而，联合进行时刻检索和高光检测是一个新兴的研究课题，尽管其组成问题和一些相关任务已经研究了一段时间。在本文中，我们提出了第一个统一框架，名为统一多模态变压器（UMT），它能够实现这种联合优化，同时也可以很容易地退化以解决个别问题。据我们所知，这是第一个将多模态（视觉音频）学习集成到联合优化或单个时刻检索任务的方案，并使用新颖的查询生成器和查询解码器将时刻检索作为关键点检测问题来解决。与现有方法的广泛比较以及 QVHighlights、Charades-STA、YouTubehighlights 和 TVSum 数据集上的消融研究证明了所提出的方法在各种设置下的有效性、优越性和灵活性。源代码和预训练模型可在 https://github.com/TencentARC/UMT 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出统一多模态变换器（UMT），用于联合视频时刻检索与高亮检测任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法多将视频时刻检索与高亮检测作为独立任务处理，缺乏统一框架导致效率低下且难以协同优化。
AI.method: 设计UMT框架，整合视觉-音频多模态信息，通过新颖的查询生成器与解码器将时刻检索建模为关键点检测问题，并支持退化为单任务求解。
AI.result: 在QVHighlights、Charades-STA等数据集上显著优于现有方法，验证了方法在多种设置下的有效性与灵活性。
AI.conclusion: UMT通过统一多模态学习实现了联合优化，为视频理解任务提供了灵活高效的解决方案。

title: Accelerating Bayesian Optimization for Biological Sequence Design with Denoising Autoencoders
title_zh: 使用去噪自动编码器加速生物序列设计的贝叶斯优化
abstract: Bayesian optimization (BayesOpt) is a gold standard for query-efficient continuous optimization. However, its adoption for drug design has been hindered by the discrete, high-dimensional nature of the decision variables. We develop a new approach (LaMBO) which jointly trains a denoising autoencoder with a discriminative multi-task Gaussian process head, allowing gradient-based optimization of multi-objective acquisition functions in the latent space of the autoencoder. These acquisition functions allow LaMBO to balance the explore-exploit tradeoff over multiple design rounds, and to balance objective tradeoffs by optimizing sequences at many different points on the Pareto frontier. We evaluate LaMBO on two small-molecule design tasks, and introduce new tasks optimizing \emph{in silico} and \emph{in vitro} properties of large-molecule fluorescent proteins. In our experiments LaMBO outperforms genetic optimizers and does not require a large pretraining corpus, demonstrating that BayesOpt is practical and effective for biological sequence design.
summary: Bayesian optimization (BayesOpt) is a gold standard for query-efficient continuous optimization. However, its adoption for drug design has been hindered by the discrete, high-dimensional nature of the decision variables. We develop a new approach (LaMBO) which jointly trains a denoising autoencoder with a discriminative multi-task Gaussian process head, allowing gradient-based optimization of multi-objective acquisition functions in the latent space of the autoencoder. These acquisition functions allow LaMBO to balance the explore-exploit tradeoff over multiple design rounds, and to balance objective tradeoffs by optimizing sequences at many different points on the Pareto frontier. We evaluate LaMBO on two small-molecule design tasks, and introduce new tasks optimizing \emph{in silico} and \emph{in vitro} properties of large-molecule fluorescent proteins. In our experiments LaMBO outperforms genetic optimizers and does not require a large pretraining corpus, demonstrating that BayesOpt is practical and effective for biological sequence design.
abstract_zh: 贝叶斯优化 (BayesOpt) 是查询高效连续优化的黄金标准。然而，决策变量的离散、高维性质阻碍了其在药物设计中的采用。我们开发了一种新方法（LaMBO），它联合训练具有判别性多任务高斯过程头的去噪自动编码器，从而允许在自动编码器的潜在空间中基于梯度优化多目标采集函数。这些采集函数使 LaMBO 能够平衡多轮设计中的探索-利用权衡，并通过优化帕累托前沿上许多不同点的序列来平衡目标权衡。我们在两个小分子设计任务上评估了 LaMBO，并引入了优化大分子荧光蛋白的 \emph{in silico} 和 \emph{in vivo} 特性的新任务。在我们的实验中，LaMBO 的性能优于遗传优化器，并且不需要大型预训练语料库，这表明 BayesOpt 对于生物序列设计来说是实用且有效的。

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合去噪自编码器的贝叶斯优化方法，用于加速生物序列设计
AI.motivation: 贝叶斯优化在处理离散高维生物序列设计时效率低，传统方法依赖大量预训练数据
AI.method: 联合训练去噪自编码器与多任务高斯过程头，在潜在空间中进行梯度优化以平衡探索与利用
AI.result: 在多个生物分子设计任务中，LaMBO优于遗传优化器，且无需大量预训练数据
AI.conclusion: 贝叶斯优化结合深度学习方法在生物序列设计中具有实用性和有效性

authors_text: Hung T. Nguyen,H. Vincent Poor,Mung Chiang
title: Contextual Model Aggregation for Fast and Robust Federated Learning in Edge Computing
title_zh: 边缘计算中快速、稳健的联邦学习的上下文模型聚合
abstract: Federated learning is a prime candidate for distributed machine learning at the network edge due to the low communication complexity and privacy protection among other attractive properties. However, existing algorithms face issues with slow convergence and/or robustness of performance due to the considerable heterogeneity of data distribution, computation and communication capability at the edge. In this work, we tackle both of these issues by focusing on the key component of model aggregation in federated learning systems and studying optimal algorithms to perform this task. Particularly, we propose a contextual aggregation scheme that achieves the optimal context-dependent bound on loss reduction in each round of optimization. The aforementioned context-dependent bound is derived from the particular participating devices in that round and an assumption on smoothness of the overall loss function. We show that this aggregation leads to a definite reduction of loss function at every round. Furthermore, we can integrate our aggregation with many existing algorithms to obtain the contextual versions. Our experimental results demonstrate significant improvements in convergence speed and robustness of the contextual versions compared to the original algorithms. We also consider different variants of the contextual aggregation and show robust performance even in the most extreme settings.
summary: Federated learning is a prime candidate for distributed machine learning at the network edge due to the low communication complexity and privacy protection among other attractive properties. However, existing algorithms face issues with slow convergence and/or robustness of performance due to the considerable heterogeneity of data distribution, computation and communication capability at the edge. In this work, we tackle both of these issues by focusing on the key component of model aggregation in federated learning systems and studying optimal algorithms to perform this task. Particularly, we propose a contextual aggregation scheme that achieves the optimal context-dependent bound on loss reduction in each round of optimization. The aforementioned context-dependent bound is derived from the particular participating devices in that round and an assumption on smoothness of the overall loss function. We show that this aggregation leads to a definite reduction of loss function at every round. Furthermore, we can integrate our aggregation with many existing algorithms to obtain the contextual versions. Our experimental results demonstrate significant improvements in convergence speed and robustness of the contextual versions compared to the original algorithms. We also consider different variants of the contextual aggregation and show robust performance even in the most extreme settings.
abstract_zh: 由于通信复杂性低、隐私保护等有吸引力的特性，联邦学习是网络边缘分布式机器学习的主要候选者。然而，由于边缘的数据分布、计算和通信能力存在相当大的异质性，现有算法面临收敛速度慢和/或性能鲁棒性的问题。在这项工作中，我们通过关注联邦学习系统中模型聚合的关键组成部分并研究执行此任务的最佳算法来解决这两个问题。特别是，我们提出了一种上下文聚合方案，该方案在每轮优化中实现损失减少的最佳上下文相关界限。上述依赖于上下文的界限是从该轮中的特定参与设备以及对整体损失函数的平滑度的假设导出的。我们证明这种聚合会导致每一轮损失函数的明确减少。此外，我们可以将我们的聚合与许多现有算法集成以获得上下文版本。我们的实验结果表明，与原始算法相比，上下文版本的收敛速度和鲁棒性有了显着提高。我们还考虑了上下文聚合的不同变体，即使在最极端的设置下也显示出强大的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种上下文模型聚合方法，解决边缘计算中联邦学习因设备异质性导致的收敛速度慢和鲁棒性差的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有联邦学习算法在边缘设备上因数据分布、计算能力和通信能力的异质性，导致收敛速度慢且性能不稳定。
AI.method: 设计基于上下文的模型聚合方案，通过分析每轮参与设备的特征及损失函数平滑性假设，实现损失函数的确定性减少，并与现有算法结合形成上下文版本。
AI.result: 实验表明，上下文版本算法在收敛速度和鲁棒性上显著优于原始算法，且在极端场景下仍保持稳定性能。
AI.conclusion: 上下文模型聚合有效应对了联邦学习的异质性挑战，为边缘计算环境下的分布式机器学习提供了优化方案。

search_text: Contextual Model Aggregation for Fast and Robust Federated Learning in Edge Computing 边缘计算中快速、稳健的联邦学习的上下文模型聚合 Federated learning is a prime candidate for distributed machine learning at the network edge due to the low communication complexity and privacy protection among other attractive properties. However, existing algorithms face issues with slow convergence and/or robustness of performance due to the considerable heterogeneity of data distribution, computation and communication capability at the edge. In this work, we tackle both of these issues by focusing on the key component of model aggregation in federated learning systems and studying optimal algorithms to perform this task. Particularly, we propose a contextual aggregation scheme that achieves the optimal context-dependent bound on loss reduction in each round of optimization. The aforementioned context-dependent bound is derived from the particular participating devices in that round and an assumption on smoothness of the overall loss function. We show that this aggregation leads to a definite reduction of loss function at every round. Furthermore, we can integrate our aggregation with many existing algorithms to obtain the contextual versions. Our experimental results demonstrate significant improvements in convergence speed and robustness of the contextual versions compared to the original algorithms. We also consider different variants of the contextual aggregation and show robust performance even in the most extreme settings. 由于通信复杂性低、隐私保护等有吸引力的特性，联邦学习是网络边缘分布式机器学习的主要候选者。然而，由于边缘的数据分布、计算和通信能力存在相当大的异质性，现有算法面临收敛速度慢和/或性能鲁棒性的问题。在这项工作中，我们通过关注联邦学习系统中模型聚合的关键组成部分并研究执行此任务的最佳算法来解决这两个问题。特别是，我们提出了一种上下文聚合方案，该方案在每轮优化中实现损失减少的最佳上下文相关界限。上述依赖于上下文的界限是从该轮中的特定参与设备以及对整体损失函数的平滑度的假设导出的。我们证明这种聚合会导致每一轮损失函数的明确减少。此外，我们可以将我们的聚合与许多现有算法集成以获得上下文版本。我们的实验结果表明，与原始算法相比，上下文版本的收敛速度和鲁棒性有了显着提高。我们还考虑了上下文聚合的不同变体，即使在最极端的设置下也显示出强大的性能。 本文提出一种上下文模型聚合方法，解决边缘计算中联邦学习因设备异质性导致的收敛速度慢和鲁棒性差的问题。 Hung T. authors_text: Rui Guo
title: An interactive music infilling interface for pop music composition
title_zh: 流行音乐创作的交互式音乐填充界面
abstract: Artificial intelligence (AI) has been widely applied to music generation topics such as continuation, melody/harmony generation, genre transfer and music infilling application. Although with the burst interest to apply AI to music, there are still few interfaces for the musicians to take advantage of the latest progress of the AI technology. This makes those tools less valuable in practice and harder to find its advantage/drawbacks without utilizing them in the real scenario. This work builds a max patch for interactive music infilling application with different levels of control, including track density/polyphony/occupation rate and bar tonal tension control. The user can select the melody/bass/harmony track as the infilling content up to 16 bars. The infilling algorithm is based on the author's previous work, and the interface sends/receives messages to the AI system hosted in the cloud. This interface lowers the barrier of AI technology and can generate different variations of the selected content. Those results can give several alternatives to the musicians' composition, and the interactive process realizes the value of the AI infilling system.
summary: Artificial intelligence (AI) has been widely applied to music generation topics such as continuation, melody/harmony generation, genre transfer and music infilling application. Although with the burst interest to apply AI to music, there are still few interfaces for the musicians to take advantage of the latest progress of the AI technology. This makes those tools less valuable in practice and harder to find its advantage/drawbacks without utilizing them in the real scenario. This work builds a max patch for interactive music infilling application with different levels of control, including track density/polyphony/occupation rate and bar tonal tension control. The user can select the melody/bass/harmony track as the infilling content up to 16 bars. The infilling algorithm is based on the author's previous work, and the interface sends/receives messages to the AI system hosted in the cloud. This interface lowers the barrier of AI technology and can generate different variations of the selected content. Those results can give several alternatives to the musicians' composition, and the interactive process realizes the value of the AI infilling system.
abstract_zh: 人工智能（AI）已广泛应用于音乐生成主题，例如延续、旋律/和声生成、流派转移和音乐填充应用。尽管人们对人工智能在音乐中的应用产生了浓厚的兴趣，但可供音乐家利用人工智能技术最新进展的界面仍然很少。这使得这些工具在实践中的价值降低，并且如果不在实际场景中使用它们，就更难发现其优点/缺点。这项工作为交互式音乐填充应用程序构建了一个最大补丁，具有不同级别的控制，包括轨道密度/复调/占用率和小节音调张力控制。用户可以选择旋律/贝斯/和声曲目作为填充内容，最多16小节。填充算法基于作者之前的工作，接口向云端托管的AI系统发送/接收消息。该界面降低了人工智能技术的门槛，可以生成所选内容的不同变体。这些结果可以为音乐家的作曲提供多种选择，交互过程实现了AI填充系统的价值。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一个交互式音乐补全接口，帮助音乐人利用AI技术进行流行音乐创作。
AI.motivation: 尽管AI在音乐生成领域取得进展，但缺乏用户友好的界面限制了其实际应用价值。
AI.method: 基于Max开发带多级控制的补全接口，支持轨道密度、和声张力等参数调节，并通过云端AI系统实现音乐补全。
AI.result: 降低了AI技术使用门槛，可生成多种音乐片段变体供创作者选择。
AI.conclusion: 该接口验证了AI音乐补全系统的实用价值，为音乐创作提供了新工具。

motivation: 尽管AI在音乐生成领域取得进展，但缺乏用户友好的界面限制了其实际应用价值。
method: 基于Max开发带多级控制的补全接口，支持轨道密度、和声张力等参数调节，并通过云端AI系统实现音乐补全。
result: 降低了AI技术使用门槛，可生成多种音乐片段变体供创作者选择。
conclusion: 该接口验证了AI音乐补全系统的实用价值，为音乐创作提供了新工具。
search_text: An interactive music infilling interface for pop music composition 流行音乐创作的交互式音乐填充界面 Artificial intelligence (AI) has been widely applied to music generation topics such as continuation, melody/harmony generation, genre transfer and music infilling application. Although with the burst interest to apply AI to music, there are still few interfaces for the musicians to take advantage of the latest progress of the AI technology. This makes those tools less valuable in practice and harder to find its advantage/drawbacks without utilizing them in the real scenario. This work builds a max patch for interactive music infilling application with different levels of control, including track density/polyphony/occupation rate and bar tonal tension control. The user can select the melody/bass/harmony track as the infilling content up to 16 bars. The infilling algorithm is based on the author's previous work, and the interface sends/receives messages to the AI system hosted in the cloud. This interface lowers the barrier of AI technology and can generate different variations of the selected content. Those results can give several alternatives to the musicians' composition, and the interactive process realizes the value of the AI infilling system. 人工智能（AI）已广泛应用于音乐生成主题，例如延续、旋律/和声生成、流派转移和音乐填充应用。尽管人们对人工智能在音乐中的应用产生了浓厚的兴趣，但可供音乐家利用人工智能技术最新进展的界面仍然很少。这使得这些工具在实践中的价值降低，并且如果不在实际场景中使用它们，就更难发现其优点/缺点。这项工作为交互式音乐填充应用程序构建了一个最大补丁，具有不同级别的控制，包括轨道密度/复调/占用率和小节音调张力控制。用户可以选择旋律/贝斯/和声曲目作为填充内容，最多16小节。填充算法基于作者之前的工作，接口向云端托管的AI系统发送/接收消息。该界面降低了人工智能技术的门槛，可以生成所选内容的不同变体。这些结果可以为音乐家的作曲提供多种选择，交互过程实现了AI填充系统的价值。 本文设计了一个交互式音乐补全接口，帮助音乐人利用AI技术进行流行音乐创作。 Rui Guo cs.SD,cs.HC,cs.MM,eess.AS

authors_text: Vaughn Hamilton,Hanna Barakat,Elissa M. Redmiles
title: Risk, Resilience and Reward: Impacts of Shifting to Digital Sex Work
title_zh: 风险、弹性和回报：转向数字性工作的影响
abstract: Workers from a variety of industries rapidly shifted to remote work at the onset of the COVID-19 pandemic. While existing work has examined the impact of this shift on office workers, little work has examined how shifting from in-person to online work affected workers in the informal labor sector. We examine the impact of shifting from in-person to online-only work on a particularly marginalized group of workers: sex workers. Through 34 qualitative interviews with sex workers from seven countries in the Global North, we examine how a shift to online-only sex work impacted: (1) working conditions, (2) risks and protective behaviors, and (3) labor rewards. We find that online work offers benefits to sex workers' financial and physical well-being. However, online-only work introduces new and greater digital and mental health risks as a result of the need to be publicly visible on more platforms and to share more explicit content. From our findings we propose design and platform governance suggestions for digital sex workers and for informal workers more broadly, particularly those who create and sell digital content.
summary: Workers from a variety of industries rapidly shifted to remote work at the onset of the COVID-19 pandemic. While existing work has examined the impact of this shift on office workers, little work has examined how shifting from in-person to online work affected workers in the informal labor sector. We examine the impact of shifting from in-person to online-only work on a particularly marginalized group of workers: sex workers. Through 34 qualitative interviews with sex workers from seven countries in the Global North, we examine how a shift to online-only sex work impacted: (1) working conditions, (2) risks and protective behaviors, and (3) labor rewards. We find that online work offers benefits to sex workers' financial and physical well-being. However, online-only work introduces new and greater digital and mental health risks as a result of the need to be publicly visible on more platforms and to share more explicit content. From our findings we propose design and platform governance suggestions for digital sex workers and for informal workers more broadly, particularly those who create and sell digital content.
abstract_zh: COVID-19 大流行爆发后，各行业的工人迅速转向远程工作。虽然现有的工作已经研究了这种转变对办公室工作人员的影响，但很少有研究研究从面对面工作到在线工作的转变如何影响非正规劳动部门的工人。我们研究了从面对面工作转向仅在线工作对特别边缘化的工人群体（性工作者）的影响。通过对来自北半球七个国家的性工作者进行 34 次定性访谈，我们研究了向仅在线性工作的转变如何影响：(1) 工作条件，(2) 风险和保护行为，以及 (3) 劳动报酬。我们发现在线工作有利于性工作者的经济和身体健康。然而，由于需要在更多平台上公开可见并分享更露骨的内容，纯在线工作带来了新的、更大的数字和心理健康风险。根据我们的研究结果，我们为数字性工作者和更广泛的非正式工作者，特别是那些创建和销售数字内容的人提出了设计和平台治理建议。

AI.tldr: 研究疫情期间性工作者转向数字工作的影响，分析其工作条件、风险及回报的变化。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注办公室员工，但对非正规部门如性工作者转向在线工作的影响缺乏了解，需填补这一空白。
AI.method: 采用质性研究方法，对来自七个北方国家的34名性工作者进行深度访谈，分析其工作条件、风险行为及收益变化。
AI.result: 在线工作提升性工作者的经济和身体健康，但增加数字和心理健康风险，如需多平台公开及分享敏感内容。
AI.conclusion: 建议优化平台治理和设计，以保护数字性工作者权益，并为非正规数字内容创作者提供支持。

authors_text: Ioannis Kakogeorgiou,Spyros Gidaris,Bill Psomas,Yannis Avrithis,Andrei Bursuc,Konstantinos Karantzalos,Nikos Komodakis
title: What to Hide from Your Students: Attention-Guided Masked Image Modeling
title_zh: 对学生隐藏什么：注意力引导蒙版图像建模
comment: ECCV 2022. Codes and models are available at https://github.com/gkakogeorgiou/attmask
comments: ECCV 2022. Codes and models are available at https://github.com/gkakogeorgiou/attmask
abstract: Transformers and masked language modeling are quickly being adopted and explored in computer vision as vision transformers and masked image modeling (MIM). In this work, we argue that image token masking differs from token masking in text, due to the amount and correlation of tokens in an image. In particular, to generate a challenging pretext task for MIM, we advocate a shift from random masking to informed masking. We develop and exhibit this idea in the context of distillation-based MIM, where a teacher transformer encoder generates an attention map, which we use to guide masking for the student. We thus introduce a novel masking strategy, called attention-guided masking (AttMask), and we demonstrate its effectiveness over random masking for dense distillation-based MIM as well as plain distillation-based self-supervised learning on classification tokens. We confirm that AttMask accelerates the learning process and improves the performance on a variety of downstream tasks. We provide the implementation code at https://github.com/gkakogeorgiou/attmask.
summary: Transformers and masked language modeling are quickly being adopted and explored in computer vision as vision transformers and masked image modeling (MIM). In this work, we argue that image token masking differs from token masking in text, due to the amount and correlation of tokens in an image. In particular, to generate a challenging pretext task for MIM, we advocate a shift from random masking to informed masking. We develop and exhibit this idea in the context of distillation-based MIM, where a teacher transformer encoder generates an attention map, which we use to guide masking for the student. We thus introduce a novel masking strategy, called attention-guided masking (AttMask), and we demonstrate its effectiveness over random masking for dense distillation-based MIM as well as plain distillation-based self-supervised learning on classification tokens. We confirm that AttMask accelerates the learning process and improves the performance on a variety of downstream tasks. We provide the implementation code at https://github.com/gkakogeorgiou/attmask.
abstract_zh: Transformer 和掩蔽语言建模作为视觉变换器和掩蔽图像建模 (MIM) 在计算机视觉中迅速得到采用和探索。在这项工作中，我们认为由于图像中标记的数量和相关性，图像标记屏蔽与文本中的标记屏蔽不同。特别是，为了为 MIM 生成具有挑战性的借口任务，我们主张从随机掩蔽转变为知情掩蔽。我们在基于蒸馏的 MIM 背景下开发并展示了这个想法，其中教师变压器编码器生成注意力图，我们用它来指导学生的掩蔽。因此，我们引入了一种新颖的掩蔽策略，称为注意力引导掩蔽（AttMask），并且我们证明了它相对于基于密集蒸馏的 MIM 的随机掩蔽以及基于普通蒸馏的分类标记自监督学习的有效性。我们确认 AttMask 加速了学习过程并提高了各种下游任务的性能。我们在 https://github.com/gkakogeorgiou/attmask 提供实现代码。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于注意力机制的图像掩码策略AttMask，用于改进基于蒸馏的掩码图像建模（MIM）和自监督学习。
AI.motivation: 图像中的token数量和相关性与文本不同，随机掩码难以生成有效预训练任务，需通过注意力引导实现更精准的掩码策略。
AI.method: 利用教师Transformer的注意力图指导学生模型的掩码生成，提出AttMask方法，在蒸馏框架下实现更有效的图像重建学习。
AI.result: AttMask显著加速训练过程，并在多个下游任务中优于随机掩码方法，验证了其在密集蒸馏MIM和分类任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 注意力引导的掩码策略能提升图像建模性能，为视觉Transformer的预训练提供新思路，代码已开源。

authors_text: Teague Tomesh,Kaiwen Gui,Pranav Gokhale,Yunong Shi,Frederic T. Chong,Margaret Martonosi,Martin Suchara
title: Optimized Quantum Program Execution Ordering to Mitigate Errors in Simulations of Quantum Systems
title_zh: 优化量子程序执行顺序以减少量子系统模拟中的错误
comment: 13 pages, 7 figures, Awarded Best Paper during the IEEE International Conference on Rebooting Computing (ICRC) 2021
comments: 13 pages, 7 figures, Awarded Best Paper during the IEEE International Conference on Rebooting Computing (ICRC) 2021
abstract: Simulating the time evolution of a physical system at quantum mechanical levels of detail -- known as Hamiltonian Simulation (HS) -- is an important and interesting problem across physics and chemistry. For this task, algorithms that run on quantum computers are known to be exponentially faster than classical algorithms; in fact, this application motivated Feynman to propose the construction of quantum computers. Nonetheless, there are challenges in reaching this performance potential. Prior work has focused on compiling circuits (quantum programs) for HS with the goal of maximizing either accuracy or gate cancellation. Our work proposes a compilation strategy that simultaneously advances both goals. At a high level, we use classical optimizations such as graph coloring and travelling salesperson to order the execution of quantum programs. Specifically, we group together mutually commuting terms in the Hamiltonian (a matrix characterizing the quantum mechanical system) to improve the accuracy of the simulation. We then rearrange the terms within each group to maximize gate cancellation in the final quantum circuit. These optimizations work together to improve HS performance and result in an average 40% reduction in circuit depth. This work advances the frontier of HS which in turn can advance physical and chemical modeling in both basic and applied sciences.
summary: Simulating the time evolution of a physical system at quantum mechanical levels of detail -- known as Hamiltonian Simulation (HS) -- is an important and interesting problem across physics and chemistry. For this task, algorithms that run on quantum computers are known to be exponentially faster than classical algorithms; in fact, this application motivated Feynman to propose the construction of quantum computers. Nonetheless, there are challenges in reaching this performance potential. Prior work has focused on compiling circuits (quantum programs) for HS with the goal of maximizing either accuracy or gate cancellation. Our work proposes a compilation strategy that simultaneously advances both goals. At a high level, we use classical optimizations such as graph coloring and travelling salesperson to order the execution of quantum programs. Specifically, we group together mutually commuting terms in the Hamiltonian (a matrix characterizing the quantum mechanical system) to improve the accuracy of the simulation. We then rearrange the terms within each group to maximize gate cancellation in the final quantum circuit. These optimizations work together to improve HS performance and result in an average 40% reduction in circuit depth. This work advances the frontier of HS which in turn can advance physical and chemical modeling in both basic and applied sciences.
abstract_zh: 在量子力学细节级别模拟物理系统的时间演化——称为哈密顿模拟（HS）——是物理学和化学领域的一个重要且有趣的问题。对于这项任务，在量子计算机上运行的算法比经典算法要快得多。事实上，这一应用促使费曼提出建造量子计算机。尽管如此，要实现这种性能潜力仍存在挑战。之前的工作主要集中在为 HS 编译电路（量子程序），其目标是最大化准确性或门取消。我们的工作提出了一种同时推进这两个目标的编译策略。在较高层面上，我们使用图形着色和旅行推销员等经典优化来命令量子程序的执行。具体来说，我们将哈密顿量（表征量子力学系统的矩阵）中的相互交换项组合在一起，以提高模拟的准确性。然后，我们重新排列每组内的项，以最大限度地提高最终量子电路中的门抵消。这些优化共同提高 HS 性能，并使电路深度平均减少 40%。这项工作推进了 HS 的前沿，反过来又可以推进基础科学和应用科学中的物理和化学建模。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种优化量子程序执行顺序的方法，通过经典优化算法减少量子模拟中的错误，提升哈密尔顿模拟效率。
AI.motivation: 现有量子模拟方法在电路编译时仅能单独优化准确性或门消除，难以兼顾两者，限制了量子计算性能的发挥。
AI.method: 结合图着色与旅行商问题算法，将哈密顿量中可交换项分组并优化执行顺序，同时提升准确性与门消除效率。
AI.result: 平均减少40%量子电路深度，在保持模拟精度的同时显著降低错误率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为量子模拟提供了更高效的编译策略，推动了物理与化学领域量子计算应用的进展。

search_text: Optimized Quantum Program Execution Ordering to Mitigate Errors in Simulations of Quantum Systems 优化量子程序执行顺序以减少量子系统模拟中的错误 Simulating the time evolution of a physical system at quantum mechanical levels of detail -- known as Hamiltonian Simulation (HS) -- is an important and interesting problem across physics and chemistry. For this task, algorithms that run on quantum computers are known to be exponentially faster than classical algorithms; in fact, this application motivated Feynman to propose the construction of quantum computers. Nonetheless, there are challenges in reaching this performance potential. Prior work has focused on compiling circuits (quantum programs) for HS with the goal of maximizing either accuracy or gate cancellation. Our work proposes a compilation strategy that simultaneously advances both goals. At a high level, we use classical optimizations such as graph coloring and travelling salesperson to order the execution of quantum programs. Specifically, we group together mutually commuting terms in the Hamiltonian (a matrix characterizing the quantum mechanical system) to improve the accuracy of the simulation. We then rearrange the terms within each group to maximize gate cancellation in the final quantum circuit. These optimizations work together to improve HS performance and result in an average 40% reduction in circuit depth. This work advances the frontier of HS which in turn can advance physical and chemical modeling in both basic and applied sciences. 在量子力学细节级别模拟物理系统的时间演化——称为哈密顿模拟（HS）——是物理学和化学领域的一个重要且有趣的问题。对于这项任务，在量子计算机上运行的算法比经典算法要快得多。事实上，这一应用促使费曼提出建造量子计算机。尽管如此，要实现这种性能潜力仍存在挑战。之前的工作主要集中在为 HS 编译电路（量子程序），其目标是最大化准确性或门取消。我们的工作提出了一种同时推进这两个目标的编译策略。在较高层面上，我们使用图形着色和旅行推销员等经典优化来命令量子程序的执行。具体来说，我们将哈密顿量（表征量子力学系统的矩阵）中的相互交换项组合在一起，以提高模拟的准确性。然后，我们重新排列每组内的项，以最大限度地提高最终量子电路中的门抵消。这些优化共同提高 HS 性能，并使电路深度平均减少 40%。这项工作推进了 HS 的前沿，反过来又可以推进基础科学和应用科学中的物理和化学建模。 本文提出一种优化量子程序执行顺序的方法，通过经典优化算法减少量子模拟中的错误，提升哈密尔顿模拟效率。 Teague Tomesh,Kaiwen Gui,Pranav Gokhale,Yunong Shi,Frederic T. Chong,Margaret Martonosi,Martin Suchara quant-ph,cs.ET

authors_text: Senthil Purushwalkam,Pedro Morgado,Abhinav Gupta
title: The Challenges of Continuous Self-Supervised Learning
title_zh: 持续自我监督学习的挑战
abstract: Self-supervised learning (SSL) aims to eliminate one of the major bottlenecks in representation learning - the need for human annotations. As a result, SSL holds the promise to learn representations from data in-the-wild, i.e., without the need for finite and static datasets. Instead, true SSL algorithms should be able to exploit the continuous stream of data being generated on the internet or by agents exploring their environments. But do traditional self-supervised learning approaches work in this setup? In this work, we investigate this question by conducting experiments on the continuous self-supervised learning problem. While learning in the wild, we expect to see a continuous (infinite) non-IID data stream that follows a non-stationary distribution of visual concepts. The goal is to learn a representation that can be robust, adaptive yet not forgetful of concepts seen in the past. We show that a direct application of current methods to such continuous setup is 1) inefficient both computationally and in the amount of data required, 2) leads to inferior representations due to temporal correlations (non-IID data) in some sources of streaming data and 3) exhibits signs of catastrophic forgetting when trained on sources with non-stationary data distributions. We propose the use of replay buffers as an approach to alleviate the issues of inefficiency and temporal correlations. We further propose a novel method to enhance the replay buffer by maintaining the least redundant samples. Minimum redundancy (MinRed) buffers allow us to learn effective representations even in the most challenging streaming scenarios composed of sequential visual data obtained from a single embodied agent, and alleviates the problem of catastrophic forgetting when learning from data with non-stationary semantic distributions.
summary: Self-supervised learning (SSL) aims to eliminate one of the major bottlenecks in representation learning - the need for human annotations. As a result, SSL holds the promise to learn representations from data in-the-wild, i.e., without the need for finite and static datasets. Instead, true SSL algorithms should be able to exploit the continuous stream of data being generated on the internet or by agents exploring their environments. But do traditional self-supervised learning approaches work in this setup? In this work, we investigate this question by conducting experiments on the continuous self-supervised learning problem. While learning in the wild, we expect to see a continuous (infinite) non-IID data stream that follows a non-stationary distribution of visual concepts. The goal is to learn a representation that can be robust, adaptive yet not forgetful of concepts seen in the past. We show that a direct application of current methods to such continuous setup is 1) inefficient both computationally and in the amount of data required, 2) leads to inferior representations due to temporal correlations (non-IID data) in some sources of streaming data and 3) exhibits signs of catastrophic forgetting when trained on sources with non-stationary data distributions. We propose the use of replay buffers as an approach to alleviate the issues of inefficiency and temporal correlations. We further propose a novel method to enhance the replay buffer by maintaining the least redundant samples. Minimum redundancy (MinRed) buffers allow us to learn effective representations even in the most challenging streaming scenarios composed of sequential visual data obtained from a single embodied agent, and alleviates the problem of catastrophic forgetting when learning from data with non-stationary semantic distributions.
abstract_zh: 自监督学习（SSL）旨在消除表示学习的主要瓶颈之一——对人工注释的需求。因此，SSL 有望从野外数据中学习表示，即不需要有限的静态数据集。相反，真正的 SSL 算法应该能够利用互联网上或由探索其环境的代理生成的连续数据流。但是传统的自我监督学习方法在这种情况下有效吗？在这项工作中，我们通过对持续自我监督学习问题进行实验来研究这个问题。在野外学习时，我们期望看到遵循视觉概念的非平稳分布的连续（无限）非独立同分布数据流。目标是学习一种鲁棒、适应性强但不会忘记过去看到的概念的表示。我们表明，将当前方法直接应用于这种连续设置会导致：1）计算效率和所需数据量都低效，2）由于某些流数据源中的时间相关性（非独立同分布数据）而导致表示较差，3）在非平稳数据分布的源上进行训练时，会出现灾难性遗忘的迹象。我们建议使用重播缓冲区作为缓解低效率和时间相关性问题的方法。我们进一步提出了一种通过维持最少冗余样本来增强重播缓冲区的新方法。最小冗余（MinRed）缓冲区使我们即使在最具挑战性的流场景中也能学习有效的表示，这些流场景由从单个具体代理获得的顺序视觉数据组成，并减轻了从具有非平稳语义分布的数据中学习时的灾难性遗忘问题。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在连续非独立同分布（non-IID）数据流环境下，传统自监督学习方法的局限性，并提出改进方案以应对持续学习中的挑战。
AI.motivation: 传统自监督学习依赖静态有限数据集，难以适应互联网或智能体探索环境中持续生成的非稳态数据流，导致效率低下、表示质量下降和灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.method: 提出使用回放缓冲区（replay buffer）缓解非稳态数据问题，并设计最小冗余（MinRed）缓冲区策略，通过保留最少冗余样本优化表示学习。
AI.result: 实验表明，传统方法在连续学习场景中计算效率低、表示质量差且易发生灾难性遗忘；MinRed缓冲区有效提升了在非稳态数据流下的表示鲁棒性和适应性。
AI.conclusion: 传统自监督学习需适应连续数据流特性，MinRed缓冲区方法能有效解决非稳态环境下的表示学习挑战，为持续学习提供新思路。

authors_text: Yanwu Xu,Shaoan Xie,Wenhao Wu,Kun Zhang,Mingming Gong,Kayhan Batmanghelich
title: Maximum Spatial Perturbation Consistency for Unpaired Image-to-Image Translation
title_zh: 不成对图像到图像转换的最大空间扰动一致性
abstract: Unpaired image-to-image translation (I2I) is an ill-posed problem, as an infinite number of translation functions can map the source domain distribution to the target distribution. Therefore, much effort has been put into designing suitable constraints, e.g., cycle consistency (CycleGAN), geometry consistency (GCGAN), and contrastive learning-based constraints (CUTGAN), that help better pose the problem. However, these well-known constraints have limitations: (1) they are either too restrictive or too weak for specific I2I tasks; (2) these methods result in content distortion when there is a significant spatial variation between the source and target domains. This paper proposes a universal regularization technique called maximum spatial perturbation consistency (MSPC), which enforces a spatial perturbation function (T ) and the translation operator (G) to be commutative (i.e., TG = GT ). In addition, we introduce two adversarial training components for learning the spatial perturbation function. The first one lets T compete with G to achieve maximum perturbation. The second one lets G and T compete with discriminators to align the spatial variations caused by the change of object size, object distortion, background interruptions, etc. Our method outperforms the state-of-the-art methods on most I2I benchmarks. We also introduce a new benchmark, namely the front face to profile face dataset, to emphasize the underlying challenges of I2I for real-world applications. We finally perform ablation experiments to study the sensitivity of our method to the severity of spatial perturbation and its effectiveness for distribution alignment.
summary: Unpaired image-to-image translation (I2I) is an ill-posed problem, as an infinite number of translation functions can map the source domain distribution to the target distribution. Therefore, much effort has been put into designing suitable constraints, e.g., cycle consistency (CycleGAN), geometry consistency (GCGAN), and contrastive learning-based constraints (CUTGAN), that help better pose the problem. However, these well-known constraints have limitations: (1) they are either too restrictive or too weak for specific I2I tasks; (2) these methods result in content distortion when there is a significant spatial variation between the source and target domains. This paper proposes a universal regularization technique called maximum spatial perturbation consistency (MSPC), which enforces a spatial perturbation function (T ) and the translation operator (G) to be commutative (i.e., TG = GT ). In addition, we introduce two adversarial training components for learning the spatial perturbation function. The first one lets T compete with G to achieve maximum perturbation. The second one lets G and T compete with discriminators to align the spatial variations caused by the change of object size, object distortion, background interruptions, etc. Our method outperforms the state-of-the-art methods on most I2I benchmarks. We also introduce a new benchmark, namely the front face to profile face dataset, to emphasize the underlying challenges of I2I for real-world applications. We finally perform ablation experiments to study the sensitivity of our method to the severity of spatial perturbation and its effectiveness for distribution alignment.
abstract_zh: 不成对的图像到图像转换（I2I）是一个不适定问题，因为无限数量的转换函数可以将源域分布映射到目标分布。因此，人们投入了大量的精力来设计合适的约束，例如循环一致性（CycleGAN）、几何一致性（GCGAN）和基于对比学习的约束（CUTGAN），以帮助更好地提出问题。然而，这些众所周知的约束也有局限性：（1）对于特定的 I2I 任务，它们要么限制性太大，要么太弱； (2) 当源域和目标域之间存在显着的空间变化时，这些方法会导致内容失真。本文提出了一种称为最大空间扰动一致性（MSPC）的通用正则化技术，它强制空间扰动函数（T）和平移算子（G）是可交换的（即 TG = GT ）。此外，我们引入了两个对抗性训练组件来学习空间扰动函数。第一个让 T 与 G 竞争以获得最大扰动。第二个让 G 和 T 与判别器竞争，以对齐由对象大小变化、对象扭曲、背景中断等引起的空间变化。我们的方法在大多数 I2I 基准上优于最先进的方法。我们还引入了一个新的基准，即正面到侧脸数据集，以强调 I2I 对于实际应用程序的潜在挑战。最后，我们进行了消融实验，以研究我们的方法对空间扰动严重程度的敏感性及其对分布对齐的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为最大空间扰动一致性的新方法（MSPC），用于解决无配对图像到图像翻译（I2I）中因空间变化导致的内容失真问题。
AI.motivation: 现有约束条件（如循环一致性、几何一致性）在处理源域与目标域间显著空间差异时存在限制，导致内容扭曲，需设计更普适的正则化技术。
AI.method: 提出MSPC正则化技术，强制空间扰动函数与翻译算子满足交换性（TG=GT），并引入两个对抗训练组件：1) 使扰动函数与翻译算子竞争以实现最大扰动；2) 通过判别器对齐由物体尺寸变化、形变等引起的空域差异。
AI.result: 在多数I2I基准测试中优于现有方法，引入新的正面到侧面人脸数据集验证现实应用挑战，消融实验表明方法对空间扰动强度和分布对齐的有效性。
AI.conclusion: MSPC有效解决了I2I中的空间扰动问题，为实际应用中的分布对齐提供了新思路，且在新数据集上验证了方法的鲁棒性。

search_text: Maximum Spatial Perturbation Consistency for Unpaired Image-to-Image Translation 不成对图像到图像转换的最大空间扰动一致性 Unpaired image-to-image translation (I2I) is an ill-posed problem, as an infinite number of translation functions can map the source domain distribution to the target distribution. Therefore, much effort has been put into designing suitable constraints, e.g., cycle consistency (CycleGAN), geometry consistency (GCGAN), and contrastive learning-based constraints (CUTGAN), that help better pose the problem. However, these well-known constraints have limitations: (1) they are either too restrictive or too weak for specific I2I tasks; (2) these methods result in content distortion when there is a significant spatial variation between the source and target domains. This paper proposes a universal regularization technique called maximum spatial perturbation consistency (MSPC), which enforces a spatial perturbation function (T ) and the translation operator (G) to be commutative (i.e., TG = GT ). In addition, we introduce two adversarial training components for learning the spatial perturbation function. The first one lets T compete with G to achieve maximum perturbation. The second one lets G and T compete with discriminators to align the spatial variations caused by the change of object size, object distortion, background interruptions, etc. Our method outperforms the state-of-the-art methods on most I2I benchmarks. We also introduce a new benchmark, namely the front face to profile face dataset, to emphasize the underlying challenges of I2I for real-world applications. We finally perform ablation experiments to study the sensitivity of our method to the severity of spatial perturbation and its effectiveness for distribution alignment. 不成对的图像到图像转换（I2I）是一个不适定问题，因为无限数量的转换函数可以将源域分布映射到目标分布。因此，人们投入了大量的精力来设计合适的约束，例如循环一致性（CycleGAN）、几何一致性（GCGAN）和基于对比学习的约束（CUTGAN），以帮助更好地提出问题。然而，这些众所周知的约束也有局限性：（1）对于特定的 I2I 任务，它们要么限制性太大，要么太弱； (2) 当源域和目标域之间存在显着的空间变化时，这些方法会导致内容失真。本文提出了一种称为最大空间扰动一致性（MSPC）的通用正则化技术，它强制空间扰动函数（T）和平移算子（G）是可交换的（即 TG = GT ）。此外，我们引入了两个对抗性训练组件来学习空间扰动函数。第一个让 T 与 G 竞争以获得最大扰动。第二个让 G 和 T 与判别器竞争，以对齐由对象大小变化、对象扭曲、背景中断等引起的空间变化。我们的方法在大多数 I2I 基准上优于最先进的方法。我们还引入了一个新的基准，即正面到侧脸数据集，以强调 I2I 对于实际应用程序的潜在挑战。最后，我们进行了消融实验，以研究我们的方法对空间扰动严重程度的敏感性及其对分布对齐的有效性。 本文提出一种名为最大空间扰动一致性的新方法（MSPC），用于解决无配对图像到图像翻译（I2I）中因空间变化导致的内容失真问题。 Yanwu Xu,Shaoan Xie,Wenhao Wu,Kun Zhang,Mingming Gong,Kayhan Batmanghelich cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Sagar Parekh,Soheil Habibian,Dylan P. Losey
title: RILI: Robustly Influencing Latent Intent
title_zh: RILI：强烈影响潜在意图
abstract: When robots interact with human partners, often these partners change their behavior in response to the robot. On the one hand this is challenging because the robot must learn to coordinate with a dynamic partner. But on the other hand -- if the robot understands these dynamics -- it can harness its own behavior, influence the human, and guide the team towards effective collaboration. Prior research enables robots to learn to influence other robots or simulated agents. In this paper we extend these learning approaches to now influence humans. What makes humans especially hard to influence is that -- not only do humans react to the robot -- but the way a single user reacts to the robot may change over time, and different humans will respond to the same robot behavior in different ways. We therefore propose a robust approach that learns to influence changing partner dynamics. Our method first trains with a set of partners across repeated interactions, and learns to predict the current partner's behavior based on the previous states, actions, and rewards. Next, we rapidly adapt to new partners by sampling trajectories the robot learned with the original partners, and then leveraging those existing behaviors to influence the new partner dynamics. We compare our resulting algorithm to state-of-the-art baselines across simulated environments and a user study where the robot and participants collaborate to build towers. We find that our approach outperforms the alternatives, even when the partner follows new or unexpected dynamics. Videos of the user study are available here: https://youtu.be/lYsWM8An18g
summary: When robots interact with human partners, often these partners change their behavior in response to the robot. On the one hand this is challenging because the robot must learn to coordinate with a dynamic partner. But on the other hand -- if the robot understands these dynamics -- it can harness its own behavior, influence the human, and guide the team towards effective collaboration. Prior research enables robots to learn to influence other robots or simulated agents. In this paper we extend these learning approaches to now influence humans. What makes humans especially hard to influence is that -- not only do humans react to the robot -- but the way a single user reacts to the robot may change over time, and different humans will respond to the same robot behavior in different ways. We therefore propose a robust approach that learns to influence changing partner dynamics. Our method first trains with a set of partners across repeated interactions, and learns to predict the current partner's behavior based on the previous states, actions, and rewards. Next, we rapidly adapt to new partners by sampling trajectories the robot learned with the original partners, and then leveraging those existing behaviors to influence the new partner dynamics. We compare our resulting algorithm to state-of-the-art baselines across simulated environments and a user study where the robot and participants collaborate to build towers. We find that our approach outperforms the alternatives, even when the partner follows new or unexpected dynamics. Videos of the user study are available here: https://youtu.be/lYsWM8An18g
abstract_zh: 当机器人与人类伙伴互动时，这些伙伴通常会改变自己的行为以响应机器人。一方面，这是具有挑战性的，因为机器人必须学会与动态伙伴协调。 But on the other hand -- if the robot understands these dynamics -- it can harness its own behavior, influence the human, and guide the team towards effective collaboration.先前的研究使机器人能够学会影响其他机器人或模拟代理。在本文中，我们将这些学习方法扩展到现在影响人类。人类特别难以影响的原因是——不仅人类对机器人的反应——而且单个用户对机器人的反应方式可能会随着时间的推移而改变，而且不同的人会对相同的机器人行为做出不同的反应。因此，我们提出了一种强大的方法来学习影响不断变化的合作伙伴动态。我们的方法首先通过重复的交互与一组合作伙伴进行训练，并学习根据之前的状态、动作和奖励来预测当前合作伙伴的行为。 Next, we rapidly adapt to new partners by sampling trajectories the robot learned with the original partners, and then leveraging those existing behaviors to influence the new partner dynamics.我们将最终的算法与模拟环境中最先进的基线以及机器人和参与者协作建造塔的用户研究进行比较。我们发现，即使合作伙伴遵循新的或意想不到的动态，我们的方法也优于其他选择。用户研究的视频可在此处观看：https://youtu.be/lYsWM8An18g

AI.tldr: 本文提出RILI方法，使机器人能够通过学习和适应动态变化的人类行为模式，有效影响人类合作伙伴的意图以促进协作。
AI.motivation: 人类在与机器人互动时行为动态变化且个体差异大，现有方法难以应对这种不确定性，需开发鲁棒的适应性策略。
AI.method: 通过多轮交互训练预测合作伙伴行为模式，再利用历史轨迹快速适应新用户，结合预测与适应机制实现动态影响。
AI.result: 在模拟环境和搭积木用户实验中，RILI算法显著优于现有方法，尤其在合作伙伴行为突变场景下表现更优。
AI.conclusion: RILI方法通过动态行为预测与快速适应机制，有效解决了机器人影响人类合作伙伴这一复杂交互难题。
