authors_text: Veera Raghava Reddy Kovvuri,Siyuan Liu,Monika Seisenberger,Berndt Müller,Xiuyi Fan
title: On Understanding the Influence of Controllable Factors with a Feature Attribution Algorithm: a Medical Case Study
title_zh: 用特征归因算法理解可控因素的影响：一个医学案例研究
abstract: Feature attribution XAI algorithms enable their users to gain insight into the underlying patterns of large datasets through their feature importance calculation. Existing feature attribution algorithms treat all features in a dataset homogeneously, which may lead to misinterpretation of consequences of changing feature values. In this work, we consider partitioning features into controllable and uncontrollable parts and propose the Controllable fActor Feature Attribution (CAFA) approach to compute the relative importance of controllable features. We carried out experiments applying CAFA to two existing datasets and our own COVID-19 non-pharmaceutical control measures dataset. Experimental results show that with CAFA, we are able to exclude influences from uncontrollable features in our explanation while keeping the full dataset for prediction.
summary: Feature attribution XAI algorithms enable their users to gain insight into the underlying patterns of large datasets through their feature importance calculation. Existing feature attribution algorithms treat all features in a dataset homogeneously, which may lead to misinterpretation of consequences of changing feature values. In this work, we consider partitioning features into controllable and uncontrollable parts and propose the Controllable fActor Feature Attribution (CAFA) approach to compute the relative importance of controllable features. We carried out experiments applying CAFA to two existing datasets and our own COVID-19 non-pharmaceutical control measures dataset. Experimental results show that with CAFA, we are able to exclude influences from uncontrollable features in our explanation while keeping the full dataset for prediction.
abstract_zh: 特征归因 XAI 算法使用户能够通过特征重要性计算深入了解大型数据集的底层模式。现有的特征归因算法均匀地对待数据集中的所有特征，这可能会导致对改变特征值的后果的误解。在这项工作中，我们考虑将特征划分为可控和不可控部分，并提出可控因素特征归因（CAFA）方法来计算可控特征的相对重要性。我们将 CAFA 应用于两个现有数据集和我们自己的 COVID-19 非药物控制措施数据集进行了实验。实验结果表明，通过 CAFA，我们能够在解释中排除不可控特征的影响，同时保留完整的数据集进行预测。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为CAFA的特征归因方法，通过区分可控与不可控特征来提升医疗数据集中可控因素的解释准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有特征归因算法未区分特征的可控性，可能导致将不可控因素的影响误认为可控因素，从而误导决策者对医疗干预措施效果的判断。
AI.method: 将特征划分为可控与不可控两类，设计CAFA算法计算可控特征的相对重要性，通过实验验证其在排除不可控因素干扰后仍能保持预测性能。
AI.result: 在两个公开数据集和新冠非药物干预措施数据集上的实验表明，CAFA能有效分离不可控因素影响，使可控特征的解释更加精准。
AI.conclusion: CAFA方法通过特征分类显著提升了医疗场景下可控因素的解释可信度，为精准医疗决策提供了更可靠的依据。

search_text: On Understanding the Influence of Controllable Factors with a Feature Attribution Algorithm: a Medical Case Study 用特征归因算法理解可控因素的影响：一个医学案例研究 Feature attribution XAI algorithms enable their users to gain insight into the underlying patterns of large datasets through their feature importance calculation. Existing feature attribution algorithms treat all features in a dataset homogeneously, which may lead to misinterpretation of consequences of changing feature values. In this work, we consider partitioning features into controllable and uncontrollable parts and propose the Controllable fActor Feature Attribution (CAFA) approach to compute the relative importance of controllable features. We carried out experiments applying CAFA to two existing datasets and our own COVID-19 non-pharmaceutical control measures dataset. Experimental results show that with CAFA, we are able to exclude influences from uncontrollable features in our explanation while keeping the full dataset for prediction. 特征归因 XAI 算法使用户能够通过特征重要性计算深入了解大型数据集的底层模式。现有的特征归因算法均匀地对待数据集中的所有特征，这可能会导致对改变特征值的后果的误解。在这项工作中，我们考虑将特征划分为可控和不可控部分，并提出可控因素特征归因（CAFA）方法来计算可控特征的相对重要性。我们将 CAFA 应用于两个现有数据集和我们自己的 COVID-19 非药物控制措施数据集进行了实验。实验结果表明，通过 CAFA，我们能够在解释中排除不可控特征的影响，同时保留完整的数据集进行预测。 本文提出一种名为CAFA的特征归因方法，通过区分可控与不可控特征来提升医疗数据集中可控因素的解释准确性。 Veera Raghava Reddy Kovvuri,Siyuan Liu,Monika Seisenberger,Berndt Müller,Xiuyi Fan cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Valentina Golendukhina,Valentina Lenarduzzi,Michael Felderer
title: What is Software Quality for AI Engineers? Towards a Thinning of the Fog
title_zh: 人工智能工程师的软件质量是什么？雾气逐渐变薄
comment: 9 pages, 3 figures, accepted for CAIN22 Conference
comments: 9 pages, 3 figures, accepted for CAIN22 Conference
abstract: It is often overseen that AI-enabled systems are also software systems and therefore rely on software quality assurance (SQA). Thus, the goal of this study is to investigate the software quality assurance strategies adopted during the development, integration, and maintenance of AI/ML components and code. We conducted semi-structured interviews with representatives of ten Austrian SMEs that develop AI-enabled systems. A qualitative analysis of the interview data identified 12 issues in the development of AI/ML components. Furthermore, we identified when quality issues arise in AI/ML components and how they are detected. The results of this study should guide future work on software quality assurance processes and techniques for AI/ML components.
summary: It is often overseen that AI-enabled systems are also software systems and therefore rely on software quality assurance (SQA). Thus, the goal of this study is to investigate the software quality assurance strategies adopted during the development, integration, and maintenance of AI/ML components and code. We conducted semi-structured interviews with representatives of ten Austrian SMEs that develop AI-enabled systems. A qualitative analysis of the interview data identified 12 issues in the development of AI/ML components. Furthermore, we identified when quality issues arise in AI/ML components and how they are detected. The results of this study should guide future work on software quality assurance processes and techniques for AI/ML components.
abstract_zh: 人们经常注意到，人工智能支持的系统也是软件系统，因此依赖于软件质量保证（SQA）。因此，本研究的目的是研究在 AI/ML 组件和代码的开发、集成和维护过程中采用的软件质量保证策略。我们对十家开发人工智能系统的奥地利中小企业的代表进行了半结构化访谈。对访谈数据的定性分析确定了 AI/ML 组件开发中的 12 个问题。此外，我们还确定了 AI/ML 组件何时出现质量问题以及如何检测它们。这项研究的结果应该指导未来人工智能/机器学习组件的软件质量保证流程和技术的工作。

AI.tldr: 探讨AI工程师在开发、集成和维护AI/ML组件时采用的软件质量保证策略，以明确软件质量在AI工程中的具体体现。
AI.motivation: 现有研究常忽视AI系统作为软件系统的属性，导致其质量保证策略不明确，需探索适用于AI/ML组件的软件质量保障方法。
AI.method: 通过对奥地利十家开发AI系统的中小企业进行半结构化访谈，并采用定性分析方法处理访谈数据。
AI.result: 识别出AI/ML组件开发中的12个关键问题，明确质量问题的产生阶段及检测方法，为后续质量保障提供依据。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果为AI/ML组件的软件质量保证流程和技术优化提供了方向，有助于提升AI系统的可靠性和维护效率。

authors_text: Ziqi Wang,Marco Loog
title: Enhancing Classifier Conservativeness and Robustness by Polynomiality
title_zh: 通过多项式增强分类器的保守性和鲁棒性
comment: IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition, 2022
comments: IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition, 2022
abstract: We illustrate the detrimental effect, such as overconfident decisions, that exponential behavior can have in methods like classical LDA and logistic regression. We then show how polynomiality can remedy the situation. This, among others, leads purposefully to random-level performance in the tails, away from the bulk of the training data. A directly related, simple, yet important technical novelty we subsequently present is softRmax: a reasoned alternative to the standard softmax function employed in contemporary (deep) neural networks. It is derived through linking the standard softmax to Gaussian class-conditional models, as employed in LDA, and replacing those by a polynomial alternative. We show that two aspects of softRmax, conservativeness and inherent gradient regularization, lead to robustness against adversarial attacks without gradient obfuscation.
summary: We illustrate the detrimental effect, such as overconfident decisions, that exponential behavior can have in methods like classical LDA and logistic regression. We then show how polynomiality can remedy the situation. This, among others, leads purposefully to random-level performance in the tails, away from the bulk of the training data. A directly related, simple, yet important technical novelty we subsequently present is softRmax: a reasoned alternative to the standard softmax function employed in contemporary (deep) neural networks. It is derived through linking the standard softmax to Gaussian class-conditional models, as employed in LDA, and replacing those by a polynomial alternative. We show that two aspects of softRmax, conservativeness and inherent gradient regularization, lead to robustness against adversarial attacks without gradient obfuscation.
abstract_zh: 我们说明了指数行为在经典 LDA 和逻辑回归等方法中可能产生的有害影响，例如过度自信的决策。然后我们展示多项式如何解决这种情况。除其他外，这有目的地导致尾部的随机级性能，远离大量训练数据。我们随后提出的一个直接相关、简单但重要的技术新颖性是 softRmax：当代（深度）神经网络中使用的标准 softmax 函数的合理替代方案。它是通过将标准 softmax 链接到高斯类条件模型（如 LDA 中所使用的）并用多项式替代方案替换这些模型而导出的。我们证明了 softRmax 的两个方面，即保守性和固有的梯度正则化，可以在没有梯度混淆的情况下实现对抗对抗攻击的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过多项式性改进分类器的保守性和鲁棒性，设计了softRmax替代传统softmax函数。
AI.motivation: 指数行为（如传统softmax）会导致分类器过度自信，在数据尾部表现不佳且易受对抗攻击。
AI.method: 将softmax与高斯类条件模型关联，替换为多项式形式，提出softRmax并实现保守性与梯度正则化。
AI.result: softRmax在对抗攻击中展现鲁棒性，避免梯度混淆，且在数据分布尾部表现更稳定。
AI.conclusion: 多项式性有效提升分类器保守性与安全性，softRmax为深度网络提供可解释的替代方案。

authors_text: Puneet Kumar,Gaurav Bhat,Omkar Ingle,Daksh Goyal,Balasubramanian Raman
title: Affective Feedback Synthesis Towards Multimodal Text and Image Data
title_zh: 多模态文本和图像数据的情感反馈合成
comment: Submitted to ACM Transactions on Multimedia Computing, Communications, and Applications
comments: Submitted to ACM Transactions on Multimedia Computing, Communications, and Applications
abstract: In this paper, we have defined a novel task of affective feedback synthesis that deals with generating feedback for input text & corresponding image in a similar way as humans respond towards the multimodal data. A feedback synthesis system has been proposed and trained using ground-truth human comments along with image-text input. We have also constructed a large-scale dataset consisting of image, text, Twitter user comments, and the number of likes for the comments by crawling the news articles through Twitter feeds. The proposed system extracts textual features using a transformer-based textual encoder while the visual features have been extracted using a Faster region-based convolutional neural networks model. The textual and visual features have been concatenated to construct the multimodal features using which the decoder synthesizes the feedback. We have compared the results of the proposed system with the baseline models using quantitative and qualitative measures. The generated feedbacks have been analyzed using automatic and human evaluation. They have been found to be semantically similar to the ground-truth comments and relevant to the given text-image input.
summary: In this paper, we have defined a novel task of affective feedback synthesis that deals with generating feedback for input text & corresponding image in a similar way as humans respond towards the multimodal data. A feedback synthesis system has been proposed and trained using ground-truth human comments along with image-text input. We have also constructed a large-scale dataset consisting of image, text, Twitter user comments, and the number of likes for the comments by crawling the news articles through Twitter feeds. The proposed system extracts textual features using a transformer-based textual encoder while the visual features have been extracted using a Faster region-based convolutional neural networks model. The textual and visual features have been concatenated to construct the multimodal features using which the decoder synthesizes the feedback. We have compared the results of the proposed system with the baseline models using quantitative and qualitative measures. The generated feedbacks have been analyzed using automatic and human evaluation. They have been found to be semantically similar to the ground-truth comments and relevant to the given text-image input.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们定义了情感反馈合成的新任务，该任务以与人类对多模态数据做出响应类似的方式处理输入文本和相应图像的反馈。已经提出了反馈合成系统，并使用真实的人类评论和图像文本输入进行了训练。我们还通过爬取 Twitter feed 中的新闻文章，构建了一个由图像、文本、Twitter 用户评论以及评论点赞数组成的大规模数据集。所提出的系统使用基于变压器的文本编码器提取文本特征，同时使用基于更快区域的卷积神经网络模型提取视觉特征。文本和视觉特征已被连接起来以构造多模态特征，解码器使用该多模态特征来合成反馈。我们使用定量和定性措施将所提出的系统的结果与基线模型进行了比较。使用自动和人工评估对生成的反馈进行了分析。人们发现它们在语义上与真实评论相似，并且与给定的文本图像输入相关。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型任务——多模态文本与图像的情感反馈合成，旨在生成类似人类对图文数据的反馈。
AI.motivation: 现有系统难以生成与多模态数据（图文）匹配的自然反馈，而人类反馈更符合实际需求，需构建能理解多模态信息的反馈生成模型。
AI.method: 构建包含图像、文本、Twitter评论及点赞数的大规模数据集，采用Transformer提取文本特征，Faster R-CNN提取视觉特征，融合后通过解码器生成反馈。
AI.result: 生成反馈在自动评估和人工评估中均表现出与真实评论的语义相似性，且与输入图文内容相关。
AI.conclusion: 所提系统有效实现了多模态情感反馈合成，未来可优化模型结构或扩展数据集以提升效果。

authors_text: Caroline Chan,Fredo Durand,Phillip Isola
title: Learning to generate line drawings that convey geometry and semantics
title_zh: 学习生成传达几何和语义的线条图
abstract: This paper presents an unpaired method for creating line drawings from photographs. Current methods often rely on high quality paired datasets to generate line drawings. However, these datasets often have limitations due to the subjects of the drawings belonging to a specific domain, or in the amount of data collected. Although recent work in unsupervised image-to-image translation has shown much progress, the latest methods still struggle to generate compelling line drawings. We observe that line drawings are encodings of scene information and seek to convey 3D shape and semantic meaning. We build these observations into a set of objectives and train an image translation to map photographs into line drawings. We introduce a geometry loss which predicts depth information from the image features of a line drawing, and a semantic loss which matches the CLIP features of a line drawing with its corresponding photograph. Our approach outperforms state-of-the-art unpaired image translation and line drawing generation methods on creating line drawings from arbitrary photographs. For code and demo visit our webpage carolineec.github.io/informative_drawings
summary: This paper presents an unpaired method for creating line drawings from photographs. Current methods often rely on high quality paired datasets to generate line drawings. However, these datasets often have limitations due to the subjects of the drawings belonging to a specific domain, or in the amount of data collected. Although recent work in unsupervised image-to-image translation has shown much progress, the latest methods still struggle to generate compelling line drawings. We observe that line drawings are encodings of scene information and seek to convey 3D shape and semantic meaning. We build these observations into a set of objectives and train an image translation to map photographs into line drawings. We introduce a geometry loss which predicts depth information from the image features of a line drawing, and a semantic loss which matches the CLIP features of a line drawing with its corresponding photograph. Our approach outperforms state-of-the-art unpaired image translation and line drawing generation methods on creating line drawings from arbitrary photographs. For code and demo visit our webpage carolineec.github.io/informative_drawings
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种从照片创建线条图的不成对方法。当前的方法通常依赖于高质量的配对数据集来生成线条图。然而，由于绘图的主题属于特定领域或收集的数据量，这些数据集通常具有局限性。尽管最近在无监督图像到图像翻译方面的工作已经取得了很大进展，但最新方法仍然难以生成引人注目的线条图。我们观察到线条图是场景信息的编码，并试图传达 3D 形状和语义。我们将这些观察结果构建为一组目标，并训练图像转换以将照片映射为线条图。我们引入了一种几何损失，它可以根据线条画的图像特征预测深度信息，以及一种语义损失，可以将线条画的 CLIP 特征与其相应的照片相匹配。在从任意照片创建线条图方面，我们的方法优于最先进的不配对图像转换和线条图生成方法。如需代码和演示，请访问我们的网页 carolineec.github.io/informative_drawings

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需配对数据集的生成方法，通过照片生成能够传达几何形状和语义信息的线条画。
AI.motivation: 现有线条画生成方法依赖高质量配对数据集，但受限于领域特定性和数据量，且最新无监督方法仍难以生成令人满意的线条画。
AI.method: 设计几何损失（预测线条画深度信息）和语义损失（匹配线条画与照片的CLIP特征），通过图像翻译模型实现照片到线条画的映射。
AI.result: 在任意照片的线条画生成任务中，该方法优于现有最先进的无配对图像翻译和线条画生成方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合几何与语义目标，提出的模型能有效生成传达三维形状和语义信息的线条画，无需依赖配对数据集。

authors_text: Hyesun Choung,Prabu David,Arun Ross
title: Trust in AI and Its Role in the Acceptance of AI Technologies
title_zh: 对人工智能的信任及其在接受人工智能技术中的作用
abstract: As AI-enhanced technologies become common in a variety of domains, there is an increasing need to define and examine the trust that users have in such technologies. Given the progress in the development of AI, a correspondingly sophisticated understanding of trust in the technology is required. This paper addresses this need by explaining the role of trust on the intention to use AI technologies. Study 1 examined the role of trust in the use of AI voice assistants based on survey responses from college students. A path analysis confirmed that trust had a significant effect on the intention to use AI, which operated through perceived usefulness and participants' attitude toward voice assistants. In study 2, using data from a representative sample of the U.S. population, different dimensions of trust were examined using exploratory factor analysis, which yielded two dimensions: human-like trust and functionality trust. The results of the path analyses from Study 1 were replicated in Study 2, confirming the indirect effect of trust and the effects of perceived usefulness, ease of use, and attitude on intention to use. Further, both dimensions of trust shared a similar pattern of effects within the model, with functionality-related trust exhibiting a greater total impact on usage intention than human-like trust. Overall, the role of trust in the acceptance of AI technologies was significant across both studies. This research contributes to the advancement and application of the TAM in AI-related applications and offers a multidimensional measure of trust that can be utilized in the future study of trustworthy AI.

abstract_zh: 随着人工智能增强技术在各个领域变得普遍，越来越需要定义和检查用户对此类技术的信任。鉴于人工智能发展的进步，需要对技术的信任有相应的深入理解。本文通过解释信任对于使用人工智能技术的意图的作用来满足这一需求。研究 1 根据大学生的调查问卷调查了信任在使用人工智能语音助手中的作用。路径分析证实，信任对使用人工智能的意图有显着影响，这通过感知有用性和参与者对语音助手的态度来运作。在研究 2 中，使用来自美国人口代表性样本的数据，通过探索性因素分析检查了不同的信任维度，得出了两个维度：类人信任和功能信任。研究 1 的路径分析结果在研究 2 中得到了重复，证实了信任的间接影响以及感知有用性、易用性和态度对使用意图的影响。此外，信任的两个维度在模型中具有相似的影响模式，与功能相关的信任比类人信任对使用意图的总体影响更大。总体而言，在这两项研究中，信任在接受人工智能技术方面发挥着重要作用。这项研究有助于 TAM 在人工智能相关应用中的进步和应用，并提供了多维的信任度量，可用于未来可信人工智能的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨信任在用户接受人工智能技术中的作用，通过两项研究分析信任对使用意图的影响机制。
AI.motivation: 随着AI技术普及，需明确用户对AI的信任如何影响其接受度，以推动可信AI的发展。
AI.method: 采用两项研究：研究1基于大学生调查数据进行路径分析；研究2使用美国代表性样本，通过探索性因子分析提取信任维度，并验证模型。
AI.result: 信任通过感知有用性与态度显著影响使用意图；信任分为‘类人性信任’和‘功能信任’，后者对使用意图的影响更大。
AI.conclusion: 信任是AI技术接受的关键因素，研究拓展了技术接受模型（TAM），为未来可信AI研究提供多维信任测量框架。

tldr: 本文探讨信任在用户接受人工智能技术中的作用，通过两项研究分析信任对使用意图的影响机制。
motivation: 随着AI技术普及，需明确用户对AI的信任如何影响其接受度，以推动可信AI的发展。
method: 采用两项研究：研究1基于大学生调查数据进行路径分析；研究2使用美国代表性样本，通过探索性因子分析提取信任维度，并验证模型。
result: 信任通过感知有用性与态度显著影响使用意图；信任分为‘类人性信任’和‘功能信任’，后者对使用意图的影响更大。
conclusion: 信任是AI技术接受的关键因素，研究拓展了技术接受模型（TAM），为未来可信AI研究提供多维信任测量框架。
search_text: Trust in AI and Its Role in the Acceptance of AI Technologies 对人工智能的信任及其在接受人工智能技术中的作用 As AI-enhanced technologies become common in a variety of domains, there is an increasing need to define and examine the trust that users have in such technologies. Given the progress in the development of AI, a correspondingly sophisticated understanding of trust in the technology is required. This paper addresses this need by explaining the role of trust on the intention to use AI technologies. Study 1 examined the role of trust in the use of AI voice assistants based on survey responses from college students. A path analysis confirmed that trust had a significant effect on the intention to use AI, which operated through perceived usefulness and participants' attitude toward voice assistants. In study 2, using data from a representative sample of the U.S. population, different dimensions of trust were examined using exploratory factor analysis, which yielded two dimensions: human-like trust and functionality trust. The results of the path analyses from Study 1 were replicated in Study 2, confirming the indirect effect of trust and the effects of perceived usefulness, ease of use, and attitude on intention to use. Further, both dimensions of trust shared a similar pattern of effects within the model, with functionality-related trust exhibiting a greater total impact on usage intention than human-like trust. Overall, the role of trust in the acceptance of AI technologies was significant across both studies. This research contributes to the advancement and application of the TAM in AI-related applications and offers a multidimensional measure of trust that can be utilized in the future study of trustworthy AI. 随着人工智能增强技术在各个领域变得普遍，越来越需要定义和检查用户对此类技术的信任。鉴于人工智能发展的进步，需要对技术的信任有相应的深入理解。本文通过解释信任对于使用人工智能技术的意图的作用来满足这一需求。研究 1 根据大学生的调查问卷调查了信任在使用人工智能语音助手中的作用。路径分析证实，信任对使用人工智能的意图有显着影响，这通过感知有用性和参与者对语音助手的态度来运作。在研究 2 中，使用来自美国人口代表性样本的数据，通过探索性因素分析检查了不同的信任维度，得出了两个维度：类人信任和功能信任。研究 1 的路径分析结果在研究 2 中得到了重复，证实了信任的间接影响以及感知有用性、易用性和态度对使用意图的影响。此外，信任的两个维度在模型中具有相似的影响模式，与功能相关的信任比类人信任对使用意图的总体影响更大。总体而言，在这两项研究中，信任在接受人工智能技术方面发挥着重要作用。这项研究有助于 TAM 在人工智能相关应用中的进步和应用，并提供了多维的信任度量，可用于未来可信人工智能的研究。 本文探讨信任在用户接受人工智能技术中的作用，通过两项研究分析信任对使用意图的影响机制。 Hyesun Choung,Prabu David,Arun Ross cs.AI,cs.HC

authors_text: Robby Costales,Shariq Iqbal,Fei Sha
title: Possibility Before Utility: Learning And Using Hierarchical Affordances
title_zh: 可能性优先于效用：学习和使用分层可供性
abstract: Reinforcement learning algorithms struggle on tasks with complex hierarchical dependency structures. Humans and other intelligent agents do not waste time assessing the utility of every high-level action in existence, but instead only consider ones they deem possible in the first place. By focusing only on what is feasible, or "afforded", at the present moment, an agent can spend more time both evaluating the utility of and acting on what matters. To this end, we present Hierarchical Affordance Learning (HAL), a method that learns a model of hierarchical affordances in order to prune impossible subtasks for more effective learning. Existing works in hierarchical reinforcement learning provide agents with structural representations of subtasks but are not affordance-aware, and by grounding our definition of hierarchical affordances in the present state, our approach is more flexible than the multitude of approaches that ground their subtask dependencies in a symbolic history. While these logic-based methods often require complete knowledge of the subtask hierarchy, our approach is able to utilize incomplete and varying symbolic specifications. Furthermore, we demonstrate that relative to non-affordance-aware methods, HAL agents are better able to efficiently learn complex tasks, navigate environment stochasticity, and acquire diverse skills in the absence of extrinsic supervision -- all of which are hallmarks of human learning.
summary: Reinforcement learning algorithms struggle on tasks with complex hierarchical dependency structures. Humans and other intelligent agents do not waste time assessing the utility of every high-level action in existence, but instead only consider ones they deem possible in the first place. By focusing only on what is feasible, or "afforded", at the present moment, an agent can spend more time both evaluating the utility of and acting on what matters. To this end, we present Hierarchical Affordance Learning (HAL), a method that learns a model of hierarchical affordances in order to prune impossible subtasks for more effective learning. Existing works in hierarchical reinforcement learning provide agents with structural representations of subtasks but are not affordance-aware, and by grounding our definition of hierarchical affordances in the present state, our approach is more flexible than the multitude of approaches that ground their subtask dependencies in a symbolic history. While these logic-based methods often require complete knowledge of the subtask hierarchy, our approach is able to utilize incomplete and varying symbolic specifications. Furthermore, we demonstrate that relative to non-affordance-aware methods, HAL agents are better able to efficiently learn complex tasks, navigate environment stochasticity, and acquire diverse skills in the absence of extrinsic supervision -- all of which are hallmarks of human learning.
abstract_zh: 强化学习算法难以处理具有复杂层次依赖结构的任务。人类和其他智能体不会浪费时间评估现有的每一个高级操作的效用，而是只考虑他们首先认为可能的操作。通过仅关注当前可行的或“负担得起的”，代理可以花更多时间评估重要事项的效用并采取行动。为此，我们提出了分层可供性学习（HAL），这是一种学习分层可供性模型的方法，以便修剪不可能的子任务以实现更有效的学习。分层强化学习中的现有工作为代理提供了子任务的结构表示，但不具有可供性意识，并且通过将我们对分层可供性的定义建立在当前状态上，我们的方法比将其子任务依赖关系建立在符号历史中的多种方法更加灵活。虽然这些基于逻辑的方法通常需要完全了解子任务层次结构，但我们的方法能够利用不完整且变化的符号规范。此外，我们证明，相对于非可供性感知方法，HAL 智能体能够更好地有效学习复杂任务、驾驭环境随机性，并在缺乏外部监督的情况下获得多种技能——所有这些都是人类学习的标志。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为分层可及性学习（HAL）的方法，旨在解决强化学习中复杂分层依赖结构任务的挑战，通过学习分层可及性模型来剪枝不可能的子任务，提高学习效率。
AI.motivation: 现有分层强化学习方法缺乏对可及性的考虑，导致代理在评估所有高层动作的效用时效率低下，而人类智能体更关注当前可行的动作。
AI.method: HAL通过建模分层可及性，基于当前状态动态识别可行子任务，无需依赖完整的符号化子任务层次结构，支持不完整和变化的符号规范。
AI.result: 实验表明，HAL代理在复杂任务学习、环境随机性处理及无外部监督下的多样化技能获取方面优于非可及性感知方法。
AI.conclusion: HAL通过聚焦当前可行动作，提供了比基于符号历史的方法更灵活的分层任务处理框架，更贴近人类学习特性。

authors_text: Tianjian Meng,Golnaz Ghiasi,Reza Mahjourian,Quoc V. Le,Mingxing Tan
title: Revisiting Multi-Scale Feature Fusion for Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 重新审视语义分割的多尺度特征融合
abstract: It is commonly believed that high internal resolution combined with expensive operations (e.g. atrous convolutions) are necessary for accurate semantic segmentation, resulting in slow speed and large memory usage. In this paper, we question this belief and demonstrate that neither high internal resolution nor atrous convolutions are necessary. Our intuition is that although segmentation is a dense per-pixel prediction task, the semantics of each pixel often depend on both nearby neighbors and far-away context; therefore, a more powerful multi-scale feature fusion network plays a critical role. Following this intuition, we revisit the conventional multi-scale feature space (typically capped at P5) and extend it to a much richer space, up to P9, where the smallest features are only 1/512 of the input size and thus have very large receptive fields. To process such a rich feature space, we leverage the recent BiFPN to fuse the multi-scale features. Based on these insights, we develop a simplified segmentation model, named ESeg, which has neither high internal resolution nor expensive atrous convolutions. Perhaps surprisingly, our simple method can achieve better accuracy with faster speed than prior art across multiple datasets. In real-time settings, ESeg-Lite-S achieves 76.0% mIoU on CityScapes [12] at 189 FPS, outperforming FasterSeg [9] (73.1% mIoU at 170 FPS). Our ESeg-Lite-L runs at 79 FPS and achieves 80.1% mIoU, largely closing the gap between real-time and high-performance segmentation models.
summary: It is commonly believed that high internal resolution combined with expensive operations (e.g. atrous convolutions) are necessary for accurate semantic segmentation, resulting in slow speed and large memory usage. In this paper, we question this belief and demonstrate that neither high internal resolution nor atrous convolutions are necessary. Our intuition is that although segmentation is a dense per-pixel prediction task, the semantics of each pixel often depend on both nearby neighbors and far-away context; therefore, a more powerful multi-scale feature fusion network plays a critical role. Following this intuition, we revisit the conventional multi-scale feature space (typically capped at P5) and extend it to a much richer space, up to P9, where the smallest features are only 1/512 of the input size and thus have very large receptive fields. To process such a rich feature space, we leverage the recent BiFPN to fuse the multi-scale features. Based on these insights, we develop a simplified segmentation model, named ESeg, which has neither high internal resolution nor expensive atrous convolutions. Perhaps surprisingly, our simple method can achieve better accuracy with faster speed than prior art across multiple datasets. In real-time settings, ESeg-Lite-S achieves 76.0% mIoU on CityScapes [12] at 189 FPS, outperforming FasterSeg [9] (73.1% mIoU at 170 FPS). Our ESeg-Lite-L runs at 79 FPS and achieves 80.1% mIoU, largely closing the gap between real-time and high-performance segmentation models.
abstract_zh: 人们普遍认为，高内部分辨率与昂贵的操作（例如空洞卷积）相结合对于准确的语义分割是必要的，从而导致速度慢和内存占用大。在本文中，我们质疑这种信念，并证明高内部分辨率和空洞卷积都不是必要的。我们的直觉是，虽然分割是密集的每像素预测任务，但每个像素的语义通常取决于附近的邻居和远处的上下文；因此，更强大的多尺度特征融合网络起着至关重要的作用。遵循这种直觉，我们重新审视传统的多尺度特征空间（通常上限为 P5），并将其扩展到更丰富的空间，直至 P9，其中最小的特征仅为输入大小的 1/512，因此具有非常大的感受野。为了处理如此丰富的特征空间，我们利用最近的 BiFPN 来融合多尺度特征。基于这些见解，我们开发了一个简化的分割模型，名为 ESeg，它既没有高内部分辨率，也没有昂贵的空洞卷积。也许令人惊讶的是，我们的简单方法可以在多个数据集上以比现有技术更快的速度实现更好的准确性。在实时设置中，ESeg-Lite-S 在 CityScapes [12] 上以 189 FPS 实现了 76.0% mIoU，优于 FasterSeg [9]（在 170 FPS 下为 73.1% mIoU）。我们的 ESeg-Lite-L 运行速度为 79 FPS，达到 80.1% mIoU，很大程度上缩小了实时和高性能分割模型之间的差距。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需高分辨率和空洞卷积的语义分割模型ESeg，通过多尺度特征融合实现高效准确的分割。
AI.motivation: 传统方法认为高分辨率和空洞卷积是分割精度的必要条件，但作者质疑这一观点，认为像素语义依赖局部与全局上下文，应通过更强大的多尺度特征融合实现。
AI.method: 将传统多尺度特征空间从P5扩展至P9（最小特征为输入的1/512），结合BiFPN进行特征融合，构建无需高分辨率和空洞卷积的简化模型ESeg。
AI.result: ESeg-Lite-S在CityScapes数据集上达到76.0% mIoU（189 FPS），ESeg-Lite-L达到80.1% mIoU（79 FPS），优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过扩展特征空间和高效融合策略，ESeg在保持实时性的同时显著提升分割精度，缩小了实时模型与高性能模型间的差距。

search_text: Revisiting Multi-Scale Feature Fusion for Semantic Segmentation 重新审视语义分割的多尺度特征融合 It is commonly believed that high internal resolution combined with expensive operations (e.g. atrous convolutions) are necessary for accurate semantic segmentation, resulting in slow speed and large memory usage. In this paper, we question this belief and demonstrate that neither high internal resolution nor atrous convolutions are necessary. Our intuition is that although segmentation is a dense per-pixel prediction task, the semantics of each pixel often depend on both nearby neighbors and far-away context; therefore, a more powerful multi-scale feature fusion network plays a critical role. Following this intuition, we revisit the conventional multi-scale feature space (typically capped at P5) and extend it to a much richer space, up to P9, where the smallest features are only 1/512 of the input size and thus have very large receptive fields. To process such a rich feature space, we leverage the recent BiFPN to fuse the multi-scale features. Based on these insights, we develop a simplified segmentation model, named ESeg, which has neither high internal resolution nor expensive atrous convolutions. Perhaps surprisingly, our simple method can achieve better accuracy with faster speed than prior art across multiple datasets. In real-time settings, ESeg-Lite-S achieves 76.0% mIoU on CityScapes [12] at 189 FPS, outperforming FasterSeg [9] (73.1% mIoU at 170 FPS). Our ESeg-Lite-L runs at 79 FPS and achieves 80.1% mIoU, largely closing the gap between real-time and high-performance segmentation models. 人们普遍认为，高内部分辨率与昂贵的操作（例如空洞卷积）相结合对于准确的语义分割是必要的，从而导致速度慢和内存占用大。在本文中，我们质疑这种信念，并证明高内部分辨率和空洞卷积都不是必要的。我们的直觉是，虽然分割是密集的每像素预测任务，但每个像素的语义通常取决于附近的邻居和远处的上下文；因此，更强大的多尺度特征融合网络起着至关重要的作用。遵循这种直觉，我们重新审视传统的多尺度特征空间（通常上限为 P5），并将其扩展到更丰富的空间，直至 P9，其中最小的特征仅为输入大小的 1/512，因此具有非常大的感受野。为了处理如此丰富的特征空间，我们利用最近的 BiFPN 来融合多尺度特征。基于这些见解，我们开发了一个简化的分割模型，名为 ESeg，它既没有高内部分辨率，也没有昂贵的空洞卷积。也许令人惊讶的是，我们的简单方法可以在多个数据集上以比现有技术更快的速度实现更好的准确性。在实时设置中，ESeg-Lite-S 在 CityScapes [12] 上以 189 FPS 实现了 76.0% mIoU，优于 FasterSeg [9]（在 170 FPS 下为 73.1% mIoU）。我们的 ESeg-Lite-L 运行速度为 79 FPS，达到 80.1% mIoU，很大程度上缩小了实时和高性能分割模型之间的差距。 本文提出了一种无需高分辨率和空洞卷积的语义分割模型ESeg，通过多尺度特征融合实现高效准确的分割。 Tianjian Meng,Golnaz Ghiasi,Reza Mahjourian,Quoc V. Le,Mingxing Tan cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Siow Meng Low,Akshat Kumar,Scott Sanner
title: Sample-efficient Iterative Lower Bound Optimization of Deep Reactive Policies for Planning in Continuous MDPs
title_zh: 用于连续 MDP 规划的深度反应策略的样本效率迭代下界优化
abstract: Recent advances in deep learning have enabled optimization of deep reactive policies (DRPs) for continuous MDP planning by encoding a parametric policy as a deep neural network and exploiting automatic differentiation in an end-to-end model-based gradient descent framework. This approach has proven effective for optimizing DRPs in nonlinear continuous MDPs, but it requires a large number of sampled trajectories to learn effectively and can suffer from high variance in solution quality. In this work, we revisit the overall model-based DRP objective and instead take a minorization-maximization perspective to iteratively optimize the DRP w.r.t. a locally tight lower-bounded objective. This novel formulation of DRP learning as iterative lower bound optimization (ILBO) is particularly appealing because (i) each step is structurally easier to optimize than the overall objective, (ii) it guarantees a monotonically improving objective under certain theoretical conditions, and (iii) it reuses samples between iterations thus lowering sample complexity. Empirical evaluation confirms that ILBO is significantly more sample-efficient than the state-of-the-art DRP planner and consistently produces better solution quality with lower variance. We additionally demonstrate that ILBO generalizes well to new problem instances (i.e., different initial states) without requiring retraining.
summary: Recent advances in deep learning have enabled optimization of deep reactive policies (DRPs) for continuous MDP planning by encoding a parametric policy as a deep neural network and exploiting automatic differentiation in an end-to-end model-based gradient descent framework. This approach has proven effective for optimizing DRPs in nonlinear continuous MDPs, but it requires a large number of sampled trajectories to learn effectively and can suffer from high variance in solution quality. In this work, we revisit the overall model-based DRP objective and instead take a minorization-maximization perspective to iteratively optimize the DRP w.r.t. a locally tight lower-bounded objective. This novel formulation of DRP learning as iterative lower bound optimization (ILBO) is particularly appealing because (i) each step is structurally easier to optimize than the overall objective, (ii) it guarantees a monotonically improving objective under certain theoretical conditions, and (iii) it reuses samples between iterations thus lowering sample complexity. Empirical evaluation confirms that ILBO is significantly more sample-efficient than the state-of-the-art DRP planner and consistently produces better solution quality with lower variance. We additionally demonstrate that ILBO generalizes well to new problem instances (i.e., different initial states) without requiring retraining.
abstract_zh: 深度学习的最新进展通过将参数策略编码为深度神经网络并在基于端到端模型的梯度下降框架中利用自动微分，实现了连续 MDP 规划的深度反应策略 (DRP) 的优化。事实证明，这种方法对于优化非线性连续 MDP 中的 DRP 是有效的，但它需要大量采样轨迹才能有效学习，并且可能会受到解决方案质量差异较大的影响。在这项工作中，我们重新审视基于模型的整体 DRP 目标，并采取少数化最大化的视角来迭代优化 DRP。局部紧的下限目标。 DRP 学习的这种新颖的迭代下界优化（ILBO）公式特别有吸引力，因为（i）每个步骤在结构上比总体目标更容易优化，（ii）它保证在某些理论条件下单调改进目标，以及（iii）它在迭代之间重用样本，从而降低样本复杂性。实证评估证实，ILB​​O 的样本效率明显高于最先进的 DRP 规划器，并且始终能够以更低的方差产生更好的解决方案质量。我们还证明 ILBO 可以很好地推广到新的问题实例（即不同的初始状态），而无需重新训练。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ILBO的迭代下界优化方法，用于提高连续马尔可夫决策过程（MDPs）中深度反应策略（DRPs）的样本效率和解决方案质量。
AI.motivation: 现有基于深度学习的DRP优化方法在连续MDPs中需要大量样本轨迹进行学习，且解决方案质量波动较大，存在样本复杂度高和方差大的问题。
AI.method: 通过将DRP学习重构为迭代下界优化（ILBO），利用次梯度最大化框架，每一步优化局部紧下界目标函数，实现样本复用和单调改进。
AI.result: 实验表明，ILBO相比现有最先进方法显著提升样本效率，解决方案质量更优且方差更低，同时能泛化到新问题实例而无需重新训练。
AI.conclusion: ILBO通过迭代下界优化有效解决了DRP在连续MDPs中的样本效率和稳定性问题，为模型预测控制提供了更高效的优化框架。

authors_text: Kyle Hsu,Moo Jin Kim,Rafael Rafailov,Jiajun Wu,Chelsea Finn
title: Vision-Based Manipulators Need to Also See from Their Hands
title_zh: 基于视觉的机械手也需要从他们的手中看到
comment: First two authors contributed equally. ICLR 2022 (oral) camera-ready. 30 pages, 20 figures. Project website: https://sites.google.com/view/seeing-from-hands
comments: First two authors contributed equally. ICLR 2022 (oral) camera-ready. 30 pages, 20 figures. Project website: https://sites.google.com/view/seeing-from-hands
abstract: We study how the choice of visual perspective affects learning and generalization in the context of physical manipulation from raw sensor observations. Compared with the more commonly used global third-person perspective, a hand-centric (eye-in-hand) perspective affords reduced observability, but we find that it consistently improves training efficiency and out-of-distribution generalization. These benefits hold across a variety of learning algorithms, experimental settings, and distribution shifts, and for both simulated and real robot apparatuses. However, this is only the case when hand-centric observability is sufficient; otherwise, including a third-person perspective is necessary for learning, but also harms out-of-distribution generalization. To mitigate this, we propose to regularize the third-person information stream via a variational information bottleneck. On six representative manipulation tasks with varying hand-centric observability adapted from the Meta-World benchmark, this results in a state-of-the-art reinforcement learning agent operating from both perspectives improving its out-of-distribution generalization on every task. While some practitioners have long put cameras in the hands of robots, our work systematically analyzes the benefits of doing so and provides simple and broadly applicable insights for improving end-to-end learned vision-based robotic manipulation.
summary: We study how the choice of visual perspective affects learning and generalization in the context of physical manipulation from raw sensor observations. Compared with the more commonly used global third-person perspective, a hand-centric (eye-in-hand) perspective affords reduced observability, but we find that it consistently improves training efficiency and out-of-distribution generalization. These benefits hold across a variety of learning algorithms, experimental settings, and distribution shifts, and for both simulated and real robot apparatuses. However, this is only the case when hand-centric observability is sufficient; otherwise, including a third-person perspective is necessary for learning, but also harms out-of-distribution generalization. To mitigate this, we propose to regularize the third-person information stream via a variational information bottleneck. On six representative manipulation tasks with varying hand-centric observability adapted from the Meta-World benchmark, this results in a state-of-the-art reinforcement learning agent operating from both perspectives improving its out-of-distribution generalization on every task. While some practitioners have long put cameras in the hands of robots, our work systematically analyzes the benefits of doing so and provides simple and broadly applicable insights for improving end-to-end learned vision-based robotic manipulation.
abstract_zh: 我们研究视觉视角的选择如何影响原始传感器观察的物理操作背景下的学习和概括。与更常用的全局第三人称视角相比，以手为中心（手眼）的视角降低了可观察性，但我们发现它持续提高了训练效率和分布外泛化能力。这些好处适用于各种学习算法、实验设置和分布变化，以及模拟和真实的机器人设备。然而，这只是当以手为中心的可观察性足够时的情况；否则，包括第三人称视角对于学习是必要的，但也会损害分布外泛化。为了缓解这种情况，我们建议通过变分信息瓶颈规范第三人称信息流。在六个具有不同的以手为中心的可观察性的代表性操作任务中，这些任务改编自元世界基准，这导致了最先进的强化学习代理从两个角度操作，提高了其对每项任务的分布外泛化。虽然一些从业者长期以来一直将相机放在机器人手中，但我们的工作系统地分析了这样做的好处，并为改进基于端到端学习视觉的机器人操作提供了简单且广泛适用的见解。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了视觉视角对机械臂操作学习和泛化能力的影响，提出手部视角（eye-in-hand）优于传统第三人称视角，并通过信息瓶颈方法优化多视角融合。
AI.motivation: 传统第三人称视角虽常用，但手部视角可能因信息更聚焦而提升学习效率。作者旨在系统验证该假设并解决视角不足时的泛化问题。
AI.method: 对比实验验证不同视角对多种算法和任务的影响，提出通过变分信息瓶颈正则化第三人称视角信息流，结合多视角优势。
AI.result: 在六个任务中，手部视角显著提升训练效率和分布外泛化能力，融合方法在所有任务中均达到最优表现。
AI.conclusion: 手部视角是提升视觉机械臂性能的关键，信息瓶颈方法可有效平衡多视角信息，为端到端学习提供实用指导。

While some practitioners have long put cameras in the hands of robots, our work systematically analyzes the benefits of doing so and provides simple and broadly applicable insights for improving end-to-end learned vision-based robotic manipulation. 我们研究视觉视角的选择如何影响原始传感器观察的物理操作背景下的学习和概括。与更常用的全局第三人称视角相比，以手为中心（手眼）的视角降低了可观察性，但我们发现它持续提高了训练效率和分布外泛化能力。这些好处适用于各种学习算法、实验设置和分布变化，以及模拟和真实的机器人设备。然而，这只是当以手为中心的可观察性足够时的情况；否则，包括第三人称视角对于学习是必要的，但也会损害分布外泛化。为了缓解这种情况，我们建议通过变分信息瓶颈规范第三人称信息流。在六个具有不同的以手为中心的可观察性的代表性操作任务中，这些任务改编自元世界基准，这导致了最先进的强化学习代理从两个角度操作，提高了其对每项任务的分布外泛化。虽然一些从业者长期以来一直将相机放在机器人手中，但我们的工作系统地分析了这样做的好处，并为改进基于端到端学习视觉的机器人操作提供了简单且广泛适用的见解。 本文研究了视觉视角对机械臂操作学习和泛化能力的影响，提出手部视角（eye-in-hand）优于传统第三人称视角，并通过信息瓶颈方法优化多视角融合。 Kyle Hsu,Moo Jin Kim,Rafael Rafailov,Jiajun Wu,Chelsea Finn cs.RO,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Xiaoyu He,Zibin Zheng,Yuren Zhou
title: MMES: Mixture Model based Evolution Strategy for Large-Scale Optimization
title_zh: MMES：基于混合模型的大规模优化进化策略
abstract: This work provides an efficient sampling method for the covariance matrix adaptation evolution strategy (CMA-ES) in large-scale settings. In contract to the Gaussian sampling in CMA-ES, the proposed method generates mutation vectors from a mixture model, which facilitates exploiting the rich variable correlations of the problem landscape within a limited time budget. We analyze the probability distribution of this mixture model and show that it approximates the Gaussian distribution of CMA-ES with a controllable accuracy. We use this sampling method, coupled with a novel method for mutation strength adaptation, to formulate the mixture model based evolution strategy (MMES) -- a CMA-ES variant for large-scale optimization. The numerical simulations show that, while significantly reducing the time complexity of CMA-ES, MMES preserves the rotational invariance, is scalable to high dimensional problems, and is competitive against the state-of-the-arts in performing global optimization.
summary: This work provides an efficient sampling method for the covariance matrix adaptation evolution strategy (CMA-ES) in large-scale settings. In contract to the Gaussian sampling in CMA-ES, the proposed method generates mutation vectors from a mixture model, which facilitates exploiting the rich variable correlations of the problem landscape within a limited time budget. We analyze the probability distribution of this mixture model and show that it approximates the Gaussian distribution of CMA-ES with a controllable accuracy. We use this sampling method, coupled with a novel method for mutation strength adaptation, to formulate the mixture model based evolution strategy (MMES) -- a CMA-ES variant for large-scale optimization. The numerical simulations show that, while significantly reducing the time complexity of CMA-ES, MMES preserves the rotational invariance, is scalable to high dimensional problems, and is competitive against the state-of-the-arts in performing global optimization.
abstract_zh: 这项工作为大规模设置中的协方差矩阵适应进化策略（CMA-ES）提供了一种有效的采样方法。与 CMA-ES 中的高斯采样相反，所提出的方法从混合模型生成突变向量，这有助于在有限的时间预算内利用问题景观的丰富变量相关性。我们分析了该混合模型的概率分布，表明它以可控的精度逼近 CMA-ES 的高斯分布。我们使用这种采样方法，结合突变强度适应的新方法，制定基于混合模型的进化策略（MMES）——一种用于大规模优化的 CMA-ES 变体。数值模拟表明，在显着降低 CMA-ES 时间复杂度的同时，MMES 保留了旋转不变性，可扩展到高维问题，并且在执行全局优化方面与最先进的技术具有竞争力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于混合模型的进化策略MMES，用于解决大规模优化问题，通过改进CMA-ES的采样方法提升效率。
AI.motivation: 传统CMA-ES在大规模优化中存在计算复杂度高、难以有效利用变量相关性的问题，需更高效的采样方法。
AI.method: 采用混合模型生成突变向量替代高斯采样，结合新型突变强度自适应机制，构建MMES算法。
AI.result: MMES显著降低时间复杂度，保持旋转不变性，适用于高维问题，且在全局优化性能上与现有方法竞争。
AI.conclusion: MMES有效平衡了大规模优化中的计算效率与求解精度，为高维问题提供可行的进化策略方案。

authors_text: Yibo Guo,Lishuo Hou,Mingxin Li,Yue Yuan,Shun Liu,Jingyi Xue,Yafang Han,Mingliang Xu
title: Decision-making of Emergent Incident based on P-MADDPG
title_zh: 基于P-MADDPG的突发事件决策
abstract: In recent years, human casualties and damage to resources caused by emergent incidents have become a serious problem worldwide. In this paper, we model the emergency decision-making problem and use Multi-agent System (MAS) to solve the problem that the decision speed cannot keep up with the spreading speed. MAS can play an important role in the automated execution of these tasks to reduce mission completion time. In this paper, we propose a P-MADDPG algorithm to solve the emergency decision-making problem of emergent incidents, which predicts the nodes where an incident may occur in the next time by GRU model and makes decisions before the incident occurs, thus solving the problem that the decision speed cannot keep up with the spreading speed. A simulation environment was established for realistic scenarios, and three scenarios were selected to test the performance of P-MADDPG in emergency decision-making problems for emergent incidents: unmanned storage, factory assembly line, and civil airport baggage transportation. Simulation results using the P-MADDPG algorithm are compared with the greedy algorithm and the MADDPG algorithm, and the final experimental results show that the P-MADDPG algorithm converges faster and better than the other algorithms in scenarios of different sizes. This shows that the P-MADDP algorithm is effective for emergency decision-making in emergent incident.
summary: In recent years, human casualties and damage to resources caused by emergent incidents have become a serious problem worldwide. In this paper, we model the emergency decision-making problem and use Multi-agent System (MAS) to solve the problem that the decision speed cannot keep up with the spreading speed. MAS can play an important role in the automated execution of these tasks to reduce mission completion time. In this paper, we propose a P-MADDPG algorithm to solve the emergency decision-making problem of emergent incidents, which predicts the nodes where an incident may occur in the next time by GRU model and makes decisions before the incident occurs, thus solving the problem that the decision speed cannot keep up with the spreading speed. A simulation environment was established for realistic scenarios, and three scenarios were selected to test the performance of P-MADDPG in emergency decision-making problems for emergent incidents: unmanned storage, factory assembly line, and civil airport baggage transportation. Simulation results using the P-MADDPG algorithm are compared with the greedy algorithm and the MADDPG algorithm, and the final experimental results show that the P-MADDPG algorithm converges faster and better than the other algorithms in scenarios of different sizes. This shows that the P-MADDP algorithm is effective for emergency decision-making in emergent incident.
abstract_zh: 近年来，突发事件造成的人员伤亡和资源破坏已成为全球性的严重问题。本文对应急决策问题进行建模，利用多智能体系统（MAS）来解决决策速度跟不上传播速度的问题。 MAS 可以在这些任务的自动执行中发挥重要作用，以减少任务完成时间。本文提出一种P-MADDPG算法来解决突发事件的应急决策问题，通过GRU模型预测下次可能发生事件的节点，并在事件发生之前做出决策，从而解决决策速度跟不上传播速度的问题。针对现实场景建立了模拟环境，选取无人仓储、工厂流水线、民用机场行李运输3个场景来测试P-MADDPG在突发事件应急决策问题上的性能。将P-MADDPG算法的仿真结果与贪心算法和MADDPG算法进行比较，最终的实验结果表明，在不同规模的场景下，P-MADDPG算法比其他算法收敛得更快、更好。这表明P-MADDP算法对于突发事件的应急决策是有效的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于P-MADDPG算法的应急事件决策方法，通过预测事件节点并提前决策以提高响应速度。
AI.motivation: 应急事件导致的人身伤亡和资源损失日益严重，传统决策速度难以匹配事件扩散速度，需自动化解决方案缩短任务完成时间。
AI.method: 结合多智能体系统（MAS）与GRU模型，设计P-MADDPG算法预测潜在事件节点并提前决策，通过仿真环境测试无人仓储、工厂流水线和机场行李运输三种场景。
AI.result: 实验表明，P-MADDPG算法在不同规模场景中收敛速度优于贪婪算法和MADDPG算法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: P-MADDPG算法能有效提升应急事件决策效率，为突发事件的快速响应提供可行方案。

authors_text: Aastha Acharya,Rebecca Russell,Nisar R. Ahmed
title: Competency Assessment for Autonomous Agents using Deep Generative Models
title_zh: 使用深度生成模型对自主代理进行能力评估
abstract: For autonomous agents to act as trustworthy partners to human users, they must be able to reliably communicate their competency for the tasks they are asked to perform. Towards this objective, we develop probabilistic world models based on deep generative modelling that allow for the simulation of agent trajectories and accurate calculation of tasking outcome probabilities. By combining the strengths of conditional variational autoencoders with recurrent neural networks, the deep generative world model can probabilistically forecast trajectories over long horizons to task completion. We show how these forecasted trajectories can be used to calculate outcome probability distributions, which enable the precise assessment of agent competency for specific tasks and initial settings.
summary: For autonomous agents to act as trustworthy partners to human users, they must be able to reliably communicate their competency for the tasks they are asked to perform. Towards this objective, we develop probabilistic world models based on deep generative modelling that allow for the simulation of agent trajectories and accurate calculation of tasking outcome probabilities. By combining the strengths of conditional variational autoencoders with recurrent neural networks, the deep generative world model can probabilistically forecast trajectories over long horizons to task completion. We show how these forecasted trajectories can be used to calculate outcome probability distributions, which enable the precise assessment of agent competency for specific tasks and initial settings.
abstract_zh: 为了让自主代理成为人类用户值得信赖的合作伙伴，他们必须能够可靠地传达他们执行任务的能力。为了实现这一目标，我们开发了基于深度生成模型的概率世界模型，可以模拟代理轨迹并准确计算任务结果概率。通过将条件变分自动编码器与循环神经网络的优势相结合，深度生成世界模型可以概率性地预测长期任务完成的轨迹。我们展示了如何使用这些预测轨迹来计算结果概率分布，从而能够精确评估代理针对特定任务和初始设置的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于深度生成模型的概率世界模型，用于评估自主代理在特定任务中的能力，通过模拟轨迹和计算任务结果概率实现可靠通信。
AI.motivation: 自主代理需作为人类可信伙伴，必须可靠沟通其任务执行能力，现有方法难以准确评估长期任务结果的概率。
AI.method: 结合条件变分自编码器与循环神经网络，构建深度生成世界模型，实现长期轨迹的概率预测及任务结果概率分布计算。
AI.result: 展示了如何利用预测轨迹计算结果概率分布，从而精确评估代理在特定任务和初始条件下的能力水平。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为自主代理能力评估提供了有效框架，支持其与人类用户进行可信的任务协作与沟通。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出基于深度生成模型的概率世界模型，用于评估自主代理在特定任务中的能力，通过模拟轨迹和计算任务结果概率实现可靠通信。
ai_content.motivation: 自主代理需作为人类可信伙伴，必须可靠沟通其任务执行能力，现有方法难以准确评估长期任务结果的概率。
ai_content.method: 结合条件变分自编码器与循环神经网络，构建深度生成世界模型，实现长期轨迹的概率预测及任务结果概率分布计算。
ai_content.result: 展示了如何利用预测轨迹计算结果概率分布，从而精确评估代理在特定任务和初始条件下的能力水平。
ai_content.conclusion: 该方法为自主代理能力评估提供了有效框架，支持其与人类用户进行可信的任务协作与沟通。

search_text: Competency Assessment for Autonomous Agents using Deep Generative Models 使用深度生成模型对自主代理进行能力评估 For autonomous agents to act as trustworthy partners to human users, they must be able to reliably communicate their competency for the tasks they are asked to perform. Towards this objective, we develop probabilistic world models based on deep generative modelling that allow for the simulation of agent trajectories and accurate calculation of tasking outcome probabilities. By combining the strengths of conditional variational autoencoders with recurrent neural networks, the deep generative world model can probabilistically forecast trajectories over long horizons to task completion. We show how these forecasted trajectories can be used to calculate outcome probability distributions, which enable the precise assessment of agent competency for specific tasks and initial settings. 为了让自主代理成为人类用户值得信赖的合作伙伴，他们必须能够可靠地传达他们执行任务的能力。为了实现这一目标，我们开发了基于深度生成模型的概率世界模型，可以模拟代理轨迹并准确计算任务结果概率。通过将条件变分自动编码器与循环神经网络的优势相结合，深度生成世界模型可以概率性地预测长期任务完成的轨迹。我们展示了如何使用这些预测轨迹来计算结果概率分布，从而能够精确评估代理针对特定任务和初始设置的能力。 本文提出基于深度生成模型的概率世界模型，用于评估自主代理在特定任务中的能力，通过模拟轨迹和计算任务结果概率实现可靠通信。 Aastha Acharya,Rebecca Russell,Nisar R. Ahmed cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.HC,cs.NE,cs.RO

authors_text: Jing Gu,Eliana Stefani,Qi Wu,Jesse Thomason,Xin Eric Wang
title: Vision-and-Language Navigation: A Survey of Tasks, Methods, and Future Directions
title_zh: 视觉和语言导航：任务、方法和未来方向的调查
abstract: A long-term goal of AI research is to build intelligent agents that can communicate with humans in natural language, perceive the environment, and perform real-world tasks. Vision-and-Language Navigation (VLN) is a fundamental and interdisciplinary research topic towards this goal, and receives increasing attention from natural language processing, computer vision, robotics, and machine learning communities. In this paper, we review contemporary studies in the emerging field of VLN, covering tasks, evaluation metrics, methods, etc. Through structured analysis of current progress and challenges, we highlight the limitations of current VLN and opportunities for future work. This paper serves as a thorough reference for the VLN research community.
summary: A long-term goal of AI research is to build intelligent agents that can communicate with humans in natural language, perceive the environment, and perform real-world tasks. Vision-and-Language Navigation (VLN) is a fundamental and interdisciplinary research topic towards this goal, and receives increasing attention from natural language processing, computer vision, robotics, and machine learning communities. In this paper, we review contemporary studies in the emerging field of VLN, covering tasks, evaluation metrics, methods, etc. Through structured analysis of current progress and challenges, we highlight the limitations of current VLN and opportunities for future work. This paper serves as a thorough reference for the VLN research community.
abstract_zh: 人工智能研究的长期目标是构建能够用自然语言与人类交流、感知环境并执行现实世界任务的智能代理。视觉和语言导航（VLN）是实现这一目标的基础性跨学科研究课题，并受到自然语言处理、计算机视觉、机器人和机器学习社区越来越多的关注。在本文中，我们回顾了 VLN 新兴领域的当代研究，涵盖任务、评估指标、方法等。通过对当前进展和挑战的结构化分析，我们强调了当前 VLN 的局限性和未来工作的机会。本文可作为 VLN 研究界的全面参考。

AI.tldr: 本文系统回顾了视觉与语言导航（VLN）领域的任务、方法及未来研究方向，分析其现状与挑战。
AI.motivation: 推动智能体在自然语言交互、环境感知与现实任务执行方面的研究，促进跨学科技术融合。
AI.method: 通过文献综述与结构化分析，梳理VLN任务分类、评估指标及现有技术方法，总结局限性与改进空间。
AI.result: 明确了VLN的核心任务与技术框架，指出当前方法在环境理解、指令遵循及泛化能力上的不足，并提出未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 为VLN研究提供了全面参考，强调需加强多模态学习、真实场景测试及跨领域协作以推动技术突破。

authors_text: Matthias Miller,Julius Rauscher,Daniel A. Keim,Mennatallah El-Assady
title: CorpusVis: Visual Analysis of Digital Sheet Music Collections
title_zh: CorpusVis：数字乐谱收藏的可视化分析
comment: 12 pages, 9 figures, Computer Graphics Forum 2022, EuroVis Conference (Full Papers)
comments: 12 pages, 9 figures, Computer Graphics Forum 2022, EuroVis Conference (Full Papers)
abstract: Manually investigating sheet music collections is challenging for music analysts due to the magnitude and complexity of underlying features, structures, and contextual information. However, applying sophisticated algorithmic methods would require advanced technical expertise that analysts do not necessarily have. Bridging this gap, we contribute CorpusVis, an interactive visual workspace, enabling scalable and multi-faceted analysis. Our proposed visual analytics dashboard provides access to computational methods, generating varying perspectives on the same data. The proposed application uses metadata including composers, type, epoch, and low-level features, such as pitch, melody, and rhythm. To evaluate our approach, we conducted a pair analytics study with nine participants. The qualitative results show that CorpusVis supports users in performing exploratory and confirmatory analysis, leading them to new insights and findings. In addition, based on three exemplary workflows, we demonstrate how to apply our approach to different tasks, such as exploring musical features or comparing composers.
summary: Manually investigating sheet music collections is challenging for music analysts due to the magnitude and complexity of underlying features, structures, and contextual information. However, applying sophisticated algorithmic methods would require advanced technical expertise that analysts do not necessarily have. Bridging this gap, we contribute CorpusVis, an interactive visual workspace, enabling scalable and multi-faceted analysis. Our proposed visual analytics dashboard provides access to computational methods, generating varying perspectives on the same data. The proposed application uses metadata including composers, type, epoch, and low-level features, such as pitch, melody, and rhythm. To evaluate our approach, we conducted a pair analytics study with nine participants. The qualitative results show that CorpusVis supports users in performing exploratory and confirmatory analysis, leading them to new insights and findings. In addition, based on three exemplary workflows, we demonstrate how to apply our approach to different tasks, such as exploring musical features or comparing composers.
abstract_zh: 由于潜在特征、结构和上下文信息的规模和复杂性，手动调查乐谱收藏对于音乐分析师来说是一项挑战。然而，应用复杂的算法方法需要分析师不一定具备的先进技术专业知识。为了弥补这一差距，我们贡献了 CorpusVis，这是一个交互式可视化工作区，可实现可扩展和多方面的分析。我们提出的可视化分析仪表板提供了对计算方法的访问，对相同数据生成不同的观点。所提出的应用程序使用元数据，包括作曲家、类型、时代和低级特征，例如音高、旋律和节奏。为了评估我们的方法，我们对九名参与者进行了配对分析研究。定性结果表明，CorpusVis 支持用户进行探索性和验证性分析，引导他们获得新的见解和发现。此外，基于三个示例性工作流程，我们演示了如何将我们的方法应用于不同的任务，例如探索音乐特征或比较作曲家。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CorpusVis，一种用于数字乐谱集合的可视化分析工具，帮助音乐分析师无需复杂算法即可进行多维度分析。
AI.motivation: 手动分析乐谱集合因数据规模和复杂性困难，而现有算法方法需要专业技能，分析师难以掌握。
AI.method: 开发交互式可视化仪表盘，整合元数据（作曲家、类型、时期）和低级特征（音高、旋律、节奏），通过用户研究验证有效性并展示三种典型工作流程。
AI.result: 用户研究显示CorpusVis支持探索性与验证性分析，帮助用户发现新见解，并通过三种任务流程证明其适用性。
AI.conclusion: CorpusVis通过可视化分析有效降低了乐谱数据研究的技术门槛，为音乐学者提供了可扩展的分析工具。

authors_text: James B. Aimone,Aaron J. Hill,William M. Severa,Craig M. Vineyard
title: Spiking Neural Streaming Binary Arithmetic
title_zh: 尖峰神经流二进制算法
comment: Accepted and presented at the 2021 International Conference on Rebooting Computing (ICRC)
comments: Accepted and presented at the 2021 International Conference on Rebooting Computing (ICRC)
abstract: Boolean functions and binary arithmetic operations are central to standard computing paradigms. Accordingly, many advances in computing have focused upon how to make these operations more efficient as well as exploring what they can compute. To best leverage the advantages of novel computing paradigms it is important to consider what unique computing approaches they offer. However, for any special-purpose co-processor, Boolean functions and binary arithmetic operations are useful for, among other things, avoiding unnecessary I/O on-and-off the co-processor by pre- and post-processing data on-device. This is especially true for spiking neuromorphic architectures where these basic operations are not fundamental low-level operations. Instead, these functions require specific implementation. Here we discuss the implications of an advantageous streaming binary encoding method as well as a handful of circuits designed to exactly compute elementary Boolean and binary operations.
summary: Boolean functions and binary arithmetic operations are central to standard computing paradigms. Accordingly, many advances in computing have focused upon how to make these operations more efficient as well as exploring what they can compute. To best leverage the advantages of novel computing paradigms it is important to consider what unique computing approaches they offer. However, for any special-purpose co-processor, Boolean functions and binary arithmetic operations are useful for, among other things, avoiding unnecessary I/O on-and-off the co-processor by pre- and post-processing data on-device. This is especially true for spiking neuromorphic architectures where these basic operations are not fundamental low-level operations. Instead, these functions require specific implementation. Here we discuss the implications of an advantageous streaming binary encoding method as well as a handful of circuits designed to exactly compute elementary Boolean and binary operations.
abstract_zh: 布尔函数和二进制算术运算是标准计算范例的核心。因此，计算领域的许多进步都集中在如何使这些操作更加高效以及探索它们可以计算什么。为了最好地利用新颖计算范式的优势，重要的是要考虑它们提供的独特计算方法。然而，对于任何专用协处理器，布尔函数和二进制算术运算对于通过在设备上预处理和后处理数据来避免不必要的 I/O 打开和关闭协处理器非常有用。对于尖峰神经形态架构尤其如此，其中这些基本操作不是基本的低级操作。相反，这些功能需要具体的实现。在这里，我们讨论了一种有利的流式二进制编码方法以及一些设计用于精确计算基本布尔和二进制运算的电路的含义。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在脉冲神经形态架构中实现布尔函数和二进制运算的流式二进制编码方法及电路设计。
AI.motivation: 在脉冲神经形态架构中，布尔函数和二进制运算并非基础操作，需通过特定实现以减少协处理器的I/O开销并提升效率。
AI.method: 提出一种流式二进制编码方法，并设计专用电路精确计算基本布尔和二进制运算。
AI.result: 验证了所提方法在脉冲神经形态架构中实现基础运算的有效性，为减少数据传输和提升计算效率提供了可行方案。
AI.conclusion: 流式编码与定制电路设计可有效支持脉冲神经形态计算中的基础运算需求，为新型计算范式奠定基础。

search_text: Spiking Neural Streaming Binary Arithmetic 尖峰神经流二进制算法 Boolean functions and binary arithmetic operations are central to standard computing paradigms. Accordingly, many advances in computing have focused upon how to make these operations more efficient as well as exploring what they can compute. To best leverage the advantages of novel computing paradigms it is important to consider what unique computing approaches they offer. However, for any special-purpose co-processor, Boolean functions and binary arithmetic operations are useful for, among other things, avoiding unnecessary I/O on-and-off the co-processor by pre- and post-processing data on-device. This is especially true for spiking neuromorphic architectures where these basic operations are not fundamental low-level operations. Instead, these functions require specific implementation. Here we discuss the implications of an advantageous streaming binary encoding method as well as a handful of circuits designed to exactly compute elementary Boolean and binary operations. 布尔函数和二进制算术运算是标准计算范例的核心。因此，计算领域的许多进步都集中在如何使这些操作更加高效以及探索它们可以计算什么。为了最好地利用新颖计算范式的优势，重要的是要考虑它们提供的独特计算方法。然而，对于任何专用协处理器，布尔函数和二进制算术运算对于通过在设备上预处理和后处理数据来避免不必要的 I/O 打开和关闭协处理器非常有用。对于尖峰神经形态架构尤其如此，其中这些基本操作不是基本的低级操作。相反，这些功能需要具体的实现。在这里，我们讨论了一种有利的流式二进制编码方法以及一些设计用于精确计算基本布尔和二进制运算的电路的含义。 本文探讨了在脉冲神经形态架构中实现布尔函数和二进制运算的流式二进制编码方法及电路设计。 James B. Aimone,Aaron J. Hill,William M. Severa,Craig M. Vineyard cs.NE,cs.DC

authors_text: Martin Zach,Erich Kobler,Thomas Pock
title: Computed Tomography Reconstruction using Generative Energy-Based Priors
title_zh: 使用基于生成能量的先验进行计算机断层扫描重建
abstract: In the past decades, Computed Tomography (CT) has established itself as one of the most important imaging techniques in medicine. Today, the applicability of CT is only limited by the deposited radiation dose, reduction of which manifests in noisy or incomplete measurements. Thus, the need for robust reconstruction algorithms arises. In this work, we learn a parametric regularizer with a global receptive field by maximizing it's likelihood on reference CT data. Due to this unsupervised learning strategy, our trained regularizer truly represents higher-level domain statistics, which we empirically demonstrate by synthesizing CT images. Moreover, this regularizer can easily be applied to different CT reconstruction problems by embedding it in a variational framework, which increases flexibility and interpretability compared to feed-forward learning-based approaches. In addition, the accompanying probabilistic perspective enables experts to explore the full posterior distribution and may quantify uncertainty of the reconstruction approach. We apply the regularizer to limited-angle and few-view CT reconstruction problems, where it outperforms traditional reconstruction algorithms by a large margin.
summary: In the past decades, Computed Tomography (CT) has established itself as one of the most important imaging techniques in medicine. Today, the applicability of CT is only limited by the deposited radiation dose, reduction of which manifests in noisy or incomplete measurements. Thus, the need for robust reconstruction algorithms arises. In this work, we learn a parametric regularizer with a global receptive field by maximizing it's likelihood on reference CT data. Due to this unsupervised learning strategy, our trained regularizer truly represents higher-level domain statistics, which we empirically demonstrate by synthesizing CT images. Moreover, this regularizer can easily be applied to different CT reconstruction problems by embedding it in a variational framework, which increases flexibility and interpretability compared to feed-forward learning-based approaches. In addition, the accompanying probabilistic perspective enables experts to explore the full posterior distribution and may quantify uncertainty of the reconstruction approach. We apply the regularizer to limited-angle and few-view CT reconstruction problems, where it outperforms traditional reconstruction algorithms by a large margin.
abstract_zh: 在过去的几十年里，计算机断层扫描 (CT) 已成为医学中最重要的成像技术之一。如今，CT 的适用性仅受到沉积辐射剂量的限制，辐射剂量的减少表现为噪声或不完整的测量。因此，需要鲁棒的重建算法。在这项工作中，我们通过最大化参考 CT 数据上的可能性来学习具有全局感受野的参数正则化器。由于这种无监督学习策略，我们训练有素的正则化器真正代表了更高级别的领域统计数据，我们通过合成 CT 图像凭经验证明了这一点。此外，通过将这种正则化器嵌入到变分框架中，可以轻松地将其应用于不同的 CT 重建问题，与基于前馈学习的方法相比，这提高了灵活性和可解释性。此外，伴随的概率视角使专家能够探索完整的后验分布，并可以量化重建方法的不确定性。我们将正则化器应用于有限角度和少视图 CT 重建问题，其性能大大优于传统的重建算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于生成能量先验的CT重建方法，通过无监督学习训练正则化器以解决低剂量或不完整测量下的图像重建问题。
AI.motivation: CT成像受辐射剂量限制，低剂量会导致测量噪声或不完整，需开发稳健的重建算法以提升图像质量。
AI.method: 通过最大化参考CT数据的似然训练参数化正则化器，嵌入变分框架实现灵活应用，并利用概率视角量化重建不确定性。
AI.result: 该方法在有限角度和少量视角的CT重建任务中显著优于传统算法。
AI.conclusion: 能量先验方法提升了CT重建的灵活性和准确性，适用于不同场景并支持不确定性量化。

authors_text: Bing Li,Cheng Zheng,Guohao Li,Bernard Ghanem
title: Learning Scene Flow in 3D Point Clouds with Noisy Pseudo Labels
title_zh: 使用嘈杂的伪标签学习 3D 点云中的场景流
abstract: We propose a novel scene flow method that captures 3D motions from point clouds without relying on ground-truth scene flow annotations. Due to the irregularity and sparsity of point clouds, it is expensive and time-consuming to acquire ground-truth scene flow annotations. Some state-of-the-art approaches train scene flow networks in a self-supervised learning manner via approximating pseudo scene flow labels from point clouds. However, these methods fail to achieve the performance level of fully supervised methods, due to the limitations of point cloud such as sparsity and lacking color information. To provide an alternative, we propose a novel approach that utilizes monocular RGB images and point clouds to generate pseudo scene flow labels for training scene flow networks. Our pseudo label generation module infers pseudo scene labels for point clouds by jointly leveraging rich appearance information in monocular images and geometric information of point clouds. To further reduce the negative effect of noisy pseudo labels on the training, we propose a noisy-label-aware training scheme by exploiting the geometric relations of points. Experiment results show that our method not only outperforms state-of-the-art self-supervised approaches, but also outperforms some supervised approaches that use accurate ground-truth flows.
summary: We propose a novel scene flow method that captures 3D motions from point clouds without relying on ground-truth scene flow annotations. Due to the irregularity and sparsity of point clouds, it is expensive and time-consuming to acquire ground-truth scene flow annotations. Some state-of-the-art approaches train scene flow networks in a self-supervised learning manner via approximating pseudo scene flow labels from point clouds. However, these methods fail to achieve the performance level of fully supervised methods, due to the limitations of point cloud such as sparsity and lacking color information. To provide an alternative, we propose a novel approach that utilizes monocular RGB images and point clouds to generate pseudo scene flow labels for training scene flow networks. Our pseudo label generation module infers pseudo scene labels for point clouds by jointly leveraging rich appearance information in monocular images and geometric information of point clouds. To further reduce the negative effect of noisy pseudo labels on the training, we propose a noisy-label-aware training scheme by exploiting the geometric relations of points. Experiment results show that our method not only outperforms state-of-the-art self-supervised approaches, but also outperforms some supervised approaches that use accurate ground-truth flows.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的场景流方法，可以从点云捕获 3D 运动，而不依赖于地面真实场景流注释。由于点云的不规则性和稀疏性，获取地面真实场景流注释既昂贵又耗时。一些最先进的方法通过近似来自点云的伪场景流标签以自监督学习的方式训练场景流网络。然而，由于点云的稀疏性和缺乏颜色信息等局限性，这些方法未能达到完全监督方法的性能水平。为了提供替代方案，我们提出了一种利用单目 RGB 图像和点云生成伪场景流标签来训练场景流网络的新颖方法。我们的伪标签生成模块通过联合利用单目图像中丰富的外观信息和点云的几何信息来推断点云的伪场景标签。为了进一步减少噪声伪标签对训练的负面影响，我们通过利用点的几何关系提出了一种噪声标签感知训练方案。实验结果表明，我们的方法不仅优于最先进的自监督方法，而且优于一些使用准确的地面实况流的监督方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需真实场景流标注、利用单目RGB图像与点云生成伪标签的3D点云场景流学习方法。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督方法因点云稀疏性和缺乏颜色信息导致伪标签质量不足，难以达到全监督方法性能。
AI.method: 结合单目RGB图像的外观信息与点云几何信息生成伪标签，并通过点间几何关系构建噪声标签感知训练框架。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法超越现有自监督方案，并优于部分依赖精确真实标注的监督方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过多模态信息融合与噪声鲁棒训练机制，为点云场景流学习提供了新思路。

Experiment results show that our method not only outperforms state-of-the-art self-supervised approaches, but also outperforms some supervised approaches that use accurate ground-truth flows. 我们提出了一种新颖的场景流方法，可以从点云捕获 3D 运动，而不依赖于地面真实场景流注释。由于点云的不规则性和稀疏性，获取地面真实场景流注释既昂贵又耗时。一些最先进的方法通过近似来自点云的伪场景流标签以自监督学习的方式训练场景流网络。然而，由于点云的稀疏性和缺乏颜色信息等局限性，这些方法未能达到完全监督方法的性能水平。为了提供替代方案，我们提出了一种利用单目 RGB 图像和点云生成伪场景流标签来训练场景流网络的新颖方法。我们的伪标签生成模块通过联合利用单目图像中丰富的外观信息和点云的几何信息来推断点云的伪场景标签。为了进一步减少噪声伪标签对训练的负面影响，我们通过利用点的几何关系提出了一种噪声标签感知训练方案。实验结果表明，我们的方法不仅优于最先进的自监督方法，而且优于一些使用准确的地面实况流的监督方法。 本文提出一种无需真实场景流标注、利用单目RGB图像与点云生成伪标签的3D点云场景流学习方法。 Bing Li,Cheng Zheng,Guohao Li,Bernard Ghanem cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Ajith Anil Meera,Filip Novicky,Thomas Parr,Karl Friston,Pablo Lanillos,Noor Sajid
title: Reclaiming saliency: rhythmic precision-modulated action and perception
title_zh: 恢复显着性：有节奏的精确调节的行动和感知
abstract: Computational models of visual attention in artificial intelligence and robotics have been inspired by the concept of a saliency map. These models account for the mutual information between the (current) visual information and its estimated causes. However, they fail to consider the circular causality between perception and action. In other words, they do not consider where to sample next, given current beliefs. Here, we reclaim salience as an active inference process that relies on two basic principles: uncertainty minimisation and rhythmic scheduling. For this, we make a distinction between attention and salience. Briefly, we associate attention with precision control, i.e., the confidence with which beliefs can be updated given sampled sensory data, and salience with uncertainty minimisation that underwrites the selection of future sensory data. Using this, we propose a new account of attention based on rhythmic precision-modulation and discuss its potential in robotics, providing numerical experiments that showcase advantages of precision-modulation for state and noise estimation, system identification and action selection for informative path planning.
summary: Computational models of visual attention in artificial intelligence and robotics have been inspired by the concept of a saliency map. These models account for the mutual information between the (current) visual information and its estimated causes. However, they fail to consider the circular causality between perception and action. In other words, they do not consider where to sample next, given current beliefs. Here, we reclaim salience as an active inference process that relies on two basic principles: uncertainty minimisation and rhythmic scheduling. For this, we make a distinction between attention and salience. Briefly, we associate attention with precision control, i.e., the confidence with which beliefs can be updated given sampled sensory data, and salience with uncertainty minimisation that underwrites the selection of future sensory data. Using this, we propose a new account of attention based on rhythmic precision-modulation and discuss its potential in robotics, providing numerical experiments that showcase advantages of precision-modulation for state and noise estimation, system identification and action selection for informative path planning.
abstract_zh: 人工智能和机器人技术中视觉注意力的计算模型受到显着图概念的启发。这些模型解释了（当前）视觉信息与其估计原因之间的互信息。然而，他们没有考虑感知和行动之间的循环因果关系。换句话说，根据当前的信念，他们不会考虑下一步在哪里采样。在这里，我们将显着性重新定义为一种主动推理过程，它依赖于两个基本原则：不确定性最小化和有节奏的调度。为此，我们区分了注意力和显着性。简而言之，我们将注意力与精确控制联系起来，即根据采样的感官数据更新信念的置信度，以及支持未来感官数据选择的不确定性最小化的显着性。利用这一点，我们提出了一种基于节奏精确调制的新注意力解释，并讨论了其在机器人技术中的潜力，提供了数值实验，展示了精确调制在状态和噪声估计、系统识别和信息路径规划的动作选择方面的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文重新定义显著性为一种主动推理过程，结合不确定性最小化和节奏调度，提出基于节奏精度调制的注意力新理论，并在机器人学中验证其效果。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉注意力模型未考虑感知与行动的循环因果关系，无法动态决定下一步采样位置，因此需引入主动推理框架以改进模型性能。
AI.method: 区分注意力（精度控制）与显著性（不确定性最小化），提出节奏精度调制方法，并通过数值实验验证其在机器人状态估计、系统识别及路径规划中的优势。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在噪声估计、系统识别和信息路径规划任务中表现优于传统模型，验证了节奏精度调制的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 将主动推理与节奏调度结合可有效提升机器人感知-行动系统的动态决策能力，为未来智能体设计提供新思路。

authors_text: Nicky Zimmerman,Louis Wiesmann,Tiziano Guadagnino,Thomas Läbe,Jens Behley,Cyrill Stachniss
title: Robust Onboard Localization in Changing Environments Exploiting Text Spotting
title_zh: 利用文本识别在不断变化的环境中实现强大的机载本地化
comment: This work has been accepted to IROS 2022
comments: This work has been accepted to IROS 2022
abstract: Robust localization in a given map is a crucial component of most autonomous robots. In this paper, we address the problem of localizing in an indoor environment that changes and where prominent structures have no correspondence in the map built at a different point in time. To overcome the discrepancy between the map and the observed environment caused by such changes, we exploit human-readable localization cues to assist localization. These cues are readily available in most facilities and can be detected using RGB camera images by utilizing text spotting. We integrate these cues into a Monte Carlo localization framework using a particle filter that operates on 2D LiDAR scans and camera data. By this, we provide a robust localization solution for environments with structural changes and dynamics by humans walking. We evaluate our localization framework on multiple challenging indoor scenarios in an office environment. The experiments suggest that our approach is robust to structural changes and can run on an onboard computer. We release an open source implementation of our approach (upon paper acceptance), which uses off-the-shelf text spotting, written in C++ with a ROS wrapper.
summary: Robust localization in a given map is a crucial component of most autonomous robots. In this paper, we address the problem of localizing in an indoor environment that changes and where prominent structures have no correspondence in the map built at a different point in time. To overcome the discrepancy between the map and the observed environment caused by such changes, we exploit human-readable localization cues to assist localization. These cues are readily available in most facilities and can be detected using RGB camera images by utilizing text spotting. We integrate these cues into a Monte Carlo localization framework using a particle filter that operates on 2D LiDAR scans and camera data. By this, we provide a robust localization solution for environments with structural changes and dynamics by humans walking. We evaluate our localization framework on multiple challenging indoor scenarios in an office environment. The experiments suggest that our approach is robust to structural changes and can run on an onboard computer. We release an open source implementation of our approach (upon paper acceptance), which uses off-the-shelf text spotting, written in C++ with a ROS wrapper.
abstract_zh: 给定地图中的稳健定位是大多数自主机器人的重要组成部分。在本文中，我们解决了在变化的室内环境中进行定位的问题，并且突出的结构在不同时间点构建的地图中没有对应关系。为了克服此类变化引起的地图与观察环境之间的差异，我们利用人类可读的定位线索来协助定位。这些提示在大多数设施中都很容易获得，并且可以通过利用文本定位使用 RGB 相机图像来检测。我们使用对 2D LiDAR 扫描和相机数据进行操作的粒子滤波器将这些线索集成到蒙特卡罗定位框架中。通过这种方式，我们为具有结构变化和人类行走动态的环境提供了强大的定位解决方案。我们在办公环境中多个具有挑战性的室内场景中评估我们的定位框架。实验表明，我们的方法对结构变化具有鲁棒性，并且可以在机载计算机上运行。我们发布了我们的方法的开源实现（在论文接受后），它使用现成的文本识别，用 C++ 和 ROS 包装器编写。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用文本识别技术实现动态室内环境中鲁棒的自主定位方法。
AI.motivation: 传统定位方法在环境结构变化或地图与现实不匹配时性能下降，需寻找不受环境变化影响的定位线索。
AI.method: 结合2D LiDAR扫描与RGB相机数据，通过文本检测技术提取可读文本作为定位线索，并集成至蒙特卡洛定位框架中的粒子滤波器。
AI.result: 在多个复杂室内场景测试显示方法对结构变化和人员动态具有鲁棒性，且可在 onboard 计算机上实时运行。
AI.conclusion: 文本线索有效提升了动态环境下的定位可靠性，为自主机器人提供了实用的定位解决方案。

authors_text: Shawn G. Rosofsky,Hani Al Majed,E. A. Huerta
title: Applications of physics informed neural operators
title_zh: 物理知识神经算子的应用
abstract: We present an end-to-end framework to learn partial differential equations that brings together initial data production, selection of boundary conditions, and the use of physics-informed neural operators to solve partial differential equations that are ubiquitous in the study and modeling of physics phenomena. We first demonstrate that our methods reproduce the accuracy and performance of other neural operators published elsewhere in the literature to learn the 1D wave equation and the 1D Burgers equation. Thereafter, we apply our physics-informed neural operators to learn new types of equations, including the 2D Burgers equation in the scalar, inviscid and vector types. Finally, we show that our approach is also applicable to learn the physics of the 2D linear and nonlinear shallow water equations, which involve three coupled partial differential equations. We release our artificial intelligence surrogates and scientific software to produce initial data and boundary conditions to study a broad range of physically motivated scenarios. We provide the source code, an interactive website to visualize the predictions of our physics informed neural operators, and a tutorial for their use at the Data and Learning Hub for Science.
summary: We present an end-to-end framework to learn partial differential equations that brings together initial data production, selection of boundary conditions, and the use of physics-informed neural operators to solve partial differential equations that are ubiquitous in the study and modeling of physics phenomena. We first demonstrate that our methods reproduce the accuracy and performance of other neural operators published elsewhere in the literature to learn the 1D wave equation and the 1D Burgers equation. Thereafter, we apply our physics-informed neural operators to learn new types of equations, including the 2D Burgers equation in the scalar, inviscid and vector types. Finally, we show that our approach is also applicable to learn the physics of the 2D linear and nonlinear shallow water equations, which involve three coupled partial differential equations. We release our artificial intelligence surrogates and scientific software to produce initial data and boundary conditions to study a broad range of physically motivated scenarios. We provide the source code, an interactive website to visualize the predictions of our physics informed neural operators, and a tutorial for their use at the Data and Learning Hub for Science.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个学习偏微分方程的端到端框架，该框架汇集了初始数据生成、边界条件的选择以及使用物理信息神经算子来求解在物理现象的研究和建模中普遍存在的偏微分方程。我们首先证明我们的方法重现了文献中其他地方发布的其他神经算子的准确性和性能，以学习一维波动方程和一维伯格斯方程。此后，我们应用基于物理的神经算子来学习新类型的方程，包括标量、无粘性和矢量类型的 2D Burgers 方程。最后，我们表明我们的方法也适用于学习二维线性和非线性浅水方程的物理学，其中涉及三个耦合偏微分方程。我们发布人工智能替代品和科学软件来生成初始数据和边界条件，以研究各种物理动机场景。我们提供源代码、一个交互式网站，用于可视化基于物理的神经算子的预测，以及在科学数据和学习中心使用它们的教程。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种端到端框架，结合物理信息神经算子学习偏微分方程，应用于多种物理场景。
AI.motivation: 传统数值方法求解复杂物理方程效率低，现有神经算子缺乏对初始条件和边界条件的系统整合，需统一框架提升准确性与适用性。
AI.method: 构建端到端框架，集成初始数据生成、边界条件选择与物理信息神经算子，验证1D/2D波动方程、Burgers方程及浅水方程的求解能力。
AI.result: 方法在1D波方程和Burgers方程上复现文献结果，成功扩展至2D多类型方程及浅水方程，开源工具与可视化平台辅助研究。
AI.conclusion: 框架有效解决多物理场景PDE问题，提供的AI工具与教程促进科学计算与物理建模的结合。
